search_text: Expanding Low-Density Latent Regions for Open-Set Object Detection 扩展低密度潜在区域以进行开放集目标检测 Modern object detectors have achieved impressive progress under the close-set setup. However, open-set object detection (OSOD) remains challenging since objects of unknown categories are often misclassified to existing known classes. In this work, we propose to identify unknown objects by separating high/low-density regions in the latent space, based on the consensus that unknown objects are usually distributed in low-density latent regions. As traditional threshold-based methods only maintain limited low-density regions, which cannot cover all unknown objects, we present a novel Open-set Detector (OpenDet) with expanded low-density regions. To this aim, we equip OpenDet with two learners, Contrastive Feature Learner (CFL) and Unknown Probability Learner (UPL). CFL performs instance-level contrastive learning to encourage compact features of known classes, leaving more low-density regions for unknown classes; UPL optimizes unknown probability based on the uncertainty of predictions, which further divides more low-density regions around the cluster of known classes. Thus, unknown objects in low-density regions can be easily identified with the learned unknown probability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can significantly improve the OSOD performance, e.g., OpenDet reduces the Absolute Open-Set Errors by 25%-35% on six OSOD benchmarks. Code is available at: https://github.com/csuhan/opendet2. 现代物体探测器在近距离设置下取得了令人印象深刻的进步。然而，开放集对象检测（OSOD）仍然具有挑战性，因为未知类别的对象经常被错误分类为现有的已知类别。在这项工作中，基于未知物体通常分布在低密度潜在区域的共识，我们建议通过分离潜在空间中的高/低密度区域来识别未知物体。由于传统的基于阈值的方法仅保留有限的低密度区域，无法覆盖所有未知对象，因此我们提出了一种具有扩展的低密度区域的新型开放集检测器（OpenDet）。为此，我们为 OpenDet 配备了两个学习器：对比特征学习器 (CFL) 和未知概率学习器 (UPL)。 CFL进行实例级对比学习，以鼓励已知类的紧凑特征，为未知类留下更多的低密度区域； UPL根据预测的不确定性优化未知概率，进一步在已知类簇周围划分更多低密度区域。因此，可以利用学习到的未知概率轻松识别低密度区域中的未知物体。大量实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高 OSOD 性能，例如，OpenDet 在六个 OSOD 基准测试上将绝对开集误差降低了 25%-35%。代码位于：https://github.com/csuhan/opendet2。 本文提出一种改进开放集目标检测的方法，通过扩展潜在空间中的低密度区域以更有效地识别未知类别。 Jiaming Han,Yuqiang Ren,Jian Ding,Xingjia Pan,Ke Yan,Gui-Song Xia cs.CV

authors_text: Alessio Burrello,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Matteo Risso,Simone Benatti,Enrico Macii,Luca Benini,Massimo Poncino
title: Q-PPG: Energy-Efficient PPG-based Heart Rate Monitoring on Wearable Devices
title_zh: Q-PPG：可穿戴设备上基于节能 PPG 的心率监测
abstract: Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is increasingly performed in wrist-worn devices using low-cost photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, Motion Artifacts (MAs) caused by movements of the subject's arm affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This is typically addressed coupling the PPG signal with acceleration measurements from an inertial sensor. Unfortunately, most standard approaches of this kind rely on hand-tuned parameters, which impair their generalization capabilities and their applicability to real data in the field. In contrast, methods based on deep learning, despite their better generalization, are considered to be too complex to deploy on wearable devices. In this work, we tackle these limitations, proposing a design space exploration methodology to automatically generate a rich family of deep Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) for HR monitoring, all derived from a single "seed" model. Our flow involves a cascade of two Neural Architecture Search (NAS) tools and a hardware-friendly quantizer, whose combination yields both highly accurate and extremely lightweight models. When tested on the PPG-Dalia dataset, our most accurate model sets a new state-of-the-art in Mean Absolute Error. Furthermore, we deploy our TCNs on an embedded platform featuring a STM32WB55 microcontroller, demonstrating their suitability for real-time execution. Our most accurate quantized network achieves 4.41 Beats Per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE), with an energy consumption of 47.65 mJ and a memory footprint of 412 kB. At the same time, the smallest network that obtains a MAE < 8 BPM, among those generated by our flow, has a memory footprint of 1.9 kB and consumes just 1.79 mJ per inference.
summary: Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is increasingly performed in wrist-worn devices using low-cost photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, Motion Artifacts (MAs) caused by movements of the subject's arm affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This is typically addressed coupling the PPG signal with acceleration measurements from an inertial sensor. Unfortunately, most standard approaches of this kind rely on hand-tuned parameters, which impair their generalization capabilities and their applicability to real data in the field. In contrast, methods based on deep learning, despite their better generalization, are considered to be too complex to deploy on wearable devices. In this work, we tackle these limitations, proposing a design space exploration methodology to automatically generate a rich family of deep Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) for HR monitoring, all derived from a single "seed" model. Our flow involves a cascade of two Neural Architecture Search (NAS) tools and a hardware-friendly quantizer, whose combination yields both highly accurate and extremely lightweight models. When tested on the PPG-Dalia dataset, our most accurate model sets a new state-of-the-art in Mean Absolute Error. Furthermore, we deploy our TCNs on an embedded platform featuring a STM32WB55 microcontroller, demonstrating their suitability for real-time execution. Our most accurate quantized network achieves 4.41 Beats Per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE), with an energy consumption of 47.65 mJ and a memory footprint of 412 kB. At the same time, the smallest network that obtains a MAE < 8 BPM, among those generated by our flow, has a memory footprint of 1.9 kB and consumes just 1.79 mJ per inference.
abstract_zh: 心率 (HR) 监测越来越多地在腕戴式设备中使用低成本光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器进行。然而，由受试者手臂运动引起的运动伪影 (MA) 会影响基于 PPG 的 HR 跟踪的性能。这通常是通过将 PPG 信号与惯性传感器的加速度测量值耦合来解决的。不幸的是，大多数此类标准方法都依赖于手动调整参数，这削弱了它们的泛化能力及其对现场真实数据的适用性。相比之下，基于深度学习的方法尽管具有更好的泛化性，但被认为过于复杂而无法部署在可穿戴设备上。在这项工作中，我们解决了这些限制，提出了一种设计空间探索方法，可以自动生成用于 HR 监控的丰富的深度时间卷积网络 (TCN) 系列，所有这些都源自单个“种子”模型。我们的流程涉及两个神经架构搜索（NAS）工具和一个硬件友好的量化器的级联，它们的组合产生了高精度和极其轻量级的模型。在 PPG-Dalia 数据集上进行测试时，我们最准确的模型在平均绝对误差方面创下了新的最先进水平。此外，我们将 TCN 部署在配备 STM32WB55 微控制器的嵌入式平台上，展示了它们对实时执行的适用性。我们最准确的量化网络的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 达到 4.41 节拍 (BPM)，能耗为 47.65 mJ，内存占用为 412 kB。与此同时，在我们的流程生成的网络中，获得 MAE < 8 BPM 的最小网络的内存占用为 1.9 kB，每次推理仅消耗 1.79 mJ。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-PPG方法，通过深度学习优化可穿戴设备上的PPG信号心率监测，解决运动伪影问题并降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 传统PPG心率监测受运动伪影影响大，依赖手工调参的方法泛化性差，而深度学习模型复杂度高难以部署于资源受限的可穿戴设备。
AI.method: 结合双重神经架构搜索（NAS）工具与硬件友好型量化器，从单一种子模型自动生成轻量级时序卷积网络（TCN）家族，平衡精度与计算资源。
AI.result: 在PPG-Dalia数据集上，最优模型MAE达4.41 BPM，能耗47.65 mJ，内存占用412 kB；最小有效模型内存仅1.9 kB，单次推理能耗1.79 mJ。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化模型生成与量化优化，在保证心率监测精度的同时显著降低计算开销，验证了深度学习模型在可穿戴设备上的实时部署可行性。

search_text: Q-PPG: Energy-Efficient PPG-based Heart Rate Monitoring on Wearable Devices Q-PPG：可穿戴设备上基于节能 PPG 的心率监测 Hearth Rate (HR) monitoring is increasingly performed in wrist-worn devices using low-cost photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors. However, Motion Artifacts (MAs) caused by movements of the subject's arm affect the performance of PPG-based HR tracking. This is typically addressed coupling the PPG signal with acceleration measurements from an inertial sensor. Unfortunately, most standard approaches of this kind rely on hand-tuned parameters, which impair their generalization capabilities and their applicability to real data in the field. In contrast, methods based on deep learning, despite their better generalization, are considered to be too complex to deploy on wearable devices. In this work, we tackle these limitations, proposing a design space exploration methodology to automatically generate a rich family of deep Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) for HR monitoring, all derived from a single "seed" model. Our flow involves a cascade of two Neural Architecture Search (NAS) tools and a hardware-friendly quantizer, whose combination yields both highly accurate and extremely lightweight models. When tested on the PPG-Dalia dataset, our most accurate model sets a new state-of-the-art in Mean Absolute Error. Furthermore, we deploy our TCNs on an embedded platform featuring a STM32WB55 microcontroller, demonstrating their suitability for real-time execution. Our most accurate quantized network achieves 4.41 Beats Per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE), with an energy consumption of 47.65 mJ and a memory footprint of 412 kB. At the same time, the smallest network that obtains a MAE < 8 BPM, among those generated by our flow, has a memory footprint of 1.9 kB and consumes just 1.79 mJ per inference. 心率 (HR) 监测越来越多地在腕戴式设备中使用低成本光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器进行。然而，由受试者手臂运动引起的运动伪影 (MA) 会影响基于 PPG 的 HR 跟踪的性能。这通常是通过将 PPG 信号与惯性传感器的加速度测量值耦合来解决的。不幸的是，大多数此类标准方法都依赖于手动调整参数，这削弱了它们的泛化能力及其对现场真实数据的适用性。相比之下，基于深度学习的方法尽管具有更好的泛化性，但被认为过于复杂而无法部署在可穿戴设备上。在这项工作中，我们解决了这些限制，提出了一种设计空间探索方法，可以自动生成用于 HR 监控的丰富的深度时间卷积网络 (TCN) 系列，所有这些都源自单个“种子”模型。我们的流程涉及两个神经架构搜索（NAS）工具和一个硬件友好的量化器的级联，它们的组合产生了高精度和极其轻量级的模型。在 PPG-Dalia 数据集上进行测试时，我们最准确的模型在平均绝对误差方面创下了新的最先进水平。此外，我们将 TCN 部署在配备 STM32WB55 微控制器的嵌入式平台上，展示了它们对实时执行的适用性。我们最准确的量化网络的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 达到 4.41 节拍 (BPM)，能耗为 47.65 mJ，内存占用为 412 kB。与此同时，在我们的流程生成的网络中，获得 MAE < 8 BPM 的最小网络的内存占用为 1.9 kB，每次推理仅消耗 1.79 mJ。 本文提出Q-PPG方法，通过深度学习优化可穿戴设备上的PPG信号心率监测，解决运动伪影问题并降低能耗。 Alessio Burrello,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Matteo Risso,Simone Benatti,Enrico Macii,Luca Benini,Massimo Poncino eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Apan Dastider,Mingjie Lin
title: Non-Parametric Stochastic Policy Gradient with Strategic Retreat for Non-Stationary Environment
title_zh: 非平稳环境下具有战略撤退的非参数随机政策梯度
abstract: In modern robotics, effectively computing optimal control policies under dynamically varying environments poses substantial challenges to the off-the-shelf parametric policy gradient methods, such as the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic policy gradient (TD3). In this paper, we propose a systematic methodology to dynamically learn a sequence of optimal control policies non-parametrically, while autonomously adapting with the constantly changing environment dynamics. Specifically, our non-parametric kernel-based methodology embeds a policy distribution as the features in a non-decreasing Euclidean space, therefore allowing its search space to be defined as a very high (possible infinite) dimensional RKHS (Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space). Moreover, by leveraging the similarity metric computed in RKHS, we augmented our non-parametric learning with the technique of AdaptiveH- adaptively selecting a time-frame window of finishing the optimal part of whole action-sequence sampled on some preceding observed state. To validate our proposed approach, we conducted extensive experiments with multiple classic benchmarks and one simulated robotics benchmark equipped with dynamically changing environments. Overall, our methodology has outperformed the well-established DDPG and TD3 methodology by a sizeable margin in terms of learning performance.
summary: In modern robotics, effectively computing optimal control policies under dynamically varying environments poses substantial challenges to the off-the-shelf parametric policy gradient methods, such as the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic policy gradient (TD3). In this paper, we propose a systematic methodology to dynamically learn a sequence of optimal control policies non-parametrically, while autonomously adapting with the constantly changing environment dynamics. Specifically, our non-parametric kernel-based methodology embeds a policy distribution as the features in a non-decreasing Euclidean space, therefore allowing its search space to be defined as a very high (possible infinite) dimensional RKHS (Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space). Moreover, by leveraging the similarity metric computed in RKHS, we augmented our non-parametric learning with the technique of AdaptiveH- adaptively selecting a time-frame window of finishing the optimal part of whole action-sequence sampled on some preceding observed state. To validate our proposed approach, we conducted extensive experiments with multiple classic benchmarks and one simulated robotics benchmark equipped with dynamically changing environments. Overall, our methodology has outperformed the well-established DDPG and TD3 methodology by a sizeable margin in terms of learning performance.
abstract_zh: 在现代机器人技术中，在动态变化的环境下有效计算最优控制策略对现成的参数策略梯度方法提出了巨大的挑战，例如深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）。在本文中，我们提出了一种系统方法来动态学习一系列非参数最优控制策略，同时自主适应不断变化的环境动态。具体来说，我们的非参数基于内核的方法将策略分布作为特征嵌入到非递减欧几里得空间中，因此允许其搜索空间被定义为非常高（可能无限）维的 RKHS（再现内核希尔伯特空间）。此外，通过利用 RKHS 中计算的相似性度量，我们通过 AdaptiveH 技术增强了非参数学习——自适应地选择完成在某些先前观察到的状态上采样的整个动作序列的最佳部分的时间帧窗口。为了验证我们提出的方法，我们使用多个经典基准和一个配备动态变化环境的模拟机器人基准进行了广泛的实验。总体而言，我们的方法在学习绩效方面明显优于成熟的 DDPG 和 TD3 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非参数随机策略梯度方法，用于在非平稳环境中动态学习最优控制策略。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化策略梯度方法（如DDPG、TD3）在动态变化的环境中表现不足，需开发能自主适应环境变化的非参数方法。
AI.method: 基于非参数核方法，将策略分布嵌入非降欧几里得空间的高维再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS），并结合自适应时间窗口选择技术（AdaptiveH）优化策略学习。
AI.result: 在多个经典基准和模拟机器人基准测试中，该方法在学习性能上显著优于DDPG和TD3。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非参数方法有效解决了非平稳环境下的策略优化问题，为动态环境中的机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Evgeniy Martyushev,Jana Vrablikova,Tomas Pajdla
title: Optimizing Elimination Templates by Greedy Parameter Search
title_zh: 通过贪心参数搜索优化消除模板
abstract: We propose a new method for constructing elimination templates for efficient polynomial system solving of minimal problems in structure from motion, image matching, and camera tracking. We first construct a particular affine parameterization of the elimination templates for systems with a finite number of distinct solutions. Then, we use a heuristic greedy optimization strategy over the space of parameters to get a template with a small size. We test our method on 34 minimal problems in computer vision. For all of them, we found the templates either of the same or smaller size compared to the state-of-the-art. For some difficult examples, our templates are, e.g., 2.1, 2.5, 3.8, 6.6 times smaller. For the problem of refractive absolute pose estimation with unknown focal length, we have found a template that is 20 times smaller. Our experiments on synthetic data also show that the new solvers are fast and numerically accurate. We also present a fast and numerically accurate solver for the problem of relative pose estimation with unknown common focal length and radial distortion.
summary: We propose a new method for constructing elimination templates for efficient polynomial system solving of minimal problems in structure from motion, image matching, and camera tracking. We first construct a particular affine parameterization of the elimination templates for systems with a finite number of distinct solutions. Then, we use a heuristic greedy optimization strategy over the space of parameters to get a template with a small size. We test our method on 34 minimal problems in computer vision. For all of them, we found the templates either of the same or smaller size compared to the state-of-the-art. For some difficult examples, our templates are, e.g., 2.1, 2.5, 3.8, 6.6 times smaller. For the problem of refractive absolute pose estimation with unknown focal length, we have found a template that is 20 times smaller. Our experiments on synthetic data also show that the new solvers are fast and numerically accurate. We also present a fast and numerically accurate solver for the problem of relative pose estimation with unknown common focal length and radial distortion.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种构建消除模板的新方法，用于有效解决运动、图像匹配和相机跟踪结构中的最小问题的多项式系统。我们首先为具有有限数量不同解的系统构建消除模板的特定仿射参数化。然后，我们在参数空间上使用启发式贪婪优化策略来获得小尺寸的模板。我们在计算机视觉中的 34 个最小问题上测试了我们的方法。对于所有这些模板，我们发现与最先进的模板相比尺寸相同或更小。对于一些困难的示例，我们的模板要小 2.1、2.5、3.8、6.6 倍等。对于焦距未知的屈光绝对位姿估计问题，我们找到了一个小20倍的模板。我们对合成数据的实验还表明，新的求解器速度快且数值准确。我们还提出了一种快速且数值精确的求解器，用于解决具有未知公共焦距和径向畸变的相对姿态估计问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过贪婪参数搜索优化消除模板的方法，用于高效求解计算机视觉中的多项式系统问题。
AI.motivation: 现有消除模板在求解结构从运动、图像匹配等计算机视觉问题时存在模板规模大、效率低的问题，需改进方法以提升求解效率。
AI.method: 通过构造有限解系统的仿射参数化消除模板，并采用启发式贪婪优化策略缩小模板规模，结合合成数据验证新求解器的效率与数值稳定性。
AI.result: 在34个计算机视觉基准问题中，模板规模优于或等于现有方法，部分案例缩小2.1至20倍；新求解器在速度和数值精度上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效优化了消除模板规模，提升了多项式系统求解效率，为未知焦距和径向畸变的相对位姿估计提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Lang Huang,Shan You,Mingkai Zheng,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Toshihiko Yamasaki
title: Learning Where to Learn in Cross-View Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 学习跨视图自我监督学习在哪里学习
comment: To appear at CVPR'2022. 13 pages, 5 figures, and 9 tables
comments: To appear at CVPR'2022. 13 pages, 5 figures, and 9 tables
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has made enormous progress and largely narrowed the gap with the supervised ones, where the representation learning is mainly guided by a projection into an embedding space. During the projection, current methods simply adopt uniform aggregation of pixels for embedding; however, this risks involving object-irrelevant nuisances and spatial misalignment for different augmentations. In this paper, we present a new approach, Learning Where to Learn (LEWEL), to adaptively aggregate spatial information of features, so that the projected embeddings could be exactly aligned and thus guide the feature learning better. Concretely, we reinterpret the projection head in SSL as a per-pixel projection and predict a set of spatial alignment maps from the original features by this weight-sharing projection head. A spectrum of aligned embeddings is thus obtained by aggregating the features with spatial weighting according to these alignment maps. As a result of this adaptive alignment, we observe substantial improvements on both image-level prediction and dense prediction at the same time: LEWEL improves MoCov2 by 1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4% points, improves BYOL by 1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6% points, on ImageNet linear/semi-supervised classification, Pascal VOC semantic segmentation, and object detection, respectively.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has made enormous progress and largely narrowed the gap with the supervised ones, where the representation learning is mainly guided by a projection into an embedding space. During the projection, current methods simply adopt uniform aggregation of pixels for embedding; however, this risks involving object-irrelevant nuisances and spatial misalignment for different augmentations. In this paper, we present a new approach, Learning Where to Learn (LEWEL), to adaptively aggregate spatial information of features, so that the projected embeddings could be exactly aligned and thus guide the feature learning better. Concretely, we reinterpret the projection head in SSL as a per-pixel projection and predict a set of spatial alignment maps from the original features by this weight-sharing projection head. A spectrum of aligned embeddings is thus obtained by aggregating the features with spatial weighting according to these alignment maps. As a result of this adaptive alignment, we observe substantial improvements on both image-level prediction and dense prediction at the same time: LEWEL improves MoCov2 by 1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4% points, improves BYOL by 1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6% points, on ImageNet linear/semi-supervised classification, Pascal VOC semantic segmentation, and object detection, respectively.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）取得了巨大的进步，并在很大程度上缩小了与监督学习的差距，监督学习的表示学习主要通过嵌入空间的投影来引导。目前的方法在投影过程中简单地采用像素的均匀聚合进行嵌入；然而，这存在涉及与对象无关的麻烦和不同增强的空间错位的风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，即学习在哪里学习（LEWEL），以自适应地聚合特征的空间信息，以便投影的嵌入可以精确对齐，从而更好地指导特征学习。具体来说，我们将 SSL 中的投影头重新解释为每像素投影，并通过该权重共享投影头根据原始特征预测一组空间对齐图。因此，通过根据这些对齐图以空间权重聚合特征来获得对齐嵌入的频谱。由于这种自适应对齐，我们同时观察到图像级预测和密集预测的显着改进：LEWEL 在 ImageNet 线性/半监督分类、Pascal VOC 语义分割和对象检测上分别将 MoCov2 提高了 1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4% 点，将 BYOL 提高了 1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6% 点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LEWEL的新方法，通过自适应聚合空间信息来改进跨视图自监督学习中的特征对齐，从而提升模型在图像分类和密集预测任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在投影过程中采用均匀像素聚合，可能导致引入与目标无关的干扰信息及不同增强间的空间对齐问题，影响特征学习效果。
AI.method: 将SSL的投影头重新解释为逐像素投影，通过共享权重的投影头预测空间对齐图，根据这些对齐图加权聚合特征，生成对齐的嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在ImageNet线性/半监督分类、Pascal VOC语义分割和目标检测任务中，LEWEL分别使MoCov2和BYOL的性能提升1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4%和1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6%。
AI.conclusion: LEWEL通过自适应空间对齐机制有效解决了跨视图特征对齐问题，在多种任务中均取得显著性能提升，为自监督学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Where to Learn in Cross-View Self-Supervised Learning 学习跨视图自我监督学习在哪里学习 Self-supervised learning (SSL) has made enormous progress and largely narrowed the gap with the supervised ones, where the representation learning is mainly guided by a projection into an embedding space. During the projection, current methods simply adopt uniform aggregation of pixels for embedding; however, this risks involving object-irrelevant nuisances and spatial misalignment for different augmentations. In this paper, we present a new approach, Learning Where to Learn (LEWEL), to adaptively aggregate spatial information of features, so that the projected embeddings could be exactly aligned and thus guide the feature learning better. Concretely, we reinterpret the projection head in SSL as a per-pixel projection and predict a set of spatial alignment maps from the original features by this weight-sharing projection head. A spectrum of aligned embeddings is thus obtained by aggregating the features with spatial weighting according to these alignment maps. As a result of this adaptive alignment, we observe substantial improvements on both image-level prediction and dense prediction at the same time: LEWEL improves MoCov2 by 1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4% points, improves BYOL by 1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6% points, on ImageNet linear/semi-supervised classification, Pascal VOC semantic segmentation, and object detection, respectively. 自监督学习（SSL）取得了巨大的进步，并在很大程度上缩小了与监督学习的差距，监督学习的表示学习主要通过嵌入空间的投影来引导。目前的方法在投影过程中简单地采用像素的均匀聚合进行嵌入；然而，这存在涉及与对象无关的麻烦和不同增强的空间错位的风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，即学习在哪里学习（LEWEL），以自适应地聚合特征的空间信息，以便投影的嵌入可以精确对齐，从而更好地指导特征学习。具体来说，我们将 SSL 中的投影头重新解释为每像素投影，并通过该权重共享投影头根据原始特征预测一组空间对齐图。因此，通过根据这些对齐图以空间权重聚合特征来获得对齐嵌入的频谱。由于这种自适应对齐，我们同时观察到图像级预测和密集预测的显着改进：LEWEL 在 ImageNet 线性/半监督分类、Pascal VOC 语义分割和对象检测上分别将 MoCov2 提高了 1.6%/1.3%/0.5%/0.4% 点，将 BYOL 提高了 1.3%/1.3%/0.7%/0.6% 点。 本文提出了一种名为LEWEL的新方法，通过自适应聚合空间信息来改进跨视图自监督学习中的特征对齐，从而提升模型在图像分类和密集预测任务中的表现。 Lang Huang,Shan You,Mingkai Zheng,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Toshihiko Yamasaki cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Simon Vandenhende
title: Multi-Task Learning for Visual Scene Understanding
title_zh: 视觉场景理解的多任务学习
abstract: Despite the recent progress in deep learning, most approaches still go for a silo-like solution, focusing on learning each task in isolation: training a separate neural network for each individual task. Many real-world problems, however, call for a multi-modal approach and, therefore, for multi-tasking models. Multi-task learning (MTL) aims to leverage useful information across tasks to improve the generalization capability of a model. This thesis is concerned with multi-task learning in the context of computer vision. First, we review existing approaches for MTL. Next, we propose several methods that tackle important aspects of multi-task learning. The proposed methods are evaluated on various benchmarks. The results show several advances in the state-of-the-art of multi-task learning. Finally, we discuss several possibilities for future work.
summary: Despite the recent progress in deep learning, most approaches still go for a silo-like solution, focusing on learning each task in isolation: training a separate neural network for each individual task. Many real-world problems, however, call for a multi-modal approach and, therefore, for multi-tasking models. Multi-task learning (MTL) aims to leverage useful information across tasks to improve the generalization capability of a model. This thesis is concerned with multi-task learning in the context of computer vision. First, we review existing approaches for MTL. Next, we propose several methods that tackle important aspects of multi-task learning. The proposed methods are evaluated on various benchmarks. The results show several advances in the state-of-the-art of multi-task learning. Finally, we discuss several possibilities for future work.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习最近取得了进展，但大多数方法仍然采用类似筒仓的解决方案，专注于孤立地学习每个任务：为每个单独的任务训练一个单独的神经网络。然而，许多现实世界的问题需要多模式方法，因此需要多任务模型。多任务学习（MTL）旨在利用跨任务的有用信息来提高模型的泛化能力。本论文关注计算机视觉背景下的多任务学习。首先，我们回顾现有的 MTL 方法。接下来，我们提出了几种解决多任务学习重要方面的方法。所提出的方法在各种基准上进行评估。结果显示了多任务学习最先进的技术取得了一些进展。最后，我们讨论了未来工作的几种可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多任务学习在计算机视觉中的应用，旨在通过跨任务信息共享提升视觉场景理解的模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法多采用孤立任务训练模式，难以应对现实场景中多模态、多任务协同的需求。
AI.method: 系统综述现有MTL方法，并提出针对任务关联性建模、特征共享机制优化等关键问题的改进算法。
AI.result: 在多个视觉任务基准测试中取得优于现有方法的性能，验证了所提方法在多任务学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习能显著提升模型泛化能力，未来需探索更动态的任务关联建模与跨模态知识迁移方法。

authors_text: Amitabh Priyadarshi,Krzysztof J. Kochut
title: WawPart: Workload-Aware Partitioning of Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: WawPart：知识图的工作负载感知分区
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, Springer International Publishing, in Advances and Trends in Artificial Intelligence. Artificial Intelligence Practices, pp. 383-395
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, Springer International Publishing, in Advances and Trends in Artificial Intelligence. Artificial Intelligence Practices, pp. 383-395
abstract: Large-scale datasets in the form of knowledge graphs are often used in numerous domains, today. A knowledge graphs size often exceeds the capacity of a single computer system, especially if the graph must be stored in main memory. To overcome this, knowledge graphs can be partitioned into multiple sub-graphs and distributed as shards among many computing nodes. However, performance of many common tasks performed on graphs, such as querying, suffers, as a result. This is due to distributed joins mandated by graph edges crossing (cutting) the partitions. In this paper, we propose a method of knowledge graph partitioning that takes into account a set of queries (workload). The resulting partitioning aims to reduces the number of distributed joins and improve the workload performance. Critical features identified in the query workload and the knowledge graph are used to cluster the queries and then partition the graph. Queries are rewritten to account for the graph partitioning. Our evaluation results demonstrate the performance improvement in workload processing time.
summary: Large-scale datasets in the form of knowledge graphs are often used in numerous domains, today. A knowledge graphs size often exceeds the capacity of a single computer system, especially if the graph must be stored in main memory. To overcome this, knowledge graphs can be partitioned into multiple sub-graphs and distributed as shards among many computing nodes. However, performance of many common tasks performed on graphs, such as querying, suffers, as a result. This is due to distributed joins mandated by graph edges crossing (cutting) the partitions. In this paper, we propose a method of knowledge graph partitioning that takes into account a set of queries (workload). The resulting partitioning aims to reduces the number of distributed joins and improve the workload performance. Critical features identified in the query workload and the knowledge graph are used to cluster the queries and then partition the graph. Queries are rewritten to account for the graph partitioning. Our evaluation results demonstrate the performance improvement in workload processing time.
abstract_zh: 如今，知识图形式的大规模数据集通常用于许多领域。知识图的大小通常超过单个计算机系统的容量，特别是如果知识图必须存储在主存储器中的话。为了克服这个问题，知识图可以划分为多个子图，并作为分片分布在许多计算节点之间。然而，在图上执行的许多常见任务（例如查询）的性能因此受到影响。这是由于交叉（切割）分区的图边强制进行分布式连接。在本文中，我们提出了一种考虑一组查询（工作负载）的知识图划分方法。由此产生的分区旨在减少分布式连接的数量并提高工作负载性能。查询工作负载和知识图中识别的关键特征用于对查询进行聚类，然后对图进行分区。查询被重写以考虑图分区。我们的评估结果证明了工作负载处理时间的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于工作负载的知识图谱分区方法，以减少分布式连接并提高查询性能
AI.motivation: 传统分区方法在处理跨分区边时导致查询性能下降，需要优化分区策略以适应实际查询负载
AI.method: 通过分析查询负载和图结构特征，聚类查询并进行分区，同时重写查询以适应分区后的结构
AI.result: 评估显示该方法在处理工作负载时显著减少了分布式连接，提升了性能
AI.conclusion: 基于工作负载的分区方法能有效减少分布式连接，提升知识图谱查询性能

authors_text: Vasileios Magoulianitis,Yijing Yang,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: HUNIS: High-Performance Unsupervised Nuclei Instance Segmentation
title_zh: HUNIS：高性能无监督核实例分割
abstract: A high-performance unsupervised nuclei instance segmentation (HUNIS) method is proposed in this work. HUNIS consists of two-stage block-wise operations. The first stage includes: 1) adaptive thresholding of pixel intensities, 2) incorporation of nuclei size/shape priors and 3) removal of false positive nuclei instances. Then, HUNIS conducts the second stage segmentation by receiving guidance from the first one. The second stage exploits the segmentation masks obtained in the first stage and leverages color and shape distributions for a more accurate segmentation. The main purpose of the two-stage design is to provide pixel-wise pseudo-labels from the first to the second stage. This self-supervision mechanism is novel and effective. Experimental results on the MoNuSeg dataset show that HUNIS outperforms all other unsupervised methods by a substantial margin. It also has a competitive standing among state-of-the-art supervised methods.
summary: A high-performance unsupervised nuclei instance segmentation (HUNIS) method is proposed in this work. HUNIS consists of two-stage block-wise operations. The first stage includes: 1) adaptive thresholding of pixel intensities, 2) incorporation of nuclei size/shape priors and 3) removal of false positive nuclei instances. Then, HUNIS conducts the second stage segmentation by receiving guidance from the first one. The second stage exploits the segmentation masks obtained in the first stage and leverages color and shape distributions for a more accurate segmentation. The main purpose of the two-stage design is to provide pixel-wise pseudo-labels from the first to the second stage. This self-supervision mechanism is novel and effective. Experimental results on the MoNuSeg dataset show that HUNIS outperforms all other unsupervised methods by a substantial margin. It also has a competitive standing among state-of-the-art supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种高性能无监督核实例分割（HUNIS）方法。 HUNIS 由两阶段的块操作组成。第一阶段包括：1) 像素强度的自适应阈值处理，2) 合并核大小/形状先验，以及 3) 去除假阳性核实例。然后，HUNIS在第一阶段的指导下进行第二阶段的分割。第二阶段利用第一阶段获得的分割掩模，并利用颜色和形状分布来实现更准确的分割。两阶段设计的主要目的是提供从第一阶段到第二阶段的逐像素伪标签。这种自我监督机制新颖、有效。 MoNuSeg 数据集上的实验结果表明，HUNIS 大幅优于所有其他无监督方法。它在最先进的监督方法中也具有竞争地位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的无监督细胞核实例分割方法HUNIS，通过两阶段操作实现高精度分割。
AI.motivation: 细胞核分割需要大量标注数据，而获取标注数据成本高昂，因此需要开发无需标注的无监督方法。
AI.method: HUNIS采用两阶段架构：第一阶段通过自适应阈值、形状先验和假阳性去除生成伪标签；第二阶段利用颜色和形状分布优化分割结果，通过自监督机制提升性能。
AI.result: 在MoNuSeg数据集上，HUNIS显著优于其他无监督方法，并达到最先进的监督方法水平。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段自监督机制有效提升了无监督分割性能，为减少标注依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amitabh Priyadarshi,Krzysztof J. Kochut
title: AWAPart: Adaptive Workload-Aware Partitioning of Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: AWAPart：知识图的自适应工作负载感知分区
comment: 6 pages, 11 figures, SEMAPRO 2021 : The Fifteenth International Conference on Advances in Semantic Processing
comments: 6 pages, 11 figures, SEMAPRO 2021 : The Fifteenth International Conference on Advances in Semantic Processing
abstract: Large-scale knowledge graphs are increasingly common in many domains. Their large sizes often exceed the limits of systems storing the graphs in a centralized data store, especially if placed in main memory. To overcome this, large knowledge graphs need to be partitioned into multiple sub-graphs and placed in nodes in a distributed system. But querying these fragmented sub-graphs poses new challenges, such as increased communication costs, due to distributed joins involving cut edges. To combat these problems, a good partitioning should reduce the edge cuts while considering a given query workload. However, a partitioned graph needs to be continually re-partitioned to accommodate changes in the query workload and maintain a good average processing time. In this paper, an adaptive partitioning method for large-scale knowledge graphs is introduced, which adapts the partitioning in response to changes in the query workload. Our evaluation demonstrates that the performance of processing time for queries is improved after dynamically adapting the partitioning of knowledge graph triples.
summary: Large-scale knowledge graphs are increasingly common in many domains. Their large sizes often exceed the limits of systems storing the graphs in a centralized data store, especially if placed in main memory. To overcome this, large knowledge graphs need to be partitioned into multiple sub-graphs and placed in nodes in a distributed system. But querying these fragmented sub-graphs poses new challenges, such as increased communication costs, due to distributed joins involving cut edges. To combat these problems, a good partitioning should reduce the edge cuts while considering a given query workload. However, a partitioned graph needs to be continually re-partitioned to accommodate changes in the query workload and maintain a good average processing time. In this paper, an adaptive partitioning method for large-scale knowledge graphs is introduced, which adapts the partitioning in response to changes in the query workload. Our evaluation demonstrates that the performance of processing time for queries is improved after dynamically adapting the partitioning of knowledge graph triples.
abstract_zh: 大规模知识图在许多领域越来越普遍。它们的大尺寸通常超出了将图形存储在集中式数据存储中的系统的限制，特别是如果放置在主存储器中的话。为了克服这个问题，需要将大型知识图划分为多个子图并放置在分布式系统中的节点中。但查询这些分散的子图会带来新的挑战，例如由于涉及切边的分布式连接而增加了通信成本。为了解决这些问题，良好的分区应该在考虑给定查询工作负载的同时减少边缘切割。然而，分区图需要不断地重新分区，以适应查询工作负载的变化并保持良好的平均处理时间。本文提出了一种大规模知识图的自适应分区方法，该方法可以根据查询工作负载的变化来调整分区。我们的评估表明，动态调整知识图三元组的分区后，查询处理时间的性能得到了改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适应性工作负载感知的知识图谱分区方法AWAPart，以应对分布式系统中查询工作负载变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 大规模知识图谱在分布式存储时面临碎片化查询导致的高通信成本问题，传统静态分区无法适应动态变化的查询负载。
AI.method: 通过动态调整分区策略，根据查询工作负载变化实时优化知识图谱三元组的分区布局，减少跨节点边切割。
AI.result: 实验表明，动态适应性分区方法显著提升了查询处理时间性能，相比静态分区方法具有更低的通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 适应性分区方法能有效应对知识图谱查询负载的动态变化，为大规模图数据的分布式处理提供了更优解决方案。

Their large sizes often exceed the limits of systems storing the graphs in a centralized data store, especially if placed in main memory. To overcome this, large knowledge graphs need to be partitioned into multiple sub-graphs and placed in nodes in a distributed system. But querying these fragmented sub-graphs poses new challenges, such as increased communication costs, due to distributed joins involving cut edges. To combat these problems, a good partitioning should reduce the edge cuts while considering a given query workload. However, a partitioned graph needs to be continually re-partitioned to accommodate changes in the query workload and maintain a good average processing time. In this paper, an adaptive partitioning method for large-scale knowledge graphs is introduced, which adapts the partitioning in response to changes in the query workload. authors_text: Anja Virkkunen,Aku Rouhe,Nhan Phan,Mikko Kurimo
title: Finnish Parliament ASR corpus - Analysis, benchmarks and statistics
title_zh: 芬兰议会 ASR 语料库 - 分析、基准和统计
comment: Submitted to Language Resources and Evaluation
comments: Submitted to Language Resources and Evaluation
abstract: Public sources like parliament meeting recordings and transcripts provide ever-growing material for the training and evaluation of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this paper, we publish and analyse the Finnish parliament ASR corpus, the largest publicly available collection of manually transcribed speech data for Finnish with over 3000 hours of speech and 449 speakers for which it provides rich demographic metadata. This corpus builds on earlier initial work, and as a result the corpus has a natural split into two training subsets from two periods of time. Similarly, there are two official, corrected test sets covering different times, setting an ASR task with longitudinal distribution-shift characteristics. An official development set is also provided. We develop a complete Kaldi-based data preparation pipeline, and hidden Markov model (HMM), hybrid deep neural network (HMM-DNN) and attention-based encoder-decoder (AED) ASR recipes. We set benchmarks on the official test sets, as well as multiple other recently used test sets. Both temporal corpus subsets are already large, and we observe that beyond their scale, ASR performance on the official test sets plateaus, whereas other domains benefit from added data. The HMM-DNN and AED approaches are compared in a carefully matched equal data setting, with the HMM-DNN system consistently performing better. Finally, the variation of the ASR accuracy is compared between the speaker categories available in the parliament metadata to detect potential biases based on factors such as gender, age, and education.
summary: Public sources like parliament meeting recordings and transcripts provide ever-growing material for the training and evaluation of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this paper, we publish and analyse the Finnish parliament ASR corpus, the largest publicly available collection of manually transcribed speech data for Finnish with over 3000 hours of speech and 449 speakers for which it provides rich demographic metadata. This corpus builds on earlier initial work, and as a result the corpus has a natural split into two training subsets from two periods of time. Similarly, there are two official, corrected test sets covering different times, setting an ASR task with longitudinal distribution-shift characteristics. An official development set is also provided. We develop a complete Kaldi-based data preparation pipeline, and hidden Markov model (HMM), hybrid deep neural network (HMM-DNN) and attention-based encoder-decoder (AED) ASR recipes. We set benchmarks on the official test sets, as well as multiple other recently used test sets. Both temporal corpus subsets are already large, and we observe that beyond their scale, ASR performance on the official test sets plateaus, whereas other domains benefit from added data. The HMM-DNN and AED approaches are compared in a carefully matched equal data setting, with the HMM-DNN system consistently performing better. Finally, the variation of the ASR accuracy is compared between the speaker categories available in the parliament metadata to detect potential biases based on factors such as gender, age, and education.
abstract_zh: 议会会议录音和笔录等公共资源为自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的培训和评估提供了不断增长的材料。在本文中，我们发布并分析了芬兰议会 ASR 语料库，这是最大的公开可用的芬兰语手动转录语音数据集，包含超过 3000 小时的语音和 449 名发言者，并为其提供了丰富的人口统计元数据。该语料库建立在早期的初始工作的基础上，因此该语料库自然分为两个时间段的两个训练子集。同样，官方也有两个覆盖不同时间的修正测试集，设置了具有纵向分布偏移特征的 ASR 任务。还提供了官方开发集。我们开发了一个完整的基于 Kaldi 的数据准备管道、隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM)、混合深度神经网络 (HMM-DNN) 和基于注意力的编码器-解码器 (AED) ASR 配方。我们在官方测试集以及多个其他最近使用的测试集上设置了基准。两个时间语料库子集都已经很大，我们观察到，超出其规模，官方测试集上的 ASR 性能趋于稳定，而其他领域则受益于添加的数据。在仔细匹配的相同数据设置中对 HMM-DNN 和 AED 方法进行比较，HMM-DNN 系统始终表现更好。最后，比较议会元数据中可用的发言者类别之间的 ASR 准确性的变化，以检测基于性别、年龄和教育等因素的潜在偏差。

AI.tldr: 发布并分析芬兰议会ASR语料库，设置基准测试并研究不同模型在长期分布变化下的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 通过公开大规模手动转录的芬兰语语音数据，推动ASR系统研究，并提供具有长期分布偏移特性的测试集以评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建基于Kaldi的预处理流程，实现HMM、HMM-DNN和AED模型，使用官方及多领域测试集进行基准测试，并分析说话人属性对准确率的影响。
AI.result: 官方测试集性能趋于饱和，其他领域数据增益显著；HMM-DNN在同等数据条件下优于AED；性别、年龄等人口统计学因素存在模型偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为芬兰语ASR研究提供重要资源，HMM-DNN在当前设置下表现更优，未来需关注模型偏差缓解与长期分布适应性研究。

search_text: Finnish Parliament ASR corpus - Analysis, benchmarks and statistics 芬兰议会 ASR 语料库 - 分析、基准和统计 Public sources like parliament meeting recordings and transcripts provide ever-growing material for the training and evaluation of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this paper, we publish and analyse the Finnish parliament ASR corpus, the largest publicly available collection of manually transcribed speech data for Finnish with over 3000 hours of speech and 449 speakers for which it provides rich demographic metadata. This corpus builds on earlier initial work, and as a result the corpus has a natural split into two training subsets from two periods of time. Similarly, there are two official, corrected test sets covering different times, setting an ASR task with longitudinal distribution-shift characteristics. An official development set is also provided. We develop a complete Kaldi-based data preparation pipeline, and hidden Markov model (HMM), hybrid deep neural network (HMM-DNN) and attention-based encoder-decoder (AED) ASR recipes. We set benchmarks on the official test sets, as well as multiple other recently used test sets. Both temporal corpus subsets are already large, and we observe that beyond their scale, ASR performance on the official test sets plateaus, whereas other domains benefit from added data. The HMM-DNN and AED approaches are compared in a carefully matched equal data setting, with the HMM-DNN system consistently performing better. Finally, the variation of the ASR accuracy is compared between the speaker categories available in the parliament metadata to detect potential biases based on factors such as gender, age, and education. 议会会议录音和笔录等公共资源为自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的培训和评估提供了不断增长的材料。在本文中，我们发布并分析了芬兰议会 ASR 语料库，这是最大的公开可用的芬兰语手动转录语音数据集，包含超过 3000 小时的语音和 449 名发言者，并为其提供了丰富的人口统计元数据。该语料库建立在早期的初始工作的基础上，因此该语料库自然分为两个时间段的两个训练子集。同样，官方也有两个覆盖不同时间的修正测试集，设置了具有纵向分布偏移特征的 ASR 任务。还提供了官方开发集。我们开发了一个完整的基于 Kaldi 的数据准备管道、隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM)、混合深度神经网络 (HMM-DNN) 和基于注意力的编码器-解码器 (AED) ASR 配方。我们在官方测试集以及多个其他最近使用的测试集上设置了基准。两个时间语料库子集都已经很大，我们观察到，超出其规模，官方测试集上的 ASR 性能趋于稳定，而其他领域则受益于添加的数据。在仔细匹配的相同数据设置中对 HMM-DNN 和 AED 方法进行比较，HMM-DNN 系统始终表现更好。最后，比较议会元数据中可用的发言者类别之间的 ASR 准确性的变化，以检测基于性别、年龄和教育等因素的潜在偏差。 发布并分析芬兰议会ASR语料库，设置基准测试并研究不同模型在长期分布变化下的性能表现。 Anja Virkkunen,Aku Rouhe,Nhan Phan,Mikko Kurimo cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sneha Das,Nicklas Leander Lund,Nicole Nadine Lønfeldt,Anne Katrine Pagsberg,Line H. Clemmensen
title: Continuous Metric Learning For Transferable Speech Emotion Recognition and Embedding Across Low-resource Languages
title_zh: 用于可转移语音情感识别和跨低资源语言嵌入的连续度量学习
comment: Preprint of paper accepted to be presented at the Northern Lights Deep Learning Conference (NLDL), 2022. The labels are available at: https://bit.ly/3rg6VsA
comments: Preprint of paper accepted to be presented at the Northern Lights Deep Learning Conference (NLDL), 2022. The labels are available at: https://bit.ly/3rg6VsA
abstract: Speech emotion recognition~(SER) refers to the technique of inferring the emotional state of an individual from speech signals. SERs continue to garner interest due to their wide applicability. Although the domain is mainly founded on signal processing, machine learning, and deep learning, generalizing over languages continues to remain a challenge. However, developing generalizable and transferable models are critical due to a lack of sufficient resources in terms of data and labels for languages beyond the most commonly spoken ones. To improve performance over languages, we propose a denoising autoencoder with semi-supervision using a continuous metric loss based on either activation or valence. The novelty of this work lies in our proposal of continuous metric learning, which is among the first proposals on the topic to the best of our knowledge. Furthermore, to address the lack of activation and valence labels in the transfer datasets, we annotate the signal samples with activation and valence levels corresponding to a dimensional model of emotions, which were then used to evaluate the quality of the embedding over the transfer datasets. We show that the proposed semi-supervised model consistently outperforms the baseline unsupervised method, which is a conventional denoising autoencoder, in terms of emotion classification accuracy as well as correlation with respect to the dimensional variables. Further evaluation of classification accuracy with respect to the reference, a BERT based speech representation model, shows that the proposed method is comparable to the reference method in classifying specific emotion classes at a much lower complexity.

SERs continue to garner interest due to their wide applicability. Although the domain is mainly founded on signal processing, machine learning, and deep learning, generalizing over languages continues to remain a challenge. However, developing generalizable and transferable models are critical due to a lack of sufficient resources in terms of data and labels for languages beyond the most commonly spoken ones. To improve performance over languages, we propose a denoising autoencoder with semi-supervision using a continuous metric loss based on either activation or valence. The novelty of this work lies in our proposal of continuous metric learning, which is among the first proposals on the topic to the best of our knowledge. Furthermore, to address the lack of activation and valence labels in the transfer datasets, we annotate the signal samples with activation and valence levels corresponding to a dimensional model of emotions, which were then used to evaluate the quality of the embedding over the transfer datasets. We show that the proposed semi-supervised model consistently outperforms the baseline unsupervised method, which is a conventional denoising autoencoder, in terms of emotion classification accuracy as well as correlation with respect to the dimensional variables. Further evaluation of classification accuracy with respect to the reference, a BERT based speech representation model, shows that the proposed method is comparable to the reference method in classifying specific emotion classes at a much lower complexity.
abstract_zh: 语音情绪识别~（SER）是指从语音信号推断个体情绪状态的技术。 SER 由于其广泛的适用性而继续引起人们的兴趣。尽管该领域主要建立在信号处理、机器学习和深度学习的基础上，但语言的泛化仍然是一个挑战。然而，由于最常用语言之外的语言缺乏足够的数据和标签资源，因此开发可推广和可转移的模型至关重要。为了提高语言的性能，我们提出了一种具有半监督功能的去噪自动编码器，使用基于激活或价的连续度量损失。这项工作的新颖性在于我们提出的连续度量学习，据我们所知，这是该主题的第一个提案之一。此外，为了解决传输数据集中缺乏激活和价标签的问题，我们用与情感维度模型相对应的激活和价水平来注释信号样本，然后将其用于评估传输数据集上嵌入的质量。我们表明，在情感分类准确性以及与维度变量的相关性方面，所提出的半监督模型始终优于基线无监督方法（传统的去噪自动编码器）。相对于参考（基于 BERT 的语音表示模型）的分类准确性的进一步评估表明，所提出的方法在以低得多的复杂度对特定情感类别进行分类方面与参考方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续度量学习的半监督去噪自编码器，用于跨低资源语言的可迁移语音情感识别与嵌入。
AI.motivation: 语音情感识别（SER）在多语言场景下面临数据和标签资源不足的挑战，需开发可泛化且可迁移的模型以适应低资源语言。
AI.method: 设计结合连续度量损失（基于激活度或效价）的半监督去噪自编码器，并通过标注激活度和效价标签增强嵌入质量评估。
AI.result: 该模型在情感分类准确率及与维度变量的相关性上优于基线无监督方法，且复杂度显著低于基于BERT的语音表示模型。
AI.conclusion: 连续度量学习与半监督框架有效提升了低资源语言的语音情感识别性能，为跨语言迁移提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Sneha Das,Nicole Nadine Lønfeldt,Anne Katrine Pagsberg,Line H. Clemmensen
title: Towards Transferable Speech Emotion Representation: On loss functions for cross-lingual latent representations
title_zh: 迈向可转移的语音情感表示：跨语言潜在表示的损失函数
comment: Preprint of paper accepted to be presented at the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2022. Source code at https://bit.ly/34CgkSZ. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.02055
comments: Preprint of paper accepted to be presented at the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2022. Source code at https://bit.ly/34CgkSZ. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.02055
abstract: In recent years, speech emotion recognition (SER) has been used in wide ranging applications, from healthcare to the commercial sector. In addition to signal processing approaches, methods for SER now also use deep learning techniques which provide transfer learning possibilities. However, generalizing over languages, corpora and recording conditions is still an open challenge. In this work we address this gap by exploring loss functions that aid in transferability, specifically to non-tonal languages. We propose a variational autoencoder (VAE) with KL annealing and a semi-supervised VAE to obtain more consistent latent embedding distributions across data sets. To ensure transferability, the distribution of the latent embedding should be similar across non-tonal languages (data sets). We start by presenting a low-complexity SER based on a denoising-autoencoder, which achieves an unweighted classification accuracy of over 52.09% for four-class emotion classification. This performance is comparable to that of similar baseline methods. Following this, we employ a VAE, the semi-supervised VAE and the VAE with KL annealing to obtain a more regularized latent space. We show that while the DAE has the highest classification accuracy among the methods, the semi-supervised VAE has a comparable classification accuracy and a more consistent latent embedding distribution over data sets.
summary: In recent years, speech emotion recognition (SER) has been used in wide ranging applications, from healthcare to the commercial sector. In addition to signal processing approaches, methods for SER now also use deep learning techniques which provide transfer learning possibilities. However, generalizing over languages, corpora and recording conditions is still an open challenge. In this work we address this gap by exploring loss functions that aid in transferability, specifically to non-tonal languages. We propose a variational autoencoder (VAE) with KL annealing and a semi-supervised VAE to obtain more consistent latent embedding distributions across data sets. To ensure transferability, the distribution of the latent embedding should be similar across non-tonal languages (data sets). We start by presenting a low-complexity SER based on a denoising-autoencoder, which achieves an unweighted classification accuracy of over 52.09% for four-class emotion classification. This performance is comparable to that of similar baseline methods. Following this, we employ a VAE, the semi-supervised VAE and the VAE with KL annealing to obtain a more regularized latent space. We show that while the DAE has the highest classification accuracy among the methods, the semi-supervised VAE has a comparable classification accuracy and a more consistent latent embedding distribution over data sets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，语音情感识别（SER）已被广泛应用于从医疗保健到商业领域。除了信号处理方法之外，SER 方法现在还使用提供迁移学习可能性的深度学习技术。然而，对语言、语料库和记录条件的概括仍然是一个公开的挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过探索有助于可迁移性的损失函数来解决这一差距，特别是对于非声调语言。我们提出了一种具有 KL 退火和半监督 VAE 的变分自动编码器（VAE），以获得跨数据集更一致的潜在嵌入分布。为了确保可转移性，潜在嵌入的分布在非声调语言（数据集）之间应该是相似的。我们首先提出一种基于去噪自动编码器的低复杂度 SER，它对四类情感分类实现了超过 52.09% 的未加权分类准确率。该性能与类似的基线方法相当。接下来，我们采用 VAE、半监督 VAE 和带有 KL 退火的 VAE 来获得更正则化的潜在空间。我们表明，虽然 DAE 在这些方法中具有最高的分类精度，但半监督 VAE 具有可比的分类精度和数据集上更一致的潜在嵌入分布。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过探索损失函数和变分自编码器（VAE）方法，提升跨语言语音情感表示的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 语音情感识别（SER）在多语言和不同数据集间泛化能力不足，需解决跨语言、跨语料库及录音条件下的表示一致性问题。
AI.method: 提出基于去噪自编码器（DAE）的低复杂度SER模型，并采用VAE、半监督VAE及KL退火技术优化潜在空间分布以增强可迁移性。
AI.result: DAE在四类情感分类中达到52.09%的准确率，半监督VAE虽准确率相近但潜在表示分布更一致。
AI.conclusion: 半监督VAE在跨语言场景下能生成更稳定的潜在表示，为可迁移语音情感建模提供有效方案。

search_text: Towards Transferable Speech Emotion Representation: On loss functions for cross-lingual latent representations 迈向可转移的语音情感表示：跨语言潜在表示的损失函数 In recent years, speech emotion recognition (SER) has been used in wide ranging applications, from healthcare to the commercial sector. In addition to signal processing approaches, methods for SER now also use deep learning techniques which provide transfer learning possibilities. However, generalizing over languages, corpora and recording conditions is still an open challenge. In this work we address this gap by exploring loss functions that aid in transferability, specifically to non-tonal languages. We propose a variational autoencoder (VAE) with KL annealing and a semi-supervised VAE to obtain more consistent latent embedding distributions across data sets. To ensure transferability, the distribution of the latent embedding should be similar across non-tonal languages (data sets). We start by presenting a low-complexity SER based on a denoising-autoencoder, which achieves an unweighted classification accuracy of over 52.09% for four-class emotion classification. This performance is comparable to that of similar baseline methods. Following this, we employ a VAE, the semi-supervised VAE and the VAE with KL annealing to obtain a more regularized latent space. We show that while the DAE has the highest classification accuracy among the methods, the semi-supervised VAE has a comparable classification accuracy and a more consistent latent embedding distribution over data sets. 近年来，语音情感识别（SER）已被广泛应用于从医疗保健到商业领域。除了信号处理方法之外，SER 方法现在还使用提供迁移学习可能性的深度学习技术。然而，对语言、语料库和记录条件的概括仍然是一个公开的挑战。在这项工作中，我们通过探索有助于可迁移性的损失函数来解决这一差距，特别是对于非声调语言。我们提出了一种具有 KL 退火和半监督 VAE 的变分自动编码器（VAE），以获得跨数据集更一致的潜在嵌入分布。为了确保可转移性，潜在嵌入的分布在非声调语言（数据集）之间应该是相似的。我们首先提出一种基于去噪自动编码器的低复杂度 SER，它对四类情感分类实现了超过 52.09% 的未加权分类准确率。该性能与类似的基线方法相当。接下来，我们采用 VAE、半监督 VAE 和带有 KL 退火的 VAE 来获得更正则化的潜在空间。我们表明，虽然 DAE 在这些方法中具有最高的分类精度，但半监督 VAE 具有可比的分类精度和数据集上更一致的潜在嵌入分布。 本文旨在通过探索损失函数和变分自编码器（VAE）方法，提升跨语言语音情感表示的可迁移性。 Sneha Das,Nicole Nadine Lønfeldt,Anne Katrine Pagsberg,Line H. Clemmensen eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: N. R. Aravind,Neeldhara Misra,Harshil Mittal
title: Chess is hard even for a single player
title_zh: 即使对于一个人来说，国际象棋也很难
comment: 22 pages, a slightly shorter version to appear in FUN 2022
comments: 22 pages, a slightly shorter version to appear in FUN 2022
abstract: We introduce a generalization of "Solo Chess", a single-player variant of the game that can be played on chess.com. The standard version of the game is played on a regular 8 x 8 chessboard by a single player, with only white pieces, using the following rules: every move must capture a piece, no piece may capture more than 2 times, and if there is a King on the board, it must be the final piece. The goal is to clear the board, i.e, make a sequence of captures after which only one piece is left. We generalize this game to unbounded boards with $n$ pieces, each of which have a given number of captures that they are permitted to make. We show that Generalized Solo Chess is NP-complete, even when it is played by only rooks that have at most two captures remaining. It also turns out to be NP-complete even when every piece is a queen with exactly two captures remaining in the initial configuration. In contrast, we show that solvable instances of Generalized Solo Chess can be completely characterized when the game is: a) played by rooks on a one-dimensional board, and b) played by pawns with two captures left on a 2D board. Inspired by Generalized Solo Chess, we also introduce the Graph Capture Game, which involves clearing a graph of tokens via captures along edges. This game subsumes Generalized Solo Chess played by knights. We show that the Graph Capture Game is NP-complete for undirected graphs and DAGs.
summary: We introduce a generalization of "Solo Chess", a single-player variant of the game that can be played on chess.com. The standard version of the game is played on a regular 8 x 8 chessboard by a single player, with only white pieces, using the following rules: every move must capture a piece, no piece may capture more than 2 times, and if there is a King on the board, it must be the final piece. The goal is to clear the board, i.e, make a sequence of captures after which only one piece is left. We generalize this game to unbounded boards with $n$ pieces, each of which have a given number of captures that they are permitted to make. We show that Generalized Solo Chess is NP-complete, even when it is played by only rooks that have at most two captures remaining. It also turns out to be NP-complete even when every piece is a queen with exactly two captures remaining in the initial configuration. In contrast, we show that solvable instances of Generalized Solo Chess can be completely characterized when the game is: a) played by rooks on a one-dimensional board, and b) played by pawns with two captures left on a 2D board. Inspired by Generalized Solo Chess, we also introduce the Graph Capture Game, which involves clearing a graph of tokens via captures along edges. This game subsumes Generalized Solo Chess played by knights. We show that the Graph Capture Game is NP-complete for undirected graphs and DAGs.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了“Solo Chess”的概括，这是一种可以在 chess.com 上玩的单人游戏变体。该游戏的标准版本由单人在常规的 8 x 8 棋盘上进行，只有白子，使用以下规则：每一步必须吃掉一个棋子，任何棋子不能吃掉超过 2 次，如果棋盘上有一个 K，则它必须是最后的棋子。目标是清除棋盘，即进行一系列捕获，然后只剩下一个棋子。我们将这个游戏推广到具有 $n$ 个棋子的无界棋盘，每个棋盘都有允许进行的给定数量的捕获。我们证明了广义独奏国际象棋是 NP 完全的，即使它仅由最多剩下两次吃子的车来玩。即使每个棋子都是皇后并且初始配置中仅保留两个捕获，它也被证明是 NP 完全的。相比之下，我们表明，当游戏满足以下条件时，广义单人国际象棋的可解实例可以被完全表征：a）由车在一维棋盘上玩，b）由棋子在二维棋盘上留下两个吃子玩。受广义独奏国际象棋的启发，我们还引入了图形捕获游戏，其中涉及通过沿边缘捕获来清除令牌图。该游戏包含骑士玩的广义单人象棋。我们证明了图捕获游戏对于无向图和 DAG 来说是 NP 完全的。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了单人棋类游戏'广义Solo Chess'的计算复杂性，并探讨了其NP完全性。
AI.motivation: 通过将单人棋类游戏推广到无限棋盘和不同棋子规则，分析其计算难度，验证此类游戏是否属于NP完全问题。
AI.method: 通过规则泛化、构造性证明和归约方法，结合图论中的捕获游戏模型，分析不同棋子类型和棋盘条件下的复杂性。
AI.result: 证明了广义Solo Chess在特定条件下（如最多两次捕获的车或双次捕获的后）为NP完全问题，并刻画了部分可解情形；图捕获游戏在无向图和DAG中也具有NP完全性。
AI.conclusion: 单人棋类游戏在通用规则下具有高计算复杂性，但受限条件可实现求解；图捕获游戏模型扩展了棋类复杂性分析的理论边界。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Xiang,Jon Morton,Fitsum A Reda,Lucas Young,Federico Perazzi,Rakesh Ranjan,Amit Kumar,Andrea Colaco,Jan Allebach
title: HIME: Efficient Headshot Image Super-Resolution with Multiple Exemplars
title_zh: HIME：具有多个示例的高效头像图像超分辨率
abstract: A promising direction for recovering the lost information in low-resolution headshot images is utilizing a set of high-resolution exemplars from the same identity. Complementary images in the reference set can improve the generated headshot quality across many different views and poses. However, it is challenging to make the best use of multiple exemplars: the quality and alignment of each exemplar cannot be guaranteed. Using low-quality and mismatched images as references will impair the output results. To overcome these issues, we propose an efficient Headshot Image Super-Resolution with Multiple Exemplars network (HIME) method. Compared with previous methods, our network can effectively handle the misalignment between the input and the reference without requiring facial priors and learn the aggregated reference set representation in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, to reconstruct more detailed facial features, we propose a correlation loss that provides a rich representation of the local texture in a controllable spatial range. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework not only has significantly fewer computation cost than recent exemplar-guided methods but also achieves better qualitative and quantitative performance.
summary: A promising direction for recovering the lost information in low-resolution headshot images is utilizing a set of high-resolution exemplars from the same identity. Complementary images in the reference set can improve the generated headshot quality across many different views and poses. However, it is challenging to make the best use of multiple exemplars: the quality and alignment of each exemplar cannot be guaranteed. Using low-quality and mismatched images as references will impair the output results. To overcome these issues, we propose an efficient Headshot Image Super-Resolution with Multiple Exemplars network (HIME) method. Compared with previous methods, our network can effectively handle the misalignment between the input and the reference without requiring facial priors and learn the aggregated reference set representation in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, to reconstruct more detailed facial features, we propose a correlation loss that provides a rich representation of the local texture in a controllable spatial range. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework not only has significantly fewer computation cost than recent exemplar-guided methods but also achieves better qualitative and quantitative performance.
abstract_zh: 恢复低分辨率头像图像中丢失的信息的一个有希望的方向是利用来自同一身份的一组高分辨率样本。参考集中的互补图像可以提高在许多不同视图和姿势下生成的爆头质量。然而，充分利用多个样本是具有挑战性的：无法保证每个样本的质量和对齐。使用低质量和不匹配的图像作为参考会损害输出结果。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种高效的头像图像超分辨率多样本网络（HIME）方法。与以前的方法相比，我们的网络可以有效地处理输入和参考之间的错位，而不需要面部先验，并以端到端的方式学习聚合的参考集表示。此外，为了重建更详细的面部特征，我们提出了一种相关损失，可以在可控空间范围内提供丰富的局部纹理表示。实验结果表明，所提出的框架不仅比最近的示例引导方法具有更少的计算成本，而且还实现了更好的定性和定量性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用多个高分辨率参考图像进行低分辨率人脸图像超分辨率重建的方法HIME。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多参考图像时面临对齐困难和参考图像质量参差不齐的问题，导致重建效果受限。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络HIME，无需人脸先验知识即可处理输入与参考图像的错位，并引入相关性损失函数增强局部纹理细节学习。
AI.result: 实验表明HIME在计算成本和重建质量上均优于现有方法，实现了更优的定性和定量性能。
AI.conclusion: HIME通过有效整合多参考图像信息，解决了人脸超分辨率重建中的关键挑战，具有更高的效率和精度。

search_text: HIME: Efficient Headshot Image Super-Resolution with Multiple Exemplars HIME：具有多个示例的高效头像图像超分辨率 A promising direction for recovering the lost information in low-resolution headshot images is utilizing a set of high-resolution exemplars from the same identity. Complementary images in the reference set can improve the generated headshot quality across many different views and poses. However, it is challenging to make the best use of multiple exemplars: the quality and alignment of each exemplar cannot be guaranteed. Using low-quality and mismatched images as references will impair the output results. To overcome these issues, we propose an efficient Headshot Image Super-Resolution with Multiple Exemplars network (HIME) method. Compared with previous methods, our network can effectively handle the misalignment between the input and the reference without requiring facial priors and learn the aggregated reference set representation in an end-to-end manner. Furthermore, to reconstruct more detailed facial features, we propose a correlation loss that provides a rich representation of the local texture in a controllable spatial range. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework not only has significantly fewer computation cost than recent exemplar-guided methods but also achieves better qualitative and quantitative performance. 恢复低分辨率头像图像中丢失的信息的一个有希望的方向是利用来自同一身份的一组高分辨率样本。参考集中的互补图像可以提高在许多不同视图和姿势下生成的爆头质量。然而，充分利用多个样本是具有挑战性的：无法保证每个样本的质量和对齐。使用低质量和不匹配的图像作为参考会损害输出结果。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种高效的头像图像超分辨率多样本网络（HIME）方法。与以前的方法相比，我们的网络可以有效地处理输入和参考之间的错位，而不需要面部先验，并以端到端的方式学习聚合的参考集表示。此外，为了重建更详细的面部特征，我们提出了一种相关损失，可以在可控空间范围内提供丰富的局部纹理表示。实验结果表明，所提出的框架不仅比最近的示例引导方法具有更少的计算成本，而且还实现了更好的定性和定量性能。 本文提出了一种利用多个高分辨率参考图像进行低分辨率人脸图像超分辨率重建的方法HIME。 Xiaoyu Xiang,Jon Morton,Fitsum A Reda,Lucas Young,Federico Perazzi,Rakesh Ranjan,Amit Kumar,Andrea Colaco,Jan Allebach cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Haitong Tang,Shuang He,Lingbin Bian,Zhiming Cui,Nizhuan Wang
title: WSEBP: A Novel Width-depth Synchronous Extension-based Basis Pursuit Algorithm for Multi-Layer Convolutional Sparse Coding
title_zh: WSEBP：一种新颖的基于宽深同步扩展的多层卷积稀疏编码基追踪算法
abstract: The pursuit algorithms integrated in multi-layer convolutional sparse coding (ML-CSC) can interpret the convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, many current state-of-art (SOTA) pursuit algorithms require multiple iterations to optimize the solution of ML-CSC, which limits their applications to deeper CNNs due to high computational cost and large number of resources for getting very tiny gain of performance. In this study, we focus on the 0th iteration in pursuit algorithm by introducing an effective initialization strategy for each layer, by which the solution for ML-CSC can be improved. Specifically, we first propose a novel width-depth synchronous extension-based basis pursuit (WSEBP) algorithm which solves the ML-CSC problem without the limitation of the number of iterations compared to the SOTA algorithms and maximizes the performance by an effective initialization in each layer. Then, we propose a simple and unified ML-CSC-based classification network (ML-CSC-Net) which consists of an ML-CSC-based feature encoder and a fully-connected layer to validate the performance of WSEBP on image classification task. The experimental results show that our proposed WSEBP outperforms SOTA algorithms in terms of accuracy and consumption resources. In addition, the WSEBP integrated in CNNs can improve the performance of deeper CNNs and make them interpretable. Finally, taking VGG as an example, we propose WSEBP-VGG13 to enhance the performance of VGG13, which achieves competitive results on four public datasets, i.e., 87.79% vs. 86.83% on Cifar-10 dataset, 58.01% vs. 54.60% on Cifar-100 dataset, 91.52% vs. 89.58% on COVID-19 dataset, and 99.88% vs. 99.78% on Crack dataset, respectively. The results show the effectiveness of the proposed WSEBP, the improved performance of ML-CSC with WSEBP, and interpretation of the CNNs or deeper CNNs.
summary: The pursuit algorithms integrated in multi-layer convolutional sparse coding (ML-CSC) can interpret the convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, many current state-of-art (SOTA) pursuit algorithms require multiple iterations to optimize the solution of ML-CSC, which limits their applications to deeper CNNs due to high computational cost and large number of resources for getting very tiny gain of performance. In this study, we focus on the 0th iteration in pursuit algorithm by introducing an effective initialization strategy for each layer, by which the solution for ML-CSC can be improved. Specifically, we first propose a novel width-depth synchronous extension-based basis pursuit (WSEBP) algorithm which solves the ML-CSC problem without the limitation of the number of iterations compared to the SOTA algorithms and maximizes the performance by an effective initialization in each layer. Then, we propose a simple and unified ML-CSC-based classification network (ML-CSC-Net) which consists of an ML-CSC-based feature encoder and a fully-connected layer to validate the performance of WSEBP on image classification task. The experimental results show that our proposed WSEBP outperforms SOTA algorithms in terms of accuracy and consumption resources. In addition, the WSEBP integrated in CNNs can improve the performance of deeper CNNs and make them interpretable. Finally, taking VGG as an example, we propose WSEBP-VGG13 to enhance the performance of VGG13, which achieves competitive results on four public datasets, i.e., 87.79% vs. 86.83% on Cifar-10 dataset, 58.01% vs. 54.60% on Cifar-100 dataset, 91.52% vs. 89.58% on COVID-19 dataset, and 99.88% vs. 99.78% on Crack dataset, respectively. The results show the effectiveness of the proposed WSEBP, the improved performance of ML-CSC with WSEBP, and interpretation of the CNNs or deeper CNNs.
abstract_zh: 多层卷积稀疏编码（ML-CSC）中集成的追踪算法可以解释卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，许多当前最先进的（SOTA）追踪算法需要多次迭代来优化 ML-CSC 的解决方案，由于高计算成本和大量资源来获得非常小的性能增益，这限制了它们在更深层次 CNN 上的应用。在本研究中，我们通过为每一层引入有效的初始化策略来关注追踪算法的第 0 次迭代，从而可以改进 ML-CSC 的解决方案。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新颖的基于宽度深度同步扩展的基追踪（WSEBP）算法，与 SOTA 算法相比，该算法解决了 ML-CSC 问题，没有迭代次数的限制，并通过每层的有效初始化来最大化性能。然后，我们提出了一个简单且统一的基于 ML-CSC 的分类网络（ML-CSC-Net），它由基于 ML-CSC 的特征编码器和全连接层组成，以验证 WSEBP 在图像分类任务上的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的 WSEBP 在准确性和消耗资源方面优于 SOTA 算法。此外，集成在 CNN 中的 WSEBP 可以提高更深层次 CNN 的性能并使其可解释。最后，以VGG为例，我们提出WSEBP-VGG13来增强VGG13的性能，它在四个公共数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，即Cifar-10数据集上的87.79% vs. 86.83%、Cifar-100数据集上的58.01% vs. 54.60%、COVID-19数据集上的91.52% vs. 89.58%，在 Crack 数据集上分别为 99.88% 和 99.78%。结果显示了所提出的 WSEBP 的有效性、使用 WSEBP 改进的 ML-CSC 性能以及对 CNN 或更深 CNN 的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需迭代限制的宽度-深度同步扩展基追踪算法（WSEBP），用于改进多层卷积稀疏编码（ML-CSC）并提升CNN性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ML-CSC追求算法需多次迭代优化，导致计算成本高且难以应用于深层CNN，因此需要更高效的初始化策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出WSEBP算法，通过每层有效初始化策略解决ML-CSC问题；设计ML-CSC-Net网络结构验证算法性能，包含ML-CSC特征编码器和全连接层。
AI.result: WSEBP在Cifar-10（87.79%）、Cifar-100（58.01%）、COVID-19（91.52%）、Crack（99.88%）等数据集上优于SOTA算法，且提升VGG13性能。
AI.conclusion: WSEBP有效提升ML-CSC性能并增强CNN可解释性，验证了其在深层网络中的有效性。

authors_text: Dafni Antotsiou,Carlo Ciliberto,Tae-Kyun Kim
title: Modular Adaptive Policy Selection for Multi-Task Imitation Learning through Task Division
title_zh: 通过任务划分进行多任务模仿学习的模块化自适应策略选择
abstract: Deep imitation learning requires many expert demonstrations, which can be hard to obtain, especially when many tasks are involved. However, different tasks often share similarities, so learning them jointly can greatly benefit them and alleviate the need for many demonstrations. But, joint multi-task learning often suffers from negative transfer, sharing information that should be task-specific. In this work, we introduce a method to perform multi-task imitation while allowing for task-specific features. This is done by using proto-policies as modules to divide the tasks into simple sub-behaviours that can be shared. The proto-policies operate in parallel and are adaptively chosen by a selector mechanism that is jointly trained with the modules. Experiments on different sets of tasks show that our method improves upon the accuracy of single agents, task-conditioned and multi-headed multi-task agents, as well as state-of-the-art meta learning agents. We also demonstrate its ability to autonomously divide the tasks into both shared and task-specific sub-behaviours.
summary: Deep imitation learning requires many expert demonstrations, which can be hard to obtain, especially when many tasks are involved. However, different tasks often share similarities, so learning them jointly can greatly benefit them and alleviate the need for many demonstrations. But, joint multi-task learning often suffers from negative transfer, sharing information that should be task-specific. In this work, we introduce a method to perform multi-task imitation while allowing for task-specific features. This is done by using proto-policies as modules to divide the tasks into simple sub-behaviours that can be shared. The proto-policies operate in parallel and are adaptively chosen by a selector mechanism that is jointly trained with the modules. Experiments on different sets of tasks show that our method improves upon the accuracy of single agents, task-conditioned and multi-headed multi-task agents, as well as state-of-the-art meta learning agents. We also demonstrate its ability to autonomously divide the tasks into both shared and task-specific sub-behaviours.
abstract_zh: 深度模仿学习需要大量的专家演示，而这可能很难获得，特别是当涉及许多任务时。然而，不同的任务通常有相似之处，因此共同学习它们可以使他们受益匪浅，并减少大量演示的需要。但是，联合多任务学习经常遭受负迁移，共享本应针对特定任务的信息。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种执行多任务模仿的方法，同时允许特定于任务的功能。这是通过使用原始策略作为模块将任务划分为可以共享的简单子行为来完成的。原始策略并行运行，并由与模块联合训练的选择器机制自适应选择。对不同任务集的实验表明，我们的方法提高了单代理、任务条件和多头多任务代理以及最先进的元学习代理的准确性。我们还展示了它自动将任务划分为共享子行为和特定于任务的子行为的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过任务划分实现多任务模仿学习的模块化自适应策略选择方法，解决多任务学习中的负迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 深度模仿学习需要大量专家示范数据，且多任务联合学习时易出现负迁移（任务间共享不应共享的信息）。
AI.method: 引入原型策略模块划分任务为可共享的子行为，通过并行运行的原型策略与自适应选择器（联合训练）实现任务特定特征学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确率上优于单智能体、任务条件化代理、多头多任务代理及元学习代理，并能自主划分共享与任务特定子行为。
AI.conclusion: 模块化任务划分有效缓解负迁移问题，为多任务模仿学习提供更高效的学习框架。

We also demonstrate its ability to autonomously divide the tasks into both shared and task-specific sub-behaviours. 深度模仿学习需要大量的专家演示，而这可能很难获得，特别是当涉及许多任务时。然而，不同的任务通常有相似之处，因此共同学习它们可以使他们受益匪浅，并减少大量演示的需要。但是，联合多任务学习经常遭受负迁移，共享本应针对特定任务的信息。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种执行多任务模仿的方法，同时允许特定于任务的功能。这是通过使用原始策略作为模块将任务划分为可以共享的简单子行为来完成的。原始策略并行运行，并由与模块联合训练的选择器机制自适应选择。对不同任务集的实验表明，我们的方法提高了单代理、任务条件和多头多任务代理以及最先进的元学习代理的准确性。我们还展示了它自动将任务划分为共享子行为和特定于任务的子行为的能力。 本文提出一种通过任务划分实现多任务模仿学习的模块化自适应策略选择方法，解决多任务学习中的负迁移问题。 Dafni Antotsiou,Carlo Ciliberto,Tae-Kyun Kim cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Dominik Drexler,Jendrik Seipp,Hector Geffner
title: Learning Sketches for Decomposing Planning Problems into Subproblems of Bounded Width: Extended Version
title_zh: 将规划问题分解为有限宽度子问题的学习草图：扩展版本
comment: This work will appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS2022)
comments: This work will appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS2022)
abstract: Recently, sketches have been introduced as a general language for representing the subgoal structure of instances drawn from the same domain. Sketches are collections of rules of the form C -> E over a given set of features where C expresses Boolean conditions and E expresses qualitative changes. Each sketch rule defines a subproblem: going from a state that satisfies C to a state that achieves the change expressed by E or a goal state. Sketches can encode simple goal serializations, general policies, or decompositions of bounded width that can be solved greedily, in polynomial time, by the SIW_R variant of the SIW algorithm. Previous work has shown the computational value of sketches over benchmark domains that, while tractable, are challenging for domain-independent planners. In this work, we address the problem of learning sketches automatically given a planning domain, some instances of the target class of problems, and the desired bound on the sketch width. We present a logical formulation of the problem, an implementation using the ASP solver Clingo, and experimental results. The sketch learner and the SIW_R planner yield a domain-independent planner that learns and exploits domain structure in a crisp and explicit form.
summary: Recently, sketches have been introduced as a general language for representing the subgoal structure of instances drawn from the same domain. Sketches are collections of rules of the form C -> E over a given set of features where C expresses Boolean conditions and E expresses qualitative changes. Each sketch rule defines a subproblem: going from a state that satisfies C to a state that achieves the change expressed by E or a goal state. Sketches can encode simple goal serializations, general policies, or decompositions of bounded width that can be solved greedily, in polynomial time, by the SIW_R variant of the SIW algorithm. Previous work has shown the computational value of sketches over benchmark domains that, while tractable, are challenging for domain-independent planners. In this work, we address the problem of learning sketches automatically given a planning domain, some instances of the target class of problems, and the desired bound on the sketch width. We present a logical formulation of the problem, an implementation using the ASP solver Clingo, and experimental results. The sketch learner and the SIW_R planner yield a domain-independent planner that learns and exploits domain structure in a crisp and explicit form.
abstract_zh: 最近，草图被引入作为通用语言，用于表示来自同一域的实例的子目标结构。草图是给定特征集上 C -> E 形式的规则集合，其中 C 表示布尔条件，E 表示质变。每个草图规则定义一个子问题：从满足 C 的状态到实现 E 表示的变化的状态或目标状态。草图可以对简单的目标序列化、一般策略或有界宽度的分解进行编码，这些分解可以通过 SIW 算法的 SIW_R 变体在多项式时间内贪婪地求解。之前的工作已经展示了草图在基准域上的计算价值，虽然易于处理，但对于独立于域的规划者来说是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们解决了在给定规划域、目标问题类的一些实例以及草图宽度所需范围的情况下自动学习草图的问题。我们提出了问题的逻辑表述、使用 ASP 求解器 Clingo 的实现以及实验结果。草图学习器和 SIW_R 规划器生成一个独立于域的规划器，它以清晰明确的形式学习和利用域结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动学习草图的方法，将规划问题分解为有界宽度的子问题，以提高规划效率。
AI.motivation: 现有领域无关规划器在处理某些可解但复杂的领域时表现不佳，需通过学习领域结构来提升效率。
AI.method: 通过逻辑公式定义草图学习问题，利用ASP求解器Clingo实现，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实现了能够自动学习草图的规划器SIW_R，可在多项式时间内解决分解后的子问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式学习领域结构，为领域无关规划提供了有效的分解策略。

authors_text: Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Viswanatha Reddy Gajjala,Subhadeep Koley,Rohit Kundu,Aneeshan Sain,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Doodle It Yourself: Class Incremental Learning by Drawing a Few Sketches
title_zh: 自己涂鸦：通过画几张草图进行课堂增量学习
abstract: The human visual system is remarkable in learning new visual concepts from just a few examples. This is precisely the goal behind few-shot class incremental learning (FSCIL), where the emphasis is additionally placed on ensuring the model does not suffer from "forgetting". In this paper, we push the boundary further for FSCIL by addressing two key questions that bottleneck its ubiquitous application (i) can the model learn from diverse modalities other than just photo (as humans do), and (ii) what if photos are not readily accessible (due to ethical and privacy constraints). Our key innovation lies in advocating the use of sketches as a new modality for class support. The product is a "Doodle It Yourself" (DIY) FSCIL framework where the users can freely sketch a few examples of a novel class for the model to learn to recognize photos of that class. For that, we present a framework that infuses (i) gradient consensus for domain invariant learning, (ii) knowledge distillation for preserving old class information, and (iii) graph attention networks for message passing between old and novel classes. We experimentally show that sketches are better class support than text in the context of FSCIL, echoing findings elsewhere in the sketching literature.
summary: The human visual system is remarkable in learning new visual concepts from just a few examples. This is precisely the goal behind few-shot class incremental learning (FSCIL), where the emphasis is additionally placed on ensuring the model does not suffer from "forgetting". In this paper, we push the boundary further for FSCIL by addressing two key questions that bottleneck its ubiquitous application (i) can the model learn from diverse modalities other than just photo (as humans do), and (ii) what if photos are not readily accessible (due to ethical and privacy constraints). Our key innovation lies in advocating the use of sketches as a new modality for class support. The product is a "Doodle It Yourself" (DIY) FSCIL framework where the users can freely sketch a few examples of a novel class for the model to learn to recognize photos of that class. For that, we present a framework that infuses (i) gradient consensus for domain invariant learning, (ii) knowledge distillation for preserving old class information, and (iii) graph attention networks for message passing between old and novel classes. We experimentally show that sketches are better class support than text in the context of FSCIL, echoing findings elsewhere in the sketching literature.
abstract_zh: 人类视觉系统在从几个例子中学习新的视觉概念方面非常出色。这正是小样本类增量学习（FSCIL）背后的目标，其中的重点还在于确保模型不会遭受“遗忘”。在本文中，我们通过解决阻碍 FSCIL 普遍应用的两个关键问题，进一步突破了 FSCIL 的界限：(i) 该模型能否从照片之外的多种模式中学习（就像人类一样），以及 (ii) 如果照片不易访问（由于道德和隐私限制）怎么办。我们的关键创新在于提倡使用草图作为课堂支持的新方式。该产品是一个“Doodle It Yourself”（DIY）FSCIL 框架，用户可以在其中自由地绘制一些新颖类别的示例，以便模型学习识别该类别的照片。为此，我们提出了一个框架，该框架融合了（i）领域不变学习的梯度共识，（ii）用于保留旧类信息的知识蒸馏，以及（iii）用于旧类和新类之间消息传递的图注意网络。我们通过实验表明，在 FSCIL 背景下，草图比文本能提供更好的班级支持，这与草图文献中其他地方的发现相呼应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Doodle It Yourself'（DIY）的少样本类别增量学习框架，通过让用户绘制少量草图作为新类别的支持数据，解决模型在学习新类别时的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本类别增量学习（FSCIL）方法依赖照片作为支持数据，但存在隐私限制和模态单一的问题。人类能通过草图学习新概念，因此探索草图作为替代模态具有实际意义。
AI.method: 框架包含三个核心模块：（i）梯度共识实现跨模态领域不变学习，（ii）知识蒸馏保留旧类别信息，（iii）图注意力网络促进新旧类别间的信息传递。
AI.result: 实验表明，草图作为支持数据在FSCIL任务中优于文本，验证了DIY框架的有效性，并展示了其在隐私敏感场景下的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过引入草图模态和跨模态学习技术，为FSCIL提供了新的解决方案，推动了模型在资源受限场景下的应用边界。
