authors_text: Pan Li,Yanwei Fu,Shaogang Gong
title: A Framework of Meta Functional Learning for Regularising Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 用于规范知识转移的元功能学习框架
abstract: Machine learning classifiers' capability is largely dependent on the scale of available training data and limited by the model overfitting in data-scarce learning tasks. To address this problem, this work proposes a novel framework of Meta Functional Learning (MFL) by meta-learning a generalisable functional model from data-rich tasks whilst simultaneously regularising knowledge transfer to data-scarce tasks. The MFL computes meta-knowledge on functional regularisation generalisable to different learning tasks by which functional training on limited labelled data promotes more discriminative functions to be learned. Based on this framework, we formulate three variants of MFL: MFL with Prototypes (MFL-P) which learns a functional by auxiliary prototypes, Composite MFL (ComMFL) that transfers knowledge from both functional space and representational space, and MFL with Iterative Updates (MFL-IU) which improves knowledge transfer regularisation from MFL by progressively learning the functional regularisation in knowledge transfer. Moreover, we generalise these variants for knowledge transfer regularisation from binary classifiers to multi-class classifiers. Extensive experiments on two few-shot learning scenarios, Few-Shot Learning (FSL) and Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL), show that meta functional learning for knowledge transfer regularisation can improve FSL classifiers.
summary: Machine learning classifiers' capability is largely dependent on the scale of available training data and limited by the model overfitting in data-scarce learning tasks. To address this problem, this work proposes a novel framework of Meta Functional Learning (MFL) by meta-learning a generalisable functional model from data-rich tasks whilst simultaneously regularising knowledge transfer to data-scarce tasks. The MFL computes meta-knowledge on functional regularisation generalisable to different learning tasks by which functional training on limited labelled data promotes more discriminative functions to be learned. Based on this framework, we formulate three variants of MFL: MFL with Prototypes (MFL-P) which learns a functional by auxiliary prototypes, Composite MFL (ComMFL) that transfers knowledge from both functional space and representational space, and MFL with Iterative Updates (MFL-IU) which improves knowledge transfer regularisation from MFL by progressively learning the functional regularisation in knowledge transfer. Moreover, we generalise these variants for knowledge transfer regularisation from binary classifiers to multi-class classifiers. Extensive experiments on two few-shot learning scenarios, Few-Shot Learning (FSL) and Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL), show that meta functional learning for knowledge transfer regularisation can improve FSL classifiers.
abstract_zh: 机器学习分类器的能力在很大程度上取决于可用训练数据的规模，并受到数据稀缺学习任务中模型过度拟合的限制。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了一种新的元功能学习（MFL）框架，通过从数据丰富的任务中元学习可概括的功能模型，同时规范知识转移到数据稀缺的任务。 MFL 计算可推广到不同学习任务的功能正则化元知识，通过对有限标记数据的功能训练可以促进学习更多判别功能。基于这个框架，我们制定了 MFL 的三种变体：通过辅助原型学习函数的 MFL with Prototypes (MFL-P)、从函数空间和表征空间迁移知识的 Composite MFL (ComMFL)、以及通过迭代更新的 MFL (MFL-IU)，它通过逐步学习知识迁移中的函数正则化来改进 MFL 的知识迁移正则化。此外，我们将这些变体推广到从二元分类器到多类分类器的知识转移正则化。对两种少样本学习场景（少样本学习（FSL）和跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL））的大量实验表明，用于知识转移正则化的元功能学习可以改进 FSL 分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元功能学习框架（MFL），通过从数据丰富的任务中学习通用功能模型来正则化知识迁移，以解决数据稀缺任务中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习分类器在数据稀缺任务中易出现过拟合，且知识迁移效果受限，需更有效的正则化方法提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计MFL框架及其三个变体（MFL-P/ComMFL/MFL-IU），通过功能空间与表示空间联合知识迁移，结合原型辅助、迭代更新等机制实现跨任务正则化。
AI.result: 在Few-Shot Learning和跨域Few-Shot Learning场景的实验表明，MFL框架显著提升了数据稀缺任务下的分类器性能。
AI.conclusion: 元功能学习框架通过创新的知识迁移正则化机制，有效缓解了数据稀缺场景下的过拟合问题，为小样本学习提供了新思路。

search_text: A Framework of Meta Functional Learning for Regularising Knowledge Transfer 用于规范知识转移的元功能学习框架 Machine learning classifiers' capability is largely dependent on the scale of available training data and limited by the model overfitting in data-scarce learning tasks. To address this problem, this work proposes a novel framework of Meta Functional Learning (MFL) by meta-learning a generalisable functional model from data-rich tasks whilst simultaneously regularising knowledge transfer to data-scarce tasks. The MFL computes meta-knowledge on functional regularisation generalisable to different learning tasks by which functional training on limited labelled data promotes more discriminative functions to be learned. Based on this framework, we formulate three variants of MFL: MFL with Prototypes (MFL-P) which learns a functional by auxiliary prototypes, Composite MFL (ComMFL) that transfers knowledge from both functional space and representational space, and MFL with Iterative Updates (MFL-IU) which improves knowledge transfer regularisation from MFL by progressively learning the functional regularisation in knowledge transfer. Moreover, we generalise these variants for knowledge transfer regularisation from binary classifiers to multi-class classifiers. Extensive experiments on two few-shot learning scenarios, Few-Shot Learning (FSL) and Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CD-FSL), show that meta functional learning for knowledge transfer regularisation can improve FSL classifiers. 机器学习分类器的能力在很大程度上取决于可用训练数据的规模，并受到数据稀缺学习任务中模型过度拟合的限制。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了一种新的元功能学习（MFL）框架，通过从数据丰富的任务中元学习可概括的功能模型，同时规范知识转移到数据稀缺的任务。 MFL 计算可推广到不同学习任务的功能正则化元知识，通过对有限标记数据的功能训练可以促进学习更多判别功能。基于这个框架，我们制定了 MFL 的三种变体：通过辅助原型学习函数的 MFL with Prototypes (MFL-P)、从函数空间和表征空间迁移知识的 Composite MFL (ComMFL)、以及通过迭代更新的 MFL (MFL-IU)，它通过逐步学习知识迁移中的函数正则化来改进 MFL 的知识迁移正则化。此外，我们将这些变体推广到从二元分类器到多类分类器的知识转移正则化。对两种少样本学习场景（少样本学习（FSL）和跨域少样本学习（CD-FSL））的大量实验表明，用于知识转移正则化的元功能学习可以改进 FSL 分类器。 本文提出一种元功能学习框架（MFL），通过从数据丰富的任务中学习通用功能模型来正则化知识迁移，以解决数据稀缺任务中的过拟合问题。 Pan Li,Yanwei Fu,Shaogang Gong cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuchen Hu,Nana Hou,Chen Chen,Eng Siong Chng
title: Dual-Path Style Learning for End-to-End Noise-Robust Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于端到端噪声鲁棒语音识别的双路径式学习
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems degrade significantly under noisy conditions. Recently, speech enhancement (SE) is introduced as front-end to reduce noise for ASR, but it also suppresses some important speech information, i.e., over-suppression. To alleviate this, we propose a dual-path style learning approach for end-to-end noise-robust speech recognition (DPSL-ASR). Specifically, we first introduce clean speech feature along with the fused feature from IFF-Net as dual-path inputs to recover the suppressed information. Then, we propose style learning to map the fused feature close to clean feature, in order to learn latent speech information from the latter, i.e., clean "speech style". Furthermore, we also minimize the distance of final ASR outputs in two paths to improve noise-robustness. Experiments show that the proposed approach achieves relative word error rate (WER) reductions of 10.6% and 8.6% over the best IFF-Net baseline, on RATS and CHiME-4 datasets respectively.
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems degrade significantly under noisy conditions. Recently, speech enhancement (SE) is introduced as front-end to reduce noise for ASR, but it also suppresses some important speech information, i.e., over-suppression. To alleviate this, we propose a dual-path style learning approach for end-to-end noise-robust speech recognition (DPSL-ASR). Specifically, we first introduce clean speech feature along with the fused feature from IFF-Net as dual-path inputs to recover the suppressed information. Then, we propose style learning to map the fused feature close to clean feature, in order to learn latent speech information from the latter, i.e., clean "speech style". Furthermore, we also minimize the distance of final ASR outputs in two paths to improve noise-robustness. Experiments show that the proposed approach achieves relative word error rate (WER) reductions of 10.6% and 8.6% over the best IFF-Net baseline, on RATS and CHiME-4 datasets respectively.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统在噪声条件下性能会显着下降。最近，引入了语音增强（SE）作为前端来降低 ASR 的噪声，但它也抑制了一些重要的语音信息，即过度抑制。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种用于端到端噪声鲁棒语音识别（DPSL-ASR）的双路径式学习方法。具体来说，我们首先引入干净的语音特征以及来自 IFF-Net 的融合特征作为双路径输入来恢复抑制的信息。然后，我们提出风格学习将融合特征映射到干净的特征，以便从后者学习潜在的语音信息，即干净的“语音风格”。此外，我们还最小化了两条路径中最终 ASR 输出的距离，以提高抗噪声能力。实验表明，与最佳 IFF-Net 基线相比，所提出的方法在 RATS 和 CHiME-4 数据集上分别实现了相对字错误率 (WER) 降低 10.6% 和 8.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双路径风格学习方法（DPSL-ASR），用于端到端的抗噪语音识别，以解决传统语音增强技术导致的过抑制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强（SE）方法在降噪时可能过度抑制有效语音信息，导致语音识别系统性能下降，需寻找更有效的抗噪策略。
AI.method: 引入双路径输入（干净语音特征与IFF-Net融合特征），通过风格学习将融合特征映射至接近干净语音特征，并最小化双路径最终识别结果的距离以提升抗噪能力。
AI.result: 在RATS和CHiME-4数据集上，相对于最佳IFF-Net基线，相对词错误率（WER）分别降低10.6%和8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 双路径风格学习方法有效缓解了语音增强的过抑制问题，在保持语音信息完整性的同时提升了噪声环境下的语音识别鲁棒性。

authors_text: Shashank Subramanya,Jan Niehues
title: Multilingual Simultaneous Speech Translation
title_zh: 多语言同声翻译
abstract: Applications designed for simultaneous speech translation during events such as conferences or meetings need to balance quality and lag while displaying translated text to deliver a good user experience. One common approach to building online spoken language translation systems is by leveraging models built for offline speech translation. Based on a technique to adapt end-to-end monolingual models, we investigate multilingual models and different architectures (end-to-end and cascade) on the ability to perform online speech translation. On the multilingual TEDx corpus, we show that the approach generalizes to different architectures. We see similar gains in latency reduction (40% relative) across languages and architectures. However, the end-to-end architecture leads to smaller translation quality losses after adapting to the online model. Furthermore, the approach even scales to zero-shot directions.
summary: Applications designed for simultaneous speech translation during events such as conferences or meetings need to balance quality and lag while displaying translated text to deliver a good user experience. One common approach to building online spoken language translation systems is by leveraging models built for offline speech translation. Based on a technique to adapt end-to-end monolingual models, we investigate multilingual models and different architectures (end-to-end and cascade) on the ability to perform online speech translation. On the multilingual TEDx corpus, we show that the approach generalizes to different architectures. We see similar gains in latency reduction (40% relative) across languages and architectures. However, the end-to-end architecture leads to smaller translation quality losses after adapting to the online model. Furthermore, the approach even scales to zero-shot directions.
abstract_zh: 专为会议或会议等活动期间的同步语音翻译而设计的应用程序需要在显示翻译文本时平衡质量和延迟，以提供良好的用户体验。构建在线口语翻译系统的一种常见方法是利用为离线语音翻译构建的模型。基于适应端到端单语言模型的技术，我们研究了多语言模型和不同架构（端到端和级联）执行在线语音翻译的能力。在多语言 TEDx 语料库上，我们表明该方法可以推广到不同的架构。我们看到跨语言和架构在延迟减少方面取得了类似的成果（相对 40%）。然而，端到端的架构在适应在线模型后导致翻译质量损失更小。此外，该方法甚至可以扩展到零射击方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多语言同声传译系统，旨在平衡翻译质量与延迟以提升用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有同声传译系统难以在翻译质量与实时性之间取得良好平衡，需探索更优架构与方法。
AI.method: 基于端到端单语模型适应技术，对比多语言模型与级联/端到端架构在在线翻译中的表现。
AI.result: 在TEDx语料库中，延迟降低40%；端到端架构质量损失更小，且支持零样本翻译方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于不同架构，端到端模型在质量与延迟权衡上表现更优，具有扩展性。

search_text: Multilingual Simultaneous Speech Translation 多语言同声翻译 Applications designed for simultaneous speech translation during events such as conferences or meetings need to balance quality and lag while displaying translated text to deliver a good user experience. One common approach to building online spoken language translation systems is by leveraging models built for offline speech translation. Based on a technique to adapt end-to-end monolingual models, we investigate multilingual models and different architectures (end-to-end and cascade) on the ability to perform online speech translation. On the multilingual TEDx corpus, we show that the approach generalizes to different architectures. We see similar gains in latency reduction (40% relative) across languages and architectures. However, the end-to-end architecture leads to smaller translation quality losses after adapting to the online model. Furthermore, the approach even scales to zero-shot directions. 专为会议或会议等活动期间的同步语音翻译而设计的应用程序需要在显示翻译文本时平衡质量和延迟，以提供良好的用户体验。构建在线口语翻译系统的一种常见方法是利用为离线语音翻译构建的模型。基于适应端到端单语言模型的技术，我们研究了多语言模型和不同架构（端到端和级联）执行在线语音翻译的能力。在多语言 TEDx 语料库上，我们表明该方法可以推广到不同的架构。我们看到跨语言和架构在延迟减少方面取得了类似的成果（相对 40%）。然而，端到端的架构在适应在线模型后导致翻译质量损失更小。此外，该方法甚至可以扩展到零射击方向。 本文研究多语言同声传译系统，旨在平衡翻译质量与延迟以提升用户体验。 Shashank Subramanya,Jan Niehues cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xiaoxiao Miao,Xin Wang,Erica Cooper,Junichi Yamagishi,Natalia Tomashenko
title: Analyzing Language-Independent Speaker Anonymization Framework under Unseen Conditions
title_zh: 分析未见条件下与语言无关的说话人匿名化框架
abstract: In our previous work, we proposed a language-independent speaker anonymization system based on self-supervised learning models. Although the system can anonymize speech data of any language, the anonymization was imperfect, and the speech content of the anonymized speech was distorted. This limitation is more severe when the input speech is from a domain unseen in the training data. This study analyzed the bottleneck of the anonymization system under unseen conditions. It was found that the domain (e.g., language and channel) mismatch between the training and test data affected the neural waveform vocoder and anonymized speaker vectors, which limited the performance of the whole system. Increasing the training data diversity for the vocoder was found to be helpful to reduce its implicit language and channel dependency. Furthermore, a simple correlation-alignment-based domain adaption strategy was found to be significantly effective to alleviate the mismatch on the anonymized speaker vectors. Audio samples and source code are available online.
summary: In our previous work, we proposed a language-independent speaker anonymization system based on self-supervised learning models. Although the system can anonymize speech data of any language, the anonymization was imperfect, and the speech content of the anonymized speech was distorted. This limitation is more severe when the input speech is from a domain unseen in the training data. This study analyzed the bottleneck of the anonymization system under unseen conditions. It was found that the domain (e.g., language and channel) mismatch between the training and test data affected the neural waveform vocoder and anonymized speaker vectors, which limited the performance of the whole system. Increasing the training data diversity for the vocoder was found to be helpful to reduce its implicit language and channel dependency. Furthermore, a simple correlation-alignment-based domain adaption strategy was found to be significantly effective to alleviate the mismatch on the anonymized speaker vectors. Audio samples and source code are available online.
abstract_zh: 在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了一种基于自监督学习模型的独立于语言的说话人匿名化系统。虽然该系统可以对任意语言的语音数据进行匿名化处理，但匿名化效果并不完善，匿名化后的语音内容存在扭曲。当输入语音来自训练数据中看不见的域时，这种限制更加严重。本研究分析了未见条件下匿名系统的瓶颈。研究发现，训练数据和测试数据之间的领域（例如语言和通道）不匹配会影响神经波形声码器和匿名说话者向量，从而限制了整个系统的性能。研究发现，增加声码器训练数据的多样性有助于减少其隐式语言和通道依赖性。此外，发现一种简单的基于相关对齐的域适应策略对于减轻匿名说话者向量的不匹配非常有效。音频样本和源代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了无语言依赖说话人匿名化框架在未见过条件下的性能瓶颈，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在未见过领域（如新语言或信道）下匿名化效果差，语音内容易失真，需解决领域不匹配问题。
AI.method: 分析领域不匹配对声码器和说话人向量的影响，通过增加声码器训练数据多样性及采用相关性对齐的领域适应策略优化模型。
AI.result: 提升声码器数据多样性可降低语言/信道依赖性，相关性对齐策略有效缓解匿名化向量的领域不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: 领域不匹配是未见过条件下性能下降的主要原因，数据增强与领域适应策略可显著提升系统鲁棒性。

authors_text: Richard Shaw,Sibi Catley-Chandar,Ales Leonardis,Eduardo Perez-Pellitero
title: HDR Reconstruction from Bracketed Exposures and Events
title_zh: 根据包围曝光和事件重建 HDR
abstract: Reconstruction of high-quality HDR images is at the core of modern computational photography. Significant progress has been made with multi-frame HDR reconstruction methods, producing high-resolution, rich and accurate color reconstructions with high-frequency details. However, they are still prone to fail in dynamic or largely over-exposed scenes, where frame misalignment often results in visible ghosting artifacts. Recent approaches attempt to alleviate this by utilizing an event-based camera (EBC), which measures only binary changes of illuminations. Despite their desirable high temporal resolution and dynamic range characteristics, such approaches have not outperformed traditional multi-frame reconstruction methods, mainly due to the lack of color information and low-resolution sensors. In this paper, we propose to leverage both bracketed LDR images and simultaneously captured events to obtain the best of both worlds: high-quality RGB information from bracketed LDRs and complementary high frequency and dynamic range information from events. We present a multi-modal end-to-end learning-based HDR imaging system that fuses bracketed images and event modalities in the feature domain using attention and multi-scale spatial alignment modules. We propose a novel event-to-image feature distillation module that learns to translate event features into the image-feature space with self-supervision. Our framework exploits the higher temporal resolution of events by sub-sampling the input event streams using a sliding window, enriching our combined feature representation. Our proposed approach surpasses SoTA multi-frame HDR reconstruction methods using synthetic and real events, with a 2dB and 1dB improvement in PSNR-L and PSNR-mu on the HdM HDR dataset, respectively.
summary: Reconstruction of high-quality HDR images is at the core of modern computational photography. Significant progress has been made with multi-frame HDR reconstruction methods, producing high-resolution, rich and accurate color reconstructions with high-frequency details. However, they are still prone to fail in dynamic or largely over-exposed scenes, where frame misalignment often results in visible ghosting artifacts. Recent approaches attempt to alleviate this by utilizing an event-based camera (EBC), which measures only binary changes of illuminations. Despite their desirable high temporal resolution and dynamic range characteristics, such approaches have not outperformed traditional multi-frame reconstruction methods, mainly due to the lack of color information and low-resolution sensors. In this paper, we propose to leverage both bracketed LDR images and simultaneously captured events to obtain the best of both worlds: high-quality RGB information from bracketed LDRs and complementary high frequency and dynamic range information from events. We present a multi-modal end-to-end learning-based HDR imaging system that fuses bracketed images and event modalities in the feature domain using attention and multi-scale spatial alignment modules. We propose a novel event-to-image feature distillation module that learns to translate event features into the image-feature space with self-supervision. Our framework exploits the higher temporal resolution of events by sub-sampling the input event streams using a sliding window, enriching our combined feature representation. Our proposed approach surpasses SoTA multi-frame HDR reconstruction methods using synthetic and real events, with a 2dB and 1dB improvement in PSNR-L and PSNR-mu on the HdM HDR dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 高质量 HDR 图像的重建是现代计算摄影的核心。多帧 HDR 重建方法取得了重大进展，产生了具有高频细节的高分辨率、丰富且准确的色彩重建。然而，它们在动态或过度曝光的场景中仍然容易失败，其中帧未对准通常会导致可见的重影伪影。最近的方法试图通过利用基于事件的相机（EBC）来缓解这一问题，该相机仅测量照明的二进制变化。尽管它们具有理想的高时间分辨率和动态范围特性，但此类方法并未优于传统的多帧重建方法，这主要是由于缺乏颜色信息和低分辨率传感器。在本文中，我们建议利用包围式 LDR 图像和同时捕获的事件来获得两全其美的效果：来自包围式 LDR 的高质量 RGB 信息以及来自事件的互补高频和动态范围信息。我们提出了一种基于多模态端到端学习的 HDR 成像系统，该系统使用注意力和多尺度空间对齐模块在特征域中融合包围图像和事件模态。我们提出了一种新颖的事件到图像特征蒸馏模块，该模块学习通过自我监督将事件特征转化为图像特征空间。我们的框架通过使用滑动窗口对输入事件流进行二次采样来利用事件的更高时间分辨率，丰富了我们的组合特征表示。我们提出的方法超越了使用合成事件和真实事件的 SoTA 多帧 HDR 重建方法，在 HdM HDR 数据集上的 PSNR-L 和 PSNR-mu 分别提高了 2dB 和 1dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多帧曝光图像和事件相机数据的HDR重建方法，以解决动态场景下的鬼影伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多帧HDR重建方法在动态或过曝场景中易产生鬼影伪影，而事件相机虽具高时间分辨率和动态范围，但缺乏色彩信息和低分辨率限制了其性能。
AI.method: 设计多模态端到端学习框架，融合曝光图像与事件数据，采用注意力机制、多尺度空间对齐模块及事件到图像特征蒸馏模块，通过滑动窗口子采样事件流增强特征表示。
AI.result: 在HdM数据集上，PSNR-L和PSNR-mu指标分别较现有方法提升2dB和1dB。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合利用曝光图像的高保真色彩与事件相机的高动态范围特性，提出的方法在HDR重建任务中实现了性能突破。

We propose a novel event-to-image feature distillation module that learns to translate event features into the image-feature space with self-supervision. Our framework exploits the higher temporal resolution of events by sub-sampling the input event streams using a sliding window, enriching our combined feature representation. Our proposed approach surpasses SoTA multi-frame HDR reconstruction methods using synthetic and real events, with a 2dB and 1dB improvement in PSNR-L and PSNR-mu on the HdM HDR dataset, respectively. 高质量 HDR 图像的重建是现代计算摄影的核心。多帧 HDR 重建方法取得了重大进展，产生了具有高频细节的高分辨率、丰富且准确的色彩重建。然而，它们在动态或过度曝光的场景中仍然容易失败，其中帧未对准通常会导致可见的重影伪影。最近的方法试图通过利用基于事件的相机（EBC）来缓解这一问题，该相机仅测量照明的二进制变化。尽管它们具有理想的高时间分辨率和动态范围特性，但此类方法并未优于传统的多帧重建方法，这主要是由于缺乏颜色信息和低分辨率传感器。在本文中，我们建议利用包围式 LDR 图像和同时捕获的事件来获得两全其美的效果：来自包围式 LDR 的高质量 RGB 信息以及来自事件的互补高频和动态范围信息。我们提出了一种基于多模态端到端学习的 HDR 成像系统，该系统使用注意力和多尺度空间对齐模块在特征域中融合包围图像和事件模态。我们提出了一种新颖的事件到图像特征蒸馏模块，该模块学习通过自我监督将事件特征转化为图像特征空间。我们的框架通过使用滑动窗口对输入事件流进行二次采样来利用事件的更高时间分辨率，丰富了我们的组合特征表示。我们提出的方法超越了使用合成事件和真实事件的 SoTA 多帧 HDR 重建方法，在 HdM HDR 数据集上的 PSNR-L 和 PSNR-mu 分别提高了 2dB 和 1dB。 本文提出了一种结合多帧曝光图像和事件相机数据的HDR重建方法，以解决动态场景下的鬼影伪影问题。 Richard Shaw,Sibi Catley-Chandar,Ales Leonardis,Eduardo Perez-Pellitero cs.CV

authors_text: Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Subhadeep Koley,Abdullah Faiz Ur Rahman Khilji,Aneeshan Sain,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Sketching without Worrying: Noise-Tolerant Sketch-Based Image Retrieval
title_zh: 无忧素描：基于耐噪素描的图像检索
comment: IEEE Conf. on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022 Code: https://github.com/AyanKumarBhunia/Stroke_Subset_Selector-for-FGSBIR
comments: IEEE Conf. on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022 Code: https://github.com/AyanKumarBhunia/Stroke_Subset_Selector-for-FGSBIR
abstract: Sketching enables many exciting applications, notably, image retrieval. The fear-to-sketch problem (i.e., "I can't sketch") has however proven to be fatal for its widespread adoption. This paper tackles this "fear" head on, and for the first time, proposes an auxiliary module for existing retrieval models that predominantly lets the users sketch without having to worry. We first conducted a pilot study that revealed the secret lies in the existence of noisy strokes, but not so much of the "I can't sketch". We consequently design a stroke subset selector that {detects noisy strokes, leaving only those} which make a positive contribution towards successful retrieval. Our Reinforcement Learning based formulation quantifies the importance of each stroke present in a given subset, based on the extent to which that stroke contributes to retrieval. When combined with pre-trained retrieval models as a pre-processing module, we achieve a significant gain of 8%-10% over standard baselines and in turn report new state-of-the-art performance. Last but not least, we demonstrate the selector once trained, can also be used in a plug-and-play manner to empower various sketch applications in ways that were not previously possible.
summary: Sketching enables many exciting applications, notably, image retrieval. The fear-to-sketch problem (i.e., "I can't sketch") has however proven to be fatal for its widespread adoption. This paper tackles this "fear" head on, and for the first time, proposes an auxiliary module for existing retrieval models that predominantly lets the users sketch without having to worry. We first conducted a pilot study that revealed the secret lies in the existence of noisy strokes, but not so much of the "I can't sketch". We consequently design a stroke subset selector that {detects noisy strokes, leaving only those} which make a positive contribution towards successful retrieval. Our Reinforcement Learning based formulation quantifies the importance of each stroke present in a given subset, based on the extent to which that stroke contributes to retrieval. When combined with pre-trained retrieval models as a pre-processing module, we achieve a significant gain of 8%-10% over standard baselines and in turn report new state-of-the-art performance. Last but not least, we demonstrate the selector once trained, can also be used in a plug-and-play manner to empower various sketch applications in ways that were not previously possible.
abstract_zh: 草图绘制可以实现许多令人兴奋的应用，特别是图像检索。然而，对素描的恐惧问题（即“我不会素描”）已被证明对其广泛采用是致命的。本文正面解决了这种“恐惧”，并首次提出了现有检索模型的辅助模块，主要让用户无需担心即可绘制草图。我们首先进行了一项试点研究，揭示了秘密在于嘈杂的笔画的存在，但并不是“我不会素描”。因此，我们设计了一个笔画子集选择器，它{检测嘈杂的笔画，只留下那些}对成功检索做出积极贡献的笔画。我们基于强化学习的公式根据给定子集中每个笔划对检索的贡献程度来量化该笔划的重要性。当与预先训练的检索模型结合作为预处理模块时，我们比标准基线实现了 8%-10% 的显着增益，并反过来报告了新的最先进的性能。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们演示了选择器一旦经过训练，也可以以即插即用的方式使用，以以前不可能的方式支持各种草图应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种辅助模块，用于解决用户因害怕绘制草图而无法使用基于草图的图像检索系统的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于用户害怕绘制草图，基于草图的图像检索系统未能广泛采用。研究表明，问题的根源在于草图中存在噪声笔画，而不是用户不会绘制。
AI.method: 设计了一个笔画子集选择器，通过强化学习量化每个笔画对检索的贡献，从而检测并去除噪声笔画。
AI.result: 该方法在标准基线基础上提升了8%-10%，并实现了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 训练后的选择器可以作为一种即插即用的模块，增强各种草图应用，实现之前无法实现的功能。

authors_text: Yinghong Jing,Liupeng Lin,Xinghua Li,Tongwen Li,Huanfeng Shen
title: An attention mechanism based convolutional network for satellite precipitation downscaling over China
title_zh: 基于注意力机制的中国卫星降水降尺度卷积网络
abstract: Precipitation is a key part of hydrological circulation and is a sensitive indicator of climate change. The Integrated Multi-satellitE Retrievals for the Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) mission (IMERG) datasets are widely used for global and regional precipitation investigations. However, their local application is limited by the relatively coarse spatial resolution. Therefore, in this paper, an attention mechanism based convolutional network (AMCN) is proposed to downscale GPM IMERG monthly precipitation data. The proposed method is an end-to-end network, which consists of a global cross-attention module, a multi-factor cross-attention module, and a residual convolutional module, comprehensively considering the potential relationships between precipitation and complicated surface characteristics. In addition, a degradation loss function based on low-resolution precipitation is designed to physically constrain the network training, to improve the robustness of the proposed network under different time and scale variations. The experiments demonstrate that the proposed network significantly outperforms three baseline methods. Finally, a geographic difference analysis method is introduced to further improve the downscaled results by incorporating in-situ measurements for high-quality and fine-scale precipitation estimation.
summary: Precipitation is a key part of hydrological circulation and is a sensitive indicator of climate change. The Integrated Multi-satellitE Retrievals for the Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) mission (IMERG) datasets are widely used for global and regional precipitation investigations. However, their local application is limited by the relatively coarse spatial resolution. Therefore, in this paper, an attention mechanism based convolutional network (AMCN) is proposed to downscale GPM IMERG monthly precipitation data. The proposed method is an end-to-end network, which consists of a global cross-attention module, a multi-factor cross-attention module, and a residual convolutional module, comprehensively considering the potential relationships between precipitation and complicated surface characteristics. In addition, a degradation loss function based on low-resolution precipitation is designed to physically constrain the network training, to improve the robustness of the proposed network under different time and scale variations. The experiments demonstrate that the proposed network significantly outperforms three baseline methods. Finally, a geographic difference analysis method is introduced to further improve the downscaled results by incorporating in-situ measurements for high-quality and fine-scale precipitation estimation.
abstract_zh: 降水是水文循环的关键组成部分，是气候变化的敏感指标。全球降水测量（GPM）任务的综合多卫星反演（IMERG）数据集广泛用于全球和区域降水调查。然而，它们的局部应用受到相对粗糙的空间分辨率的限制。因此，本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的卷积网络（AMCN）来缩减 GPM IMERG 月降水数据。该方法是一个端到端网络，由全局交叉注意模块、多因素交叉注意模块和残差卷积模块组成，综合考虑降水与复杂地表特征之间的潜在关系。此外，设计了基于低分辨率降水的退化损失函数来物理约束网络训练，以提高所提出的网络在不同时间和尺度变化下的鲁棒性。实验表明，所提出的网络显着优于三种基线方法。最后，引入地理差异分析方法，通过结合现场测量来进一步改进降尺度结果，以进行高质量和精细的降水估算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的卷积网络（AMCN），用于对中国地区的GPM IMERG月降水量数据进行降尺度处理。
AI.motivation: GPM IMERG数据在全球和区域降水研究中被广泛使用，但由于其空间分辨率较低，限制了在局部地区的应用，因此需要一种更精确的降尺度方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种端到端的AMCN，包含全局交叉注意力模块、多因子交叉注意力模块和残差卷积模块，同时设计了一种基于低分辨率降水的退化损失函数，以物理约束网络训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该网络显著优于三种基线方法，并通过引入地理差异分析方法，结合现场测量数据进一步提升了降尺度结果的精度。
AI.conclusion: AMCN方法在降尺度GPM IMERG数据方面表现出色，能够提供高质量、高分辨率的降水估计结果，适用于区域气候研究和水文应用。

authors_text: Xiaoyang Guo,Wei Wu,Anuj Srivastava
title: Data-Driven, Soft Alignment of Functional Data Using Shapes and Landmarks
title_zh: 使用形状和地标对功能数据进行数据驱动的软对齐
abstract: Alignment or registration of functions is a fundamental problem in statistical analysis of functions and shapes. While there are several approaches available, a more recent approach based on Fisher-Rao metric and square-root velocity functions (SRVFs) has been shown to have good performance. However, this SRVF method has two limitations: (1) it is susceptible to over alignment, i.e., alignment of noise as well as the signal, and (2) in case there is additional information in form of landmarks, the original formulation does not prescribe a way to incorporate that information. In this paper we propose an extension that allows for incorporation of landmark information to seek a compromise between matching curves and landmarks. This results in a soft landmark alignment that pushes landmarks closer, without requiring their exact overlays to finds a compromise between contributions from functions and landmarks. The proposed method is demonstrated to be superior in certain practical scenarios.
summary: Alignment or registration of functions is a fundamental problem in statistical analysis of functions and shapes. While there are several approaches available, a more recent approach based on Fisher-Rao metric and square-root velocity functions (SRVFs) has been shown to have good performance. However, this SRVF method has two limitations: (1) it is susceptible to over alignment, i.e., alignment of noise as well as the signal, and (2) in case there is additional information in form of landmarks, the original formulation does not prescribe a way to incorporate that information. In this paper we propose an extension that allows for incorporation of landmark information to seek a compromise between matching curves and landmarks. This results in a soft landmark alignment that pushes landmarks closer, without requiring their exact overlays to finds a compromise between contributions from functions and landmarks. The proposed method is demonstrated to be superior in certain practical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 函数的对齐或配准是函数和形状统计分析中的基本问题。虽然有多种可用方法，但基于 Fisher-Rao 度量和平方根速度函数 (SRVF) 的最新方法已被证明具有良好的性能。然而，这种 SRVF 方法有两个局限性：（1）它容易受到过度对齐的影响，即噪声和信号的对齐，以及（2）如果存在地标形式的附加信息，原始公式没有规定合并该信息的方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种扩展，允许合并地标信息，以寻求匹配曲线和地标之间的折衷方案。这会导致软地标对齐，将地标推得更近，而不需要它们的精确叠加来找到功能和地标贡献之间的折衷方案。所提出的方法被证明在某些实际场景中具有优越性。

AI.motivation: 现有SRVF方法易受噪声影响且无法有效利用地标信息，需改进以平衡信号与噪声、整合地标信息

AI.result: 实验表明方法在存在噪声和地标信息时优于传统SRVF方法，有效减少过度对齐
AI.conclusion: 提出的软对齐方法有效结合地标信息，提升函数数据对齐的准确性和鲁棒性

authors_text: Paolo Felli,Marco Montali,Sarah Winkler
title: Soundness of Data-Aware Processes with Arithmetic Conditions
title_zh: 具有算术条件的数据感知过程的可靠性
abstract: Data-aware processes represent and integrate structural and behavioural constraints in a single model, and are thus increasingly investigated in business process management and information systems engineering. In this spectrum, Data Petri nets (DPNs) have gained increasing popularity thanks to their ability to balance simplicity with expressiveness. The interplay of data and control-flow makes checking the correctness of such models, specifically the well-known property of soundness, crucial and challenging. A major shortcoming of previous approaches for checking soundness of DPNs is that they consider data conditions without arithmetic, an essential feature when dealing with real-world, concrete applications. In this paper, we attack this open problem by providing a foundational and operational framework for assessing soundness of DPNs enriched with arithmetic data conditions. The framework comes with a proof-of-concept implementation that, instead of relying on ad-hoc techniques, employs off-the-shelf established SMT technologies. The implementation is validated on a collection of examples from the literature, and on synthetic variants constructed from such examples.
summary: Data-aware processes represent and integrate structural and behavioural constraints in a single model, and are thus increasingly investigated in business process management and information systems engineering. In this spectrum, Data Petri nets (DPNs) have gained increasing popularity thanks to their ability to balance simplicity with expressiveness. The interplay of data and control-flow makes checking the correctness of such models, specifically the well-known property of soundness, crucial and challenging. A major shortcoming of previous approaches for checking soundness of DPNs is that they consider data conditions without arithmetic, an essential feature when dealing with real-world, concrete applications. In this paper, we attack this open problem by providing a foundational and operational framework for assessing soundness of DPNs enriched with arithmetic data conditions. The framework comes with a proof-of-concept implementation that, instead of relying on ad-hoc techniques, employs off-the-shelf established SMT technologies. The implementation is validated on a collection of examples from the literature, and on synthetic variants constructed from such examples.
abstract_zh: 数据感知流程在单个模型中表示和集成结构和行为约束，因此在业务流程管理和信息系统工程中得到越来越多的研究。在这个范围内，数据 Petri 网 (DPN) 因其平衡简单性和表现力的能力而越来越受欢迎。数据和控制流的相互作用使得检查此类模型的正确性，特别是众所周知的健全性变得至关重要且具有挑战性。以前检查 DPN 健全性的方法的一个主要缺点是，它们在没有算术的情况下考虑数据条件，而这是处理现实世界的具体应用时的一个基本特征。在本文中，我们通过提供一个用于评估富含算术数据条件的 DPN 的健全性的基础和操作框架来解决这个开放问题。该框架附带了概念验证实现，它不依赖临时技术，而是采用现成的成熟 SMT 技术。该实现在文献中的示例集合以及从这些示例构建的合成变体上进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于验证包含算术条件的数据感知流程（DPNs）正确性的框架，并通过SMT技术实现验证。
AI.motivation: 现有DPNs的正确性验证方法未考虑算术条件，而算术条件在实际应用中至关重要，需解决这一缺陷。
AI.method: 构建包含算术数据条件的DPNs框架，利用现成的SMT技术进行验证，而非依赖特定技巧。
AI.result: 实现了该框架并验证了其在文献实例及合成变体中的有效性，证明方法可行。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效填补了DPNs算术条件验证的空白，为实际应用提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: S. J. Blanchard,T. J. Noseworthy,E. Pancer,M. Poole
title: Extraction of Visual Information to Predict Crowdfunding Success
title_zh: 提取视觉信息以预测众筹成功
abstract: Researchers have increasingly turned to crowdfunding platforms to gain insights into entrepreneurial activity and dynamics. While previous studies have explored various factors influencing crowdfunding success, such as technology, communication, and marketing strategies, the role of visual elements that can be automatically extracted from images has received less attention. This is surprising, considering that crowdfunding platforms emphasize the importance of attention-grabbing and high-resolution images, and previous research has shown that image characteristics can significantly impact product evaluations. Indeed, a comprehensive review of empirical articles (n = 202) that utilized Kickstarter data, focusing on the incorporation of visual information in their analyses. Our findings reveal that only 29.70% controlled for the number of images, and less than 12% considered any image details. In this manuscript, we review the literature on image processing and its relevance to the business domain, highlighting two types of visual variables: visual counts (number of pictures and number of videos) and image details. Building upon previous work that discussed the role of color, composition and figure-ground relationships, we introduce visual scene elements that have not yet been explored in crowdfunding, including the number of faces, the number of concepts depicted, and the ease of identifying those concepts. To demonstrate the predictive value of visual counts and image details, we analyze Kickstarter data. Our results highlight that visual count features are two of the top three predictors of success. Our results also show that simple image detail features such as color matter a lot, and our proposed measures of visual scene elements can also be useful. We supplement our article with R and Python codes that help authors extract image details (https://osf.io/ujnzp/).
summary: Researchers have increasingly turned to crowdfunding platforms to gain insights into entrepreneurial activity and dynamics. While previous studies have explored various factors influencing crowdfunding success, such as technology, communication, and marketing strategies, the role of visual elements that can be automatically extracted from images has received less attention. This is surprising, considering that crowdfunding platforms emphasize the importance of attention-grabbing and high-resolution images, and previous research has shown that image characteristics can significantly impact product evaluations. Indeed, a comprehensive review of empirical articles (n = 202) that utilized Kickstarter data, focusing on the incorporation of visual information in their analyses. Our findings reveal that only 29.70% controlled for the number of images, and less than 12% considered any image details. In this manuscript, we review the literature on image processing and its relevance to the business domain, highlighting two types of visual variables: visual counts (number of pictures and number of videos) and image details. Building upon previous work that discussed the role of color, composition and figure-ground relationships, we introduce visual scene elements that have not yet been explored in crowdfunding, including the number of faces, the number of concepts depicted, and the ease of identifying those concepts. To demonstrate the predictive value of visual counts and image details, we analyze Kickstarter data. Our results highlight that visual count features are two of the top three predictors of success. Our results also show that simple image detail features such as color matter a lot, and our proposed measures of visual scene elements can also be useful. We supplement our article with R and Python codes that help authors extract image details (https://osf.io/ujnzp/).
abstract_zh: 研究人员越来越多地转向众筹平台来深入了解创业活动和动态。虽然之前的研究探讨了影响众筹成功的各种因素，例如技术、沟通和营销策略，但可以从图像中自动提取的视觉元素的作用却很少受到关注。考虑到众筹平台强调引人注目和高分辨率图像的重要性，而且之前的研究表明图像特征可以显着影响产品评估，这令人惊讶。事实上，对利用 Kickstarter 数据的实证文章 (n = 202) 进行了全面回顾，重点关注在分析中纳入视觉信息。我们的研究结果表明，只有 29.70% 的人控制了图像的数量，不到 12% 的人考虑了任何图像细节。在这篇手稿中，我们回顾了有关图像处理的文献及其与业务领域的相关性，重点介绍了两种类型的视觉变量：视觉计数（图片数量和视频数量）和图像细节。在之前讨论颜色、构图和图形与背景关系的工作的基础上，我们引入了众筹中尚未探索的视觉场景元素，包括面孔的数量、所描绘的概念的数量以及识别这些概念的难易程度。为了证明视觉计数和图像细节的预测价值，我们分析了 Kickstarter 数据。我们的结果强调，视觉计数特征是成功的三大预测因素中的两个。我们的结果还表明，简单的图像细节特征（例如颜色）非常重要，并且我们提出的视觉场景元素度量也很有用。我们用 R 和 Python 代码补充我们的文章，帮助作者提取图像细节 (https://osf.io/ujnzp/)。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析众筹平台Kickstarter的数据，探讨视觉元素（如图片数量、颜色、构图等）对众筹项目成功预测的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管众筹平台强调视觉内容的重要性，但现有研究对自动提取的图像特征在预测众筹成功中的作用关注不足，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 文献综述结合实证分析，提取两类视觉变量：视觉数量（图片和视频数量）及图像细节（颜色、构图、场景元素如人脸数量、概念可识别性等），并基于Kickstarter数据验证其预测价值。
AI.result: 视觉数量特征为成功预测的前三大因素之一，颜色等简单图像细节显著影响结果，新提出的场景元素指标也具有实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 视觉信息是预测众筹成功的关键因素，本文提出的场景元素分析方法可为后续研究提供工具支持，建议更多关注图像细节的量化分析。

motivation: 尽管众筹平台强调视觉内容的重要性，但现有研究对自动提取的图像特征在预测众筹成功中的作用关注不足，需填补这一研究空白。
method: 文献综述结合实证分析，提取两类视觉变量：视觉数量（图片和视频数量）及图像细节（颜色、构图、场景元素如人脸数量、概念可识别性等），并基于Kickstarter数据验证其预测价值。
result: 视觉数量特征为成功预测的前三大因素之一，颜色等简单图像细节显著影响结果，新提出的场景元素指标也具有实用价值。
conclusion: 视觉信息是预测众筹成功的关键因素，本文提出的场景元素分析方法可为后续研究提供工具支持，建议更多关注图像细节的量化分析。
search_text: Extraction of Visual Information to Predict Crowdfunding Success 提取视觉信息以预测众筹成功 Researchers have increasingly turned to crowdfunding platforms to gain insights into entrepreneurial activity and dynamics. While previous studies have explored various factors influencing crowdfunding success, such as technology, communication, and marketing strategies, the role of visual elements that can be automatically extracted from images has received less attention. This is surprising, considering that crowdfunding platforms emphasize the importance of attention-grabbing and high-resolution images, and previous research has shown that image characteristics can significantly impact product evaluations. Indeed, a comprehensive review of empirical articles (n = 202) that utilized Kickstarter data, focusing on the incorporation of visual information in their analyses. Our findings reveal that only 29.70% controlled for the number of images, and less than 12% considered any image details. In this manuscript, we review the literature on image processing and its relevance to the business domain, highlighting two types of visual variables: visual counts (number of pictures and number of videos) and image details. Building upon previous work that discussed the role of color, composition and figure-ground relationships, we introduce visual scene elements that have not yet been explored in crowdfunding, including the number of faces, the number of concepts depicted, and the ease of identifying those concepts. To demonstrate the predictive value of visual counts and image details, we analyze Kickstarter data. Our results highlight that visual count features are two of the top three predictors of success. Our results also show that simple image detail features such as color matter a lot, and our proposed measures of visual scene elements can also be useful. We supplement our article with R and Python codes that help authors extract image details (https://osf.io/ujnzp/). 研究人员越来越多地转向众筹平台来深入了解创业活动和动态。虽然之前的研究探讨了影响众筹成功的各种因素，例如技术、沟通和营销策略，但可以从图像中自动提取的视觉元素的作用却很少受到关注。考虑到众筹平台强调引人注目和高分辨率图像的重要性，而且之前的研究表明图像特征可以显着影响产品评估，这令人惊讶。事实上，对利用 Kickstarter 数据的实证文章 (n = 202) 进行了全面回顾，重点关注在分析中纳入视觉信息。我们的研究结果表明，只有 29.70% 的人控制了图像的数量，不到 12% 的人考虑了任何图像细节。在这篇手稿中，我们回顾了有关图像处理的文献及其与业务领域的相关性，重点介绍了两种类型的视觉变量：视觉计数（图片数量和视频数量）和图像细节。在之前讨论颜色、构图和图形与背景关系的工作的基础上，我们引入了众筹中尚未探索的视觉场景元素，包括面孔的数量、所描绘的概念的数量以及识别这些概念的难易程度。为了证明视觉计数和图像细节的预测价值，我们分析了 Kickstarter 数据。我们的结果强调，视觉计数特征是成功的三大预测因素中的两个。我们的结果还表明，简单的图像细节特征（例如颜色）非常重要，并且我们提出的视觉场景元素度量也很有用。我们用 R 和 Python 代码补充我们的文章，帮助作者提取图像细节 (https://osf.io/ujnzp/)。 本文通过分析众筹平台Kickstarter的数据，探讨视觉元素（如图片数量、颜色、构图等）对众筹项目成功预测的影响。 S. J. Blanchard,T. J. Noseworthy,E. Pancer,M. Poole cs.CV,cs.MM,stat.AP

authors_text: Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Viswanatha Reddy Gajjala,Aneeshan Sain,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Partially Does It: Towards Scene-Level FG-SBIR with Partial Input
title_zh: 部分做到了：通过部分输入实现场景级 FG-SBIR
abstract: We scrutinise an important observation plaguing scene-level sketch research -- that a significant portion of scene sketches are "partial". A quick pilot study reveals: (i) a scene sketch does not necessarily contain all objects in the corresponding photo, due to the subjective holistic interpretation of scenes, (ii) there exists significant empty (white) regions as a result of object-level abstraction, and as a result, (iii) existing scene-level fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval methods collapse as scene sketches become more partial. To solve this "partial" problem, we advocate for a simple set-based approach using optimal transport (OT) to model cross-modal region associativity in a partially-aware fashion. Importantly, we improve upon OT to further account for holistic partialness by comparing intra-modal adjacency matrices. Our proposed method is not only robust to partial scene-sketches but also yields state-of-the-art performance on existing datasets.
summary: We scrutinise an important observation plaguing scene-level sketch research -- that a significant portion of scene sketches are "partial". A quick pilot study reveals: (i) a scene sketch does not necessarily contain all objects in the corresponding photo, due to the subjective holistic interpretation of scenes, (ii) there exists significant empty (white) regions as a result of object-level abstraction, and as a result, (iii) existing scene-level fine-grained sketch-based image retrieval methods collapse as scene sketches become more partial. To solve this "partial" problem, we advocate for a simple set-based approach using optimal transport (OT) to model cross-modal region associativity in a partially-aware fashion. Importantly, we improve upon OT to further account for holistic partialness by comparing intra-modal adjacency matrices. Our proposed method is not only robust to partial scene-sketches but also yields state-of-the-art performance on existing datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们仔细研究了困扰场景级草图研究的一个重要观察结果——场景草图的很大一部分是“部分的”。一项快速试点研究表明：（i）由于对场景的主观整体解释，场景草图不一定包含相应照片中的所有对象，（ii）由于对象级抽象而存在显着的空白（白色）区域，因此，（iii）随着场景草图变得更加局部，现有的场景级细粒度基于草图的图像检索方法崩溃了。为了解决这个“部分”问题，我们提倡一种简单的基于集合的方法，使用最优传输（OT）以部分感知的方式对跨模式区域关联性进行建模。重要的是，我们改进了 OT，通过比较模态内邻接矩阵来进一步解释整体偏向性。我们提出的方法不仅对部分场景草图具有鲁棒性，而且还能在现有数据集上产生最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文针对场景级细粒度草图到图像检索（FG-SBIR）中部分输入草图的问题，提出了一种鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有场景级FG-SBIR方法在处理不完整草图时表现不佳，因为实际场景草图常缺失部分物体且存在大量空白区域，导致跨模态对齐失效。
AI.method: 采用基于最优传输（OT）的集合方法建模跨模态区域关联性，并通过比较模态内邻接矩阵改进OT以适应整体部分性。
AI.result: 所提方法在部分草图输入下保持鲁棒性，并在现有数据集上达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了部分场景草图的检索难题，为FG-SBIR领域提供了新的技术思路。

authors_text: Yu Chen,Sanjeev Khanna,Zihan Tan
title: Sublinear Algorithms and Lower Bounds for Estimating MST and TSP Cost in General Metrics
title_zh: 用于估计一般指标中 MST 和 TSP 成本的次线性算法和下界
abstract: We consider the design of sublinear space and query complexity algorithms for estimating the cost of a minimum spanning tree (MST) and the cost of a minimum traveling salesman (TSP) tour in a metric on $n$ points. We first consider the $o(n)$-space regime and show that, when the input is a stream of all $\binom{n}{2}$ entries of the metric, for any $α\ge 2$, both MST and TSP cost can be $α$-approximated using $\tilde{O}(n/α)$ space, and that $Ω(n/α^2)$ space is necessary for this task. Moreover, we show that even if the streaming algorithm is allowed $p$ passes over a metric stream, it still requires $\tildeΩ(\sqrt{n/αp^2})$ space. We next consider the semi-streaming regime, where computing even the exact MST cost is easy and the main challenge is to estimate TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$. We show that, if the input is a stream of all edges of the weighted graph that induces the underlying metric, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, any one-pass $(2-\varepsilon)$-approximation of TSP cost requires $Ω(\varepsilon^2 n^2)$ space; on the other hand, there is an $\tilde{O}(n)$ space two-pass algorithm that approximates the TSP cost to within a factor of 1.96. Finally, we consider the query complexity of estimating metric TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$, when the algorithm is given access to a matrix that specifies pairwise distances between all points. For MST estimation in this model, it is known that a $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation is achievable with $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ queries. We design an algorithm that performs $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ distance queries and achieves a strictly better than $2$-approximation when either the metric is known to contain a spanning tree supported on weight-$1$ edges or the algorithm is given access to a minimum spanning tree of the graph.
summary: We consider the design of sublinear space and query complexity algorithms for estimating the cost of a minimum spanning tree (MST) and the cost of a minimum traveling salesman (TSP) tour in a metric on $n$ points. We first consider the $o(n)$-space regime and show that, when the input is a stream of all $\binom{n}{2}$ entries of the metric, for any $α\ge 2$, both MST and TSP cost can be $α$-approximated using $\tilde{O}(n/α)$ space, and that $Ω(n/α^2)$ space is necessary for this task. Moreover, we show that even if the streaming algorithm is allowed $p$ passes over a metric stream, it still requires $\tildeΩ(\sqrt{n/αp^2})$ space. We next consider the semi-streaming regime, where computing even the exact MST cost is easy and the main challenge is to estimate TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$. We show that, if the input is a stream of all edges of the weighted graph that induces the underlying metric, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, any one-pass $(2-\varepsilon)$-approximation of TSP cost requires $Ω(\varepsilon^2 n^2)$ space; on the other hand, there is an $\tilde{O}(n)$ space two-pass algorithm that approximates the TSP cost to within a factor of 1.96. Finally, we consider the query complexity of estimating metric TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$, when the algorithm is given access to a matrix that specifies pairwise distances between all points. For MST estimation in this model, it is known that a $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation is achievable with $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ queries. We design an algorithm that performs $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ distance queries and achieves a strictly better than $2$-approximation when either the metric is known to contain a spanning tree supported on weight-$1$ edges or the algorithm is given access to a minimum spanning tree of the graph.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑次线性空间和查询复杂度算法的设计，用于估计最小生成树（MST）的成本和最小旅行商（TSP）旅行的成本（以$n$点为度量）。我们首先考虑 $o(n)$ 空间体系，并表明，当输入是度量的所有 $\binom{n}{2}$ 条目的流时，对于任何 $α\ge 2$，MST 和 TSP 成本都可以使用 $\tilde{O}(n/α)$ 空间进行 $α$ 近似，并且 $Ω(n/α^2)$ 空间对于此任务是必要的。此外，我们表明，即使流算法允许 $p$ 通过度量流，它仍然需要 $\tildeΩ(\sqrt{n/αp^2})$ 空间。接下来我们考虑半流机制，其中计算精确的 MST 成本很容易，主要挑战是将 TSP 成本估计在严格优于 2 美元的因素内。我们证明，如果输入是产生基础度量的加权图的所有边的流，则对于任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，任何单程 $(2-\varepsilon)$ 近似 TSP 成本都需要 $Ω(\varepsilon^2 n^2)$ 空间；另一方面，有一种 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 空间两遍算法，可以将 TSP 成本近似到 1.96 倍以内。最后，当算法有权访问指定所有点之间的成对距离的矩阵时，我们考虑将估计度量 TSP 成本的查询复杂性控制在严格优于 2 美元的因素内。对于该模型中的 MST 估计，已知可以通过 $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ 查询实现 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似。我们设计了一种算法，该算法执行 $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ 距离查询，并在已知度量包含权重 $1$ 边上支持的生成树或算法有权访问图的最小生成树时，获得严格优于 $2$ 的近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在一般度量空间中，设计用于估计最小生成树（MST）和旅行商问题（TSP）成本的亚线性空间和查询复杂度算法。
AI.motivation: 在大规模数据场景下，传统算法需要存储全部数据，而亚线性空间算法能够在不存储全部数据的情况下高效估计MST和TSP成本，具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 采用流式算法、半流式模型及查询模型，分析不同场景下的空间复杂度与近似比关系，设计多趟算法并结合最小生成树结构优化查询效率。
AI.result: 证明了在流式模型下，MST和TSP的α近似需Ω(n/α²)空间；半流式模型中，任何(2-ε)近似TSP需Ω(ε²n²)空间，但两趟算法可在1.96近似下使用O(n)空间；查询模型中，通过O(n^1.5)次查询可实现严格优于2倍近似的TSP估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文明确了空间复杂度与近似比的理论界限，提出了高效算法，揭示了流式与查询模型下MST/TSP估计的可行性与性能瓶颈。

method: 采用流式算法、半流式模型及查询模型，分析不同场景下的空间复杂度与近似比关系，设计多趟算法并结合最小生成树结构优化查询效率。
result: 证明了在流式模型下，MST和TSP的α近似需Ω(n/α²)空间；半流式模型中，任何(2-ε)近似TSP需Ω(ε²n²)空间，但两趟算法可在1.96近似下使用O(n)空间；查询模型中，通过O(n^1.5)次查询可实现严格优于2倍近似的TSP估计。
conclusion: 本文明确了空间复杂度与近似比的理论界限，提出了高效算法，揭示了流式与查询模型下MST/TSP估计的可行性与性能瓶颈。
search_text: Sublinear Algorithms and Lower Bounds for Estimating MST and TSP Cost in General Metrics 用于估计一般指标中 MST 和 TSP 成本的次线性算法和下界 We consider the design of sublinear space and query complexity algorithms for estimating the cost of a minimum spanning tree (MST) and the cost of a minimum traveling salesman (TSP) tour in a metric on $n$ points. We first consider the $o(n)$-space regime and show that, when the input is a stream of all $\binom{n}{2}$ entries of the metric, for any $α\ge 2$, both MST and TSP cost can be $α$-approximated using $\tilde{O}(n/α)$ space, and that $Ω(n/α^2)$ space is necessary for this task. Moreover, we show that even if the streaming algorithm is allowed $p$ passes over a metric stream, it still requires $\tildeΩ(\sqrt{n/αp^2})$ space. We next consider the semi-streaming regime, where computing even the exact MST cost is easy and the main challenge is to estimate TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$. We show that, if the input is a stream of all edges of the weighted graph that induces the underlying metric, for any $\varepsilon > 0$, any one-pass $(2-\varepsilon)$-approximation of TSP cost requires $Ω(\varepsilon^2 n^2)$ space; on the other hand, there is an $\tilde{O}(n)$ space two-pass algorithm that approximates the TSP cost to within a factor of 1.96. Finally, we consider the query complexity of estimating metric TSP cost to within a factor that is strictly better than $2$, when the algorithm is given access to a matrix that specifies pairwise distances between all points. For MST estimation in this model, it is known that a $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation is achievable with $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ queries. We design an algorithm that performs $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ distance queries and achieves a strictly better than $2$-approximation when either the metric is known to contain a spanning tree supported on weight-$1$ edges or the algorithm is given access to a minimum spanning tree of the graph. 我们考虑次线性空间和查询复杂度算法的设计，用于估计最小生成树（MST）的成本和最小旅行商（TSP）旅行的成本（以$n$点为度量）。我们首先考虑 $o(n)$ 空间体系，并表明，当输入是度量的所有 $\binom{n}{2}$ 条目的流时，对于任何 $α\ge 2$，MST 和 TSP 成本都可以使用 $\tilde{O}(n/α)$ 空间进行 $α$ 近似，并且 $Ω(n/α^2)$ 空间对于此任务是必要的。此外，我们表明，即使流算法允许 $p$ 通过度量流，它仍然需要 $\tildeΩ(\sqrt{n/αp^2})$ 空间。接下来我们考虑半流机制，其中计算精确的 MST 成本很容易，主要挑战是将 TSP 成本估计在严格优于 2 美元的因素内。我们证明，如果输入是产生基础度量的加权图的所有边的流，则对于任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，任何单程 $(2-\varepsilon)$ 近似 TSP 成本都需要 $Ω(\varepsilon^2 n^2)$ 空间；另一方面，有一种 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 空间两遍算法，可以将 TSP 成本近似到 1.96 倍以内。最后，当算法有权访问指定所有点之间的成对距离的矩阵时，我们考虑将估计度量 TSP 成本的查询复杂性控制在严格优于 2 美元的因素内。对于该模型中的 MST 估计，已知可以通过 $\tilde{O}(n/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ 查询实现 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似。我们设计了一种算法，该算法执行 $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ 距离查询，并在已知度量包含权重 $1$ 边上支持的生成树或算法有权访问图的最小生成树时，获得严格优于 $2$ 的近似值。 本文研究在一般度量空间中，设计用于估计最小生成树（MST）和旅行商问题（TSP）成本的亚线性空间和查询复杂度算法。 Yu Chen,Sanjeev Khanna,Zihan Tan cs.DS

authors_text: Mayank Patwari,Ralf Gutjahr,Rainer Raupach,Andreas Maier
title: Limited Parameter Denoising for Low-dose X-ray Computed Tomography Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的低剂量 X 射线计算机断层扫描的有限参数去噪
comment: Accepted to Medical Physics. 30 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, 2 algorithms
comments: Accepted to Medical Physics. 30 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, 2 algorithms
abstract: The use of deep learning has successfully solved several problems in the field of medical imaging. Deep learning has been applied to the CT denoising problem successfully. However, the use of deep learning requires large amounts of data to train deep convolutional networks (CNNs). Moreover, due to large parameter count, such deep CNNs may cause unexpected results. In this study, we introduce a novel CT denoising framework, which has interpretable behaviour, and provides useful results with limited data. We employ bilateral filtering in both the projection and volume domains to remove noise. To account for non-stationary noise, we tune the $σ$ parameters of the volume for every projection view, and for every volume pixel. The tuning is carried out by two deep CNNs. Due to impracticality of labelling, the two deep CNNs are trained via a Deep-Q reinforcement learning task. The reward for the task is generated by using a custom reward function represented by a neural network. Our experiments were carried out on abdominal scans for the Mayo Clinic TCIA dataset, and the AAPM Low Dose CT Grand Challenge. Our denoising framework has excellent denoising performance increasing the PSNR from 28.53 to 28.93, and increasing the SSIM from 0.8952 to 0.9204. We outperform several state-of-the-art deep CNNs, which have several orders of magnitude higher number of parameters (p-value (PSNR) = 0.000, p-value (SSIM) = 0.000). Our method does not introduce any blurring, which is introduced by MSE loss based methods, or any deep learning artifacts, which are introduced by WGAN based models. Our ablation studies show that parameter tuning and using our reward network results in the best possible results.

Our denoising framework has excellent denoising performance increasing the PSNR from 28.53 to 28.93, and increasing the SSIM from 0.8952 to 0.9204. abstract_zh: 深度学习的运用成功解决了医学成像领域的多个问题。深度学习已成功应用于CT去噪问题。然而，深度学习的使用需要大量数据来训练深度卷积网络（CNN）。此外，由于参数数量较多，如此深的 CNN 可能会导致意想不到的结果。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新颖的 CT 去噪框架，该框架具有可解释的行为，并可以利用有限的数据提供有用的结果。我们在投影和体积域中采用双边滤波来消除噪声。为了解决非平稳噪声，我们为每个投影视图和每个体积像素调整体积的 $σ$ 参数。调整由两个深度 CNN 进行。由于标记的不切实际，这两个深度 CNN 通过 Deep-Q 强化学习任务进行训练。任务的奖励是通过使用由神经网络表示的自定义奖励函数生成的。我们的实验是针对 Mayo Clinic TCIA 数据集和 AAPM 低剂量 CT 大挑战的腹部扫描进行的。我们的去噪框架具有出色的去噪性能，将PSNR从28.53增加到28.93，并将SSIM从0.8952增加到0.9204。我们的性能优于几种最先进的深度 CNN，后者的参数数量高出几个数量级（p 值 (PSNR) = 0.000，p 值 (SSIM) = 0.000）。我们的方法不会引入任何模糊（这是由基于 MSE 损失的方法引入的），也不会引入任何深度学习工件（这是由基于 WGAN 的模型引入的）。我们的消融研究表明，参数调整和使用我们的奖励网络会产生最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的低剂量CT图像去噪框架，通过有限参数调整和双边滤波技术，在减少数据需求的同时提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法需大量数据训练且参数过多易导致不稳定结果，而现有去噪方法可能引入模糊或伪影，需更高效且参数可控的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合投影域与体积域的双边滤波，利用两个深度CNN动态调整σ参数，并通过深度Q强化学习框架优化参数，奖励函数由神经网络生成以避免人工标注依赖。
AI.result: 在腹部CT数据集上，PSNR提升0.40dB（28.53→28.93），SSIM提升0.0252（0.8952→0.9204），显著优于参数量级更高的SOTA方法（p值均<0.001），且无模糊或伪影问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过参数自适应调整与强化学习机制，在有限数据下实现高效去噪，验证了有限参数模型在低剂量CT应用中的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: R. Gnana Praveen,Wheidima Carneiro de Melo,Nasib Ullah,Haseeb Aslam,Osama Zeeshan,Théo Denorme,Marco Pedersoli,Alessandro Koerich,Simon Bacon,Patrick Cardinal,Eric Granger
title: A Joint Cross-Attention Model for Audio-Visual Fusion in Dimensional Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 维度情感识别中视听融合的联合交叉注意模型
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.05222
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.05222
abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition has recently gained much attention since it can leverage diverse and complementary relationships over multiple modalities (e.g., audio, visual, biosignals, etc.), and can provide some robustness to noisy modalities. Most state-of-the-art methods for audio-visual (A-V) fusion rely on recurrent networks or conventional attention mechanisms that do not effectively leverage the complementary nature of A-V modalities. In this paper, we focus on dimensional emotion recognition based on the fusion of facial and vocal modalities extracted from videos. Specifically, we propose a joint cross-attention model that relies on the complementary relationships to extract the salient features across A-V modalities, allowing for accurate prediction of continuous values of valence and arousal. The proposed fusion model efficiently leverages the inter-modal relationships, while reducing the heterogeneity between the features. In particular, it computes the cross-attention weights based on correlation between the combined feature representation and individual modalities. By deploying the combined A-V feature representation into the cross-attention module, the performance of our fusion module improves significantly over the vanilla cross-attention module. Experimental results on validation-set videos from the AffWild2 dataset indicate that our proposed A-V fusion model provides a cost-effective solution that can outperform state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/praveena2j/JointCrossAttentional-AV-Fusion.

Most state-of-the-art methods for audio-visual (A-V) fusion rely on recurrent networks or conventional attention mechanisms that do not effectively leverage the complementary nature of A-V modalities. In this paper, we focus on dimensional emotion recognition based on the fusion of facial and vocal modalities extracted from videos. Specifically, we propose a joint cross-attention model that relies on the complementary relationships to extract the salient features across A-V modalities, allowing for accurate prediction of continuous values of valence and arousal. The proposed fusion model efficiently leverages the inter-modal relationships, while reducing the heterogeneity between the features. In particular, it computes the cross-attention weights based on correlation between the combined feature representation and individual modalities. By deploying the combined A-V feature representation into the cross-attention module, the performance of our fusion module improves significantly over the vanilla cross-attention module. Experimental results on validation-set videos from the AffWild2 dataset indicate that our proposed A-V fusion model provides a cost-effective solution that can outperform state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/praveena2j/JointCrossAttentional-AV-Fusion.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感识别最近受到了广泛关注，因为它可以利用多种模态（例如音频、视觉、生物信号等）的多样化和互补关系，并且可以为噪声模态提供一定的鲁棒性。大多数最先进的视听（A-V）融合方法依赖于循环网络或传统的注意力机制，而这些机制不能有效地利用 A-V 模式的互补性。在本文中，我们专注于基于从视频中提取的面部和声音模态融合的维度情感识别。具体来说，我们提出了一种联合交叉注意力模型，该模型依赖于互补关系来提取跨 A-V 模态的显着特征，从而可以准确预测效价和唤醒的连续值。所提出的融合模型有效地利用了模态间关系，同时减少了特征之间的异质性。特别是，它根据组合特征表示和各个模态之间的相关性来计算交叉注意权重。通过将组合的 A-V 特征表示部署到交叉注意模块中，我们的融合模块的性能比普通交叉注意模块显着提高。 AffWild2 数据集验证集视频的实验结果表明，我们提出的 A-V 融合模型提供了一种经济有效的解决方案，可以超越最先进的方法。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/praveena2j/JointCrossAttentional-AV-Fusion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合交叉注意力模型，用于融合音频和视觉模态以提升维度情绪识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉（A-V）融合方法未能有效利用两种模态的互补性，导致在噪声环境下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计联合交叉注意力机制，通过计算融合特征与单模态特征间的相关性生成注意力权重，减少模态间异质性并提取显著特征。
AI.result: 在AffWild2数据集验证集上，该模型显著优于传统交叉注意力模块及现有先进方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型为音频-视觉融合情绪识别提供了高效且成本较低的解决方案，有效提升了连续情绪值（效价与唤醒度）预测性能。

search_text: A Joint Cross-Attention Model for Audio-Visual Fusion in Dimensional Emotion Recognition 维度情感识别中视听融合的联合交叉注意模型 Multimodal emotion recognition has recently gained much attention since it can leverage diverse and complementary relationships over multiple modalities (e.g., audio, visual, biosignals, etc.), and can provide some robustness to noisy modalities. Most state-of-the-art methods for audio-visual (A-V) fusion rely on recurrent networks or conventional attention mechanisms that do not effectively leverage the complementary nature of A-V modalities. In this paper, we focus on dimensional emotion recognition based on the fusion of facial and vocal modalities extracted from videos. Specifically, we propose a joint cross-attention model that relies on the complementary relationships to extract the salient features across A-V modalities, allowing for accurate prediction of continuous values of valence and arousal. The proposed fusion model efficiently leverages the inter-modal relationships, while reducing the heterogeneity between the features. In particular, it computes the cross-attention weights based on correlation between the combined feature representation and individual modalities. By deploying the combined A-V feature representation into the cross-attention module, the performance of our fusion module improves significantly over the vanilla cross-attention module. Experimental results on validation-set videos from the AffWild2 dataset indicate that our proposed A-V fusion model provides a cost-effective solution that can outperform state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/praveena2j/JointCrossAttentional-AV-Fusion. 多模态情感识别最近受到了广泛关注，因为它可以利用多种模态（例如音频、视觉、生物信号等）的多样化和互补关系，并且可以为噪声模态提供一定的鲁棒性。大多数最先进的视听（A-V）融合方法依赖于循环网络或传统的注意力机制，而这些机制不能有效地利用 A-V 模式的互补性。在本文中，我们专注于基于从视频中提取的面部和声音模态融合的维度情感识别。具体来说，我们提出了一种联合交叉注意力模型，该模型依赖于互补关系来提取跨 A-V 模态的显着特征，从而可以准确预测效价和唤醒的连续值。所提出的融合模型有效地利用了模态间关系，同时减少了特征之间的异质性。特别是，它根据组合特征表示和各个模态之间的相关性来计算交叉注意权重。通过将组合的 A-V 特征表示部署到交叉注意模块中，我们的融合模块的性能比普通交叉注意模块显着提高。 AffWild2 数据集验证集视频的实验结果表明，我们提出的 A-V 融合模型提供了一种经济有效的解决方案，可以超越最先进的方法。该代码可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/praveena2j/JointCrossAttentional-AV-Fusion。 本文提出一种联合交叉注意力模型，用于融合音频和视觉模态以提升维度情绪识别的准确性。 R. authors_text: Domenico Amato,Giosue' Lo Bosco,Raffaele Giancarlo
title: On the Suitability of Neural Networks as Building Blocks for The Design of Efficient Learned Indexes
title_zh: 神经网络作为高效学习索引设计构建模块的适用性
abstract: With the aim of obtaining time/space improvements in classic Data Structures, an emerging trend is to combine Machine Learning techniques with the ones proper of Data Structures. This new area goes under the name of Learned Data Structures. The motivation for its study is a perceived change of paradigm in Computer Architectures that would favour the use of Graphics Processing Units and Tensor Processing Units over conventional Central Processing Units. In turn, that would favour the use of Neural Networks as building blocks of Classic Data Structures. Indeed, Learned Bloom Filters, which are one of the main pillars of Learned Data Structures, make extensive use of Neural Networks to improve the performance of classic Filters. However, no use of Neural Networks is reported in the realm of Learned Indexes, which is another main pillar of that new area. In this contribution, we provide the first, and much needed, comparative experimental analysis regarding the use of Neural Networks as building blocks of Learned Indexes. The results reported here highlight the need for the design of very specialized Neural Networks tailored to Learned Indexes and it establishes a solid ground for those developments. Our findings, methodologically important, are of interest to both Scientists and Engineers working in Neural Networks Design and Implementation, in view also of the importance of the application areas involved, e.g., Computer Networks and Data Bases.
summary: With the aim of obtaining time/space improvements in classic Data Structures, an emerging trend is to combine Machine Learning techniques with the ones proper of Data Structures. This new area goes under the name of Learned Data Structures. The motivation for its study is a perceived change of paradigm in Computer Architectures that would favour the use of Graphics Processing Units and Tensor Processing Units over conventional Central Processing Units. In turn, that would favour the use of Neural Networks as building blocks of Classic Data Structures. Indeed, Learned Bloom Filters, which are one of the main pillars of Learned Data Structures, make extensive use of Neural Networks to improve the performance of classic Filters. However, no use of Neural Networks is reported in the realm of Learned Indexes, which is another main pillar of that new area. In this contribution, we provide the first, and much needed, comparative experimental analysis regarding the use of Neural Networks as building blocks of Learned Indexes. The results reported here highlight the need for the design of very specialized Neural Networks tailored to Learned Indexes and it establishes a solid ground for those developments. Our findings, methodologically important, are of interest to both Scientists and Engineers working in Neural Networks Design and Implementation, in view also of the importance of the application areas involved, e.g., Computer Networks and Data Bases.
abstract_zh: 为了在经典数据结构中获得时间/空间改进，一个新兴趋势是将机器学习技术与数据结构本身相结合。这个新领域被称为“学习数据结构”。其研究的动机是计算机体系结构范式的明显变化，与传统中央处理单元相比，有利于使用图形处理单元和张量处理单元。反过来，这将有利于使用神经网络作为经典数据结构的构建块。事实上，学习型布隆过滤器是学习型数据结构的主要支柱之一，它广泛使用神经网络来提高经典过滤器的性能。然而，在学习索引领域没有使用神经网络的报道，而学习索引是该新领域的另一个主要支柱。在这篇文章中，我们提供了第一个也是急需的关于使用神经网络作为学习索引构建块的比较实验分析。这里报告的结果强调需要设计专门针对学习索引的神经网络，并为这些发展奠定了坚实的基础。我们的研究结果在方法论上很重要，对于从事神经网络设计和实现的科学家和工程师来说都很感兴趣，同时考虑到所涉及的应用领域（例如计算机网络和数据库）的重要性。

AI.tldr: 探讨神经网络作为构建高效学习索引的模块的适用性，并进行比较实验分析。
AI.motivation: 由于计算机架构向GPU/TPU转变，神经网络在数据结构中的应用增加，但学习索引领域尚未有相关研究，需进行探索。
AI.method: 通过比较实验分析，评估不同神经网络作为学习索引构建模块的效果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明需要专门设计适用于学习索引的神经网络，并为后续研究提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调设计专用神经网络的重要性，对神经网络设计及数据库等领域具有参考价值。

authors_text: Ruiyang Zhao,Zhao He,Tao Wang,Suhao Qiu,Pawel Herman,Yanle Hu,Chencheng Zhang,Dinggang Shen,Bomin Sun,Guang-Zhong Yang,Yuan Feng
title: A Long Short-term Memory Based Recurrent Neural Network for Interventional MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于长短期记忆的介入性 MRI 重建循环神经网络
abstract: Interventional magnetic resonance imaging (i-MRI) for surgical guidance could help visualize the interventional process such as deep brain stimulation (DBS), improving the surgery performance and patient outcome. Different from retrospective reconstruction in conventional dynamic imaging, i-MRI for DBS has to acquire and reconstruct the interventional images sequentially online. Here we proposed a convolutional long short-term memory (Conv-LSTM) based recurrent neural network (RNN), or ConvLR, to reconstruct interventional images with golden-angle radial sampling. By using an initializer and Conv-LSTM blocks, the priors from the pre-operative reference image and intra-operative frames were exploited for reconstructing the current frame. Data consistency for radial sampling was implemented by a soft-projection method. To improve the reconstruction accuracy, an adversarial learning strategy was adopted. A set of interventional images based on the pre-operative and post-operative MR images were simulated for algorithm validation. Results showed with only 10 radial spokes, ConvLR provided the best performance compared with state-of-the-art methods, giving an acceleration up to 40 folds. The proposed algorithm has the potential to achieve real-time i-MRI for DBS and can be used for general purpose MR-guided intervention.
summary: Interventional magnetic resonance imaging (i-MRI) for surgical guidance could help visualize the interventional process such as deep brain stimulation (DBS), improving the surgery performance and patient outcome. Different from retrospective reconstruction in conventional dynamic imaging, i-MRI for DBS has to acquire and reconstruct the interventional images sequentially online. Here we proposed a convolutional long short-term memory (Conv-LSTM) based recurrent neural network (RNN), or ConvLR, to reconstruct interventional images with golden-angle radial sampling. By using an initializer and Conv-LSTM blocks, the priors from the pre-operative reference image and intra-operative frames were exploited for reconstructing the current frame. Data consistency for radial sampling was implemented by a soft-projection method. To improve the reconstruction accuracy, an adversarial learning strategy was adopted. A set of interventional images based on the pre-operative and post-operative MR images were simulated for algorithm validation. Results showed with only 10 radial spokes, ConvLR provided the best performance compared with state-of-the-art methods, giving an acceleration up to 40 folds. The proposed algorithm has the potential to achieve real-time i-MRI for DBS and can be used for general purpose MR-guided intervention.
abstract_zh: 用于手术指导的介入磁共振成像（i-MRI）可以帮助可视化介入过程，例如深部脑刺激（DBS），从而改善手术效果和患者预后。与传统动态成像中的回顾性重建不同，DBS i-MRI 必须在线顺序获取和重建介入图像。在这里，我们提出了一种基于卷积长短期记忆（Conv-LSTM）的循环神经网络（RNN）或ConvLR，以通过黄金角径向采样重建介入图像。通过使用初始化器和 Conv-LSTM 块，利用术前参考图像和术中帧的先验来重建当前帧。径向采样的数据一致性是通过软投影方法实现的。为了提高重建精度，采用对抗性学习策略。模拟一组基于术前和术后 MR 图像的介入图像以进行算法验证。结果显示，与最先进的方法相比，ConvLR 仅使用 10 个径向辐条即可提供最佳性能，加速度高达 40 倍。所提出的算法有潜力实现 DBS 的实时 i-MRI，并可用于通用 MR 引导干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于卷积长短期记忆网络（Conv-LSTM）的递归神经网络（ConvLR），用于实时介入式磁共振成像（i-MRI）的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统动态成像的回顾性重建无法满足介入手术中实时在线图像重建的需求，而介入式MRI（i-MRI）对于深部脑刺激（DBS）等手术的实时可视化至关重要。
AI.method: 采用包含初始化模块和Conv-LSTM块的ConvLR网络，结合术前参考图像与术中帧的先验信息，并通过软投影方法实现径向采样的数据一致性，同时引入对抗学习策略提升重建精度。
AI.result: 在仅使用10条径向采样轨迹的情况下，ConvLR相较现有方法实现最高40倍加速，且重建效果最优。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有望实现DBS等手术的实时i-MRI，并可推广至通用的MRI引导干预场景。

motivation: 传统动态成像的回顾性重建无法满足介入手术中实时在线图像重建的需求，而介入式MRI（i-MRI）对于深部脑刺激（DBS）等手术的实时可视化至关重要。
method: 采用包含初始化模块和Conv-LSTM块的ConvLR网络，结合术前参考图像与术中帧的先验信息，并通过软投影方法实现径向采样的数据一致性，同时引入对抗学习策略提升重建精度。
result: 在仅使用10条径向采样轨迹的情况下，ConvLR相较现有方法实现最高40倍加速，且重建效果最优。
conclusion: 该算法有望实现DBS等手术的实时i-MRI，并可推广至通用的MRI引导干预场景。
search_text: A Long Short-term Memory Based Recurrent Neural Network for Interventional MRI Reconstruction 基于长短期记忆的介入性 MRI 重建循环神经网络 Interventional magnetic resonance imaging (i-MRI) for surgical guidance could help visualize the interventional process such as deep brain stimulation (DBS), improving the surgery performance and patient outcome. Different from retrospective reconstruction in conventional dynamic imaging, i-MRI for DBS has to acquire and reconstruct the interventional images sequentially online. Here we proposed a convolutional long short-term memory (Conv-LSTM) based recurrent neural network (RNN), or ConvLR, to reconstruct interventional images with golden-angle radial sampling. By using an initializer and Conv-LSTM blocks, the priors from the pre-operative reference image and intra-operative frames were exploited for reconstructing the current frame. Data consistency for radial sampling was implemented by a soft-projection method. To improve the reconstruction accuracy, an adversarial learning strategy was adopted. A set of interventional images based on the pre-operative and post-operative MR images were simulated for algorithm validation. Results showed with only 10 radial spokes, ConvLR provided the best performance compared with state-of-the-art methods, giving an acceleration up to 40 folds. The proposed algorithm has the potential to achieve real-time i-MRI for DBS and can be used for general purpose MR-guided intervention. 用于手术指导的介入磁共振成像（i-MRI）可以帮助可视化介入过程，例如深部脑刺激（DBS），从而改善手术效果和患者预后。与传统动态成像中的回顾性重建不同，DBS i-MRI 必须在线顺序获取和重建介入图像。在这里，我们提出了一种基于卷积长短期记忆（Conv-LSTM）的循环神经网络（RNN）或ConvLR，以通过黄金角径向采样重建介入图像。通过使用初始化器和 Conv-LSTM 块，利用术前参考图像和术中帧的先验来重建当前帧。径向采样的数据一致性是通过软投影方法实现的。为了提高重建精度，采用对抗性学习策略。模拟一组基于术前和术后 MR 图像的介入图像以进行算法验证。结果显示，与最先进的方法相比，ConvLR 仅使用 10 个径向辐条即可提供最佳性能，加速度高达 40 倍。所提出的算法有潜力实现 DBS 的实时 i-MRI，并可用于通用 MR 引导干预。 本文提出基于卷积长短期记忆网络（Conv-LSTM）的递归神经网络（ConvLR），用于实时介入式磁共振成像（i-MRI）的图像重建。 Ruiyang Zhao,Zhao He,Tao Wang,Suhao Qiu,Pawel Herman,Yanle Hu,Chencheng Zhang,Dinggang Shen,Bomin Sun,Guang-Zhong Yang,Yuan Feng cs.CV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Yuki Saito,Yuto Nishimura,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Kentaro Tachibana,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: STUDIES: Corpus of Japanese Empathetic Dialogue Speech Towards Friendly Voice Agent
title_zh: 研究：针对友好语音代理的日语移情对话语音语料库
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for INTERSPEECH2022, project page: http://sython.org/Corpus/STUDIES
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for INTERSPEECH2022, project page: http://sython.org/Corpus/STUDIES
abstract: We present STUDIES, a new speech corpus for developing a voice agent that can speak in a friendly manner. Humans naturally control their speech prosody to empathize with each other. By incorporating this "empathetic dialogue" behavior into a spoken dialogue system, we can develop a voice agent that can respond to a user more naturally. We designed the STUDIES corpus to include a speaker who speaks with empathy for the interlocutor's emotion explicitly. We describe our methodology to construct an empathetic dialogue speech corpus and report the analysis results of the STUDIES corpus. We conducted a text-to-speech experiment to initially investigate how we can develop more natural voice agent that can tune its speaking style corresponding to the interlocutor's emotion. The results show that the use of interlocutor's emotion label and conversational context embedding can produce speech with the same degree of naturalness as that synthesized by using the agent's emotion label. Our project page of the STUDIES corpus is http://sython.org/Corpus/STUDIES.
summary: We present STUDIES, a new speech corpus for developing a voice agent that can speak in a friendly manner. Humans naturally control their speech prosody to empathize with each other. By incorporating this "empathetic dialogue" behavior into a spoken dialogue system, we can develop a voice agent that can respond to a user more naturally. We designed the STUDIES corpus to include a speaker who speaks with empathy for the interlocutor's emotion explicitly. We describe our methodology to construct an empathetic dialogue speech corpus and report the analysis results of the STUDIES corpus. We conducted a text-to-speech experiment to initially investigate how we can develop more natural voice agent that can tune its speaking style corresponding to the interlocutor's emotion. The results show that the use of interlocutor's emotion label and conversational context embedding can produce speech with the same degree of naturalness as that synthesized by using the agent's emotion label. Our project page of the STUDIES corpus is http://sython.org/Corpus/STUDIES.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 STUDIES，一个新的语音语料库，用于开发能够以友好方式说话的语音代理。人类自然地控制自己的言语韵律以相互理解。通过将这种“同理心对话”行为融入到语音对话系统中，我们可以开发出能够更自然地响应用户的语音代理。我们设计的“研究”语料库中包含一位说话者，他在说话时明确地表达了对对话者情感的同理心。我们描述了构建移情对话语音语料库的方法，并报告了研究语料库的分析结果。我们进行了文本转语音实验，初步研究如何开发更自然的语音代理，根据对话者的情绪调整其说话风格。结果表明，使用对话者的情感标签和会话上下文嵌入可以产生与使用代理的情感标签合成的语音具有相同程度的自然度。我们的 STUDIES 语料库项目页面是 http://sython.org/Corpus/STUDIES。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STUDIES语料库，旨在开发能够进行友好对话的语音代理，通过纳入共情对话行为提升语音交互的自然性。
AI.motivation: 人类通过调整语音韵律实现共情，现有语音代理缺乏对对话者情绪的自然响应，需构建包含共情对话的语料库以改进语音代理的交互能力。
AI.method: 设计包含明确共情对话的语料库构建方法，结合对话者情绪标签与上下文嵌入，进行文本到语音实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用对话者情绪标签与上下文嵌入生成的语音自然度与使用代理自身情绪标签的效果相当。
AI.conclusion: STUDIES语料库为开发能根据对话者情绪调整语音风格的友好语音代理提供了有效数据支持。

authors: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_json: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
authors_text: Cheng Liu,Erik-Jan van Kampen,Guido C. H. E. de Croon
title: Adaptive Risk-Tendency: Nano Drone Navigation in Cluttered Environments with Distributional Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 自适应风险倾向：利用分布式强化学习在杂乱环境中进行纳米无人机导航
abstract: Enabling the capability of assessing risk and making risk-aware decisions is essential to applying reinforcement learning to safety-critical robots like drones. In this paper, we investigate a specific case where a nano quadcopter robot learns to navigate an apriori-unknown cluttered environment under partial observability. We present a distributional reinforcement learning framework to generate adaptive risk-tendency policies. Specifically, we propose to use lower tail conditional variance of the learnt return distribution as intrinsic uncertainty estimation, and use exponentially weighted average forecasting (EWAF) to adapt the risk-tendency in accordance with the estimated uncertainty. In simulation and real-world empirical results, we show that (1) the most effective risk-tendency vary across states, (2) the agent with adaptive risk-tendency achieves superior performance compared to risk-neutral policy or risk-averse policy baselines.
summary: Enabling the capability of assessing risk and making risk-aware decisions is essential to applying reinforcement learning to safety-critical robots like drones. In this paper, we investigate a specific case where a nano quadcopter robot learns to navigate an apriori-unknown cluttered environment under partial observability. We present a distributional reinforcement learning framework to generate adaptive risk-tendency policies. Specifically, we propose to use lower tail conditional variance of the learnt return distribution as intrinsic uncertainty estimation, and use exponentially weighted average forecasting (EWAF) to adapt the risk-tendency in accordance with the estimated uncertainty. In simulation and real-world empirical results, we show that (1) the most effective risk-tendency vary across states, (2) the agent with adaptive risk-tendency achieves superior performance compared to risk-neutral policy or risk-averse policy baselines.
abstract_zh: 实现风险评估和做出风险意识决策的能力对于将强化学习应用于无人机等安全关键型机器人至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了一个具体案例，其中纳米四轴飞行器机器人学习在部分可观察性下导航先验未知的杂乱环境。我们提出了一个分布式强化学习框架来生成自适应风险倾向策略。具体来说，我们建议使用学习收益分布的下尾条件方差作为内在不确定性估计，并使用指数加权平均预测（EWAF）根据估计的不确定性来调整风险倾向。在模拟和现实世界的实证结果中，我们表明（1）最有效的风险倾向因州而异，（2）与风险中性政策或风险规避政策基线相比，具有适应性风险倾向的代理人取得了优异的绩效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布强化学习的自适应风险倾向框架，用于解决纳米四旋翼无人机在未知杂乱环境中的导航问题。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测的未知杂乱环境中，无人机需要具备风险评估能力以实现安全导航，传统风险中性或风险规避策略难以适应动态变化的环境风险。
AI.method: 采用分布强化学习框架，通过学习回报分布的下尾条件方差估计内在不确定性，并利用指数加权平均预测（EWAF）动态调整风险倾向策略。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验表明：（1）不同状态下的最优风险倾向存在差异；（2）自适应风险策略在性能上优于风险中性和风险规避基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应风险倾向策略能有效提升无人机在不确定环境中的导航鲁棒性，为安全关键型机器人提供新的决策框架。
