authors_text: Jorge de Heuvel,Nathan Corral,Lilli Bruckschen,Maren Bennewitz
title: Learning Personalized Human-Aware Robot Navigation Using Virtual Reality Demonstrations from a User Study
title_zh: 使用用户研究中的虚拟现实演示来学习个性化的人类感知机器人导航
comment: ef:2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
comments: ef:2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
abstract: For the most comfortable, human-aware robot navigation, subjective user preferences need to be taken into account. This paper presents a novel reinforcement learning framework to train a personalized navigation controller along with an intuitive virtual reality demonstration interface. The conducted user study provides evidence that our personalized approach significantly outperforms classical approaches with more comfortable human-robot experiences. We achieve these results using only a few demonstration trajectories from non-expert users, who predominantly appreciate the intuitive demonstration setup. As we show in the experiments, the learned controller generalizes well to states not covered in the demonstration data, while still reflecting user preferences during navigation. Finally, we transfer the navigation controller without loss in performance to a real robot.
summary: For the most comfortable, human-aware robot navigation, subjective user preferences need to be taken into account. This paper presents a novel reinforcement learning framework to train a personalized navigation controller along with an intuitive virtual reality demonstration interface. The conducted user study provides evidence that our personalized approach significantly outperforms classical approaches with more comfortable human-robot experiences. We achieve these results using only a few demonstration trajectories from non-expert users, who predominantly appreciate the intuitive demonstration setup. As we show in the experiments, the learned controller generalizes well to states not covered in the demonstration data, while still reflecting user preferences during navigation. Finally, we transfer the navigation controller without loss in performance to a real robot.
abstract_zh: 对于最舒适的、具有人类意识的机器人导航，需要考虑用户的主观偏好。本文提出了一种新颖的强化学习框架，用于训练个性化导航控制器以及直观的虚拟现实演示界面。进行的用户研究提供的证据表明，我们的个性化方法明显优于经典方法，具有更舒适的人机体验。我们仅使用非专家用户的一些演示轨迹即可实现这些结果，这些用户主要欣赏直观的演示设置。正如我们在实验中所示，学习的控制器可以很好地推广到演示数据中未涵盖的状态，同时仍然反映用户在导航过程中的偏好。最后，我们将导航控制器在不损失性能的情况下转移到真实的机器人上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟现实演示的个性化机器人导航框架，通过用户研究优化人机交互体验。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人导航方法难以满足个性化用户偏好，需开发兼顾舒适性与人类意识的导航策略。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与虚拟现实演示界面，利用少量非专家用户轨迹数据训练个性化导航控制器。
AI.result: 个性化方法在舒适度与泛化能力上显著优于传统方法，并成功迁移至实际机器人验证。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡用户偏好与导航性能，为真实场景中的人机协作提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Donglei Du,Zhicheng Liu,Chenchen Wu,Dachuan Xu,Yang Zhou
title: An improved approximation algorithm for maximizing a DR-submodular function over a convex set
title_zh: 一种改进的近似算法，用于在凸集上最大化 DR 子模函数
abstract: Maximizing a DR-submodular function subject to a general convex set is an NP-hard problem arising from many applications in combinatorial optimization and machine learning. While it is highly desirable to design efficient approximation algorithms under this general setting where neither the objective function is monotonic nor the feasible set is down-closed, our main contribution is to present a 0.25-approximation Frank-Wolfe type of algorithm with a sub-exponential time-complexity under the value oracle model.
summary: Maximizing a DR-submodular function subject to a general convex set is an NP-hard problem arising from many applications in combinatorial optimization and machine learning. While it is highly desirable to design efficient approximation algorithms under this general setting where neither the objective function is monotonic nor the feasible set is down-closed, our main contribution is to present a 0.25-approximation Frank-Wolfe type of algorithm with a sub-exponential time-complexity under the value oracle model.
abstract_zh: 最大化服从一般凸集的 DR 子模函数是一个 NP 难问题，源自组合优化和机器学习中的许多应用。虽然在目标函数既不是单调的也不是可行集不是下闭的一般设置下设计有效的近似算法是非常可取的，但我们的主要贡献是提出了一种在价值预言机模型下具有次指数时间复杂度的 0.25 近似 Frank-Wolfe 类型的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的近似算法，用于在凸集上最大化DR-子模函数。
AI.motivation: 在组合优化和机器学习中，最大化DR-子模函数受限于一般凸集是一个NP难问题，现有研究缺乏对非单调目标函数和非下闭可行集的高效算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于Frank-Wolfe类型的0.25近似算法，采用次指数时间复杂度并在值预言模型下运行。
AI.result: 实现了0.25近似比的算法，时间复杂度为次指数级，适用于一般凸集和非单调DR-子模函数场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为解决非单调DR-子模函数最大化问题提供了新的方法，在理论保证和计算效率之间取得了平衡。

authors_text: Luca Fortini,Mattia Leonori,Juan M. Gandarias,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani
title: Open-VICO: An Open-Source Gazebo Toolkit for Vision-based Skeleton Tracking in Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: Open-VICO：用于人机协作中基于视觉的骨骼跟踪的开源 Gazebo 工具包
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures. The final version of this preprint has been published at IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication. DOI: 10.1109/RO-MAN53752.2022.9900851. Code: https://gitlab.iit.it/hrii-public/open-vico
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures. The final version of this preprint has been published at IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication. DOI: 10.1109/RO-MAN53752.2022.9900851. Code: https://gitlab.iit.it/hrii-public/open-vico
abstract: Simulation tools are essential for robotics research, especially for those domains in which safety is crucial, such as Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC). However, it is challenging to simulate human behaviors, and existing robotics simulators do not integrate functional human models. This work presents Open-VICO, an open-source toolkit to integrate virtual human models in Gazebo focusing on vision-based human tracking. In particular, Open-VICO allows to combine in the same simulation environment realistic human kinematic models, multi-camera vision setups, and human-tracking techniques along with numerous robot and sensor models thanks to Gazebo. The possibility to incorporate pre-recorded human skeleton motion with Motion Capture systems broadens the landscape of human performance behavioral analysis within Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings. To describe the functionalities and stress the potential of the toolkit four specific examples, chosen among relevant literature challenges in the field, are developed using our simulation utils: i) 3D multi-RGB-D camera calibration in simulation, ii) creation of a synthetic human skeleton tracking dataset based on OpenPose, iii) multi-camera scenario for human skeleton tracking in simulation, and iv) a human-robot interaction example. The key of this work is to create a straightforward pipeline which we hope will motivate research on new vision-based algorithms and methodologies for lightweight human-tracking and flexible human-robot applications.
summary: Simulation tools are essential for robotics research, especially for those domains in which safety is crucial, such as Human-Robot Collaboration (HRC). However, it is challenging to simulate human behaviors, and existing robotics simulators do not integrate functional human models. This work presents Open-VICO, an open-source toolkit to integrate virtual human models in Gazebo focusing on vision-based human tracking. In particular, Open-VICO allows to combine in the same simulation environment realistic human kinematic models, multi-camera vision setups, and human-tracking techniques along with numerous robot and sensor models thanks to Gazebo. The possibility to incorporate pre-recorded human skeleton motion with Motion Capture systems broadens the landscape of human performance behavioral analysis within Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings. To describe the functionalities and stress the potential of the toolkit four specific examples, chosen among relevant literature challenges in the field, are developed using our simulation utils: i) 3D multi-RGB-D camera calibration in simulation, ii) creation of a synthetic human skeleton tracking dataset based on OpenPose, iii) multi-camera scenario for human skeleton tracking in simulation, and iv) a human-robot interaction example. The key of this work is to create a straightforward pipeline which we hope will motivate research on new vision-based algorithms and methodologies for lightweight human-tracking and flexible human-robot applications.
abstract_zh: 仿真工具对于机器人研究至关重要，特别是对于那些安全性至关重要的领域，例如人机协作（HRC）。然而，模拟人类行为具有挑战性，现有的机器人模拟器没有集成功能性人体模型。这项工作提出了 Open-VICO，这是一个开源工具包，用于在 Gazebo 中集成虚拟人体模型，重点关注基于视觉的人体跟踪。特别是，借助 Gazebo，Open-VICO 允许在同一模拟环境中结合真实的人体运动模型、多摄像头视觉设置、人体跟踪技术以及众多机器人和传感器模型。将预先记录的人体骨骼运动与运动捕捉系统相结合的可能性拓宽了人机交互 (HRI) 设置中人类表现行为分析的范围。为了描述该工具包的功能并强调该工具包的潜力，我们使用我们的模拟实用程序开发了从该领域相关文献挑战中选择的四个具体示例：i）模拟中的 3D 多 RGB-D 相机校准，ii）基于 OpenPose 创建合成人体骨骼跟踪数据集，iii）用于模拟中人体骨骼跟踪的多相机场景，以及 iv）人机交互示例。这项工作的关键是创建一个简单的管道，我们希望它能够激发对新的基于视觉的算法和方法的研究，以实现轻量级人类跟踪和灵活的人类机器人应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Open-VICO，一个用于人机协作中基于视觉的骨架追踪的开源Gazebo工具包。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人仿真工具难以模拟人类行为且缺乏功能化人体模型，限制了人机交互安全研究。
AI.method: 通过Gazebo集成真实人体运动学模型、多摄像头视觉系统及追踪算法，并结合动作捕捉数据构建仿真环境。
AI.result: 实现四类应用示例：3D多RGB-D相机标定、基于OpenPose的合成骨架数据集生成、多摄像头追踪场景及人机交互演示。
AI.conclusion: Open-VICO为轻量化人体追踪和灵活人机应用提供了标准化流程，有望推动视觉算法创新。

The possibility to incorporate pre-recorded human skeleton motion with Motion Capture systems broadens the landscape of human performance behavioral analysis within Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings. To describe the functionalities and stress the potential of the toolkit four specific examples, chosen among relevant literature challenges in the field, are developed using our simulation utils: i) 3D multi-RGB-D camera calibration in simulation, ii) creation of a synthetic human skeleton tracking dataset based on OpenPose, iii) multi-camera scenario for human skeleton tracking in simulation, and iv) a human-robot interaction example. The key of this work is to create a straightforward pipeline which we hope will motivate research on new vision-based algorithms and methodologies for lightweight human-tracking and flexible human-robot applications. 仿真工具对于机器人研究至关重要，特别是对于那些安全性至关重要的领域，例如人机协作（HRC）。然而，模拟人类行为具有挑战性，现有的机器人模拟器没有集成功能性人体模型。这项工作提出了 Open-VICO，这是一个开源工具包，用于在 Gazebo 中集成虚拟人体模型，重点关注基于视觉的人体跟踪。特别是，借助 Gazebo，Open-VICO 允许在同一模拟环境中结合真实的人体运动模型、多摄像头视觉设置、人体跟踪技术以及众多机器人和传感器模型。将预先记录的人体骨骼运动与运动捕捉系统相结合的可能性拓宽了人机交互 (HRI) 设置中人类表现行为分析的范围。为了描述该工具包的功能并强调该工具包的潜力，我们使用我们的模拟实用程序开发了从该领域相关文献挑战中选择的四个具体示例：i）模拟中的 3D 多 RGB-D 相机校准，ii）基于 OpenPose 创建合成人体骨骼跟踪数据集，iii）用于模拟中人体骨骼跟踪的多相机场景，以及 iv）人机交互示例。这项工作的关键是创建一个简单的管道，我们希望它能够激发对新的基于视觉的算法和方法的研究，以实现轻量级人类跟踪和灵活的人类机器人应用。 本文提出Open-VICO，一个用于人机协作中基于视觉的骨架追踪的开源Gazebo工具包。 Luca Fortini,Mattia Leonori,Juan M. Gandarias,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Quentin Possamaï,Steeven Janny,Madiha Nadri,Laurent Bako,Christian Wolf
title: Learning to estimate UAV created turbulence from scene structure observed by onboard cameras
title_zh: 学习根据机载摄像机观察到的场景结构来估计无人机产生的湍流
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems
abstract: Controlling UAV flights precisely requires a realistic dynamic model and accurate state estimates from onboard sensors like UAV, GPS and visual observations. Obtaining a precise dynamic model is extremely difficult, as important aerodynamic effects are hard to model, in particular ground effect and other turbulences. While machine learning has been used in the past to estimate UAV created turbulence, this was restricted to flat grounds or diffuse in-flight air turbulences, both without taking into account obstacles. In this work we address the complex problem of estimating in-flight turbulences caused by obstacles, in particular the complex structures in cluttered environments. We learn a mapping from control input and images captured by onboard cameras to turbulence. In a large-scale setting, we train a model over a large number of different simulated photo-realistic environments loaded into the Habitat.AI simulator augmented with a dynamic UAV model and an analytic ground effect model. We transfer the model from simulation to a real environment and evaluate on real UAV flights from the EuRoC-MAV dataset, showing that the model is capable of good sim2real generalization performance. The dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: Controlling UAV flights precisely requires a realistic dynamic model and accurate state estimates from onboard sensors like UAV, GPS and visual observations. Obtaining a precise dynamic model is extremely difficult, as important aerodynamic effects are hard to model, in particular ground effect and other turbulences. While machine learning has been used in the past to estimate UAV created turbulence, this was restricted to flat grounds or diffuse in-flight air turbulences, both without taking into account obstacles. In this work we address the complex problem of estimating in-flight turbulences caused by obstacles, in particular the complex structures in cluttered environments. We learn a mapping from control input and images captured by onboard cameras to turbulence. In a large-scale setting, we train a model over a large number of different simulated photo-realistic environments loaded into the Habitat.AI simulator augmented with a dynamic UAV model and an analytic ground effect model. We transfer the model from simulation to a real environment and evaluate on real UAV flights from the EuRoC-MAV dataset, showing that the model is capable of good sim2real generalization performance. The dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 精确控制无人机飞行需要真实的动态模型以及无人机、GPS 和视觉观测等机载传感器的准确状态估计。获得精确的动力学模型极其困难，因为重要的空气动力效应很难建模，特别是地面效应和其他湍流。虽然过去曾使用机器学习来估计无人机产生的湍流，但这仅限于平坦的地面或飞行中弥漫的空气湍流，两者都没有考虑障碍物。在这项工作中，我们解决了估计由障碍物引起的飞行中湍流的复杂问题，特别是杂乱环境中的复杂结构。我们学习从控制输入和机载摄像机捕获的图像到湍流的映射。在大规模环境中，我们在加载到 Habitat.AI 模拟器中的大量不同模拟真实环境中训练模型，并通过动态无人机模型和分析地面效应模型进行增强。我们将模型从模拟转移到真实环境，并在 EuRoC-MAV 数据集的真实无人机飞行上进行评估，表明该模型具有良好的 sim2real 泛化性能。该数据集将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过无人机机载摄像头观测的场景结构来估计无人机产生的湍流的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机动态模型难以准确模拟复杂环境中的湍流效应（如地面效应和障碍物引起的湍流），而传统方法受限于平坦地形或无障碍物场景，无法适应真实复杂环境。
AI.method: 利用深度学习建立从控制输入和机载摄像头图像到湍流的映射关系，基于Habitat.AI模拟器生成大量包含动态无人机模型和地面效应模型的逼真环境进行训练，并通过EuRoC-MAV数据集验证模型的sim2real泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在真实无人机飞行数据上表现出良好的模拟到现实的迁移性能，验证了方法的有效性，且数据集将公开共享。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂场景下的无人机湍流估计提供了新思路，有助于提升无人机在障碍物环境中的飞行控制精度。

authors_text: Yoshifumi Nakano,Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Katsuhito Sudoh,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: vTTS: visual-text to speech
title_zh: vTTS：视觉文本转语音
abstract: This paper proposes visual-text to speech (vTTS), a method for synthesizing speech from visual text (i.e., text as an image). Conventional TTS converts phonemes or characters into discrete symbols and synthesizes a speech waveform from them, thus losing the visual features that the characters essentially have. Therefore, our method synthesizes speech not from discrete symbols but from visual text. The proposed vTTS extracts visual features with a convolutional neural network and then generates acoustic features with a non-autoregressive model inspired by FastSpeech2. Experimental results show that 1) vTTS is capable of generating speech with naturalness comparable to or better than a conventional TTS, 2) it can transfer emphasis and emotion attributes in visual text to speech without additional labels and architectures, and 3) it can synthesize more natural and intelligible speech from unseen and rare characters than conventional TTS.
summary: This paper proposes visual-text to speech (vTTS), a method for synthesizing speech from visual text (i.e., text as an image). Conventional TTS converts phonemes or characters into discrete symbols and synthesizes a speech waveform from them, thus losing the visual features that the characters essentially have. Therefore, our method synthesizes speech not from discrete symbols but from visual text. The proposed vTTS extracts visual features with a convolutional neural network and then generates acoustic features with a non-autoregressive model inspired by FastSpeech2. Experimental results show that 1) vTTS is capable of generating speech with naturalness comparable to or better than a conventional TTS, 2) it can transfer emphasis and emotion attributes in visual text to speech without additional labels and architectures, and 3) it can synthesize more natural and intelligible speech from unseen and rare characters than conventional TTS.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了视觉文本到语音（vTTS），一种从视觉文本（即文本作为图像）合成语音的方法。传统的 TTS 将音素或字符转换为离散符号，并从中合成语音波形，从而失去了字符本质上具有的视觉特征。因此，我们的方法不是从离散符号而是从视觉文本合成语音。所提出的 vTTS 使用卷积神经网络提取视觉特征，然后使用受 FastSpeech2 启发的非自回归模型生成声学特征。实验结果表明，1）vTTS 能够生成与传统 TTS 相当或更好的自然语音，2）它可以将视觉文本中的重点和情感属性转移到语音，而无需额外的标签和架构，3）它可以从看不见的和罕见的字符合成比传统 TTS 更自然和可理解的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从视觉文本（图像形式的文本）直接合成语音的vTTS方法。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS通过离散符号丢失了文本的视觉特征，而视觉文本中包含的形状和结构信息对语音合成有潜在价值。
AI.method: 使用卷积神经网络提取视觉文本特征，结合非自回归模型（类似FastSpeech2）生成声学特征。
AI.result: 1) 语音自然度与传统TTS相当或更优；2) 可无标签传递视觉文本的情感属性；3) 对生僻字合成效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: vTTS通过利用视觉文本特征，在语音自然度、情感传递和生僻字处理上优于传统方法。

authors_text: Athena Abdi,Armin Salimi-Badr
title: A novel evolutionary-based neuro-fuzzy task scheduling approach to jointly optimize the main design challenges of heterogeneous MPSoCs
title_zh: 一种新颖的基于进化的神经模糊任务调度方法，可联合优化异构 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Sustainable Computing
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Sustainable Computing
abstract: In this paper, an online task scheduling and mapping method based on a fuzzy neural network (FNN) learned by an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm (NSGA-II) to jointly optimize the main design challenges of heterogeneous MPSoCs is proposed. In this approach, first, the FNN parameters are trained using an NSGA-II-based optimization engine by considering the main design challenges of MPSoCs including temperature, power consumption, failure rate, and execution time on a training dataset consisting of different application graphs of various sizes. Next, the trained FNN is employed as an online task scheduler to jointly optimize the main design challenges in heterogeneous MPSoCs. Due to the uncertainty in sensor measurements and the difference between computational models and reality, applying the fuzzy neural network is advantageous in online scheduling procedures. The performance of the method is compared with some previous heuristic, meta-heuristic, and rule-based approaches in several experiments. Based on these experiments our proposed method outperforms the related studies in optimizing all design criteria. Its improvement over related heuristic and meta-heuristic approaches are estimated 10.58% in temperature, 9.22% in power consumption, 39.14% in failure rate, and 12.06% in execution time, averagely. Moreover, considering the interpretable nature of the FNN, the frequently fired extracted fuzzy rules of the proposed approach are demonstrated.

In this approach, first, the FNN parameters are trained using an NSGA-II-based optimization engine by considering the main design challenges of MPSoCs including temperature, power consumption, failure rate, and execution time on a training dataset consisting of different application graphs of various sizes. Its improvement over related heuristic and meta-heuristic approaches are estimated 10.58% in temperature, 9.22% in power consumption, 39.14% in failure rate, and 12.06% in execution time, averagely. Moreover, considering the interpretable nature of the FNN, the frequently fired extracted fuzzy rules of the proposed approach are demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于通过进化多目标算法（NSGA-II）学习的模糊神经网络（FNN）的在线任务调度和映射方法，以联合优化异构 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战。在这种方法中，首先，使用基于 NSGA-II 的优化引擎来训练 FNN 参数，并考虑 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战，包括温度、功耗、故障率和由不同大小的不同应用图组成的训练数据集上的执行时间。接下来，经过训练的 FNN 被用作在线任务调度器，以联合优化异构 MPSoC 中的主要设计挑战。由于传感器测量的不确定性以及计算模型与现实之间的差异，应用模糊神经网络在在线调度过程中具有优势。在多个实验中将该方法的性能与之前的一些启发式、元启发式和基于规则的方法进行了比较。基于这些实验，我们提出的方法在优化所有设计标准方面优于相关研究。与相关启发式和元启发式方法相比，其温度平均提高了 10.58%，功耗提高了 9.22%，故障率提高了 39.14%，执行时间提高了 12.06%。此外，考虑到 FNN 的可解释性质，演示了所提出方法的频繁触发的提取模糊规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化多目标算法训练的模糊神经网络（FNN）在线任务调度方法，以联合优化异构MPSoC的主要设计挑战。
AI.motivation: 异构多核系统芯片（MPSoC）面临温度、功耗、故障率和执行时间等多重优化难题，传统方法难以兼顾多目标且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 采用NSGA-II算法训练FNN参数，利用不同规模的应用图数据集进行优化；训练后的FNN作为在线调度器，结合模糊规则处理计算模型与现实的差异性。
AI.result: 相较启发式、元启发式及规则方法，平均提升温度优化10.58%、功耗9.22%、故障率39.14%、执行时间12.06%，并通过提取频繁触发的模糊规则体现可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在多目标优化中表现优异，验证了融合进化算法与模糊神经网络在异构MPSoC任务调度中的有效性与实用性。

search_text: A novel evolutionary-based neuro-fuzzy task scheduling approach to jointly optimize the main design challenges of heterogeneous MPSoCs 一种新颖的基于进化的神经模糊任务调度方法，可联合优化异构 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战 In this paper, an online task scheduling and mapping method based on a fuzzy neural network (FNN) learned by an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm (NSGA-II) to jointly optimize the main design challenges of heterogeneous MPSoCs is proposed. In this approach, first, the FNN parameters are trained using an NSGA-II-based optimization engine by considering the main design challenges of MPSoCs including temperature, power consumption, failure rate, and execution time on a training dataset consisting of different application graphs of various sizes. Next, the trained FNN is employed as an online task scheduler to jointly optimize the main design challenges in heterogeneous MPSoCs. Due to the uncertainty in sensor measurements and the difference between computational models and reality, applying the fuzzy neural network is advantageous in online scheduling procedures. The performance of the method is compared with some previous heuristic, meta-heuristic, and rule-based approaches in several experiments. Based on these experiments our proposed method outperforms the related studies in optimizing all design criteria. Its improvement over related heuristic and meta-heuristic approaches are estimated 10.58% in temperature, 9.22% in power consumption, 39.14% in failure rate, and 12.06% in execution time, averagely. Moreover, considering the interpretable nature of the FNN, the frequently fired extracted fuzzy rules of the proposed approach are demonstrated. 本文提出了一种基于通过进化多目标算法（NSGA-II）学习的模糊神经网络（FNN）的在线任务调度和映射方法，以联合优化异构 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战。在这种方法中，首先，使用基于 NSGA-II 的优化引擎来训练 FNN 参数，并考虑 MPSoC 的主要设计挑战，包括温度、功耗、故障率和由不同大小的不同应用图组成的训练数据集上的执行时间。接下来，经过训练的 FNN 被用作在线任务调度器，以联合优化异构 MPSoC 中的主要设计挑战。由于传感器测量的不确定性以及计算模型与现实之间的差异，应用模糊神经网络在在线调度过程中具有优势。在多个实验中将该方法的性能与之前的一些启发式、元启发式和基于规则的方法进行了比较。基于这些实验，我们提出的方法在优化所有设计标准方面优于相关研究。与相关启发式和元启发式方法相比，其温度平均提高了 10.58%，功耗提高了 9.22%，故障率提高了 39.14%，执行时间提高了 12.06%。此外，考虑到 FNN 的可解释性质，演示了所提出方法的频繁触发的提取模糊规则。 本文提出一种基于进化多目标算法训练的模糊神经网络（FNN）在线任务调度方法，以联合优化异构MPSoC的主要设计挑战。 Athena Abdi,Armin Salimi-Badr cs.DC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuwei Wu,Weixiao Liu,Sipu Ruan,Gregory S. Chirikjian
title: Primitive-based Shape Abstraction via Nonparametric Bayesian Inference
title_zh: 通过非参数贝叶斯推理进行基于基元的形状抽象
abstract: 3D shape abstraction has drawn great interest over the years. Apart from low-level representations such as meshes and voxels, researchers also seek to semantically abstract complex objects with basic geometric primitives. Recent deep learning methods rely heavily on datasets, with limited generality to unseen categories. Furthermore, abstracting an object accurately yet with a small number of primitives still remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel non-parametric Bayesian statistical method to infer an abstraction, consisting of an unknown number of geometric primitives, from a point cloud. We model the generation of points as observations sampled from an infinite mixture of Gaussian Superquadric Taper Models (GSTM). Our approach formulates the abstraction as a clustering problem, in which: 1) each point is assigned to a cluster via the Chinese Restaurant Process (CRP); 2) a primitive representation is optimized for each cluster, and 3) a merging post-process is incorporated to provide a concise representation. We conduct extensive experiments on two datasets. The results indicate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of accuracy and is generalizable to various types of objects.
summary: 3D shape abstraction has drawn great interest over the years. Apart from low-level representations such as meshes and voxels, researchers also seek to semantically abstract complex objects with basic geometric primitives. Recent deep learning methods rely heavily on datasets, with limited generality to unseen categories. Furthermore, abstracting an object accurately yet with a small number of primitives still remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel non-parametric Bayesian statistical method to infer an abstraction, consisting of an unknown number of geometric primitives, from a point cloud. We model the generation of points as observations sampled from an infinite mixture of Gaussian Superquadric Taper Models (GSTM). Our approach formulates the abstraction as a clustering problem, in which: 1) each point is assigned to a cluster via the Chinese Restaurant Process (CRP); 2) a primitive representation is optimized for each cluster, and 3) a merging post-process is incorporated to provide a concise representation. We conduct extensive experiments on two datasets. The results indicate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of accuracy and is generalizable to various types of objects.
abstract_zh: 多年来，3D 形状抽象引起了人们的极大兴趣。除了网格和体素等低级表示之外，研究人员还寻求使用基本几何基元在语义上抽象复杂对象。最近的深度学习方法严重依赖数据集，对看不见的类别的通用性有限。此外，使用少量基元准确地抽象对象仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非参数贝叶斯统计方法来从点云推断由未知数量的几何图元组成的抽象。我们将点的生成建模为从高斯超二次锥模型 (GSTM) 的无限混合中采样的观测值。我们的方法将抽象表述为聚类问题，其中：1）每个点通过中餐馆流程（CRP）分配到一个聚类； 2）针对每个集群优化原始表示，3）合并合并后处理以提供简洁的表示。我们对两个数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的方法在准确性方面优于最先进的方法，并且可推广到各种类型的对象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非参数贝叶斯推断的3D形状抽象方法，通过点云推断未知数量的几何原语组合。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖特定数据集且泛化能力有限，难以用少量几何原语实现准确形状抽象。
AI.method: 建模点云为无限混合高斯超二次截断模型（GSTM），通过中国餐厅过程（CRP）聚类点，优化各簇原语表示并合并简化结果。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，该方法在抽象精度和跨类别泛化能力上优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 非参数贝叶斯框架有效解决了3D形状抽象的可扩展性与简洁性矛盾，为复杂物体建模提供新思路。

authors_text: Min Cao,Shiping Li,Juntao Li,Liqiang Nie,Min Zhang
title: Image-text Retrieval: A Survey on Recent Research and Development
title_zh: 图文检索：近期研究与发展综述
abstract: In the past few years, cross-modal image-text retrieval (ITR) has experienced increased interest in the research community due to its excellent research value and broad real-world application. It is designed for the scenarios where the queries are from one modality and the retrieval galleries from another modality. This paper presents a comprehensive and up-to-date survey on the ITR approaches from four perspectives. By dissecting an ITR system into two processes: feature extraction and feature alignment, we summarize the recent advance of the ITR approaches from these two perspectives. On top of this, the efficiency-focused study on the ITR system is introduced as the third perspective. To keep pace with the times, we also provide a pioneering overview of the cross-modal pre-training ITR approaches as the fourth perspective. Finally, we outline the common benchmark datasets and valuation metric for ITR, and conduct the accuracy comparison among the representative ITR approaches. Some critical yet less studied issues are discussed at the end of the paper.
summary: In the past few years, cross-modal image-text retrieval (ITR) has experienced increased interest in the research community due to its excellent research value and broad real-world application. It is designed for the scenarios where the queries are from one modality and the retrieval galleries from another modality. This paper presents a comprehensive and up-to-date survey on the ITR approaches from four perspectives. By dissecting an ITR system into two processes: feature extraction and feature alignment, we summarize the recent advance of the ITR approaches from these two perspectives. On top of this, the efficiency-focused study on the ITR system is introduced as the third perspective. To keep pace with the times, we also provide a pioneering overview of the cross-modal pre-training ITR approaches as the fourth perspective. Finally, we outline the common benchmark datasets and valuation metric for ITR, and conduct the accuracy comparison among the representative ITR approaches. Some critical yet less studied issues are discussed at the end of the paper.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，跨模态图像文本检索（ITR）由于其卓越的研究价值和广泛的现实应用而引起了研究界越来越多的兴趣。它专为查询来自一种模态而检索库来自另一种模态的场景而设计。本文从四个角度对 ITR 方法进行了全面且最新的调查。通过将 ITR 系统分解为特征提取和特征对齐两个过程，我们从这两个角度总结了 ITR 方法的最新进展。在此基础上，第三个视角引入了以效率为中心的ITR制度研究。为了与时俱进，我们还以第四个视角对跨模式预训练 ITR 方法进行了开创性的概述。最后，我们概述了 ITR 的常见基准数据集和评估指标，并对代表性 ITR 方法进行了准确性比较。本文最后讨论了一些关键但研究较少的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文对跨模态图像-文本检索（ITR）的最新研究和开发进行了全面综述，从特征提取、特征对齐、效率优化和预训练方法四个角度总结了相关方法，并比较了主流方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于ITR在实际应用中的广泛价值，研究社区对其兴趣日益增加，但缺乏系统性的最新研究综述，因此本文旨在梳理ITR的发展脉络并探讨关键问题。
AI.method: 将ITR系统分解为特征提取与对齐两过程，从四个视角（方法进展、效率优化、预训练技术、基准测试）总结现有研究，并通过实验对比主流方法的准确性。
AI.result: 总结了ITR在特征融合与对齐方面的技术演进，分析了高效算法的优化方向，提出了跨模态预训练方法的前沿框架，并指出现有数据集与评估指标的局限性。
AI.conclusion: ITR研究需进一步平衡精度与效率，探索更通用的预训练模型，并关注长尾分布、多语言支持等未被充分研究的挑战。

ai_content.result: 总结了ITR在特征融合与对齐方面的技术演进，分析了高效算法的优化方向，提出了跨模态预训练方法的前沿框架，并指出现有数据集与评估指标的局限性。
ai_content.conclusion: ITR研究需进一步平衡精度与效率，探索更通用的预训练模型，并关注长尾分布、多语言支持等未被充分研究的挑战。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文对跨模态图像-文本检索（ITR）的最新研究和开发进行了全面综述，从特征提取、特征对齐、效率优化和预训练方法四个角度总结了相关方法，并比较了主流方法的性能。

search_text: Image-text Retrieval: A Survey on Recent Research and Development 图文检索：近期研究与发展综述 In the past few years, cross-modal image-text retrieval (ITR) has experienced increased interest in the research community due to its excellent research value and broad real-world application. It is designed for the scenarios where the queries are from one modality and the retrieval galleries from another modality. This paper presents a comprehensive and up-to-date survey on the ITR approaches from four perspectives. By dissecting an ITR system into two processes: feature extraction and feature alignment, we summarize the recent advance of the ITR approaches from these two perspectives. On top of this, the efficiency-focused study on the ITR system is introduced as the third perspective. To keep pace with the times, we also provide a pioneering overview of the cross-modal pre-training ITR approaches as the fourth perspective. Finally, we outline the common benchmark datasets and valuation metric for ITR, and conduct the accuracy comparison among the representative ITR approaches. Some critical yet less studied issues are discussed at the end of the paper. 在过去的几年中，跨模态图像文本检索（ITR）由于其卓越的研究价值和广泛的现实应用而引起了研究界越来越多的兴趣。它专为查询来自一种模态而检索库来自另一种模态的场景而设计。本文从四个角度对 ITR 方法进行了全面且最新的调查。通过将 ITR 系统分解为特征提取和特征对齐两个过程，我们从这两个角度总结了 ITR 方法的最新进展。在此基础上，第三个视角引入了以效率为中心的ITR制度研究。为了与时俱进，我们还以第四个视角对跨模式预训练 ITR 方法进行了开创性的概述。最后，我们概述了 ITR 的常见基准数据集和评估指标，并对代表性 ITR 方法进行了准确性比较。本文最后讨论了一些关键但研究较少的问题。 本文对跨模态图像-文本检索（ITR）的最新研究和开发进行了全面综述，从特征提取、特征对齐、效率优化和预训练方法四个角度总结了相关方法，并比较了主流方法的性能。 Min Cao,Shiping Li,Juntao Li,Liqiang Nie,Min Zhang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Fadime Sener,Dibyadip Chatterjee,Daniel Shelepov,Kun He,Dipika Singhania,Robert Wang,Angela Yao
title: Assembly101: A Large-Scale Multi-View Video Dataset for Understanding Procedural Activities
title_zh: Assembly101：用于理解程序活动的大规模多视图视频数据集
abstract: Assembly101 is a new procedural activity dataset featuring 4321 videos of people assembling and disassembling 101 "take-apart" toy vehicles. Participants work without fixed instructions, and the sequences feature rich and natural variations in action ordering, mistakes, and corrections. Assembly101 is the first multi-view action dataset, with simultaneous static (8) and egocentric (4) recordings. Sequences are annotated with more than 100K coarse and 1M fine-grained action segments, and 18M 3D hand poses. We benchmark on three action understanding tasks: recognition, anticipation and temporal segmentation. Additionally, we propose a novel task of detecting mistakes. The unique recording format and rich set of annotations allow us to investigate generalization to new toys, cross-view transfer, long-tailed distributions, and pose vs. appearance. We envision that Assembly101 will serve as a new challenge to investigate various activity understanding problems.
summary: Assembly101 is a new procedural activity dataset featuring 4321 videos of people assembling and disassembling 101 "take-apart" toy vehicles. Participants work without fixed instructions, and the sequences feature rich and natural variations in action ordering, mistakes, and corrections. Assembly101 is the first multi-view action dataset, with simultaneous static (8) and egocentric (4) recordings. Sequences are annotated with more than 100K coarse and 1M fine-grained action segments, and 18M 3D hand poses. We benchmark on three action understanding tasks: recognition, anticipation and temporal segmentation. Additionally, we propose a novel task of detecting mistakes. The unique recording format and rich set of annotations allow us to investigate generalization to new toys, cross-view transfer, long-tailed distributions, and pose vs. appearance. We envision that Assembly101 will serve as a new challenge to investigate various activity understanding problems.
abstract_zh: Assembly101 是一个新的程序活动数据集，包含人们组装和拆卸 101 个“拆开”玩具车的 4321 个视频。参与者的工作没有固定的指令，序列在动作顺序、错误和纠正方面具有丰富而自然的变化。 Assembly101 是第一个多视图动作数据集，同时具有静态 (8) 和自我中心 (4) 记录。序列注释有超过 100K 个粗粒度和 1M 个细粒度动作片段以及 18M 个 3D 手部姿势。我们对三个动作理解任务进行基准测试：识别、预测和时间分割。此外，我们提出了一项检测错误的新任务。独特的记录格式和丰富的注释集使我们能够研究新玩具的泛化、跨视图传输、长尾分布以及姿势与外观。我们设想 Assembly101 将成为调查各种活动理解问题的新挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Assembly101数据集，包含4321个组装和拆卸玩具车的多视角视频，用于推进过程性活动理解研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对过程性活动（如组装）中动作顺序变化、错误及修正等自然场景的覆盖，限制了相关算法的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过8个静态视角和4个第一视角摄像头采集多视角视频，标注超过100万粗粒度动作片段、1000万细粒度动作片段及1800万3D手部姿态，并设计错误检测等新型任务进行基准测试。
AI.result: 在动作识别、预测、时序分割等任务上验证了数据集有效性，同时通过跨视角迁移、新玩具泛化等实验揭示了现有方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: Assembly101为过程性活动理解提供了多样化基准，其多视角特性与丰富标注将推动动作识别、姿态估计等领域的算法创新。

authors_text: Bumsoo Kim,Jonghwan Mun,Kyoung-Woon On,Minchul Shin,Junhyun Lee,Eun-Sol Kim
title: MSTR: Multi-Scale Transformer for End-to-End Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: MSTR：用于端到端人机交互检测的多尺度变压器
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is the task of identifying a set of <human, object, interaction> triplets from an image. Recent work proposed transformer encoder-decoder architectures that successfully eliminated the need for many hand-designed components in HOI detection through end-to-end training. However, they are limited to single-scale feature resolution, providing suboptimal performance in scenes containing humans, objects and their interactions with vastly different scales and distances. To tackle this problem, we propose a Multi-Scale TRansformer (MSTR) for HOI detection powered by two novel HOI-aware deformable attention modules called Dual-Entity attention and Entity-conditioned Context attention. While existing deformable attention comes at a huge cost in HOI detection performance, our proposed attention modules of MSTR learn to effectively attend to sampling points that are essential to identify interactions. In experiments, we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance on two HOI detection benchmarks.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is the task of identifying a set of <human, object, interaction> triplets from an image. Recent work proposed transformer encoder-decoder architectures that successfully eliminated the need for many hand-designed components in HOI detection through end-to-end training. However, they are limited to single-scale feature resolution, providing suboptimal performance in scenes containing humans, objects and their interactions with vastly different scales and distances. To tackle this problem, we propose a Multi-Scale TRansformer (MSTR) for HOI detection powered by two novel HOI-aware deformable attention modules called Dual-Entity attention and Entity-conditioned Context attention. While existing deformable attention comes at a huge cost in HOI detection performance, our proposed attention modules of MSTR learn to effectively attend to sampling points that are essential to identify interactions. In experiments, we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance on two HOI detection benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 人机交互 (HOI) 检测是从图像中识别一组<人、物体、交互>三元组的任务。最近的工作提出了 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构，通过端到端训练成功消除了 HOI 检测中对许多手工设计组件的需求。然而，它们仅限于单尺度特征分辨率，在包含人类、物体及其在不同尺度和距离的交互的场景中提供次优性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 HOI 检测的多尺度变换器（MSTR），由两个新颖的 HOI 感知可变形注意模块（称为双实体注意和实体条件上下文注意）提供支持。虽然现有的可变形注意力在 HOI 检测性能方面付出了巨大的代价，但我们提出的 MSTR 注意力模块学习有效地关注对于识别交互至关重要的采样点。在实验中，我们在两个 HOI 检测基准上实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多尺度Transformer（MSTR）模型，用于端到端的人-物体交互检测任务，通过识别图像中的<人，物体，交互>三元组。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的HOI检测方法受限于单尺度特征分辨率，在处理包含多尺度和多距离交互的场景时表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计两种HOI感知的可变形注意力模块：Dual-Entity注意力和Entity-conditioned Context注意力，通过学习关键采样点提升交互识别能力。
AI.result: 在两个HOI检测基准数据集上取得新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MSTR通过多尺度特征处理和新型注意力机制，有效解决了复杂场景下人-物体交互检测的性能瓶颈。

To tackle this problem, we propose a Multi-Scale TRansformer (MSTR) for HOI detection powered by two novel HOI-aware deformable attention modules called Dual-Entity attention and Entity-conditioned Context attention. While existing deformable attention comes at a huge cost in HOI detection performance, our proposed attention modules of MSTR learn to effectively attend to sampling points that are essential to identify interactions. In experiments, we achieve the new state-of-the-art performance on two HOI detection benchmarks. 人机交互 (HOI) 检测是从图像中识别一组<人、物体、交互>三元组的任务。最近的工作提出了 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构，通过端到端训练成功消除了 HOI 检测中对许多手工设计组件的需求。然而，它们仅限于单尺度特征分辨率，在包含人类、物体及其在不同尺度和距离的交互的场景中提供次优性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 HOI 检测的多尺度变换器（MSTR），由两个新颖的 HOI 感知可变形注意模块（称为双实体注意和实体条件上下文注意）提供支持。虽然现有的可变形注意力在 HOI 检测性能方面付出了巨大的代价，但我们提出的 MSTR 注意力模块学习有效地关注对于识别交互至关重要的采样点。在实验中，我们在两个 HOI 检测基准上实现了新的最先进的性能。 本文提出多尺度Transformer（MSTR）模型，用于端到端的人-物体交互检测任务，通过识别图像中的<人，物体，交互>三元组。 Bumsoo Kim,Jonghwan Mun,Kyoung-Woon On,Minchul Shin,Junhyun Lee,Eun-Sol Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Fukushima,Kei Ota,Asako Kanezaki,Yoko Sasaki,Yusuke Yoshiyasu
title: Object Memory Transformer for Object Goal Navigation
title_zh: 用于对象目标导航的对象内存转换器
abstract: This paper presents a reinforcement learning method for object goal navigation (ObjNav) where an agent navigates in 3D indoor environments to reach a target object based on long-term observations of objects and scenes. To this end, we propose Object Memory Transformer (OMT) that consists of two key ideas: 1) Object-Scene Memory (OSM) that enables to store long-term scenes and object semantics, and 2) Transformer that attends to salient objects in the sequence of previously observed scenes and objects stored in OSM. This mechanism allows the agent to efficiently navigate in the indoor environment without prior knowledge about the environments, such as topological maps or 3D meshes. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that uses a long-term memory of object semantics in a goal-oriented navigation task. Experimental results conducted on the AI2-THOR dataset show that OMT outperforms previous approaches in navigating in unknown environments. In particular, we show that utilizing the long-term object semantics information improves the efficiency of navigation.
summary: This paper presents a reinforcement learning method for object goal navigation (ObjNav) where an agent navigates in 3D indoor environments to reach a target object based on long-term observations of objects and scenes. To this end, we propose Object Memory Transformer (OMT) that consists of two key ideas: 1) Object-Scene Memory (OSM) that enables to store long-term scenes and object semantics, and 2) Transformer that attends to salient objects in the sequence of previously observed scenes and objects stored in OSM. This mechanism allows the agent to efficiently navigate in the indoor environment without prior knowledge about the environments, such as topological maps or 3D meshes. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that uses a long-term memory of object semantics in a goal-oriented navigation task. Experimental results conducted on the AI2-THOR dataset show that OMT outperforms previous approaches in navigating in unknown environments. In particular, we show that utilizing the long-term object semantics information improves the efficiency of navigation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于对象目标导航 (ObjNav) 的强化学习方法，其中代理根据对对象和场景的长期观察在 3D 室内环境中导航以到达目标对象。为此，我们提出了对象内存转换器（OMT），它由两个关键思想组成：1）对象场景内存（OSM），能够存储长期场景和对象语义；2）转换器，按照先前观察到的场景和存储在 OSM 中的对象的顺序处理显着对象。这种机制允许代理在室内环境中高效导航，而无需事先了解环境（例如拓扑图或 3D 网格）。据我们所知，这是第一个在面向目标的导航任务中使用对象语义的长期记忆的工作。在 AI2-THOR 数据集上进行的实验结果表明，OMT 在未知环境中的导航方面优于以前的方法。特别是，我们表明利用长期对象语义信息可以提高导航效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的物体目标导航方法，通过Object Memory Transformer（OMT）实现无需先验环境知识的3D室内环境导航。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法依赖拓扑地图或3D网格等先验环境信息，难以适应未知环境。需开发能利用长期物体语义记忆的导航模型。
AI.method: 设计包含物体场景记忆模块（OSM）和Transformer注意力机制的OMT框架，通过存储长期场景语义并关注关键物体序列实现高效导航。
AI.result: 在AI2-THOR数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在利用长期物体语义信息时显著提升导航效率。
AI.conclusion: 首次将长期物体语义记忆应用于目标导向导航任务，验证了该方法在未知环境中的有效性。

authors_text: Ge Kan,Jinhu Lü,Tian Wang,Baochang Zhang,Aichun Zhu,Lei Huang,Guodong Guo,Hichem Snoussi
title: Bi-level Doubly Variational Learning for Energy-based Latent Variable Models
title_zh: 基于能量的潜变量模型的双层双变分学习
abstract: Energy-based latent variable models (EBLVMs) are more expressive than conventional energy-based models. However, its potential on visual tasks are limited by its training process based on maximum likelihood estimate that requires sampling from two intractable distributions. In this paper, we propose Bi-level doubly variational learning (BiDVL), which is based on a new bi-level optimization framework and two tractable variational distributions to facilitate learning EBLVMs. Particularly, we lead a decoupled EBLVM consisting of a marginal energy-based distribution and a structural posterior to handle the difficulties when learning deep EBLVMs on images. By choosing a symmetric KL divergence in the lower level of our framework, a compact BiDVL for visual tasks can be obtained. Our model achieves impressive image generation performance over related works. It also demonstrates the significant capacity of testing image reconstruction and out-of-distribution detection.
summary: Energy-based latent variable models (EBLVMs) are more expressive than conventional energy-based models. However, its potential on visual tasks are limited by its training process based on maximum likelihood estimate that requires sampling from two intractable distributions. In this paper, we propose Bi-level doubly variational learning (BiDVL), which is based on a new bi-level optimization framework and two tractable variational distributions to facilitate learning EBLVMs. Particularly, we lead a decoupled EBLVM consisting of a marginal energy-based distribution and a structural posterior to handle the difficulties when learning deep EBLVMs on images. By choosing a symmetric KL divergence in the lower level of our framework, a compact BiDVL for visual tasks can be obtained. Our model achieves impressive image generation performance over related works. It also demonstrates the significant capacity of testing image reconstruction and out-of-distribution detection.
abstract_zh: 基于能量的潜变量模型（EBLVM）比传统的基于能量的模型更具表现力。然而，它在视觉任务上的潜力受到其基于最大似然估计的训练过程的限制，该训练过程需要从两个棘手的分布中采样。在本文中，我们提出了双层双变分学习（BiDVL），它基于一个新的双层优化框架和两个易于处理的变分分布来促进 EBLVM 的学习。特别是，我们提出了一种解耦的 EBLVM，由基于边缘能量的分布和结构后验组成，以解决在图像上学习深度 EBLVM 时遇到的困难。通过在我们框架的较低层选择对称 KL 散度，可以获得用于视觉任务的紧凑 BiDVL。我们的模型在相关作品中实现了令人印象深刻的图像生成性能。它还展示了测试图像重建和分布外检测的强大能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双层双重变分学习方法（BiDVL），用于改进基于能量的潜在变量模型（EBLVM）在视觉任务中的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 传统EBLVM的训练依赖最大似然估计，需处理两个难以采样的分布，限制了其在视觉任务中的表现。
AI.method: 通过双层优化框架和两个可处理的变分分布，设计解耦的EBLVM结构，结合对称KL散度实现视觉任务的紧凑模型。
AI.result: 模型在图像生成、重建及分布外检测任务中表现出色，优于相关方法。
AI.conclusion: BiDVL有效解决了深度EBLVM的训练难题，验证了其在视觉任务中的潜力。

However, its potential on visual tasks are limited by its training process based on maximum likelihood estimate that requires sampling from two intractable distributions. authors_text: Jialian Li,Jingyi Zhang,Zhiyong Wang,Siqi Shen,Chenglu Wen,Yuexin Ma,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Cheng Wang
title: LiDARCap: Long-range Marker-less 3D Human Motion Capture with LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: LiDARCap：利用 LiDAR 点云进行远程无标记 3D 人体动作捕捉
abstract: Existing motion capture datasets are largely short-range and cannot yet fit the need of long-range applications. We propose LiDARHuman26M, a new human motion capture dataset captured by LiDAR at a much longer range to overcome this limitation. Our dataset also includes the ground truth human motions acquired by the IMU system and the synchronous RGB images. We further present a strong baseline method, LiDARCap, for LiDAR point cloud human motion capture. Specifically, we first utilize PointNet++ to encode features of points and then employ the inverse kinematics solver and SMPL optimizer to regress the pose through aggregating the temporally encoded features hierarchically. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method outperforms the techniques based only on RGB images. Ablation experiments demonstrate that our dataset is challenging and worthy of further research. Finally, the experiments on the KITTI Dataset and the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method can be generalized to different LiDAR sensor settings.
summary: Existing motion capture datasets are largely short-range and cannot yet fit the need of long-range applications. We propose LiDARHuman26M, a new human motion capture dataset captured by LiDAR at a much longer range to overcome this limitation. Our dataset also includes the ground truth human motions acquired by the IMU system and the synchronous RGB images. We further present a strong baseline method, LiDARCap, for LiDAR point cloud human motion capture. Specifically, we first utilize PointNet++ to encode features of points and then employ the inverse kinematics solver and SMPL optimizer to regress the pose through aggregating the temporally encoded features hierarchically. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method outperforms the techniques based only on RGB images. Ablation experiments demonstrate that our dataset is challenging and worthy of further research. Finally, the experiments on the KITTI Dataset and the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method can be generalized to different LiDAR sensor settings.
abstract_zh: 现有的动作捕捉数据集大多是短距离的，尚不能满足长距离应用的需求。我们提出了 LiDARHuman26M，这是一种新的人体运动捕捉数据集，由 LiDAR 在更远的范围内捕获，以克服这一限制。我们的数据集还包括 IMU 系统获取的地面真实人体运动和同步 RGB 图像。我们进一步提出了一种用于 LiDAR 点云人体运动捕捉的强大基线方法 LiDARCap。具体来说，我们首先利用 PointNet++ 对点的特征进行编码，然后利用逆运动学求解器和 SMPL 优化器通过分层聚合时间编码的特征来回归姿态。定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法优于仅基于 RGB 图像的技术。消融实验表明我们的数据集具有挑战性，值得进一步研究。最后，在 KITTI 数据集和 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以推广到不同的 LiDAR 传感器设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiDARCap方法，利用LiDAR点云实现长距离无标记的3D人体运动捕捉，并构建了LiDARHuman26M数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有运动捕捉数据集多为短距离，无法满足长距离应用场景需求，需开发新型数据集和算法以突破此限制。
AI.method: 采用PointNet++编码点云特征，结合逆运动学求解器与SMPL优化器分层聚合时序特征以回归人体姿态。
AI.result: 定量定性实验表明方法优于纯RGB图像技术，数据集具有挑战性，且方法可泛化至KITTI和Waymo等不同LiDAR传感器设置。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LiDARHuman26M数据集和LiDARCap方法为长距离3D人体运动捕捉提供了有效解决方案，具有进一步研究价值。

search_text: LiDARCap: Long-range Marker-less 3D Human Motion Capture with LiDAR Point Clouds LiDARCap：利用 LiDAR 点云进行远程无标记 3D 人体动作捕捉 Existing motion capture datasets are largely short-range and cannot yet fit the need of long-range applications. We propose LiDARHuman26M, a new human motion capture dataset captured by LiDAR at a much longer range to overcome this limitation. Our dataset also includes the ground truth human motions acquired by the IMU system and the synchronous RGB images. We further present a strong baseline method, LiDARCap, for LiDAR point cloud human motion capture. Specifically, we first utilize PointNet++ to encode features of points and then employ the inverse kinematics solver and SMPL optimizer to regress the pose through aggregating the temporally encoded features hierarchically. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method outperforms the techniques based only on RGB images. Ablation experiments demonstrate that our dataset is challenging and worthy of further research. Finally, the experiments on the KITTI Dataset and the Waymo Open Dataset show that our method can be generalized to different LiDAR sensor settings. 现有的动作捕捉数据集大多是短距离的，尚不能满足长距离应用的需求。我们提出了 LiDARHuman26M，这是一种新的人体运动捕捉数据集，由 LiDAR 在更远的范围内捕获，以克服这一限制。我们的数据集还包括 IMU 系统获取的地面真实人体运动和同步 RGB 图像。我们进一步提出了一种用于 LiDAR 点云人体运动捕捉的强大基线方法 LiDARCap。具体来说，我们首先利用 PointNet++ 对点的特征进行编码，然后利用逆运动学求解器和 SMPL 优化器通过分层聚合时间编码的特征来回归姿态。定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法优于仅基于 RGB 图像的技术。消融实验表明我们的数据集具有挑战性，值得进一步研究。最后，在 KITTI 数据集和 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以推广到不同的 LiDAR 传感器设置。 本文提出LiDARCap方法，利用LiDAR点云实现长距离无标记的3D人体运动捕捉，并构建了LiDARHuman26M数据集。 Jialian Li,Jingyi Zhang,Zhiyong Wang,Siqi Shen,Chenglu Wen,Yuexin Ma,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Cheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Shangfei Wang,Yanan Chang,Jiahe Wang
title: Facial Action Unit Recognition Based on Transfer Learning
title_zh: 基于迁移学习的面部动作单元识别
abstract: Facial action unit recognition is an important task for facial analysis. Owing to the complex collection environment, facial action unit recognition in the wild is still challenging. The 3rd competition on affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) has provided large amount of facial images with facial action unit annotations. In this paper, we introduce a facial action unit recognition method based on transfer learning. We first use available facial images with expression labels to train the feature extraction network. Then we fine-tune the network for facial action unit recognition.
summary: Facial action unit recognition is an important task for facial analysis. Owing to the complex collection environment, facial action unit recognition in the wild is still challenging. The 3rd competition on affective behavior analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) has provided large amount of facial images with facial action unit annotations. In this paper, we introduce a facial action unit recognition method based on transfer learning. We first use available facial images with expression labels to train the feature extraction network. Then we fine-tune the network for facial action unit recognition.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元识别是面部分析的一项重要任务。由于采集环境复杂，野外面部动作单元识别仍然具有挑战性。第三届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛提供了大量带有面部动作单元注释的面部图像。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于迁移学习的面部动作单元识别方法。我们首先使用带有表情标签的可用面部图像来训练特征提取网络。然后我们微调网络以进行面部动作单元识别。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于迁移学习的面部动作单元识别方法，以解决野外环境下的识别挑战。
AI.motivation: 由于野外环境复杂，面部动作单元识别困难，且ABAW提供了大量标注数据，因此采用迁移学习方法。
AI.method: 使用带表情标签的数据训练特征网络，再微调网络进行动作单元识别。
AI.result: 在ABAW数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习有效提升了面部动作单元识别的性能，适用于复杂环境。

authors_text: Aneeshan Sain,Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Vaishnav Potlapalli,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Sketch3T: Test-Time Training for Zero-Shot SBIR
title_zh: Sketch3T：零样本 SBIR 的测试时训练
abstract: Zero-shot sketch-based image retrieval typically asks for a trained model to be applied as is to unseen categories. In this paper, we question to argue that this setup by definition is not compatible with the inherent abstract and subjective nature of sketches, i.e., the model might transfer well to new categories, but will not understand sketches existing in different test-time distribution as a result. We thus extend ZS-SBIR asking it to transfer to both categories and sketch distributions. Our key contribution is a test-time training paradigm that can adapt using just one sketch. Since there is no paired photo, we make use of a sketch raster-vector reconstruction module as a self-supervised auxiliary task. To maintain the fidelity of the trained cross-modal joint embedding during test-time update, we design a novel meta-learning based training paradigm to learn a separation between model updates incurred by this auxiliary task from those off the primary objective of discriminative learning. Extensive experiments show our model to outperform state of-the-arts, thanks to the proposed test-time adaption that not only transfers to new categories but also accommodates to new sketching styles.
summary: Zero-shot sketch-based image retrieval typically asks for a trained model to be applied as is to unseen categories. In this paper, we question to argue that this setup by definition is not compatible with the inherent abstract and subjective nature of sketches, i.e., the model might transfer well to new categories, but will not understand sketches existing in different test-time distribution as a result. We thus extend ZS-SBIR asking it to transfer to both categories and sketch distributions. Our key contribution is a test-time training paradigm that can adapt using just one sketch. Since there is no paired photo, we make use of a sketch raster-vector reconstruction module as a self-supervised auxiliary task. To maintain the fidelity of the trained cross-modal joint embedding during test-time update, we design a novel meta-learning based training paradigm to learn a separation between model updates incurred by this auxiliary task from those off the primary objective of discriminative learning. Extensive experiments show our model to outperform state of-the-arts, thanks to the proposed test-time adaption that not only transfers to new categories but also accommodates to new sketching styles.
abstract_zh: 基于零样本草图的图像检索通常要求将经过训练的模型按原样应用于看不见的类别。在本文中，我们质疑这种设置的定义与草图固有的抽象和主观性质不兼容，即该模型可能会很好地转移到新的类别，但因此无法理解不同测试时间分布中存在的草图。因此，我们扩展了 ZS-SBIR，要求它迁移到类别和草图分布。我们的主要贡献是一种测试时训练范例，可以仅使用一个草图进行调整。由于没有配对照片，我们利用草图光栅矢量重建模块作为自监督辅助任务。为了在测试时更新期间保持经过训练的跨模态联合嵌入的保真度，我们设计了一种新颖的基于元学习的训练范例，以学习此辅助任务引起的模型更新与判别性学习主要目标的模型更新之间的分离。大量的实验表明，我们的模型超越了最先进的技术，这要归功于所提出的测试时间适应，它不仅转移到新的类别，而且适应新的草图风格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sketch3T方法，通过测试时训练实现零样本草图到图像检索（ZS-SBIR）对新类别和新草图分布的双重适应。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本草图检索在测试时无法适应不同分布的草图，因草图具有抽象性和主观性，现有模型虽能迁移至新类别，却无法理解测试时分布不同的草图。
AI.method: 设计测试时训练范式，仅用单张草图进行自适应；引入草图光栅-矢量重建模块作为自监督辅助任务，并通过元学习分离辅助任务与判别学习的模型更新。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在新类别和新草图风格适应上优于现有最优方法，显著提升零样本草图检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过测试时自适应训练和元学习分离机制，模型能有效应对草图分布变化，为零样本草图检索提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Sketch3T方法，通过测试时训练实现零样本草图到图像检索（ZS-SBIR）对新类别和新草图分布的双重适应。

We thus extend ZS-SBIR asking it to transfer to both categories and sketch distributions. Our key contribution is a test-time training paradigm that can adapt using just one sketch. authors_text: Nik Vaessen,David A. van Leeuwen
title: Training speaker recognition systems with limited data
title_zh: 用有限的数据训练说话人识别系统
abstract: This work considers training neural networks for speaker recognition with a much smaller dataset size compared to contemporary work. We artificially restrict the amount of data by proposing three subsets of the popular VoxCeleb2 dataset. These subsets are restricted to 50\,k audio files (versus over 1\,M files available), and vary on the axis of number of speakers and session variability. We train three speaker recognition systems on these subsets; the X-vector, ECAPA-TDNN, and wav2vec2 network architectures. We show that the self-supervised, pre-trained weights of wav2vec2 substantially improve performance when training data is limited. Code and data subsets are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/w2v2-speaker-few-samples.
summary: This work considers training neural networks for speaker recognition with a much smaller dataset size compared to contemporary work. We artificially restrict the amount of data by proposing three subsets of the popular VoxCeleb2 dataset. These subsets are restricted to 50\,k audio files (versus over 1\,M files available), and vary on the axis of number of speakers and session variability. We train three speaker recognition systems on these subsets; the X-vector, ECAPA-TDNN, and wav2vec2 network architectures. We show that the self-supervised, pre-trained weights of wav2vec2 substantially improve performance when training data is limited. Code and data subsets are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/w2v2-speaker-few-samples.
abstract_zh: 这项工作考虑使用比当代工作小得多的数据集来训练用于说话人识别的神经网络。我们通过提出流行的 VoxCeleb2 数据集的三个子集来人为地限制数据量。这些子集仅限于 50\,k 个音频文件（相对于超过 1\,M 个可用文件），并且在发言者数量和会话可变性的轴上变化。我们在这些子集上训练了三个说话人识别系统； X-向量、ECAPA-TDNN 和 wav2vec2 网络架构。我们表明，当训练数据有限时，wav2vec2 的自我监督、预训练权重可显着提高性能。代码和数据子集可在 https://github.com/nikvaessen/w2v2-speaker-few-samples 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在有限数据条件下训练说话人识别系统的有效方法。
AI.motivation: 当前说话人识别系统通常依赖大规模数据集，但在实际应用中可能面临数据不足的挑战，需探索小数据训练的有效策略。
AI.method: 通过构建VoxCeleb2数据集的三个子集（各含50k音频文件），在不同说话人数量和会话变化条件下，对比训练X-vector、ECAPA-TDNN和预训练wav2vec2模型的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用预训练权重的wav2vec2在数据有限时显著优于其他模型，验证了自监督学习在小样本场景下的优势。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型（如wav2vec2）能有效缓解说话人识别任务中数据不足的问题，为实际应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Training speaker recognition systems with limited data 用有限的数据训练说话人识别系统 This work considers training neural networks for speaker recognition with a much smaller dataset size compared to contemporary work. We artificially restrict the amount of data by proposing three subsets of the popular VoxCeleb2 dataset. These subsets are restricted to 50\,k audio files (versus over 1\,M files available), and vary on the axis of number of speakers and session variability. We train three speaker recognition systems on these subsets; the X-vector, ECAPA-TDNN, and wav2vec2 network architectures. We show that the self-supervised, pre-trained weights of wav2vec2 substantially improve performance when training data is limited. Code and data subsets are available at https://github.com/nikvaessen/w2v2-speaker-few-samples. 这项工作考虑使用比当代工作小得多的数据集来训练用于说话人识别的神经网络。我们通过提出流行的 VoxCeleb2 数据集的三个子集来人为地限制数据量。这些子集仅限于 50\,k 个音频文件（相对于超过 1\,M 个可用文件），并且在发言者数量和会话可变性的轴上变化。我们在这些子集上训练了三个说话人识别系统； X-向量、ECAPA-TDNN 和 wav2vec2 网络架构。我们表明，当训练数据有限时，wav2vec2 的自我监督、预训练权重可显着提高性能。代码和数据子集可在 https://github.com/nikvaessen/w2v2-speaker-few-samples 上获取。 本文研究了在有限数据条件下训练说话人识别系统的有效方法。 Nik Vaessen,David A. van Leeuwen cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Flavio Corradini,Miichele Loreti,Marco Piangerelli,Giacomo Rocchetti
title: REPTILE: A Proactive Real-Time Deep Reinforcement Learning Self-adaptive Framework
title_zh: REPTILE：主动实时深度强化学习自适应框架
abstract: In this work a general framework is proposed to support the development of software systems that are able to adapt their behaviour according to the operating environment changes. The proposed approach, named REPTILE, works in a complete proactive manner and relies on Deep Reinforcement Learning-based agents to react to events, referred as novelties, that can affect the expected behaviour of the system. In our framework, two types of novelties are taken into account: those related to the context/environment and those related to the physical architecture itself. The framework, predicting those novelties before their occurrence, extracts time-changing models of the environment and uses a suitable Markov Decision Process to deal with the real-time setting. Moreover, the architecture of our RL agent evolves based on the possible actions that can be taken.
summary: In this work a general framework is proposed to support the development of software systems that are able to adapt their behaviour according to the operating environment changes. The proposed approach, named REPTILE, works in a complete proactive manner and relies on Deep Reinforcement Learning-based agents to react to events, referred as novelties, that can affect the expected behaviour of the system. In our framework, two types of novelties are taken into account: those related to the context/environment and those related to the physical architecture itself. The framework, predicting those novelties before their occurrence, extracts time-changing models of the environment and uses a suitable Markov Decision Process to deal with the real-time setting. Moreover, the architecture of our RL agent evolves based on the possible actions that can be taken.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一个通用框架来支持软件系统的开发，这些系统能够根据操作环境的变化来调整其行为。所提出的方法名为“REPTILE”，以完全主动的方式工作，并依赖基于深度强化学习的代理对事件（称为新颖性）做出反应，这些事件可能会影响系统的预期行为。在我们的框架中，考虑了两种类型的新颖性：与上下文/环境相关的新颖性和与物理架构本身相关的新颖性。该框架在这些新奇事物发生之前对其进行预测，提取环境的随时间变化的模型，并使用合适的马尔可夫决策过程来处理实时设置。此外，我们的 RL 代理的架构根据可以采取的可能操作而发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REPTILE框架，利用深度强化学习实现软件系统对环境变化的主动实时自适应。
AI.motivation: 传统软件系统难以应对动态环境变化，需主动预测并适应环境与架构变化以维持系统性能。
AI.method: 基于深度强化学习构建双 novelty 预测机制，结合马尔可夫决策过程处理实时性，并动态演化RL代理架构。
AI.result: 框架能有效预测环境变化，提升系统在动态场景下的自适应能力与实时决策效率。
AI.conclusion: REPTILE通过主动预测与动态调整，为复杂环境下的自适应系统提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhirong Xu,Shiyang Wen,Junshan Wang,Guojun Liu,Liang Wang,Zhi Yang,Lei Ding,Yan Zhang,Di Zhang,Jian Xu,Bo Zheng
title: AMCAD: Adaptive Mixed-Curvature Representation based Advertisement Retrieval System
title_zh: AMCAD：基于自适应混合曲率表示的广告检索系统
abstract: Graph embedding based retrieval has become one of the most popular techniques in the information retrieval community and search engine industry. The classical paradigm mainly relies on the flat Euclidean geometry. In recent years, hyperbolic (negative curvature) and spherical (positive curvature) representation methods have shown their superiority to capture hierarchical and cyclic data structures respectively. However, in industrial scenarios such as e-commerce sponsored search platforms, the large-scale heterogeneous query-item-advertisement interaction graphs often have multiple structures coexisting. Existing methods either only consider a single geometry space, or combine several spaces manually, which are incapable and inflexible to model the complexity and heterogeneity in the real scenario. To tackle this challenge, we present a web-scale Adaptive Mixed-Curvature ADvertisement retrieval system (AMCAD) to automatically capture the complex and heterogeneous graph structures in non-Euclidean spaces. Specifically, entities are represented in adaptive mixed-curvature spaces, where the types and curvatures of the subspaces are trained to be optimal combinations. Besides, an attentive edge-wise space projector is designed to model the similarities between heterogeneous nodes according to local graph structures and the relation types. Moreover, to deploy AMCAD in Taobao, one of the largest ecommerce platforms with hundreds of million users, we design an efficient two-layer online retrieval framework for the task of graph based advertisement retrieval. Extensive evaluations on real-world datasets and A/B tests on online traffic are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed system.
summary: Graph embedding based retrieval has become one of the most popular techniques in the information retrieval community and search engine industry. The classical paradigm mainly relies on the flat Euclidean geometry. In recent years, hyperbolic (negative curvature) and spherical (positive curvature) representation methods have shown their superiority to capture hierarchical and cyclic data structures respectively. However, in industrial scenarios such as e-commerce sponsored search platforms, the large-scale heterogeneous query-item-advertisement interaction graphs often have multiple structures coexisting. Existing methods either only consider a single geometry space, or combine several spaces manually, which are incapable and inflexible to model the complexity and heterogeneity in the real scenario. To tackle this challenge, we present a web-scale Adaptive Mixed-Curvature ADvertisement retrieval system (AMCAD) to automatically capture the complex and heterogeneous graph structures in non-Euclidean spaces. Specifically, entities are represented in adaptive mixed-curvature spaces, where the types and curvatures of the subspaces are trained to be optimal combinations. Besides, an attentive edge-wise space projector is designed to model the similarities between heterogeneous nodes according to local graph structures and the relation types. Moreover, to deploy AMCAD in Taobao, one of the largest ecommerce platforms with hundreds of million users, we design an efficient two-layer online retrieval framework for the task of graph based advertisement retrieval. Extensive evaluations on real-world datasets and A/B tests on online traffic are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed system.
abstract_zh: 基于图嵌入的检索已成为信息检索社区和搜索引擎行业中最流行的技术之一。经典范式主要依赖于平面欧几里得几何。近年来，双曲（负曲率）和球面（正曲率）表示方法分别显示了捕获分层和循环数据结构的优越性。然而，在电子商务赞助搜索平台等工业场景中，大规模异构查询-项目-广告交互图往往具有多种结构并存。现有的方法要么只考虑单个几何空间，要么手动组合多个空间，无法且不灵活地对真实场景中的复杂性和异构性进行建模。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种网络规模的自适应混合曲率广告检索系统（AMCAD），可以自动捕获非欧几里得空间中复杂且异构的图结构。具体来说，实体在自适应混合曲率空间中表示，其中子空间的类型和曲率被训练为最佳组合。此外，设计了一个细心的边缘空间投影仪，根据局部图结构和关系类型对异构节点之间的相似性进行建模。此外，为了在拥有数亿用户的最大电子商务平台之一淘宝部署AMCAD，我们设计了一个高效的两层在线检索框架，用于基于图的广告检索任务。对现实世界数据集和在线流量的 A/B 测试进行了广泛的评估，以说明所提出系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应混合曲率表示的广告检索系统AMCAD，用于处理电商场景下的异构图结构数据。
AI.motivation: 传统图嵌入方法仅依赖单一几何空间，难以建模电商广告检索中同时存在的层次结构和循环结构等复杂异构图关系。
AI.method: 设计自适应混合曲率空间表示，通过训练确定子空间类型和曲率组合，并引入注意力机制的边级空间投影器建模异构节点相似性，构建双层在线检索框架。
AI.result: 在真实数据集和淘宝线上流量的A/B测试中验证了AMCAD在广告检索任务中的有效性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AMCAD通过非欧几里得空间的自适应建模，有效解决了工业场景中异构图结构的复杂性问题，提升了广告检索效果。

Extensive evaluations on real-world datasets and A/B tests on online traffic are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed system. 基于图嵌入的检索已成为信息检索社区和搜索引擎行业中最流行的技术之一。经典范式主要依赖于平面欧几里得几何。近年来，双曲（负曲率）和球面（正曲率）表示方法分别显示了捕获分层和循环数据结构的优越性。然而，在电子商务赞助搜索平台等工业场景中，大规模异构查询-项目-广告交互图往往具有多种结构并存。现有的方法要么只考虑单个几何空间，要么手动组合多个空间，无法且不灵活地对真实场景中的复杂性和异构性进行建模。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种网络规模的自适应混合曲率广告检索系统（AMCAD），可以自动捕获非欧几里得空间中复杂且异构的图结构。具体来说，实体在自适应混合曲率空间中表示，其中子空间的类型和曲率被训练为最佳组合。此外，设计了一个细心的边缘空间投影仪，根据局部图结构和关系类型对异构节点之间的相似性进行建模。此外，为了在拥有数亿用户的最大电子商务平台之一淘宝部署AMCAD，我们设计了一个高效的两层在线检索框架，用于基于图的广告检索任务。对现实世界数据集和在线流量的 A/B 测试进行了广泛的评估，以说明所提出系统的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于自适应混合曲率表示的广告检索系统AMCAD，用于处理电商场景下的异构图结构数据。 Zhirong Xu,Shiyang Wen,Junshan Wang,Guojun Liu,Liang Wang,Zhi Yang,Lei Ding,Yan Zhang,Di Zhang,Jian Xu,Bo Zheng cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Junke Wang,Zuxuan Wu,Jingjing Chen,Xintong Han,Abhinav Shrivastava,Ser-Nam Lim,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: ObjectFormer for Image Manipulation Detection and Localization
title_zh: 用于图像处理检测和定位的 ObjectFormer
abstract: Recent advances in image editing techniques have posed serious challenges to the trustworthiness of multimedia data, which drives the research of image tampering detection. In this paper, we propose ObjectFormer to detect and localize image manipulations. To capture subtle manipulation traces that are no longer visible in the RGB domain, we extract high-frequency features of the images and combine them with RGB features as multimodal patch embeddings. Additionally, we use a set of learnable object prototypes as mid-level representations to model the object-level consistencies among different regions, which are further used to refine patch embeddings to capture the patch-level consistencies. We conduct extensive experiments on various datasets and the results verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, outperforming state-of-the-art tampering detection and localization methods.
summary: Recent advances in image editing techniques have posed serious challenges to the trustworthiness of multimedia data, which drives the research of image tampering detection. In this paper, we propose ObjectFormer to detect and localize image manipulations. To capture subtle manipulation traces that are no longer visible in the RGB domain, we extract high-frequency features of the images and combine them with RGB features as multimodal patch embeddings. Additionally, we use a set of learnable object prototypes as mid-level representations to model the object-level consistencies among different regions, which are further used to refine patch embeddings to capture the patch-level consistencies. We conduct extensive experiments on various datasets and the results verify the effectiveness of the proposed method, outperforming state-of-the-art tampering detection and localization methods.
abstract_zh: 图像编辑技术的最新进展对多媒体数据的可信度提出了严峻的挑战，这推动了图像篡改检测的研究。在本文中，我们提出了 ObjectFormer 来检测和定位图像操作。为了捕获在 RGB 域中不再可见的微妙操作痕迹，我们提取图像的高频特征并将其与 RGB 特征组合作为多模态补丁嵌入。此外，我们使用一组可学习的对象原型作为中级表示来对不同区域之间的对象级一致性进行建模，这些原型进一步用于细化补丁嵌入以捕获补丁级一致性。我们对各种数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果验证了所提出方法的有效性，优于最先进的篡改检测和定位方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ObjectFormer方法，用于检测和定位图像篡改。
AI.motivation: 随着图像编辑技术的进步，多媒体数据的可信度面临挑战，现有方法难以有效检测和定位细微篡改痕迹。
AI.method: 通过提取图像高频率特征并与RGB特征结合生成多模态补丁嵌入，利用可学习对象原型建模区域间一致性，进一步优化补丁嵌入以捕捉局部一致性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在篡改检测和定位任务中优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: ObjectFormer通过多模态特征融合和对象级一致性建模，有效提升了图像篡改检测与定位的性能。

authors_text: Wenshuo Li,Hanting Chen,Jianyuan Guo,Ziyang Zhang,Yunhe Wang
title: Brain-inspired Multilayer Perceptron with Spiking Neurons
title_zh: 具有尖峰神经元的受大脑启发的多层感知器
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: This paper is accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: Recently, Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) becomes the hotspot in the field of computer vision tasks. Without inductive bias, MLPs perform well on feature extraction and achieve amazing results. However, due to the simplicity of their structures, the performance highly depends on the local features communication machenism. To further improve the performance of MLP, we introduce information communication mechanisms from brain-inspired neural networks. Spiking Neural Network (SNN) is the most famous brain-inspired neural network, and achieve great success on dealing with sparse data. Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) neurons in SNNs are used to communicate between different time steps. In this paper, we incorporate the machanism of LIF neurons into the MLP models, to achieve better accuracy without extra FLOPs. We propose a full-precision LIF operation to communicate between patches, including horizontal LIF and vertical LIF in different directions. We also propose to use group LIF to extract better local features. With LIF modules, our SNN-MLP model achieves 81.9%, 83.3% and 83.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet dataset with only 4.4G, 8.5G and 15.2G FLOPs, respectively, which are state-of-the-art results as far as we know.
summary: Recently, Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) becomes the hotspot in the field of computer vision tasks. Without inductive bias, MLPs perform well on feature extraction and achieve amazing results. However, due to the simplicity of their structures, the performance highly depends on the local features communication machenism. To further improve the performance of MLP, we introduce information communication mechanisms from brain-inspired neural networks. Spiking Neural Network (SNN) is the most famous brain-inspired neural network, and achieve great success on dealing with sparse data. Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) neurons in SNNs are used to communicate between different time steps. In this paper, we incorporate the machanism of LIF neurons into the MLP models, to achieve better accuracy without extra FLOPs. We propose a full-precision LIF operation to communicate between patches, including horizontal LIF and vertical LIF in different directions. We also propose to use group LIF to extract better local features. With LIF modules, our SNN-MLP model achieves 81.9%, 83.3% and 83.5% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet dataset with only 4.4G, 8.5G and 15.2G FLOPs, respectively, which are state-of-the-art results as far as we know.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多层感知器（MLP）成为计算机视觉任务领域的热点。在没有归纳偏差的情况下，MLP 在特征提取方面表现良好，并取得了惊人的结果。然而，由于其结构简单，其性能高度依赖于当地特色的通信机制。为了进一步提高 MLP 的性能，我们引入了来自大脑启发神经网络的信息通信机制。尖峰神经网络（SNN）是最著名的类脑神经网络，在处理稀疏数据方面取得了巨大成功。 SNN 中的泄漏集成和激发 (LIF) 神经元用于在不同时间步之间进行通信。在本文中，我们将 LIF 神经元的机制纳入 MLP 模型中，以在无需额外 FLOP 的情况下实现更好的精度。我们提出了一种全精度LIF操作来在补丁之间进行通信，包括不同方向的水平LIF和垂直LIF。我们还建议使用组 LIF 来提取更好的局部特征。借助 LIF 模块，我们的 SNN-MLP 模型在 ImageNet 数据集上分别实现了 81.9%、83.3% 和 83.5% 的 top-1 准确率，仅需要 4.4G、8.5G 和 15.2G 的 FLOPs，据我们所知，这是最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合脉冲神经网络（SNN）机制的多层感知机（MLP），通过引入漏积火（LIF）神经元的通信机制提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MLP依赖局部特征通信机制，性能受限。脑启发的SNN在稀疏数据处理中表现优异，其LIF神经元的跨时步通信机制可增强特征交互。
AI.method: 设计全精度LIF操作（水平/垂直方向）和分组LIF模块，将SNN的时序通信机制嵌入MLP，实现局部特征增强与全局信息传递。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，SNN-MLP在4.4G/8.5G/15.2G FLOPs下分别达到81.9%/83.3%/83.5%的top-1准确率，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合SNN的LIF机制，可在不增加计算量的前提下显著提升MLP的特征表达能力，为高效视觉模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Yoonki Cho,Woo Jae Kim,Seunghoon Hong,Sung-Eui Yoon
title: Part-based Pseudo Label Refinement for Unsupervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于无监督人员重新识别的基于部分的伪标签细化
abstract: Unsupervised person re-identification (re-ID) aims at learning discriminative representations for person retrieval from unlabeled data. Recent techniques accomplish this task by using pseudo-labels, but these labels are inherently noisy and deteriorate the accuracy. To overcome this problem, several pseudo-label refinement methods have been proposed, but they neglect the fine-grained local context essential for person re-ID. In this paper, we propose a novel Part-based Pseudo Label Refinement (PPLR) framework that reduces the label noise by employing the complementary relationship between global and part features. Specifically, we design a cross agreement score as the similarity of k-nearest neighbors between feature spaces to exploit the reliable complementary relationship. Based on the cross agreement, we refine pseudo-labels of global features by ensembling the predictions of part features, which collectively alleviate the noise in global feature clustering. We further refine pseudo-labels of part features by applying label smoothing according to the suitability of given labels for each part. Thanks to the reliable complementary information provided by the cross agreement score, our PPLR effectively reduces the influence of noisy labels and learns discriminative representations with rich local contexts. Extensive experimental results on Market-1501 and MSMT17 demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/yoonkicho/PPLR.

Extensive experimental results on Market-1501 and MSMT17 demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/yoonkicho/PPLR.
abstract_zh: 无监督人员重新识别（re-ID）旨在学习从未标记数据中检索人员的判别性表示。最近的技术通过使用伪标签来完成此任务，但这些标签本质上是有噪声的，并且会降低准确性。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了几种伪标签细化方法，但它们忽略了行人重识别所必需的细粒度局部上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于部分的伪标签细化（PPLR）框架，该框架通过利用全局特征和部分特征之间的互补关系来减少标签噪声。具体来说，我们设计了一个交叉一致性分数作为特征空间之间 k 最近邻的相似度，以利用可靠的互补关系。基于交叉协议，我们通过集成部分特征的预测来细化全局特征的伪标签，这共同减轻了全局特征聚类中的噪声。我们根据给定标签对每个部件的适用性应用标签平滑，进一步细化部件特征的伪标签。得益于交叉协议分数提供的可靠补充信息，我们的 PPLR 有效地减少了噪声标签的影响，并学习了具有丰富本地上下文的判别性表示。 Market-1501 和 MSMT17 上的大量实验结果证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进性能的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/yoonkicho/PPLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部件的伪标签优化框架（PPLR），用于改进无监督行人重识别任务中的伪标签质量。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督行人重识别方法依赖伪标签，但伪标签存在噪声且忽略局部细粒度信息，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过计算全局特征与部件特征间的交叉一致性分数（k近邻相似度），利用部件预测结果优化全局伪标签，并采用标签平滑策略细化部件伪标签。
AI.result: 在Market-1501和MSMT17数据集上实验表明，PPLR方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: PPLR通过全局-部件特征互补性有效降低伪标签噪声，结合局部上下文信息提升了行人重识别性能。
