search_text: Part-based Pseudo Label Refinement for Unsupervised Person Re-identification 用于无监督人员重新识别的基于部分的伪标签细化 Unsupervised person re-identification (re-ID) aims at learning discriminative representations for person retrieval from unlabeled data. Recent techniques accomplish this task by using pseudo-labels, but these labels are inherently noisy and deteriorate the accuracy. To overcome this problem, several pseudo-label refinement methods have been proposed, but they neglect the fine-grained local context essential for person re-ID. In this paper, we propose a novel Part-based Pseudo Label Refinement (PPLR) framework that reduces the label noise by employing the complementary relationship between global and part features. Specifically, we design a cross agreement score as the similarity of k-nearest neighbors between feature spaces to exploit the reliable complementary relationship. Based on the cross agreement, we refine pseudo-labels of global features by ensembling the predictions of part features, which collectively alleviate the noise in global feature clustering. We further refine pseudo-labels of part features by applying label smoothing according to the suitability of given labels for each part. Thanks to the reliable complementary information provided by the cross agreement score, our PPLR effectively reduces the influence of noisy labels and learns discriminative representations with rich local contexts. Extensive experimental results on Market-1501 and MSMT17 demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/yoonkicho/PPLR. 无监督人员重新识别（re-ID）旨在学习从未标记数据中检索人员的判别性表示。最近的技术通过使用伪标签来完成此任务，但这些标签本质上是有噪声的，并且会降低准确性。为了克服这个问题，人们提出了几种伪标签细化方法，但它们忽略了行人重识别所必需的细粒度局部上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于部分的伪标签细化（PPLR）框架，该框架通过利用全局特征和部分特征之间的互补关系来减少标签噪声。具体来说，我们设计了一个交叉一致性分数作为特征空间之间 k 最近邻的相似度，以利用可靠的互补关系。基于交叉协议，我们通过集成部分特征的预测来细化全局特征的伪标签，这共同减轻了全局特征聚类中的噪声。我们根据给定标签对每个部件的适用性应用标签平滑，进一步细化部件特征的伪标签。得益于交叉协议分数提供的可靠补充信息，我们的 PPLR 有效地减少了噪声标签的影响，并学习了具有丰富本地上下文的判别性表示。 Market-1501 和 MSMT17 上的大量实验结果证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进性能的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/yoonkicho/PPLR 获取。 本文提出了一种基于部件的伪标签优化框架（PPLR），用于改进无监督行人重识别任务中的伪标签质量。 Yoonki Cho,Woo Jae Kim,Seunghoon Hong,Sung-Eui Yoon cs.CV

authors_text: Danya Li,Joaquin Gajardo,Michele Volpi,Thijs Defraeye
title: Using Machine Learning to generate an open-access cropland map from satellite images time series in the Indian Himalayan Region
title_zh: 使用机器学习根据印度喜马拉雅地区的卫星图像时间序列生成开放获取的农田地图
abstract: Crop maps are crucial for agricultural monitoring and food management and can additionally support domain-specific applications, such as setting cold supply chain infrastructure in developing countries. Machine learning (ML) models, combined with freely-available satellite imagery, can be used to produce cost-effective and high spatial-resolution crop maps. However, accessing ground truth data for supervised learning is especially challenging in developing countries due to factors such as smallholding and fragmented geography, which often results in a lack of crop type maps or even reliable cropland maps. Our area of interest for this study lies in Himachal Pradesh, India, where we aim at producing an open-access binary cropland map at 10-meter resolution for the Kullu, Shimla, and Mandi districts. To this end, we developed an ML pipeline that relies on Sentinel-2 satellite images time series. We investigated two pixel-based supervised classifiers, support vector machines (SVM) and random forest (RF), which are used to classify per-pixel time series for binary cropland mapping. The ground truth data used for training, validation and testing was manually annotated from a combination of field survey reference points and visual interpretation of very high resolution (VHR) imagery. We trained and validated the models via spatial cross-validation to account for local spatial autocorrelation and selected the RF model due to overall robustness and lower computational cost. We tested the generalization capability of the chosen model at the pixel level by computing the accuracy, recall, precision, and F1-score on hold-out test sets of each district, achieving an average accuracy for the RF (our best model) of 87%. We used this model to generate a cropland map for three districts of Himachal Pradesh, spanning 14,600 km2, which improves the resolution and quality of existing public maps.
summary: Crop maps are crucial for agricultural monitoring and food management and can additionally support domain-specific applications, such as setting cold supply chain infrastructure in developing countries. Machine learning (ML) models, combined with freely-available satellite imagery, can be used to produce cost-effective and high spatial-resolution crop maps. However, accessing ground truth data for supervised learning is especially challenging in developing countries due to factors such as smallholding and fragmented geography, which often results in a lack of crop type maps or even reliable cropland maps. Our area of interest for this study lies in Himachal Pradesh, India, where we aim at producing an open-access binary cropland map at 10-meter resolution for the Kullu, Shimla, and Mandi districts. To this end, we developed an ML pipeline that relies on Sentinel-2 satellite images time series. We investigated two pixel-based supervised classifiers, support vector machines (SVM) and random forest (RF), which are used to classify per-pixel time series for binary cropland mapping. The ground truth data used for training, validation and testing was manually annotated from a combination of field survey reference points and visual interpretation of very high resolution (VHR) imagery. We trained and validated the models via spatial cross-validation to account for local spatial autocorrelation and selected the RF model due to overall robustness and lower computational cost. We tested the generalization capability of the chosen model at the pixel level by computing the accuracy, recall, precision, and F1-score on hold-out test sets of each district, achieving an average accuracy for the RF (our best model) of 87%. We used this model to generate a cropland map for three districts of Himachal Pradesh, spanning 14,600 km2, which improves the resolution and quality of existing public maps.
abstract_zh: 作物地图对于农业监测和粮食管理至关重要，并且还可以支持特定领域的应用，例如在发展中国家建立冷供应链基础设施。机器学习 (ML) 模型与免费提供的卫星图像相结合，可用于生成具有成本效益的高空间分辨率作物地图。然而，由于小农耕作和地理分散等因素，在发展中国家获取用于监督学习的地面实况数据尤其具有挑战性，这通常导致缺乏作物类型地图甚至可靠的农田地图。我们对这项研究感兴趣的区域位于印度喜马偕尔邦，我们的目标是为 Kullu、Shimla 和 Mandi 地区制作 10 米分辨率的开放式二元农田地图。为此，我们开发了一个依赖 Sentinel-2 卫星图像时间序列的 ML 管道。我们研究了两种基于像素的监督分类器：支持向量机（SVM）和随机森林（RF），它们用于对二元农田绘图的每像素时间序列进行分类。用于训练、验证和测试的地面实况数据是根据现场调查参考点和超高分辨率 (VHR) 图像的视觉解释的组合手动注释的。我们通过空间交叉验证来训练和验证模型，以考虑局部空间自相关性，并由于整体鲁棒性和较低的计算成本而选择了 RF 模型。我们通过计算每个区的保留测试集的准确度、召回率、精确度和 F1 分数，测试了所选模型在像素级别的泛化能力，实现了 RF（我们最好的模型）87% 的平均准确度。我们使用该模型生成了喜马偕尔邦三个地区的农田地图，面积达 14,600 平方公里，提高了现有公共地图的分辨率和质量。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用机器学习和卫星图像时间序列，在印度喜马偕尔邦生成高分辨率的开放获取耕地地图。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家因小农经营和地理碎片化导致耕地数据获取困难，亟需低成本高精度的耕地地图以支持农业管理和冷链建设。
AI.method: 基于Sentinel-2卫星时序影像，采用支持向量机（SVM）和随机森林（RF）两类像素级分类器，结合实地调查和高分辨率影像标注的地面真实数据，通过空间交叉验证选择性能更优的RF模型。
AI.result: 随机森林模型在三个区县测试中达到87%平均精度，生成覆盖14,600平方公里的10米分辨率耕地地图。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过机器学习有效提升了区域耕地地图的分辨率和质量，为数据稀缺地区提供了可复用的低成本解决方案。

authors_text: Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Are High-Resolution Event Cameras Really Needed?
title_zh: 真的需要高分辨率事件摄像机吗？
abstract: Due to their outstanding properties in challenging conditions, event cameras have become indispensable in a wide range of applications, ranging from automotive, computational photography, and SLAM. However, as further improvements are made to the sensor design, modern event cameras are trending toward higher and higher sensor resolutions, which result in higher bandwidth and computational requirements on downstream tasks. Despite this trend, the benefits of using high-resolution event cameras to solve standard computer vision tasks are still not clear. In this work, we report the surprising discovery that, in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds, low-resolution cameras can outperform high-resolution ones, while requiring a significantly lower bandwidth. We provide both empirical and theoretical evidence for this claim, which indicates that high-resolution event cameras exhibit higher per-pixel event rates, leading to higher temporal noise in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds. As a result, in most cases, high-resolution event cameras show a lower task performance, compared to lower resolution sensors in these conditions. We empirically validate our findings across several tasks, namely image reconstruction, optical flow estimation, and camera pose tracking, both on synthetic and real data. We believe that these findings will provide important guidelines for future trends in event camera development.
summary: Due to their outstanding properties in challenging conditions, event cameras have become indispensable in a wide range of applications, ranging from automotive, computational photography, and SLAM. However, as further improvements are made to the sensor design, modern event cameras are trending toward higher and higher sensor resolutions, which result in higher bandwidth and computational requirements on downstream tasks. Despite this trend, the benefits of using high-resolution event cameras to solve standard computer vision tasks are still not clear. In this work, we report the surprising discovery that, in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds, low-resolution cameras can outperform high-resolution ones, while requiring a significantly lower bandwidth. We provide both empirical and theoretical evidence for this claim, which indicates that high-resolution event cameras exhibit higher per-pixel event rates, leading to higher temporal noise in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds. As a result, in most cases, high-resolution event cameras show a lower task performance, compared to lower resolution sensors in these conditions. We empirically validate our findings across several tasks, namely image reconstruction, optical flow estimation, and camera pose tracking, both on synthetic and real data. We believe that these findings will provide important guidelines for future trends in event camera development.
abstract_zh: 由于在具有挑战性的条件下具有出色的性能，事件相机已成为汽车、计算摄影和 SLAM 等广泛应用中不可或缺的一部分。然而，随着传感器设计的进一步改进，现代事件摄像机趋向于越来越高的传感器分辨率，这导致下游任务的带宽和计算要求更高。尽管存在这种趋势，但使用高分辨率事件相机来解决标准计算机视觉任务的好处仍然不清楚。在这项工作中，我们报告了一个令人惊讶的发现，即在低照度条件下和高速下，低分辨率相机的性能可以优于高分辨率相机，同时需要的带宽显着降低。我们为这一说法提供了经验和理论证据，这表明高分辨率事件相机表现出更高的每像素事件率，导致在低照度条件和高速下产生更高的时间噪声。因此，在大多数情况下，与低分辨率传感器相比，高分辨率事件摄像机在这些条件下表现出较低的任务性能。我们在合成数据和真实数据上通过多项任务（即图像重建、光流估计和相机姿态跟踪）实证验证了我们的发现。我们相信这些发现将为事件相机的未来发展趋势提供重要指导。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了高分辨率事件相机在低光照和高速条件下是否真的优于低分辨率事件相机，并通过实验和理论分析验证了这一问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管事件相机在各种应用中表现出色，但随着传感器分辨率的不断提高，其带宽和计算需求也显著增加，而高分辨率事件相机在解决标准计算机视觉任务中的优势尚不明确。
AI.method: 作者通过实验和理论分析，验证了低分辨率事件相机在低光照和高速条件下可能优于高分辨率事件相机，并在图像重建、光流估计和相机姿态跟踪等任务上进行了实证研究。
AI.result: 研究发现，低分辨率事件相机在低光照和高速条件下表现优于高分辨率事件相机，同时显著降低了带宽需求，而高分辨率事件相机的每个像素事件率更高，导致在这些条件下出现更高的时间噪声。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，在大多数情况下，高分辨率事件相机在低光照和高速条件下表现不如低分辨率传感器，为未来事件相机的发展提供了重要指导。

search_text: Are High-Resolution Event Cameras Really Needed? 真的需要高分辨率事件摄像机吗？ Due to their outstanding properties in challenging conditions, event cameras have become indispensable in a wide range of applications, ranging from automotive, computational photography, and SLAM. However, as further improvements are made to the sensor design, modern event cameras are trending toward higher and higher sensor resolutions, which result in higher bandwidth and computational requirements on downstream tasks. Despite this trend, the benefits of using high-resolution event cameras to solve standard computer vision tasks are still not clear. In this work, we report the surprising discovery that, in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds, low-resolution cameras can outperform high-resolution ones, while requiring a significantly lower bandwidth. We provide both empirical and theoretical evidence for this claim, which indicates that high-resolution event cameras exhibit higher per-pixel event rates, leading to higher temporal noise in low-illumination conditions and at high speeds. As a result, in most cases, high-resolution event cameras show a lower task performance, compared to lower resolution sensors in these conditions. We empirically validate our findings across several tasks, namely image reconstruction, optical flow estimation, and camera pose tracking, both on synthetic and real data. We believe that these findings will provide important guidelines for future trends in event camera development. 由于在具有挑战性的条件下具有出色的性能，事件相机已成为汽车、计算摄影和 SLAM 等广泛应用中不可或缺的一部分。然而，随着传感器设计的进一步改进，现代事件摄像机趋向于越来越高的传感器分辨率，这导致下游任务的带宽和计算要求更高。尽管存在这种趋势，但使用高分辨率事件相机来解决标准计算机视觉任务的好处仍然不清楚。在这项工作中，我们报告了一个令人惊讶的发现，即在低照度条件下和高速下，低分辨率相机的性能可以优于高分辨率相机，同时需要的带宽显着降低。我们为这一说法提供了经验和理论证据，这表明高分辨率事件相机表现出更高的每像素事件率，导致在低照度条件和高速下产生更高的时间噪声。因此，在大多数情况下，与低分辨率传感器相比，高分辨率事件摄像机在这些条件下表现出较低的任务性能。我们在合成数据和真实数据上通过多项任务（即图像重建、光流估计和相机姿态跟踪）实证验证了我们的发现。我们相信这些发现将为事件相机的未来发展趋势提供重要指导。 本文探讨了高分辨率事件相机在低光照和高速条件下是否真的优于低分辨率事件相机，并通过实验和理论分析验证了这一问题。 Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza cs.CV

authors_text: Naofumi Akimoto,Yuhi Matsuo,Yoshimitsu Aoki
title: Diverse Plausible 360-Degree Image Outpainting for Efficient 3DCG Background Creation
title_zh: 多样化的 360 度图像绘制，实现高效的 3DCG 背景创建
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://akmtn.github.io/omni-dreamer/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://akmtn.github.io/omni-dreamer/
abstract: We address the problem of generating a 360-degree image from a single image with a narrow field of view by estimating its surroundings. Previous methods suffered from overfitting to the training resolution and deterministic generation. This paper proposes a completion method using a transformer for scene modeling and novel methods to improve the properties of a 360-degree image on the output image. Specifically, we use CompletionNets with a transformer to perform diverse completions and AdjustmentNet to match color, stitching, and resolution with an input image, enabling inference at any resolution. To improve the properties of a 360-degree image on an output image, we also propose WS-perceptual loss and circular inference. Thorough experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods both qualitatively and quantitatively. For example, compared to SOTA methods, our method completes images 16 times larger in resolution and achieves 1.7 times lower Frechet inception distance (FID). Furthermore, we propose a pipeline that uses the completion results for lighting and background of 3DCG scenes. Our plausible background completion enables perceptually natural results in the application of inserting virtual objects with specular surfaces.
summary: We address the problem of generating a 360-degree image from a single image with a narrow field of view by estimating its surroundings. Previous methods suffered from overfitting to the training resolution and deterministic generation. This paper proposes a completion method using a transformer for scene modeling and novel methods to improve the properties of a 360-degree image on the output image. Specifically, we use CompletionNets with a transformer to perform diverse completions and AdjustmentNet to match color, stitching, and resolution with an input image, enabling inference at any resolution. To improve the properties of a 360-degree image on an output image, we also propose WS-perceptual loss and circular inference. Thorough experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods both qualitatively and quantitatively. For example, compared to SOTA methods, our method completes images 16 times larger in resolution and achieves 1.7 times lower Frechet inception distance (FID). Furthermore, we propose a pipeline that uses the completion results for lighting and background of 3DCG scenes. Our plausible background completion enables perceptually natural results in the application of inserting virtual objects with specular surfaces.
abstract_zh: 我们通过估计周围环境来解决从具有窄视场的单个图像生成 360 度图像的问题。以前的方法存在对训练分辨率和确定性生成过度拟合的问题。本文提出了一种使用 Transformer 进行场景建模的补全方法以及改进输出图像上 360 度图像属性的新方法。具体来说，我们使用带有转换器的 CompletionNet 来执行各种补全，并使用调整网络将颜色、拼接和分辨率与输入图像相匹配，从而能够在任何分辨率下进行推理。为了提高输出图像上 360 度图像的属性，我们还提出了 WS 感知损失和循环推理。彻底的实验表明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都优于最先进的（SOTA）方法。例如，与 SOTA 方法相比，我们的方法完成的图像分辨率提高了 16 倍，Frechet 起始距离 (FID) 降低了 1.7 倍。此外，我们提出了一个使用 3DCG 场景的照明和背景完成结果的管道。我们合理的背景补全可以在插入具有镜面表面的虚拟对象的应用中实现感知上自然的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张窄视角图像生成360度全景图像的方法，用于高效创建3DCG背景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在对训练分辨率过拟合和生成结果确定性不足的问题，需提升生成多样性与背景合理性以满足3DCG需求。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的CompletionNet实现多样化场景补全，结合AdjustmentNet匹配输入图像的颜色、拼接与分辨率，并引入WS-perceptual损失函数与环形推理机制。
AI.result: 在分辨率（16倍提升）和FID指标（降低1.7倍）上优于SOTA方法，且提出适用于3DCG场景的光照与背景生成流程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活的全景补全技术，为虚拟物体插入提供了更自然的背景支持，推动了3DCG制作效率的提升。

authors_text: Xin-Chun Li,Yi-Chu Xu,Shaoming Song,Bingshuai Li,Yinchuan Li,Yunfeng Shao,De-Chuan Zhan
title: Federated Learning with Position-Aware Neurons
title_zh: 具有位置感知神经元的联合学习
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) fuses collaborative models from local nodes without centralizing users' data. The permutation invariance property of neural networks and the non-i.i.d. data across clients make the locally updated parameters imprecisely aligned, disabling the coordinate-based parameter averaging. Traditional neurons do not explicitly consider position information. Hence, we propose Position-Aware Neurons (PANs) as an alternative, fusing position-related values (i.e., position encodings) into neuron outputs. PANs couple themselves to their positions and minimize the possibility of dislocation, even updating on heterogeneous data. We turn on/off PANs to disable/enable the permutation invariance property of neural networks. PANs are tightly coupled with positions when applied to FL, making parameters across clients pre-aligned and facilitating coordinate-based parameter averaging. PANs are algorithm-agnostic and could universally improve existing FL algorithms. Furthermore, "FL with PANs" is simple to implement and computationally friendly.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) fuses collaborative models from local nodes without centralizing users' data. The permutation invariance property of neural networks and the non-i.i.d. data across clients make the locally updated parameters imprecisely aligned, disabling the coordinate-based parameter averaging. Traditional neurons do not explicitly consider position information. Hence, we propose Position-Aware Neurons (PANs) as an alternative, fusing position-related values (i.e., position encodings) into neuron outputs. PANs couple themselves to their positions and minimize the possibility of dislocation, even updating on heterogeneous data. We turn on/off PANs to disable/enable the permutation invariance property of neural networks. PANs are tightly coupled with positions when applied to FL, making parameters across clients pre-aligned and facilitating coordinate-based parameter averaging. PANs are algorithm-agnostic and could universally improve existing FL algorithms. Furthermore, "FL with PANs" is simple to implement and computationally friendly.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 融合了本地节点的协作模型，无需集中用户数据。神经网络的排列不变性和非独立同分布跨客户端的数据使得本地更新的参数不精确对齐，从而禁用基于坐标的参数平均。传统神经元没有明确考虑位置信息。因此，我们提出位置感知神经元（PAN）作为替代方案，将位置相关值（即位置编码）融合到神经元输出中。 PAN 将自身耦合到其位置并最大限度地减少错位的可能性，甚至可以更新异构数据。我们打开/关闭 PAN 来禁用/启用神经网络的排列不变性。当应用于 FL 时，PAN 与位置紧密耦合，使客户端之间的参数预先对齐并促进基于坐标的参数平均。 PAN 与算法无关，可以普遍改进现有的 FL 算法。此外，“FL with PAN”易于实现且计算友好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出位置感知神经元（PANs），通过融合位置编码解决联邦学习中因排列不变性导致的参数对齐问题，提升模型协作效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络的排列不变性与联邦学习中非独立同分布数据导致本地参数无法精确对齐，阻碍坐标参数平均，影响模型收敛。
AI.method: 设计位置感知神经元，将位置编码嵌入神经元输出，通过开关机制控制排列不变性，在联邦学习中实现跨客户端参数预对齐。
AI.result: PANs算法无关且通用，显著提升现有联邦学习算法性能，同时保持实现简单与计算高效。
AI.conclusion: 位置感知神经元有效解决联邦学习参数对齐难题，为异构数据下的模型协作提供通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Federated Learning with Position-Aware Neurons 具有位置感知神经元的联合学习 Federated Learning (FL) fuses collaborative models from local nodes without centralizing users' data. The permutation invariance property of neural networks and the non-i.i.d. data across clients make the locally updated parameters imprecisely aligned, disabling the coordinate-based parameter averaging. Traditional neurons do not explicitly consider position information. Hence, we propose Position-Aware Neurons (PANs) as an alternative, fusing position-related values (i.e., position encodings) into neuron outputs. PANs couple themselves to their positions and minimize the possibility of dislocation, even updating on heterogeneous data. We turn on/off PANs to disable/enable the permutation invariance property of neural networks. PANs are tightly coupled with positions when applied to FL, making parameters across clients pre-aligned and facilitating coordinate-based parameter averaging. PANs are algorithm-agnostic and could universally improve existing FL algorithms. Furthermore, "FL with PANs" is simple to implement and computationally friendly. 联邦学习 (FL) 融合了本地节点的协作模型，无需集中用户数据。神经网络的排列不变性和非独立同分布跨客户端的数据使得本地更新的参数不精确对齐，从而禁用基于坐标的参数平均。传统神经元没有明确考虑位置信息。因此，我们提出位置感知神经元（PAN）作为替代方案，将位置相关值（即位置编码）融合到神经元输出中。 PAN 将自身耦合到其位置并最大限度地减少错位的可能性，甚至可以更新异构数据。我们打开/关闭 PAN 来禁用/启用神经网络的排列不变性。当应用于 FL 时，PAN 与位置紧密耦合，使客户端之间的参数预先对齐并促进基于坐标的参数平均。 PAN 与算法无关，可以普遍改进现有的 FL 算法。此外，“FL with PAN”易于实现且计算友好。 本文提出位置感知神经元（PANs），通过融合位置编码解决联邦学习中因排列不变性导致的参数对齐问题，提升模型协作效率。 Xin-Chun Li,Yi-Chu Xu,Shaoming Song,Bingshuai Li,Yinchuan Li,Yunfeng Shao,De-Chuan Zhan cs.CV,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Min Zhong,Xinghao Chen,Xiaokang Chen,Gang Zeng,Yunhe Wang
title: MaskGroup: Hierarchical Point Grouping and Masking for 3D Instance Segmentation
title_zh: MaskGroup：用于 3D 实例分割的分层点分组和遮罩
abstract: This paper studies the 3D instance segmentation problem, which has a variety of real-world applications such as robotics and augmented reality. Since the surroundings of 3D objects are of high complexity, the separating of different objects is very difficult. To address this challenging problem, we propose a novel framework to group and refine the 3D instances. In practice, we first learn an offset vector for each point and shift it to its predicted instance center. To better group these points, we propose a Hierarchical Point Grouping algorithm to merge the centrally aggregated points progressively. All points are grouped into small clusters, which further gradually undergo another clustering procedure to merge into larger groups. These multi-scale groups are exploited for instance prediction, which is beneficial for predicting instances with different scales. In addition, a novel MaskScoreNet is developed to produce binary point masks of these groups for further refining the segmentation results. Extensive experiments conducted on the ScanNetV2 and S3DIS benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, our approach achieves a 66.4\% mAP with the 0.5 IoU threshold on the ScanNetV2 test set, which is 1.9\% higher than the state-of-the-art method.
summary: This paper studies the 3D instance segmentation problem, which has a variety of real-world applications such as robotics and augmented reality. Since the surroundings of 3D objects are of high complexity, the separating of different objects is very difficult. To address this challenging problem, we propose a novel framework to group and refine the 3D instances. In practice, we first learn an offset vector for each point and shift it to its predicted instance center. To better group these points, we propose a Hierarchical Point Grouping algorithm to merge the centrally aggregated points progressively. All points are grouped into small clusters, which further gradually undergo another clustering procedure to merge into larger groups. These multi-scale groups are exploited for instance prediction, which is beneficial for predicting instances with different scales. In addition, a novel MaskScoreNet is developed to produce binary point masks of these groups for further refining the segmentation results. Extensive experiments conducted on the ScanNetV2 and S3DIS benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, our approach achieves a 66.4\% mAP with the 0.5 IoU threshold on the ScanNetV2 test set, which is 1.9\% higher than the state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了 3D 实例分割问题，该问题在机器人和增强现实等现实世界中具有多种应用。由于3D物体的周围环境非常复杂，不同物体的分离非常困难。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来分组和细化 3D 实例。在实践中，我们首先学习每个点的偏移向量并将其移动到其预测的实例中心。为了更好地对这些点进行分组，我们提出了一种分层点分组算法来逐步合并集中聚合的点。所有点都被分成小簇，这些小簇进一步逐渐经历另一个聚类过程以合并成更大的组。这些多尺度组被用于实例预测，这有利于预测不同尺度的实例。此外，还开发了一种新颖的 MaskScoreNet 来生成这些组的二进制点掩模，以进一步细化分割结果。在 ScanNetV2 和 S3DIS 基准上进行的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。例如，我们的方法在 ScanNetV2 测试集上以 0.5 IoU 阈值实现了 66.4% mAP，这比最先进的方法高了 1.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MaskGroup的新型框架，用于解决复杂3D场景中的实例分割问题，通过层次化点分组和掩码生成提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 3D场景中物体周围环境复杂，不同物体的分离极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理多尺度实例的分割需求。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：1) 层次化点分组算法，通过预测点偏移向量并逐步聚类生成多尺度点群；2) MaskScoreNet网络生成二值点掩码进一步优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2和S3DIS基准测试中，该方法在ScanNetV2测试集上以0.5 IoU阈值达到66.4%的mAP，较现有最佳方法提升1.9%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的层次化分组与掩码优化框架有效提升了3D实例分割性能，验证了方法在复杂场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Gal Kaplun,Eran Malach,Preetum Nakkiran,Shai Shalev-Shwartz
title: Knowledge Distillation: Bad Models Can Be Good Role Models
title_zh: 知识蒸馏：坏榜样也可以成为好榜样
abstract: Large neural networks trained in the overparameterized regime are able to fit noise to zero train error. Recent work \citep{nakkiran2020distributional} has empirically observed that such networks behave as "conditional samplers" from the noisy distribution. That is, they replicate the noise in the train data to unseen examples. We give a theoretical framework for studying this conditional sampling behavior in the context of learning theory. We relate the notion of such samplers to knowledge distillation, where a student network imitates the outputs of a teacher on unlabeled data. We show that samplers, while being bad classifiers, can be good teachers. Concretely, we prove that distillation from samplers is guaranteed to produce a student which approximates the Bayes optimal classifier. Finally, we show that some common learning algorithms (e.g., Nearest-Neighbours and Kernel Machines) can generate samplers when applied in the overparameterized regime.
summary: Large neural networks trained in the overparameterized regime are able to fit noise to zero train error. Recent work \citep{nakkiran2020distributional} has empirically observed that such networks behave as "conditional samplers" from the noisy distribution. That is, they replicate the noise in the train data to unseen examples. We give a theoretical framework for studying this conditional sampling behavior in the context of learning theory. We relate the notion of such samplers to knowledge distillation, where a student network imitates the outputs of a teacher on unlabeled data. We show that samplers, while being bad classifiers, can be good teachers. Concretely, we prove that distillation from samplers is guaranteed to produce a student which approximates the Bayes optimal classifier. Finally, we show that some common learning algorithms (e.g., Nearest-Neighbours and Kernel Machines) can generate samplers when applied in the overparameterized regime.
abstract_zh: 在超参数化机制中训练的大型神经网络能够将噪声拟合为零训练误差。最近的工作 \citep{nakkiran2020distributional} 根据经验观察到，此类网络充当噪声分布中的“条件采样器”。也就是说，它们将训练数据中的噪声复制到未见过的示例中。我们给出了在学习理论背景下研究这种条件采样行为的理论框架。我们将此类采样器的概念与知识蒸馏联系起来，其中学生网络模仿教师对未标记数据的输出。我们证明，采样器虽然是不好的分类器，但也可以成为好老师。具体来说，我们证明从采样器中进行蒸馏可以保证产生一个接近贝叶斯最优分类器的学生。最后，我们展示了一些常见的学习算法（例如，最近邻算法和内核机）在应用于超参数化机制时可以生成采样器。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在知识蒸馏中，过参数化的大模型（尽管本身是差分类器）可作为有效教师模型，指导学生模型逼近贝叶斯最优分类器。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为过参数化模型易过拟合，但作者发现其具条件采样特性，可能在知识蒸馏中发挥独特作用，挑战现有认知。
AI.method: 构建理论框架分析条件采样行为与知识蒸馏的关系，通过理论证明和算法实例（如近邻算法）验证过参数化模型的采样特性。
AI.result: 证明从条件采样器蒸馏可保证学生模型逼近贝叶斯最优分类器，并发现近邻算法等在过参数化时会产生此类采样器。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化模型虽非良分类器，但可通过知识蒸馏传递有效信息，为模型压缩和优化提供新思路，需重新评估教师模型选择标准。

conclusion: 过参数化模型虽非良分类器，但可通过知识蒸馏传递有效信息，为模型压缩和优化提供新思路，需重新评估教师模型选择标准。
search_text: Knowledge Distillation: Bad Models Can Be Good Role Models 知识蒸馏：坏榜样也可以成为好榜样 Large neural networks trained in the overparameterized regime are able to fit noise to zero train error. Recent work \citep{nakkiran2020distributional} has empirically observed that such networks behave as "conditional samplers" from the noisy distribution. That is, they replicate the noise in the train data to unseen examples. We give a theoretical framework for studying this conditional sampling behavior in the context of learning theory. We relate the notion of such samplers to knowledge distillation, where a student network imitates the outputs of a teacher on unlabeled data. We show that samplers, while being bad classifiers, can be good teachers. Concretely, we prove that distillation from samplers is guaranteed to produce a student which approximates the Bayes optimal classifier. Finally, we show that some common learning algorithms (e.g., Nearest-Neighbours and Kernel Machines) can generate samplers when applied in the overparameterized regime. 在超参数化机制中训练的大型神经网络能够将噪声拟合为零训练误差。最近的工作 \citep{nakkiran2020distributional} 根据经验观察到，此类网络充当噪声分布中的“条件采样器”。也就是说，它们将训练数据中的噪声复制到未见过的示例中。我们给出了在学习理论背景下研究这种条件采样行为的理论框架。我们将此类采样器的概念与知识蒸馏联系起来，其中学生网络模仿教师对未标记数据的输出。我们证明，采样器虽然是不好的分类器，但也可以成为好老师。具体来说，我们证明从采样器中进行蒸馏可以保证产生一个接近贝叶斯最优分类器的学生。最后，我们展示了一些常见的学习算法（例如，最近邻算法和内核机）在应用于超参数化机制时可以生成采样器。 本文探讨了在知识蒸馏中，过参数化的大模型（尽管本身是差分类器）可作为有效教师模型，指导学生模型逼近贝叶斯最优分类器。 Gal Kaplun,Eran Malach,Preetum Nakkiran,Shai Shalev-Shwartz cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapogny,Kevin Bailly
title: To Fold or Not to Fold: a Necessary and Sufficient Condition on Batch-Normalization Layers Folding
title_zh: 折叠还是不折叠：批量归一化层折叠的充分必要条件
abstract: Batch-Normalization (BN) layers have become fundamental components in the evermore complex deep neural network architectures. Such models require acceleration processes for deployment on edge devices. However, BN layers add computation bottlenecks due to the sequential operation processing: thus, a key, yet often overlooked component of the acceleration process is BN layers folding. In this paper, we demonstrate that the current BN folding approaches are suboptimal in terms of how many layers can be removed. We therefore provide a necessary and sufficient condition for BN folding and a corresponding optimal algorithm. The proposed approach systematically outperforms existing baselines and allows to dramatically reduce the inference time of deep neural networks.
summary: Batch-Normalization (BN) layers have become fundamental components in the evermore complex deep neural network architectures. Such models require acceleration processes for deployment on edge devices. However, BN layers add computation bottlenecks due to the sequential operation processing: thus, a key, yet often overlooked component of the acceleration process is BN layers folding. In this paper, we demonstrate that the current BN folding approaches are suboptimal in terms of how many layers can be removed. We therefore provide a necessary and sufficient condition for BN folding and a corresponding optimal algorithm. The proposed approach systematically outperforms existing baselines and allows to dramatically reduce the inference time of deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化 (BN) 层已成为日益复杂的深度神经网络架构中的基本组成部分。此类模型需要加速流程才能在边缘设备上部署。然而，由于顺序操作处理，BN 层增加了计算瓶颈：因此，加速过程中一个关键但经常被忽视的组成部分是 BN 层折叠。在本文中，我们证明了当前的 BN 折叠方法在可去除的层数方面并不是最优的。因此我们提供了BN折叠的充要条件以及相应的最优算法。所提出的方法系统地优于现有基线，并可以显着减少深度神经网络的推理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种必要且充分的条件用于批归一化层折叠，并设计了相应的最优算法，以减少深度神经网络的推理时间。
AI.motivation: 现有的BN折叠方法在去除层数方面存在不足，导致计算瓶颈，亟需更高效的折叠策略以加速模型部署。
AI.method: 通过建立BN折叠的必要且充分条件，并设计系统化的最优折叠算法，实现对BN层的有效合并。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准上优于现有方法，显著降低了深度神经网络的推理时间。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的BN折叠条件和算法为深度神经网络的高效部署提供了理论依据和实用方案，有效解决了BN层带来的计算瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapgony,Matthieu Cord,Kevin Bailly
title: REx: Data-Free Residual Quantization Error Expansion
title_zh: REx：无数据残余量化误差扩展
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are ubiquitous in computer vision and natural language processing, but suffer from high inference cost. This problem can be addressed by quantization, which consists in converting floating point operations into a lower bit-width format. With the growing concerns on privacy rights, we focus our efforts on data-free methods. However, such techniques suffer from their lack of adaptability to the target devices, as a hardware typically only support specific bit widths. Thus, to adapt to a variety of devices, a quantization method shall be flexible enough to find good accuracy v.s. speed trade-offs for every bit width and target device. To achieve this, we propose REx, a quantization method that leverages residual error expansion, along with group sparsity and an ensemble approximation for better parallelization. REx is backed off by strong theoretical guarantees and achieves superior performance on every benchmarked application (from vision to NLP tasks), architecture (ConvNets, transformers) and bit-width (from int8 to ternary quantization).
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are ubiquitous in computer vision and natural language processing, but suffer from high inference cost. This problem can be addressed by quantization, which consists in converting floating point operations into a lower bit-width format. With the growing concerns on privacy rights, we focus our efforts on data-free methods. However, such techniques suffer from their lack of adaptability to the target devices, as a hardware typically only support specific bit widths. Thus, to adapt to a variety of devices, a quantization method shall be flexible enough to find good accuracy v.s. speed trade-offs for every bit width and target device. To achieve this, we propose REx, a quantization method that leverages residual error expansion, along with group sparsity and an ensemble approximation for better parallelization. REx is backed off by strong theoretical guarantees and achieves superior performance on every benchmarked application (from vision to NLP tasks), architecture (ConvNets, transformers) and bit-width (from int8 to ternary quantization).
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉和自然语言处理中无处不在，但推理成本很高。这个问题可以通过量化来解决，量化是将浮点运算转换为较低位宽的格式。随着人们对隐私权的日益关注，我们将重点放在无数据方法上。然而，此类技术缺乏对目标设备的适应性，因为硬件通常仅支持特定的位宽度。因此，为了适应各种设备，量化方法应该足够灵活，以找到良好的准确度。每个位宽和目标设备的速度权衡。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 REx，这是一种利用残余误差扩展、组稀疏性和集成近似来实现更好并行化的量化方法。 REx 拥有强大的理论保证，并在每个基准应用程序（从视觉到 NLP 任务）、架构（ConvNet、变压器）和位宽（从 int8 到三元量化）上实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为REx的数据无关量化方法，通过残差误差扩展和组稀疏性优化，降低深度神经网络的推理成本并提升设备适应性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型推理成本高，量化技术可缓解此问题。但现有数据无关量化方法无法适配不同硬件支持的位宽，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: REx结合残差误差扩展、组稀疏性约束和集成近似策略，实现对不同位宽（如int8到三值量化）和设备的自适应量化。
AI.result: REx在视觉与NLP任务、卷积网络与Transformer架构中均取得优于现有方法的精度-速度权衡表现，且具备理论保证。
AI.conclusion: REx通过灵活的量化策略解决了设备适配性问题，在保持模型性能的同时实现了跨硬件平台的高效推理。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为REx的数据无关量化方法，通过残差误差扩展和组稀疏性优化，降低深度神经网络的推理成本并提升设备适应性。

authors_text: Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapogny,Matthieu Cord,Kevin Bailly
title: SPIQ: Data-Free Per-Channel Static Input Quantization
title_zh: SPIQ：无数据每通道静态输入量化
abstract: Computationally expensive neural networks are ubiquitous in computer vision and solutions for efficient inference have drawn a growing attention in the machine learning community. Examples of such solutions comprise quantization, i.e. converting the processing values (weights and inputs) from floating point into integers e.g. int8 or int4. Concurrently, the rise of privacy concerns motivated the study of less invasive acceleration methods, such as data-free quantization of pre-trained models weights and activations. Previous approaches either exploit statistical information to deduce scalar ranges and scaling factors for the activations in a static manner, or dynamically adapt this range on-the-fly for each input of each layers (also referred to as activations): the latter generally being more accurate at the expanse of significantly slower inference. In this work, we argue that static input quantization can reach the accuracy levels of dynamic methods by means of a per-channel input quantization scheme that allows one to more finely preserve cross-channel dynamics. We show through a thorough empirical evaluation on multiple computer vision problems (e.g. ImageNet classification, Pascal VOC object detection as well as CityScapes semantic segmentation) that the proposed method, dubbed SPIQ, achieves accuracies rivalling dynamic approaches with static-level inference speed, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art quantization methods on every benchmark.
summary: Computationally expensive neural networks are ubiquitous in computer vision and solutions for efficient inference have drawn a growing attention in the machine learning community. Examples of such solutions comprise quantization, i.e. converting the processing values (weights and inputs) from floating point into integers e.g. int8 or int4. Concurrently, the rise of privacy concerns motivated the study of less invasive acceleration methods, such as data-free quantization of pre-trained models weights and activations. Previous approaches either exploit statistical information to deduce scalar ranges and scaling factors for the activations in a static manner, or dynamically adapt this range on-the-fly for each input of each layers (also referred to as activations): the latter generally being more accurate at the expanse of significantly slower inference. In this work, we argue that static input quantization can reach the accuracy levels of dynamic methods by means of a per-channel input quantization scheme that allows one to more finely preserve cross-channel dynamics. We show through a thorough empirical evaluation on multiple computer vision problems (e.g. ImageNet classification, Pascal VOC object detection as well as CityScapes semantic segmentation) that the proposed method, dubbed SPIQ, achieves accuracies rivalling dynamic approaches with static-level inference speed, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art quantization methods on every benchmark.
abstract_zh: 计算成本高昂的神经网络在计算机视觉中无处不在，有效推理的解决方案引起了机器学习社区越来越多的关注。此类解决方案的示例包括量化，即将处理值（权重和输入）从浮点转换为整数，例如int8 或 int4。与此同时，隐私问题的兴起推动了对侵入性较小的加速方法的研究，例如预训练模型权重和激活的无数据量化。以前的方法要么利用统计信息以静态方式推断激活的标量范围和缩放因子，要么为每层的每个输入动态调整该范围（也称为激活）：后者通常在推理速度明显较慢的情况下更加准确。在这项工作中，我们认为静态输入量化可以通过每通道输入量化方案达到动态方法的精度水平，该方案允许更精细地保留跨通道动态。我们通过对多个计算机视觉问题（例如 ImageNet 分类、​​Pascal VOC 对象检测以及 CityScapes 语义分割）进行彻底的实证评估表明，所提出的称为 SPIQ 的方法所达到的精度可与具有静态级推理速度的动态方法相媲美，在每个基准上都显着优于最先进的量化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPIQ的数据无关的逐通道静态输入量化方法，旨在提升神经网络推理效率并保持高精度。
AI.motivation: 传统量化方法在精度与速度间存在权衡，动态量化虽精度高但推理速度慢，而静态量化精度不足。隐私问题促使研究更少侵入性的加速方法，需在无需数据的情况下优化量化方案。
AI.method: 通过逐通道输入量化方案，精细保留跨通道动态特性，无需依赖数据统计信息或动态调整范围，实现静态量化下的高精度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类、Pascal VOC目标检测和CityScapes语义分割等任务中，SPIQ的精度与动态方法相当，且推理速度达到静态方法水平，优于现有量化方法。
AI.conclusion: SPIQ通过逐通道静态量化有效平衡了精度与速度，为数据无关的高效模型压缩提供了新思路。

search_text: SPIQ: Data-Free Per-Channel Static Input Quantization SPIQ：无数据每通道静态输入量化 Computationally expensive neural networks are ubiquitous in computer vision and solutions for efficient inference have drawn a growing attention in the machine learning community. Examples of such solutions comprise quantization, i.e. converting the processing values (weights and inputs) from floating point into integers e.g. int8 or int4. Concurrently, the rise of privacy concerns motivated the study of less invasive acceleration methods, such as data-free quantization of pre-trained models weights and activations. Previous approaches either exploit statistical information to deduce scalar ranges and scaling factors for the activations in a static manner, or dynamically adapt this range on-the-fly for each input of each layers (also referred to as activations): the latter generally being more accurate at the expanse of significantly slower inference. In this work, we argue that static input quantization can reach the accuracy levels of dynamic methods by means of a per-channel input quantization scheme that allows one to more finely preserve cross-channel dynamics. We show through a thorough empirical evaluation on multiple computer vision problems (e.g. ImageNet classification, Pascal VOC object detection as well as CityScapes semantic segmentation) that the proposed method, dubbed SPIQ, achieves accuracies rivalling dynamic approaches with static-level inference speed, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art quantization methods on every benchmark. 计算成本高昂的神经网络在计算机视觉中无处不在，有效推理的解决方案引起了机器学习社区越来越多的关注。此类解决方案的示例包括量化，即将处理值（权重和输入）从浮点转换为整数，例如int8 或 int4。与此同时，隐私问题的兴起推动了对侵入性较小的加速方法的研究，例如预训练模型权重和激活的无数据量化。以前的方法要么利用统计信息以静态方式推断激活的标量范围和缩放因子，要么为每层的每个输入动态调整该范围（也称为激活）：后者通常在推理速度明显较慢的情况下更加准确。在这项工作中，我们认为静态输入量化可以通过每通道输入量化方案达到动态方法的精度水平，该方案允许更精细地保留跨通道动态。我们通过对多个计算机视觉问题（例如 ImageNet 分类、​​Pascal VOC 对象检测以及 CityScapes 语义分割）进行彻底的实证评估表明，所提出的称为 SPIQ 的方法所达到的精度可与具有静态级推理速度的动态方法相媲美，在每个基准上都显着优于最先进的量化方法。 本文提出了一种名为SPIQ的数据无关的逐通道静态输入量化方法，旨在提升神经网络推理效率并保持高精度。 Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapogny,Matthieu Cord,Kevin Bailly cs.CV

authors_text: Carlos Hernandez-Olivan,Jorge Abadias Puyuelo,Jose R. Beltran
title: Subjective Evaluation of Deep Learning Models for Symbolic Music Composition
title_zh: 象征音乐创作深度学习模型的主观评价
comment: Workshop on Generative AI and HCI, CHI 2022
comments: Workshop on Generative AI and HCI, CHI 2022
abstract: Deep learning models are typically evaluated to measure and compare their performance on a given task. The metrics that are commonly used to evaluate these models are standard metrics that are used for different tasks. In the field of music composition or generation, the standard metrics used in other fields have no clear meaning in terms of music theory. In this paper, we propose a subjective method to evaluate AI-based music composition systems by asking questions related to basic music principles to different levels of users based on their musical experience and knowledge. We use this method to compare state-of-the-art models for music composition with deep learning. We give the results of this evaluation method and we compare the responses of each user level for each evaluated model.
summary: Deep learning models are typically evaluated to measure and compare their performance on a given task. The metrics that are commonly used to evaluate these models are standard metrics that are used for different tasks. In the field of music composition or generation, the standard metrics used in other fields have no clear meaning in terms of music theory. In this paper, we propose a subjective method to evaluate AI-based music composition systems by asking questions related to basic music principles to different levels of users based on their musical experience and knowledge. We use this method to compare state-of-the-art models for music composition with deep learning. We give the results of this evaluation method and we compare the responses of each user level for each evaluated model.
abstract_zh: 通常评估深度学习模型是为了测量和比较它们在给定任务上的表现。通常用于评估这些模型的指标是用于不同任务的标准指标。在音乐创作或生成领域，其他领域使用的标准度量在音乐理论方面没有明确的含义。在本文中，我们提出了一种主观方法来评估基于人工智能的音乐作曲系统，根据不同级别的用户的音乐经验和知识，询问与基本音乐原理相关的问题。我们使用这种方法将最先进的音乐创作模型与深度学习进行比较。我们给出了这种评估方法的结果，并比较了每个用户级别对每个评估模型的响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主观评估方法，用于比较深度学习模型在符号音乐创作中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统评估指标在音乐创作领域缺乏明确的音乐理论意义，需通过主观评估方法更准确地衡量模型表现。
AI.method: 通过向不同音乐经验水平的用户提出与音乐理论相关的问题，收集其对各模型生成音乐的主观评价。
AI.result: 评估结果显示不同用户群体对各深度学习模型的评价存在差异，揭示了模型在音乐理论相关指标上的表现差异。
AI.conclusion: 主观评估方法能有效反映深度学习模型在音乐创作中的表现，且用户音乐经验水平显著影响评估结果。

authors_text: Maaynk Patwari,Panagiotis Chazistergos,Lakshmi Sundar,Nachiappan Chockalingam,Ambadi Ramachandran,Roozbeh Naemi
title: A quantitative comparison of plantar soft tissue strainability distribution and homogeneity between ulcerated and non-ulcerated patients using strain elastography
title_zh: 使用应变弹性成像定量比较溃疡和非溃疡患者之间的足底软组织应变性分布和均匀性
abstract: The primary objective of this study was to develop a method that allows accurate quantification of plantar soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity. The secondary aim of this study is to investigate if the differences in soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity can be detected between ulcerated and non-ulcerated foot. Novel measures of individual pixel stiffness, named as quantitative strainability (QS) and relative strainability (RS) were developed. SE data obtained from 39 (9 with active diabetic foot ulcers) patients with diabetic neuropathy. The patients with active diabetic foot ulcer had wound in parts of the foot other than the first metatarsal head and the heel where the elastography measures were conducted. RS was used to measure changes and gradients in the stiffness distribution of plantar soft tissues in participants with and without active diabetic foot ulcer. The plantar soft tissue homogeneity in superior-inferior direction in the left forefoot was significantly (p<0.05) higher in ulcerated group compared to non-ulcerated group. The assessment of homogeneity showed potentials to further explain the nature of the change in tissue that can increase internal stress . This can have implications in assessing the vulnerability to soft tissue damage and ulceration in diabetes.
summary: The primary objective of this study was to develop a method that allows accurate quantification of plantar soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity. The secondary aim of this study is to investigate if the differences in soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity can be detected between ulcerated and non-ulcerated foot. Novel measures of individual pixel stiffness, named as quantitative strainability (QS) and relative strainability (RS) were developed. SE data obtained from 39 (9 with active diabetic foot ulcers) patients with diabetic neuropathy. The patients with active diabetic foot ulcer had wound in parts of the foot other than the first metatarsal head and the heel where the elastography measures were conducted. RS was used to measure changes and gradients in the stiffness distribution of plantar soft tissues in participants with and without active diabetic foot ulcer. The plantar soft tissue homogeneity in superior-inferior direction in the left forefoot was significantly (p<0.05) higher in ulcerated group compared to non-ulcerated group. The assessment of homogeneity showed potentials to further explain the nature of the change in tissue that can increase internal stress . This can have implications in assessing the vulnerability to soft tissue damage and ulceration in diabetes.
abstract_zh: 本研究的主要目的是开发一种能够准确量化足底软组织硬度分布和均匀性的方法。本研究的次要目的是调查是否可以检测溃疡足和非溃疡足之间软组织硬度分布和均匀性的差异。开发了单个像素刚度的新测量方法，称为定量应变性（QS）和相对应变性（RS）。 SE 数据来自 39 名患有糖尿病神经病变的患者（其中 9 名患有活动性糖尿病足溃疡）。活动性糖尿病足溃疡患者除了进行弹性成像测量的第一跖骨头和足跟外，其他足部部位都有伤口。 RS 用于测量患有或不患有活动性糖尿病足溃疡的参与者足底软组织硬度分布的变化和梯度。与非溃疡组相比，溃疡组左前足上下方向足底软组织均匀性显着更高（p<0.05）。均匀性的评估显示出进一步解释可增加内应力的组织变化的性质的潜力。这对于评估糖尿病患者软组织损伤和溃疡的脆弱性可能具有影响。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种量化方法，通过应变弹性成像比较糖尿病足溃疡患者与非溃疡患者的足底软组织应变能力分布及均匀性差异。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病足溃疡的早期检测和风险评估需要更精确的软组织力学特性分析方法，传统手段难以量化局部应变分布与均匀性变化。
AI.method: 开发量化应变能力（QS）和相对应变能力（RS）指标，利用应变弹性成像技术获取39例糖尿病神经病变患者的足底软组织数据，分析溃疡组与非溃疡组的应变分布及均匀性差异。
AI.result: 溃疡组左前足上下方向的软组织均匀性显著高于非溃疡组（p<0.05），提示均匀性变化可能与内部应力增加及组织损伤风险相关。
AI.conclusion: 软组织均匀性评估可为糖尿病足溃疡的发病机制和损伤风险预测提供新的力学依据，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: A quantitative comparison of plantar soft tissue strainability distribution and homogeneity between ulcerated and non-ulcerated patients using strain elastography 使用应变弹性成像定量比较溃疡和非溃疡患者之间的足底软组织应变性分布和均匀性 The primary objective of this study was to develop a method that allows accurate quantification of plantar soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity. The secondary aim of this study is to investigate if the differences in soft tissue stiffness distribution and homogeneity can be detected between ulcerated and non-ulcerated foot. Novel measures of individual pixel stiffness, named as quantitative strainability (QS) and relative strainability (RS) were developed. SE data obtained from 39 (9 with active diabetic foot ulcers) patients with diabetic neuropathy. The patients with active diabetic foot ulcer had wound in parts of the foot other than the first metatarsal head and the heel where the elastography measures were conducted. RS was used to measure changes and gradients in the stiffness distribution of plantar soft tissues in participants with and without active diabetic foot ulcer. The plantar soft tissue homogeneity in superior-inferior direction in the left forefoot was significantly (p<0.05) higher in ulcerated group compared to non-ulcerated group. The assessment of homogeneity showed potentials to further explain the nature of the change in tissue that can increase internal stress . This can have implications in assessing the vulnerability to soft tissue damage and ulceration in diabetes. 本研究的主要目的是开发一种能够准确量化足底软组织硬度分布和均匀性的方法。本研究的次要目的是调查是否可以检测溃疡足和非溃疡足之间软组织硬度分布和均匀性的差异。开发了单个像素刚度的新测量方法，称为定量应变性（QS）和相对应变性（RS）。 SE 数据来自 39 名患有糖尿病神经病变的患者（其中 9 名患有活动性糖尿病足溃疡）。活动性糖尿病足溃疡患者除了进行弹性成像测量的第一跖骨头和足跟外，其他足部部位都有伤口。 RS 用于测量患有或不患有活动性糖尿病足溃疡的参与者足底软组织硬度分布的变化和梯度。与非溃疡组相比，溃疡组左前足上下方向足底软组织均匀性显着更高（p<0.05）。均匀性的评估显示出进一步解释可增加内应力的组织变化的性质的潜力。这对于评估糖尿病患者软组织损伤和溃疡的脆弱性可能具有影响。 本研究旨在开发一种量化方法，通过应变弹性成像比较糖尿病足溃疡患者与非溃疡患者的足底软组织应变能力分布及均匀性差异。 Maaynk Patwari,Panagiotis Chazistergos,Lakshmi Sundar,Nachiappan Chockalingam,Ambadi Ramachandran,Roozbeh Naemi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yisheng He,Yao Wang,Haoqiang Fan,Jian Sun,Qifeng Chen
title: FS6D: Few-Shot 6D Pose Estimation of Novel Objects
title_zh: FS6D：新物体的少镜头 6D 姿势估计
abstract: 6D object pose estimation networks are limited in their capability to scale to large numbers of object instances due to the close-set assumption and their reliance on high-fidelity object CAD models. In this work, we study a new open set problem; the few-shot 6D object poses estimation: estimating the 6D pose of an unknown object by a few support views without extra training. To tackle the problem, we point out the importance of fully exploring the appearance and geometric relationship between the given support views and query scene patches and propose a dense prototypes matching framework by extracting and matching dense RGBD prototypes with transformers. Moreover, we show that the priors from diverse appearances and shapes are crucial to the generalization capability under the problem setting and thus propose a large-scale RGBD photorealistic dataset (ShapeNet6D) for network pre-training. A simple and effective online texture blending approach is also introduced to eliminate the domain gap from the synthesis dataset, which enriches appearance diversity at a low cost. Finally, we discuss possible solutions to this problem and establish benchmarks on popular datasets to facilitate future research. The project page is at \url{https://fs6d.github.io/}.
summary: 6D object pose estimation networks are limited in their capability to scale to large numbers of object instances due to the close-set assumption and their reliance on high-fidelity object CAD models. In this work, we study a new open set problem; the few-shot 6D object poses estimation: estimating the 6D pose of an unknown object by a few support views without extra training. To tackle the problem, we point out the importance of fully exploring the appearance and geometric relationship between the given support views and query scene patches and propose a dense prototypes matching framework by extracting and matching dense RGBD prototypes with transformers. Moreover, we show that the priors from diverse appearances and shapes are crucial to the generalization capability under the problem setting and thus propose a large-scale RGBD photorealistic dataset (ShapeNet6D) for network pre-training. A simple and effective online texture blending approach is also introduced to eliminate the domain gap from the synthesis dataset, which enriches appearance diversity at a low cost. Finally, we discuss possible solutions to this problem and establish benchmarks on popular datasets to facilitate future research. The project page is at \url{https://fs6d.github.io/}.
abstract_zh: 由于闭集假设及其对高保真对象 CAD 模型的依赖，6D 对象姿态估计网络在扩展到大量对象实例的能力方面受到限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了一个新的开集问题；少镜头 6D 物体姿态估计：通过一些支持视图估计未知物体的 6D 姿态，无需额外训练。为了解决这个问题，我们指出了充分探索给定支持视图和查询场景块之间的外观和几何关系的重要性，并通过提取密集 RGBD 原型并将其与变压器进行匹配，提出了密集原型匹配框架。此外，我们表明，不同外观和形状的先验对于问题设置下的泛化能力至关重要，因此提出了用于网络预训练的大规模 RGBD 照片真实感数据集（ShapeNet6D）。还引入了一种简单有效的在线纹理混合方法来消除合成数据集中的域间隙，从而以低成本丰富了外观多样性。最后，我们讨论该问题的可能解决方案，并在流行数据集上建立基准以促进未来的研究。项目页面位于 \url{https://fs6d.github.io/}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FS6D方法，解决在无额外训练情况下通过少量支持视图估计未知物体6D姿态的开放集问题。
AI.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计网络受限于封闭集假设和对高保真CAD模型的依赖，难以扩展到大量物体实例。
AI.method: 提出密集原型匹配框架，利用Transformer提取匹配RGBD原型；构建ShapeNet6D数据集进行预训练，并引入在线纹理混合方法减少领域差异。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上建立基准，验证方法有效性，推动少样本6D姿态估计研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过探索外观与几何关系并结合大规模预训练，FS6D方法有效解决了开放集少样本6D姿态估计问题。

authors_text: Zhengzhe Liu,Yi Wang,Xiaojuan Qi,Chi-Wing Fu
title: Towards Implicit Text-Guided 3D Shape Generation
title_zh: 迈向隐式文本引导 3D 形状生成
abstract: In this work, we explore the challenging task of generating 3D shapes from text. Beyond the existing works, we propose a new approach for text-guided 3D shape generation, capable of producing high-fidelity shapes with colors that match the given text description. This work has several technical contributions. First, we decouple the shape and color predictions for learning features in both texts and shapes, and propose the word-level spatial transformer to correlate word features from text with spatial features from shape. Also, we design a cyclic loss to encourage consistency between text and shape, and introduce the shape IMLE to diversify the generated shapes. Further, we extend the framework to enable text-guided shape manipulation. Extensive experiments on the largest existing text-shape benchmark manifest the superiority of this work. The code and the models are available at https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/Towards-Implicit Text-Guided-Shape-Generation.
summary: In this work, we explore the challenging task of generating 3D shapes from text. Beyond the existing works, we propose a new approach for text-guided 3D shape generation, capable of producing high-fidelity shapes with colors that match the given text description. This work has several technical contributions. First, we decouple the shape and color predictions for learning features in both texts and shapes, and propose the word-level spatial transformer to correlate word features from text with spatial features from shape. Also, we design a cyclic loss to encourage consistency between text and shape, and introduce the shape IMLE to diversify the generated shapes. Further, we extend the framework to enable text-guided shape manipulation. Extensive experiments on the largest existing text-shape benchmark manifest the superiority of this work. The code and the models are available at https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/Towards-Implicit Text-Guided-Shape-Generation.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索从文本生成 3D 形状的挑战性任务。除了现有的工作之外，我们还提出了一种文本引导 3D 形状生成的新方法，能够生成颜色与给定文本描述相匹配的高保真形状。这项工作有多项技术贡献。首先，我们将形状和颜色预测解耦，以学习文本和形状中的特征，并提出单词级空间变换器，将文本中的单词特征与形状中的空间特征相关联。此外，我们设计了循环损失来鼓励文本和形状之间的一致性，并引入形状 IMLE 来使生成的形状多样化。此外，我们扩展了框架以实现文本引导的形状操作。对现有最大的文本形状基准的广泛实验证明了这项工作的优越性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/Towards-Implicit Text-Guided-Shape-Generation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本隐式引导的高质量3D形状生成方法，能够生成与文本描述匹配的形状和颜色。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法在形状保真度、颜色匹配及生成多样性方面存在不足，需探索更有效的文本-形状特征关联机制。
AI.method: 解耦形状与颜色预测，设计词级空间转换器关联文本与形状特征，引入循环损失保证一致性，并采用形状IMLE提升多样性，扩展框架支持文本引导的形状编辑。
AI.result: 在最大文本-形状基准测试中优于现有方法，生成结果在保真度、颜色匹配及多样性上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征解耦与新型模块设计，本文方法在文本引导的3D生成任务中取得显著进展，代码与模型已开源。

authors_text: Stanislav Shimovolos,Andrey Shushko,Mikhail Belyaev,Boris Shirokikh
title: Adaptation to CT Reconstruction Kernels by Enforcing Cross-domain Feature Maps Consistency
title_zh: 通过强制执行跨域特征图一致性来适应 CT 重建内核
abstract: Deep learning methods provide significant assistance in analyzing coronavirus disease (COVID-19) in chest computed tomography (CT) images, including identification, severity assessment, and segmentation. Although the earlier developed methods address the lack of data and specific annotations, the current goal is to build a robust algorithm for clinical use, having a larger pool of available data. With the larger datasets, the domain shift problem arises, affecting the performance of methods on the unseen data. One of the critical sources of domain shift in CT images is the difference in reconstruction kernels used to generate images from the raw data (sinograms). In this paper, we show a decrease in the COVID-19 segmentation quality of the model trained on the smooth and tested on the sharp reconstruction kernels. Furthermore, we compare several domain adaptation approaches to tackle the problem, such as task-specific augmentation and unsupervised adversarial learning. Finally, we propose the unsupervised adaptation method, called F-Consistency, that outperforms the previous approaches. Our method exploits a set of unlabeled CT image pairs which differ only in reconstruction kernels within every pair. It enforces the similarity of the network hidden representations (feature maps) by minimizing mean squared error (MSE) between paired feature maps. We show our method achieving 0.64 Dice Score on the test dataset with unseen sharp kernels, compared to the 0.56 Dice Score of the baseline model. Moreover, F-Consistency scores 0.80 Dice Score between predictions on the paired images, which almost doubles the baseline score of 0.46 and surpasses the other methods. We also show F-Consistency to better generalize on the unseen kernels and without the specific semantic content, e.g., presence of the COVID-19 lesions.

Our method exploits a set of unlabeled CT image pairs which differ only in reconstruction kernels within every pair. We show our method achieving 0.64 Dice Score on the test dataset with unseen sharp kernels, compared to the 0.56 Dice Score of the baseline model. Moreover, F-Consistency scores 0.80 Dice Score between predictions on the paired images, which almost doubles the baseline score of 0.46 and surpasses the other methods. We also show F-Consistency to better generalize on the unseen kernels and without the specific semantic content, e.g., presence of the COVID-19 lesions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法为分析胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像中的冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 提供了重要帮助，包括识别、严重性评估和分割。尽管早期开发的方法解决了数据和特定注释缺乏的问题，但当前的目标是构建一个用于临床的强大算法，拥有更大的可用数据池。随着数据集的增大，会出现域转移问题，影响方法在未见过的数据上的性能。 CT 图像中域偏移的关键来源之一是用于从原始数据（正弦图）生成图像的重建内核的差异。在本文中，我们展示了在平滑重建内核上训练并在锐利重建内核上测试的模型的 COVID-19 分割质量下降。此外，我们还比较了解决该问题的几种领域适应方法，例如特定于任务的增强和无监督对抗性学习。最后，我们提出了称为 F-Consistency 的无监督适应方法，它优于以前的方法。我们的方法利用一组未标记的 CT 图像对，这些图像对仅在每对内的重建内核上有所不同。它通过最小化成对特征图之间的均方误差（MSE）来强制网络隐藏表示（特征图）的相似性。我们展示了我们的方法在具有看不见的尖锐内核的测试数据集上实现了 0.64 Dice 得分，而基线模型的 Dice 得分为 0.56。此外，F-Consistency 在配对图像的预测之间得分为 0.80 Dice Score，几乎是基线得分 0.46 的两倍，超过了其他方法。我们还展示了 F-Consistency，以更好地概括看不见的内核，并且无需特定的语义内容，例如 COVID-19 病变的存在。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督域适应方法F-Consistency，通过强制跨域特征图一致性来解决CT图像重建核差异导致的域偏移问题，提升COVID-19分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在CT图像分析中因重建核差异导致域偏移，影响模型在未见数据上的性能，需开发鲁棒的临床适用算法。
AI.method: 利用仅存在重建核差异的无标签CT图像对，通过最小化配对特征图的均方误差（MSE）来强制网络隐藏表示的一致性，实现无监督域适应。
AI.result: 在未见锐利核测试集上Dice得分为0.64（基线0.56），配对图像预测Dice得分为0.80（基线0.46），且在未见核和无特定语义内容时泛化能力更优。
AI.conclusion: F-Consistency方法在CT图像域适应中优于现有技术，有效提升分割准确率和泛化能力，适用于临床场景中不同重建核的CT数据。

search_text: Adaptation to CT Reconstruction Kernels by Enforcing Cross-domain Feature Maps Consistency 通过强制执行跨域特征图一致性来适应 CT 重建内核 Deep learning methods provide significant assistance in analyzing coronavirus disease (COVID-19) in chest computed tomography (CT) images, including identification, severity assessment, and segmentation. Although the earlier developed methods address the lack of data and specific annotations, the current goal is to build a robust algorithm for clinical use, having a larger pool of available data. With the larger datasets, the domain shift problem arises, affecting the performance of methods on the unseen data. One of the critical sources of domain shift in CT images is the difference in reconstruction kernels used to generate images from the raw data (sinograms). In this paper, we show a decrease in the COVID-19 segmentation quality of the model trained on the smooth and tested on the sharp reconstruction kernels. Furthermore, we compare several domain adaptation approaches to tackle the problem, such as task-specific augmentation and unsupervised adversarial learning. Finally, we propose the unsupervised adaptation method, called F-Consistency, that outperforms the previous approaches. Our method exploits a set of unlabeled CT image pairs which differ only in reconstruction kernels within every pair. It enforces the similarity of the network hidden representations (feature maps) by minimizing mean squared error (MSE) between paired feature maps. We show our method achieving 0.64 Dice Score on the test dataset with unseen sharp kernels, compared to the 0.56 Dice Score of the baseline model. Moreover, F-Consistency scores 0.80 Dice Score between predictions on the paired images, which almost doubles the baseline score of 0.46 and surpasses the other methods. We also show F-Consistency to better generalize on the unseen kernels and without the specific semantic content, e.g., presence of the COVID-19 lesions. 深度学习方法为分析胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像中的冠状病毒病 (COVID-19) 提供了重要帮助，包括识别、严重性评估和分割。尽管早期开发的方法解决了数据和特定注释缺乏的问题，但当前的目标是构建一个用于临床的强大算法，拥有更大的可用数据池。随着数据集的增大，会出现域转移问题，影响方法在未见过的数据上的性能。 CT 图像中域偏移的关键来源之一是用于从原始数据（正弦图）生成图像的重建内核的差异。在本文中，我们展示了在平滑重建内核上训练并在锐利重建内核上测试的模型的 COVID-19 分割质量下降。此外，我们还比较了解决该问题的几种领域适应方法，例如特定于任务的增强和无监督对抗性学习。最后，我们提出了称为 F-Consistency 的无监督适应方法，它优于以前的方法。我们的方法利用一组未标记的 CT 图像对，这些图像对仅在每对内的重建内核上有所不同。它通过最小化成对特征图之间的均方误差（MSE）来强制网络隐藏表示（特征图）的相似性。我们展示了我们的方法在具有看不见的尖锐内核的测试数据集上实现了 0.64 Dice 得分，而基线模型的 Dice 得分为 0.56。此外，F-Consistency 在配对图像的预测之间得分为 0.80 Dice Score，几乎是基线得分 0.46 的两倍，超过了其他方法。我们还展示了 F-Consistency，以更好地概括看不见的内核，并且无需特定的语义内容，例如 COVID-19 病变的存在。 本文提出一种无监督域适应方法F-Consistency，通过强制跨域特征图一致性来解决CT图像重建核差异导致的域偏移问题，提升COVID-19分割性能。 Stanislav Shimovolos,Andrey Shushko,Mikhail Belyaev,Boris Shirokikh eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jianzhuang Zhao,Alberto Giammarino,Edoardo Lamon,Juan M. Gandarias,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani
title: A Hybrid Learning and Optimization Framework to Achieve Physically Interactive Tasks with Mobile Manipulators
title_zh: 使用移动机械手实现物理交互任务的混合学习和优化框架
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
abstract: This paper proposes a hybrid learning and optimization framework for mobile manipulators for complex and physically interactive tasks. The framework exploits an admittance-type physical interface to obtain intuitive and simplified human demonstrations and Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM)/Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR) to encode and generate the learned task requirements in terms of position, velocity, and force profiles. Next, using the desired trajectories and force profiles generated by GMM/GMR, the impedance parameters of a Cartesian impedance controller are optimized online through a Quadratic Program augmented with an energy tank to ensure the passivity of the controlled system. Two experiments are conducted to validate the framework, comparing our method with two approaches with constant stiffness (high and low). The results showed that the proposed method outperforms the other two cases in terms of trajectory tracking and generated interaction forces, even in the presence of disturbances such as unexpected end-effector collisions.
summary: This paper proposes a hybrid learning and optimization framework for mobile manipulators for complex and physically interactive tasks. The framework exploits an admittance-type physical interface to obtain intuitive and simplified human demonstrations and Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM)/Gaussian Mixture Regression (GMR) to encode and generate the learned task requirements in terms of position, velocity, and force profiles. Next, using the desired trajectories and force profiles generated by GMM/GMR, the impedance parameters of a Cartesian impedance controller are optimized online through a Quadratic Program augmented with an energy tank to ensure the passivity of the controlled system. Two experiments are conducted to validate the framework, comparing our method with two approaches with constant stiffness (high and low). The results showed that the proposed method outperforms the other two cases in terms of trajectory tracking and generated interaction forces, even in the presence of disturbances such as unexpected end-effector collisions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于移动机械手的混合学习和优化框架，用于复杂的物理交互任务。该框架利用导纳型物理接口来获得直观和简化的人体演示，并利用高斯混合模型（GMM）/高斯混合回归（GMR）来编码和生成位置、速度和力分布方面的学习任务要求。接下来，利用 GMM/GMR 生成的所需轨迹和力分布，通过能量罐增强的二次规划在线优化笛卡尔阻抗控制器的阻抗参数，以确保受控系统的无源性。进行了两个实验来验证框架，将我们的方法与具有恒定刚度（高和低）的两种方法进行比较。结果表明，即使存在意外的末端执行器碰撞等干扰，该方法在轨迹跟踪和生成的相互作用力方面也优于其他两种情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合学习与优化框架，用于移动机械臂执行复杂物理交互任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理需要动态适应和安全交互的复杂物理任务时存在局限性，需提升移动机械臂的实时响应与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合阻抗型物理接口与GMM/GMR模型编码任务需求，通过在线二次规划优化阻抗参数，并引入能量罐确保系统被动性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在轨迹跟踪精度和交互力控制上优于固定刚度方法，且在碰撞等干扰下表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合框架有效提升了移动机械臂在物理交互任务中的适应性与安全性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Junjie Fu,Jian Sun,Gang Wang
title: Boosting Black-Box Adversarial Attacks with Meta Learning
title_zh: 通过元学习增强黑盒对抗攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in diverse fields. However, it has been demonstrated that DNNs are very vulnerable to adversarial examples even in black-box settings. A large number of black-box attack methods have been proposed to in the literature. However, those methods usually suffer from low success rates and large query counts, which cannot fully satisfy practical purposes. In this paper, we propose a hybrid attack method which trains meta adversarial perturbations (MAPs) on surrogate models and performs black-box attacks by estimating gradients of the models. Our method uses the meta adversarial perturbation as an initialization and subsequently trains any black-box attack method for several epochs. Furthermore, the MAPs enjoy favorable transferability and universality, in the sense that they can be employed to boost performance of other black-box adversarial attack methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can not only improve the attack success rates, but also reduces the number of queries compared to other methods.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in diverse fields. However, it has been demonstrated that DNNs are very vulnerable to adversarial examples even in black-box settings. A large number of black-box attack methods have been proposed to in the literature. However, those methods usually suffer from low success rates and large query counts, which cannot fully satisfy practical purposes. In this paper, we propose a hybrid attack method which trains meta adversarial perturbations (MAPs) on surrogate models and performs black-box attacks by estimating gradients of the models. Our method uses the meta adversarial perturbation as an initialization and subsequently trains any black-box attack method for several epochs. Furthermore, the MAPs enjoy favorable transferability and universality, in the sense that they can be employed to boost performance of other black-box adversarial attack methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can not only improve the attack success rates, but also reduces the number of queries compared to other methods.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在各个领域取得了显着的成功。然而，事实证明，即使在黑盒设置中，DNN 也非常容易受到对抗性示例的影响。文献中已经提出了大量的黑盒攻击方法。然而，这些方法通常成功率低、查询次数多，不能完全满足实际用途。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合攻击方法，该方法在代理模型上训练元对抗性扰动（MAP），并通过估计模型的梯度来执行黑盒攻击。我们的方法使用元对抗性扰动作为初始化，然后在几个时期内训练任何黑盒攻击方法。此外，MAP 具有良好的可移植性和通用性，因为它们可以用来提高其他黑盒对抗攻击方法的性能。大量的实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法不仅可以提高攻击成功率，而且还可以减少查询数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合元学习的混合攻击方法，通过训练元对抗扰动（MAPs）提升黑盒对抗攻击的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法存在成功率低、查询次数多的问题，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 在替代模型上训练元对抗扰动（MAPs）作为初始化，再结合其他攻击方法进行多轮训练，利用MAP的可迁移性增强攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在提升攻击成功率的同时显著减少了查询次数，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 元对抗扰动方法有效解决了黑盒攻击的效率与成功率矛盾，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Boosting Black-Box Adversarial Attacks with Meta Learning 通过元学习增强黑盒对抗攻击 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in diverse fields. However, it has been demonstrated that DNNs are very vulnerable to adversarial examples even in black-box settings. A large number of black-box attack methods have been proposed to in the literature. However, those methods usually suffer from low success rates and large query counts, which cannot fully satisfy practical purposes. In this paper, we propose a hybrid attack method which trains meta adversarial perturbations (MAPs) on surrogate models and performs black-box attacks by estimating gradients of the models. Our method uses the meta adversarial perturbation as an initialization and subsequently trains any black-box attack method for several epochs. Furthermore, the MAPs enjoy favorable transferability and universality, in the sense that they can be employed to boost performance of other black-box adversarial attack methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can not only improve the attack success rates, but also reduces the number of queries compared to other methods. 深度神经网络（DNN）在各个领域取得了显着的成功。然而，事实证明，即使在黑盒设置中，DNN 也非常容易受到对抗性示例的影响。文献中已经提出了大量的黑盒攻击方法。然而，这些方法通常成功率低、查询次数多，不能完全满足实际用途。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合攻击方法，该方法在代理模型上训练元对抗性扰动（MAP），并通过估计模型的梯度来执行黑盒攻击。我们的方法使用元对抗性扰动作为初始化，然后在几个时期内训练任何黑盒攻击方法。此外，MAP 具有良好的可移植性和通用性，因为它们可以用来提高其他黑盒对抗攻击方法的性能。大量的实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法不仅可以提高攻击成功率，而且还可以减少查询数量。 本文提出一种结合元学习的混合攻击方法，通过训练元对抗扰动（MAPs）提升黑盒对抗攻击的效果。 Junjie Fu,Jian Sun,Gang Wang cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Mengzhe Geng,Xurong Xie,Rongfeng Su,Jianwei Yu,Zengrui Jin,Tianzi Wang,Shujie Hu,Zi Ye,Helen Meng,Xunying Liu
title: On-the-Fly Feature Based Rapid Speaker Adaptation for Dysarthric and Elderly Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于构音障碍和老年人语音识别的基于动态特征的快速说话者适应
abstract: Accurate recognition of dysarthric and elderly speech remain challenging tasks to date. Speaker-level heterogeneity attributed to accent or gender, when aggregated with age and speech impairment, create large diversity among these speakers. Scarcity of speaker-level data limits the practical use of data-intensive model based speaker adaptation methods. To this end, this paper proposes two novel forms of data-efficient, feature-based on-the-fly speaker adaptation methods: variance-regularized spectral basis embedding (SVR) and spectral feature driven f-LHUC transforms. Experiments conducted on UASpeech dysarthric and DementiaBank Pitt elderly speech corpora suggest the proposed on-the-fly speaker adaptation approaches consistently outperform baseline iVector adapted hybrid DNN/TDNN and E2E Conformer systems by statistically significant WER reduction of 2.48%-2.85% absolute (7.92%-8.06% relative), and offline model based LHUC adaptation by 1.82% absolute (5.63% relative) respectively.
summary: Accurate recognition of dysarthric and elderly speech remain challenging tasks to date. Speaker-level heterogeneity attributed to accent or gender, when aggregated with age and speech impairment, create large diversity among these speakers. Scarcity of speaker-level data limits the practical use of data-intensive model based speaker adaptation methods. To this end, this paper proposes two novel forms of data-efficient, feature-based on-the-fly speaker adaptation methods: variance-regularized spectral basis embedding (SVR) and spectral feature driven f-LHUC transforms. Experiments conducted on UASpeech dysarthric and DementiaBank Pitt elderly speech corpora suggest the proposed on-the-fly speaker adaptation approaches consistently outperform baseline iVector adapted hybrid DNN/TDNN and E2E Conformer systems by statistically significant WER reduction of 2.48%-2.85% absolute (7.92%-8.06% relative), and offline model based LHUC adaptation by 1.82% absolute (5.63% relative) respectively.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，准确识别构音障碍和老年人言语仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于口音或性别而导致的说话者水平的异质性，与年龄和言语障碍相结合，会在这些说话者之间产生巨大的多样性。说话人级数据的稀缺限制了基于数据密集型模型的说话人适应方法的实际使用。为此，本文提出了两种新颖形式的数据高效、基于特征的动态扬声器自适应方法：方差正则化频谱基础嵌入（SVR）和频谱特征驱动的 f-LHUC 变换。在 UASpeech 构音障碍和 DementiaBank Pitt 老年语音语料库上进行的实验表明，所提出的动态说话者自适应方法始终优于基线 iVector 适应的混合 DNN/TDNN 和 E2E Conformer 系统，统计上显着的 WER 降低了 2.48%-2.85% 绝对值（相对 7.92%-8.06%），基于离线模型的 LHUC 适应降低了 1.82% 绝对值（5.63%）相对）分别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于特征的实时说话人自适应方法，以提高对构音障碍和老年语音的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 构音障碍和老年语音因年龄、口音、性别及言语障碍导致说话人异质性高，且缺乏足够的说话人数据，传统数据密集型自适应方法效果受限。
AI.method: 提出两种数据高效方法：方差正则化谱基嵌入（SVR）和谱特征驱动的f-LHUC变换，实现特征级实时自适应。
AI.result: 在UASpeech和DementiaBank数据集上，两种方法分别较基线系统降低2.48%-2.85%绝对词错率（7.92%-8.06%相对），较离线LHUC方法降低1.82%绝对（5.63%相对）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在少量数据下有效提升构音障碍和老年语音识别性能，验证了特征级实时自适应的可行性。

authors_text: Shasha Mei
title: S2-Net: Self-supervision Guided Feature Representation Learning for Cross-Modality Images
title_zh: S2-Net：跨模态图像的自监督引导特征表示学习
abstract: Combining the respective advantages of cross-modality images can compensate for the lack of information in the single modality, which has attracted increasing attention of researchers into multi-modal image matching tasks. Meanwhile, due to the great appearance differences between cross-modality image pairs, it often fails to make the feature representations of correspondences as close as possible. In this letter, we design a cross-modality feature representation learning network, S2-Net, which is based on the recently successful detect-and-describe pipeline, originally proposed for visible images but adapted to work with cross-modality image pairs. To solve the consequent problem of optimization difficulties, we introduce self-supervised learning with a well-designed loss function to guide the training without discarding the original advantages. This novel strategy simulates image pairs in the same modality, which is also a useful guide for the training of cross-modality images. Notably, it does not require additional data but significantly improves the performance and is even workable for all methods of the detect-and-describe pipeline. Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the strategy we proposed, compared to both handcrafted and deep learning-based methods. Results show that our elegant formulation of combined optimization of supervised and self-supervised learning outperforms state-of-the-arts on RoadScene and RGB-NIR datasets.
summary: Combining the respective advantages of cross-modality images can compensate for the lack of information in the single modality, which has attracted increasing attention of researchers into multi-modal image matching tasks. Meanwhile, due to the great appearance differences between cross-modality image pairs, it often fails to make the feature representations of correspondences as close as possible. In this letter, we design a cross-modality feature representation learning network, S2-Net, which is based on the recently successful detect-and-describe pipeline, originally proposed for visible images but adapted to work with cross-modality image pairs. To solve the consequent problem of optimization difficulties, we introduce self-supervised learning with a well-designed loss function to guide the training without discarding the original advantages. This novel strategy simulates image pairs in the same modality, which is also a useful guide for the training of cross-modality images. Notably, it does not require additional data but significantly improves the performance and is even workable for all methods of the detect-and-describe pipeline. Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the strategy we proposed, compared to both handcrafted and deep learning-based methods. Results show that our elegant formulation of combined optimization of supervised and self-supervised learning outperforms state-of-the-arts on RoadScene and RGB-NIR datasets.
abstract_zh: 结合跨模态图像各自的优点可以弥补单一模态信息的缺乏，这引起了研究人员对多模态图像匹配任务的越来越多的关注。同时，由于跨模态图像对之间的外观差异很大，往往无法使对应的特征表示尽可能接近。在这封信中，我们设计了一个跨模态特征表示学习网络 S2-Net，它基于最近成功的检测和描述管道，最初是针对可见图像提出的，但适用于跨模态图像对。为了解决随之而来的优化困难问题，我们引入了自监督学习，并通过精心设计的损失函数来指导训练，同时又不放弃原有的优势。这种新颖的策略模拟相同模态的图像对，这对于跨模态图像的训练也是一个有用的指导。值得注意的是，它不需要额外的数据，但显着提高了性能，甚至适用于检测和描述管道的所有方法。与手工方法和基于深度学习的方法相比，进行了大量的实验来评估我们提出的策略的性能。结果表明，我们的监督和自监督学习组合优化的优雅公式在 RoadScene 和 RGB-NIR 数据集上的表现优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 提出S2-Net网络，通过自监督学习优化跨模态图像的特征表示，以提升图像匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 跨模态图像因外观差异大，难以对齐特征表示，现有方法存在优化困难，需新策略提升性能。
AI.method: 基于检测-描述框架，引入自监督损失函数，模拟同模态图像对训练，无需额外数据。
AI.result: 在RoadScene和RGB-NIR数据集上，S2-Net优于传统和深度学习方法，表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 结合监督与自监督的优化策略有效，适用于所有检测-描述方法，具有广泛适用性。
