Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the strategy we proposed, compared to both handcrafted and deep learning-based methods. Results show that our elegant formulation of combined optimization of supervised and self-supervised learning outperforms state-of-the-arts on RoadScene and RGB-NIR datasets. 结合跨模态图像各自的优点可以弥补单一模态信息的缺乏，这引起了研究人员对多模态图像匹配任务的越来越多的关注。同时，由于跨模态图像对之间的外观差异很大，往往无法使对应的特征表示尽可能接近。在这封信中，我们设计了一个跨模态特征表示学习网络 S2-Net，它基于最近成功的检测和描述管道，最初是针对可见图像提出的，但适用于跨模态图像对。为了解决随之而来的优化困难问题，我们引入了自监督学习，并通过精心设计的损失函数来指导训练，同时又不放弃原有的优势。这种新颖的策略模拟相同模态的图像对，这对于跨模态图像的训练也是一个有用的指导。值得注意的是，它不需要额外的数据，但显着提高了性能，甚至适用于检测和描述管道的所有方法。与手工方法和基于深度学习的方法相比，进行了大量的实验来评估我们提出的策略的性能。结果表明，我们的监督和自监督学习组合优化的优雅公式在 RoadScene 和 RGB-NIR 数据集上的表现优于最先进的技术。 提出S2-Net网络，通过自监督学习优化跨模态图像的特征表示，以提升图像匹配性能。 Shasha Mei cs.CV

authors_text: Jisoo Mok,Byunggook Na,Ji-Hoon Kim,Dongyoon Han,Sungroh Yoon
title: Demystifying the Neural Tangent Kernel from a Practical Perspective: Can it be trusted for Neural Architecture Search without training?
title_zh: 从实践角度揭秘神经切线内核：无需训练即可信任它用于神经架构搜索吗？
abstract: In Neural Architecture Search (NAS), reducing the cost of architecture evaluation remains one of the most crucial challenges. Among a plethora of efforts to bypass training of each candidate architecture to convergence for evaluation, the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) is emerging as a promising theoretical framework that can be utilized to estimate the performance of a neural architecture at initialization. In this work, we revisit several at-initialization metrics that can be derived from the NTK and reveal their key shortcomings. Then, through the empirical analysis of the time evolution of NTK, we deduce that modern neural architectures exhibit highly non-linear characteristics, making the NTK-based metrics incapable of reliably estimating the performance of an architecture without some amount of training. To take such non-linear characteristics into account, we introduce Label-Gradient Alignment (LGA), a novel NTK-based metric whose inherent formulation allows it to capture the large amount of non-linear advantage present in modern neural architectures. With minimal amount of training, LGA obtains a meaningful level of rank correlation with the post-training test accuracy of an architecture. Lastly, we demonstrate that LGA, complemented with few epochs of training, successfully guides existing search algorithms to achieve competitive search performances with significantly less search cost. The code is available at: https://github.com/nutellamok/DemystifyingNTK.
summary: In Neural Architecture Search (NAS), reducing the cost of architecture evaluation remains one of the most crucial challenges. Among a plethora of efforts to bypass training of each candidate architecture to convergence for evaluation, the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) is emerging as a promising theoretical framework that can be utilized to estimate the performance of a neural architecture at initialization. In this work, we revisit several at-initialization metrics that can be derived from the NTK and reveal their key shortcomings. Then, through the empirical analysis of the time evolution of NTK, we deduce that modern neural architectures exhibit highly non-linear characteristics, making the NTK-based metrics incapable of reliably estimating the performance of an architecture without some amount of training. To take such non-linear characteristics into account, we introduce Label-Gradient Alignment (LGA), a novel NTK-based metric whose inherent formulation allows it to capture the large amount of non-linear advantage present in modern neural architectures. With minimal amount of training, LGA obtains a meaningful level of rank correlation with the post-training test accuracy of an architecture. Lastly, we demonstrate that LGA, complemented with few epochs of training, successfully guides existing search algorithms to achieve competitive search performances with significantly less search cost. The code is available at: https://github.com/nutellamok/DemystifyingNTK.
abstract_zh: 在神经架构搜索（NAS）中，降低架构评估成本仍然是最关键的挑战之一。在绕过每个候选架构的训练以进行收敛评估的大量努力中，神经正切核（NTK）正在成为一种有前景的理论框架，可用于估计神经架构在初始化时的性能。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了可以从 NTK 导出的几个初始化指标，并揭示了它们的主要缺点。然后，通过对 NTK 时间演化的实证分析，我们推断现代神经架构表现出高度非线性特征，使得基于 NTK 的度量无法在没有一定量训练的情况下可靠地估计架构的性能。为了考虑到这种非线性特征，我们引入了标签梯度对齐（LGA），这是一种基于 NTK 的新型度量，其固有的公式使其能够捕获现代神经架构中存在的大量非线性优势。通过最少的训练量，LGA 获得了与架构的训练后测试精度有意义的等级相关性。最后，我们证明 LGA 辅以少量的训练，成功指导现有的搜索算法以显着降低的搜索成本实现有竞争力的搜索性能。该代码位于：https://github.com/nutellamok/DemystifyingNTK。

AI.tldr: 本文从实践角度探讨神经切线核（NTK）在无需训练的情况下是否可信赖用于神经架构搜索（NAS），并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 在NAS中，减少架构评估成本至关重要。现有基于NTK的初始化指标存在局限性，无法准确估计现代神经网络架构的性能。
AI.method: 通过分析NTK的时间演化特性，提出标签梯度对齐（LGA）指标，结合少量训练即可捕捉现代架构的非线性优势。
AI.result: LGA在少量训练后能有效预测架构的测试精度，并指导搜索算法以更低成本实现竞争力性能。
AI.conclusion: 纯NTK指标不可靠，但结合少量训练的LGA可作为NAS的有效替代方案。

authors: Vitor A. P. Martins dos Santos
authors_json: Vitor A. P. Martins dos Santos
authors_text: Jennifer D'Souza,Anita Monteverdi,Muhammad Haris,Marco Anteghini,Kheir Eddine Farfar,Markus Stocker,Vitor A. P. Martins dos Santos,Sören Auer
title: The Digitalization of Bioassays in the Open Research Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 开放研究知识图中生物测定的数字化
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, In Review at DeXa 2022 https://www.dexa.org/dexa2022
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, In Review at DeXa 2022 https://www.dexa.org/dexa2022
abstract: Background: Recent years are seeing a growing impetus in the semantification of scholarly knowledge at the fine-grained level of scientific entities in knowledge graphs. The Open Research Knowledge Graph (ORKG) https://www.orkg.org/ represents an important step in this direction, with thousands of scholarly contributions as structured, fine-grained, machine-readable data. There is a need, however, to engender change in traditional community practices of recording contributions as unstructured, non-machine-readable text. For this in turn, there is a strong need for AI tools designed for scientists that permit easy and accurate semantification of their scholarly contributions. We present one such tool, ORKG-assays. Implementation: ORKG-assays is a freely available AI micro-service in ORKG written in Python designed to assist scientists obtain semantified bioassays as a set of triples. It uses an AI-based clustering algorithm which on gold-standard evaluations over 900 bioassays with 5,514 unique property-value pairs for 103 predicates shows competitive performance. Results and Discussion: As a result, semantified assay collections can be surveyed on the ORKG platform via tabulation or chart-based visualizations of key property values of the chemicals and compounds offering smart knowledge access to biochemists and pharmaceutical researchers in the advancement of drug development.
summary: Background: Recent years are seeing a growing impetus in the semantification of scholarly knowledge at the fine-grained level of scientific entities in knowledge graphs. The Open Research Knowledge Graph (ORKG) https://www.orkg.org/ represents an important step in this direction, with thousands of scholarly contributions as structured, fine-grained, machine-readable data. There is a need, however, to engender change in traditional community practices of recording contributions as unstructured, non-machine-readable text. For this in turn, there is a strong need for AI tools designed for scientists that permit easy and accurate semantification of their scholarly contributions. We present one such tool, ORKG-assays. Implementation: ORKG-assays is a freely available AI micro-service in ORKG written in Python designed to assist scientists obtain semantified bioassays as a set of triples. It uses an AI-based clustering algorithm which on gold-standard evaluations over 900 bioassays with 5,514 unique property-value pairs for 103 predicates shows competitive performance. Results and Discussion: As a result, semantified assay collections can be surveyed on the ORKG platform via tabulation or chart-based visualizations of key property values of the chemicals and compounds offering smart knowledge access to biochemists and pharmaceutical researchers in the advancement of drug development.
abstract_zh: 背景：近年来，知识图谱中科学实体细粒度层面的学术知识语义化的势头越来越大。开放研究知识图谱 (ORKG) https://www.orkg.org/ 代表了朝这个方向迈出的重要一步，其中有数以千计的学术贡献作为结构化、细粒度、机器可读的数据。然而，需要改变将贡献记录为非结构化、非机器可读文本的传统社区做法。为此，迫切需要为科学家设计的人工智能工具，以方便、准确地对他们的学术贡献进行语义化。我们提出了一种这样的工具，ORKG 分析。实施：ORKG-assays 是 ORKG 中免费提供的 AI 微服务，用 Python 编写，旨在帮助科学家获得作为一组三元组的语义化生物测定。它使用基于人工智能的聚类算法，该算法在 103 个谓词的 5,514 个独特属性值对的 900 多个生物测定中进行黄金标准评估，显示出具有竞争力的性能。结果和讨论：因此，可以在 ORKG 平台上通过化学品和化合物关键属性值的表格或图表可视化来调查语义化检测集合，为生物化学家和药物研究人员提供智能知识获取，以推动药物开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ORKG-assays的AI工具，用于将生物测定数据转化为结构化的三元组形式，以支持开放研究知识图谱（ORKG）中的语义化研究。
AI.motivation: 传统科学贡献记录方式依赖非结构化文本，难以被机器解析。需要开发AI工具帮助科学家高效地将研究数据转化为机器可读的语义化格式，以促进知识共享与药物研发。
AI.method: 基于Python开发的ORKG-assays微服务，采用AI聚类算法对生物测定数据进行语义化处理，并通过900个生物测定数据集（含5,514个属性值对）验证其性能。
AI.result: 成功实现生物测定数据的语义化，用户可通过ORKG平台以表格或图表形式可视化化学物质关键属性，提升生物化学家和制药研究人员的知识获取效率。
AI.conclusion: ORKG-assays有效推动了生物测定数据的语义化标准化，为药物研发提供了智能化的知识访问支持，是科研数据开放共享的重要实践。

Results and Discussion: As a result, semantified assay collections can be surveyed on the ORKG platform via tabulation or chart-based visualizations of key property values of the chemicals and compounds offering smart knowledge access to biochemists and pharmaceutical researchers in the advancement of drug development. 背景：近年来，知识图谱中科学实体细粒度层面的学术知识语义化的势头越来越大。开放研究知识图谱 (ORKG) https://www.orkg.org/ 代表了朝这个方向迈出的重要一步，其中有数以千计的学术贡献作为结构化、细粒度、机器可读的数据。然而，需要改变将贡献记录为非结构化、非机器可读文本的传统社区做法。为此，迫切需要为科学家设计的人工智能工具，以方便、准确地对他们的学术贡献进行语义化。我们提出了一种这样的工具，ORKG 分析。实施：ORKG-assays 是 ORKG 中免费提供的 AI 微服务，用 Python 编写，旨在帮助科学家获得作为一组三元组的语义化生物测定。它使用基于人工智能的聚类算法，该算法在 103 个谓词的 5,514 个独特属性值对的 900 多个生物测定中进行黄金标准评估，显示出具有竞争力的性能。结果和讨论：因此，可以在 ORKG 平台上通过化学品和化合物关键属性值的表格或图表可视化来调查语义化检测集合，为生物化学家和药物研究人员提供智能知识获取，以推动药物开发。 本文提出了一种名为ORKG-assays的AI工具，用于将生物测定数据转化为结构化的三元组形式，以支持开放研究知识图谱（ORKG）中的语义化研究。 Jennifer D'Souza,Anita Monteverdi,Muhammad Haris,Marco Anteghini,Kheir Eddine Farfar,Markus Stocker,Vitor A. P. Martins dos Santos,Sören Auer cs.DL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Young-Eun Kim,Woo-Jeoung Nam,Kyungseo Min,Seong-Whan Lee
title: Style-Guided Domain Adaptation for Face Presentation Attack Detection
title_zh: 用于面部呈现攻击检测的风格引导域适应
comment: With the agreement of all authors, we would like to withdraw the manuscript. For lack of some experiments, a part of important claims cannot stand solidly. We need to further carry out experiments, and reconsider the rationality of these claims
comments: With the agreement of all authors, we would like to withdraw the manuscript. For lack of some experiments, a part of important claims cannot stand solidly. We need to further carry out experiments, and reconsider the rationality of these claims
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) or domain generalization (DG) for face presentation attack detection (PAD) has attracted attention recently with its robustness against unseen attack scenarios. Existing DA/DG-based PAD methods, however, have not yet fully explored the domain-specific style information that can provide knowledge regarding attack styles (e.g., materials, background, illumination and resolution). In this paper, we introduce a novel Style-Guided Domain Adaptation (SGDA) framework for inference-time adaptive PAD. Specifically, Style-Selective Normalization (SSN) is proposed to explore the domain-specific style information within the high-order feature statistics. The proposed SSN enables the adaptation of the model to the target domain by reducing the style difference between the target and the source domains. Moreover, we carefully design Style-Aware Meta-Learning (SAML) to boost the adaptation ability, which simulates the inference-time adaptation with style selection process on virtual test domain. In contrast to previous domain adaptation approaches, our method does not require either additional auxiliary models (e.g., domain adaptors) or the unlabeled target domain during training, which makes our method more practical to PAD task. To verify our experiments, we utilize the public datasets: MSU-MFSD, CASIA-FASD, OULU-NPU and Idiap REPLAYATTACK. In most assessments, the result demonstrates a notable gap of performance compared to the conventional DA/DG-based PAD methods.

Existing DA/DG-based PAD methods, however, have not yet fully explored the domain-specific style information that can provide knowledge regarding attack styles (e.g., materials, background, illumination and resolution). In this paper, we introduce a novel Style-Guided Domain Adaptation (SGDA) framework for inference-time adaptive PAD. Specifically, Style-Selective Normalization (SSN) is proposed to explore the domain-specific style information within the high-order feature statistics. The proposed SSN enables the adaptation of the model to the target domain by reducing the style difference between the target and the source domains. Moreover, we carefully design Style-Aware Meta-Learning (SAML) to boost the adaptation ability, which simulates the inference-time adaptation with style selection process on virtual test domain. In contrast to previous domain adaptation approaches, our method does not require either additional auxiliary models (e.g., domain adaptors) or the unlabeled target domain during training, which makes our method more practical to PAD task. To verify our experiments, we utilize the public datasets: MSU-MFSD, CASIA-FASD, OULU-NPU and Idiap REPLAYATTACK. In most assessments, the result demonstrates a notable gap of performance compared to the conventional DA/DG-based PAD methods.
abstract_zh: 用于面部呈现攻击检测（PAD）的域适应（DA）或域泛化（DG）最近因其针对未见过的攻击场景的鲁棒性而引起了人们的关注。然而，现有的基于 DA/DG 的 PAD 方法尚未充分探索特定领域的风格信息，这些信息可以提供有关攻击风格的知识（例如材料、背景、照明和分辨率）。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的用于推理时间自适应 PAD 的风格引导域适应 (SGDA) 框架。具体来说，提出了风格选择性归一化（SSN）来探索高阶特征统计中特定领域的风格信息。所提出的 SSN 通过减少目标域和源域之间的风格差异，使模型能够适应目标域。此外，我们精心设计了风格感知元学习（SAML）来提高适应能力，它在虚拟测试域上模拟推理时间适应和风格选择过程。与之前的域适应方法相比，我们的方法在训练期间不需要额外的辅助模型（例如域适配器）或未标记的目标域，这使得我们的方法对于 PAD 任务更加实用。为了验证我们的实验，我们利用公共数据集：MSU-MFSD、CASIA-FASD、OULU-NPU 和 Idiap REPLAYATTACK。在大多数评估中，结果表明与传统的基于 DA/DG 的 PAD 方法相比，性能存在显着差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于风格引导的领域自适应框架（SGDA），用于提升人脸识别攻击检测（PAD）在未知攻击场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应/领域泛化方法未充分挖掘攻击风格（如材质、背景、光照等）的领域特定信息，导致模型在目标域适应性不足。
AI.method: 提出风格选择归一化（SSN）模块，通过高阶特征统计探索领域风格差异；设计风格感知元学习（SAML）模拟推理时的风格选择过程，无需额外辅助模型或目标域无标签数据。
AI.result: 在MSU-MFSD、CASIA-FASD等公开数据集的实验中，与传统领域自适应方法相比性能存在显著差距（可能指本方法表现更优）。
AI.conclusion: SGDA框架通过风格信息利用提升了PAD任务的实用性，无需依赖额外模型或目标域数据即可实现有效领域适应。

The proposed SSN enables the adaptation of the model to the target domain by reducing the style difference between the target and the source domains. Moreover, we carefully design Style-Aware Meta-Learning (SAML) to boost the adaptation ability, which simulates the inference-time adaptation with style selection process on virtual test domain. In contrast to previous domain adaptation approaches, our method does not require either additional auxiliary models (e.g., domain adaptors) or the unlabeled target domain during training, which makes our method more practical to PAD task. To verify our experiments, we utilize the public datasets: MSU-MFSD, CASIA-FASD, OULU-NPU and Idiap REPLAYATTACK. authors_text: JoonKyu Park,Yeonguk Oh,Gyeongsik Moon,Hongsuk Choi,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: HandOccNet: Occlusion-Robust 3D Hand Mesh Estimation Network
title_zh: HandOccNet：遮挡稳健的 3D 手部网格估计网络
abstract: Hands are often severely occluded by objects, which makes 3D hand mesh estimation challenging. Previous works often have disregarded information at occluded regions. However, we argue that occluded regions have strong correlations with hands so that they can provide highly beneficial information for complete 3D hand mesh estimation. Thus, in this work, we propose a novel 3D hand mesh estimation network HandOccNet, that can fully exploits the information at occluded regions as a secondary means to enhance image features and make it much richer. To this end, we design two successive Transformer-based modules, called feature injecting transformer (FIT) and self- enhancing transformer (SET). FIT injects hand information into occluded region by considering their correlation. SET refines the output of FIT by using a self-attention mechanism. By injecting the hand information to the occluded region, our HandOccNet reaches the state-of-the-art performance on 3D hand mesh benchmarks that contain challenging hand-object occlusions. The codes are available in: https://github.com/namepllet/HandOccNet.
summary: Hands are often severely occluded by objects, which makes 3D hand mesh estimation challenging. Previous works often have disregarded information at occluded regions. However, we argue that occluded regions have strong correlations with hands so that they can provide highly beneficial information for complete 3D hand mesh estimation. Thus, in this work, we propose a novel 3D hand mesh estimation network HandOccNet, that can fully exploits the information at occluded regions as a secondary means to enhance image features and make it much richer. To this end, we design two successive Transformer-based modules, called feature injecting transformer (FIT) and self- enhancing transformer (SET). FIT injects hand information into occluded region by considering their correlation. SET refines the output of FIT by using a self-attention mechanism. By injecting the hand information to the occluded region, our HandOccNet reaches the state-of-the-art performance on 3D hand mesh benchmarks that contain challenging hand-object occlusions. The codes are available in: https://github.com/namepllet/HandOccNet.
abstract_zh: 手部经常被物体严重遮挡，这使得 3D 手部网格估计具有挑战性。以前的作品经常忽略遮挡区域的信息。然而，我们认为遮挡区域与手部具有很强的相关性，因此它们可以为完整的 3D 手部网格估计提供非常有用的信息。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 手部网格估计网络 HandOccNet，它可以充分利用遮挡区域的信息作为增强图像特征并使其更加丰富的辅助手段。为此，我们设计了两个连续的基于 Transformer 的模块，称为特征注入变压器（FIT）和自增强变压器（SET）。 FIT通过考虑手部信息的相关性将手部信息注入到遮挡区域。 SET 通过使用自注意力机制来细化 FIT 的输出。通过将手部信息注入遮挡区域，我们的 HandOccNet 在包含具有挑战性的手部对象遮挡的 3D 手部网格基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/namepllet/HandOccNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HandOccNet网络，通过利用手部遮挡区域的信息提升3D手部网格估计的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视遮挡区域信息，但作者发现遮挡区域与手部存在强关联，可提供有益信息辅助估计。
AI.method: 设计两个Transformer模块：特征注入Transformer（FIT）用于将手部信息注入遮挡区域，自增强Transformer（SET）通过自注意力机制优化FIT输出。
AI.result: 在包含复杂手物遮挡的3D手部网格基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用遮挡区域信息，HandOccNet显著提升了3D手部网格估计的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Junyong You,Zheng Zhang
title: Visual Mechanisms Inspired Efficient Transformers for Image and Video Quality Assessment
title_zh: 视觉机制激发了用于图像和视频质量评估的高效变压器
comment: ef:Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2023
comments: ef:Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2023
abstract: Visual (image, video) quality assessments can be modelled by visual features in different domains, e.g., spatial, frequency, and temporal domains. Perceptual mechanisms in the human visual system (HVS) play a crucial role in generation of quality perception. This paper proposes a general framework for no-reference visual quality assessment using efficient windowed transformer architectures. A lightweight module for multi-stage channel attention is integrated into Swin (shifted window) Transformer. Such module can represent appropriate perceptual mechanisms in image quality assessment (IQA) to build an accurate IQA model. Meanwhile, representative features for image quality perception in the spatial and frequency domains can also be derived from the IQA model, which are then fed into another windowed transformer architecture for video quality assessment (VQA). The VQA model efficiently reuses attention information across local windows to tackle the issue of expensive time and memory complexities of original transformer. Experimental results on both large-scale IQA and VQA databases demonstrate that the proposed quality assessment models outperform other state-of-the-art models by large margins. The complete source code will be published on Github.

abstract_zh: 视觉（图像、视频）质量评估可以通过不同域（例如空间域、频率域和时间域）中的视觉特征来建模。人类视觉系统（HVS）中的感知机制在质量感知的生成中发挥着至关重要的作用。本文提出了一个使用高效窗口变压器架构进行无参考视觉质量评估的通用框架。 Swin（移动窗口）Transformer 中集成了用于多级通道注意力的轻量级模块。该模块可以代表图像质量评估（IQA）中适当的感知机制，以构建准确的 IQA 模型。同时，空间和频率域中图像质量感知的代表性特征也可以从 IQA 模型中导出，然后将其输入到另一个用于视频质量评估（VQA）的窗口变压器架构中。 VQA 模型有效地跨本地窗口重用注意力信息，以解决原始 Transformer 的昂贵时间和内存复杂性问题。大规模 IQA 和 VQA 数据库上的实验结果表明，所提出的质量评估模型大幅优于其他最先进的模型。完整的源代码将发布在Github上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉机制的高效Transformer框架，用于无参考图像和视频质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有质量评估模型难以有效模拟人类视觉系统（HVS）的感知机制，且传统Transformer计算成本高。
AI.method: 设计轻量级多阶段通道注意力模块集成至Swin Transformer，提取空间与频率域特征，并通过窗口化Transformer复用注意力信息实现高效视频质量评估。
AI.result: 在大规模IQA/VQA数据集上显著优于现有先进模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合视觉感知机制与高效Transformer结构，为图像/视频质量评估提供了准确且计算高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Leitian Tao,Zhenzhong Chen
title: Pyramid Feature Alignment Network for Video Deblurring
title_zh: 用于视频去模糊的金字塔特征对齐网络
abstract: Video deblurring remains a challenging task due to various causes of blurring. Traditional methods have considered how to utilize neighboring frames by the single-scale alignment for restoration. However, they typically suffer from misalignment caused by severe blur. In this work, we aim to better utilize neighboring frames with high efficient feature alignment. We propose a Pyramid Feature Alignment Network (PFAN) for video deblurring. First, the multi-scale feature of blurry frames is extracted with the strategy of Structure-to-Detail Downsampling (SDD) before alignment. This downsampling strategy makes the edges sharper, which is helpful for alignment. Then we align the feature at each scale and reconstruct the image at the corresponding scale. This strategy effectively supervises the alignment at each scale, overcoming the problem of propagated errors from the above scales at the alignment stage. To better handle the challenges of complex and large motions, instead of aligning features at each scale separately, lower-scale motion information is used to guide the higher-scale motion estimation. Accordingly, a Cascade Guided Deformable Alignment (CGDA) is proposed to integrate coarse motion into deformable convolution for finer and more accurate alignment. As demonstrated in extensive experiments, our proposed PFAN achieves superior performance with competitive speed compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Video deblurring remains a challenging task due to various causes of blurring. Traditional methods have considered how to utilize neighboring frames by the single-scale alignment for restoration. However, they typically suffer from misalignment caused by severe blur. In this work, we aim to better utilize neighboring frames with high efficient feature alignment. We propose a Pyramid Feature Alignment Network (PFAN) for video deblurring. First, the multi-scale feature of blurry frames is extracted with the strategy of Structure-to-Detail Downsampling (SDD) before alignment. This downsampling strategy makes the edges sharper, which is helpful for alignment. Then we align the feature at each scale and reconstruct the image at the corresponding scale. This strategy effectively supervises the alignment at each scale, overcoming the problem of propagated errors from the above scales at the alignment stage. To better handle the challenges of complex and large motions, instead of aligning features at each scale separately, lower-scale motion information is used to guide the higher-scale motion estimation. Accordingly, a Cascade Guided Deformable Alignment (CGDA) is proposed to integrate coarse motion into deformable convolution for finer and more accurate alignment. As demonstrated in extensive experiments, our proposed PFAN achieves superior performance with competitive speed compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于各种模糊原因，视频去模糊仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。传统方法考虑了如何通过单尺度对齐来利用相邻帧进行恢复。然而，它们通常会因严重模糊而导致错位。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过高效的特征对齐更好地利用相邻帧。我们提出了一种用于视频去模糊的金字塔特征对齐网络（PFAN）。首先，在对齐之前采用结构到细节下采样（SDD）策略提取模糊帧的多尺度特征。这种下采样策略使边缘更加锐利，这有助于对齐。然后我们在每个尺度上对齐特征并在相应的尺度上重建图像。该策略有效地监督每个尺度的对齐，克服了对齐阶段上述尺度的传播误差问题。为了更好地应对复杂和大型运动的挑战，不是单独对齐每个尺度的特征，而是使用较低尺度的运动信息来指导较高尺度的运动估计。因此，提出了级联引导可变形对准（CGDA），将粗略运动集成到可变形卷积中，以实现更精细和更准确的对准。正如大量实验所证明的那样，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的 PFAN 以具有竞争力的速度实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种金字塔特征对齐网络（PFAN），用于视频去模糊任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视频去模糊方法在利用相邻帧进行恢复时，常常因严重模糊导致对齐误差。本文旨在通过高效的特征对齐策略，更好地利用相邻帧信息。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种金字塔特征对齐网络（PFAN），采用结构到细节下采样（SDD）策略提取模糊帧的多尺度特征，并通过级联引导可变形对齐（CGDA）方法，利用低尺度运动信息指导高尺度运动估计，以实现更精确的对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，PFAN在保持竞争力速度的同时，取得了优于现有最先进方法的去模糊效果。
AI.conclusion: PFAN通过多尺度特征提取和级联引导对齐策略，有效解决了视频去模糊中的对齐误差问题，取得了优异的性能。

authors_text: Tang Xinyao,Wang Wei,Song Huansheng,Zhao Chunhui
title: CenterLoc3D: Monocular 3D Vehicle Localization Network for Roadside Surveillance Cameras
title_zh: CenterLoc3D：用于路边监控摄像头的单目 3D 车辆定位网络
comment: 33 pages, 15 figures. v3. This work has been published on Complex & Intelligent Systems, link: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s40747-022-00962-9
comments: 33 pages, 15 figures. v3. This work has been published on Complex & Intelligent Systems, link: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s40747-022-00962-9
abstract: Monocular 3D vehicle localization is an important task in Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) and Cooperative Vehicle Infrastructure System (CVIS), which is usually achieved by monocular 3D vehicle detection. However, depth information cannot be obtained directly by monocular cameras due to the inherent imaging mechanism, resulting in more challenging monocular 3D tasks. Most of the current monocular 3D vehicle detection methods leverage 2D detectors and additional geometric modules, which reduces the efficiency. In this paper, we propose a 3D vehicle localization network CenterLoc3D for roadside monocular cameras, which directly predicts centroid and eight vertexes in image space, and the dimension of 3D bounding boxes without 2D detectors. To improve the precision of 3D vehicle localization, we propose a weighted-fusion module and a loss with spatial constraints embedded in CenterLoc3D. Firstly, the transformation matrix between 2D image space and 3D world space is solved by camera calibration. Secondly, vehicle type, centroid, eight vertexes, and the dimension of 3D vehicle bounding boxes are obtained by CenterLoc3D. Finally, centroid in 3D world space can be obtained by camera calibration and CenterLoc3D for 3D vehicle localization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first application of 3D vehicle localization for roadside monocular cameras. Hence, we also propose a benchmark for this application including a dataset (SVLD-3D), an annotation tool (LabelImg-3D), and evaluation metrics. Through experimental validation, the proposed method achieves high accuracy and real-time performance. (limited words, please see the article for more details)
summary: Monocular 3D vehicle localization is an important task in Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) and Cooperative Vehicle Infrastructure System (CVIS), which is usually achieved by monocular 3D vehicle detection. However, depth information cannot be obtained directly by monocular cameras due to the inherent imaging mechanism, resulting in more challenging monocular 3D tasks. Most of the current monocular 3D vehicle detection methods leverage 2D detectors and additional geometric modules, which reduces the efficiency. In this paper, we propose a 3D vehicle localization network CenterLoc3D for roadside monocular cameras, which directly predicts centroid and eight vertexes in image space, and the dimension of 3D bounding boxes without 2D detectors. To improve the precision of 3D vehicle localization, we propose a weighted-fusion module and a loss with spatial constraints embedded in CenterLoc3D. Firstly, the transformation matrix between 2D image space and 3D world space is solved by camera calibration. Secondly, vehicle type, centroid, eight vertexes, and the dimension of 3D vehicle bounding boxes are obtained by CenterLoc3D. Finally, centroid in 3D world space can be obtained by camera calibration and CenterLoc3D for 3D vehicle localization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first application of 3D vehicle localization for roadside monocular cameras. Hence, we also propose a benchmark for this application including a dataset (SVLD-3D), an annotation tool (LabelImg-3D), and evaluation metrics. Through experimental validation, the proposed method achieves high accuracy and real-time performance. (limited words, please see the article for more details)
abstract_zh: 单目3D车辆定位是智能交通系统（ITS）和协同车辆基础设施系统（CVIS）中的一项重要任务，通常通过单目3D车辆检测来实现。然而，由于固有的成像机制，单目相机无法直接获取深度信息，导致单目3D任务更具挑战性。当前大多数单目3D车辆检测方法都利用2D检测器和额外的几何模块，这降低了效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于路边单目摄像机的 3D 车辆定位网络 CenterLoc3D，它可以直接预测图像空间中的质心和八个顶点，以及无需 2D 检测器的 3D 边界框的尺寸。为了提高 3D 车辆定位的精度，我们提出了一个加权融合模块和嵌入 CenterLoc3D 中的空间约束损失。首先，通过相机标定求解2D图像空间和3D世界空间之间的变换矩阵。其次，通过CenterLoc3D获得车辆类型、质心、八个顶点以及3D车辆边界框的尺寸。最后，可以通过相机标定和 CenterLoc3D 获得 3D 世界空间中的质心，以进行 3D 车辆定位。据我们所知，这是路边单目摄像头 3D 车辆定位的首次应用。因此，我们还为此应用程序提出了一个基准，包括数据集（SVLD-3D）、注释工具（LabelImg-3D）和评估指标。通过实验验证，该方法具有较高的准确率和实时性。 （字数有限，更多详情请看文章）

AI.tldr: 本文提出CenterLoc3D网络，直接通过单目摄像头实现路边监控场景下的3D车辆定位，无需依赖2D检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D车辆检测方法依赖2D检测器和几何模块导致效率低下，且缺乏针对路边监控摄像头的3D定位基准。
AI.method: 通过相机标定求解2D-3D空间变换矩阵，设计加权融合模块和空间约束损失函数，直接预测图像空间中的车辆质心、八个顶点及3D包围盒尺寸。
AI.result: 在提出的SVLD-3D数据集上实现高精度3D定位，同时保持实时性能，并构建包含标注工具和评估指标的基准体系。
AI.conclusion: CenterLoc3D是首个面向路边单目摄像头的3D车辆定位方法，为该领域提供了新的研究基准和高效解决方案。

search_text: CenterLoc3D: Monocular 3D Vehicle Localization Network for Roadside Surveillance Cameras CenterLoc3D：用于路边监控摄像头的单目 3D 车辆定位网络 Monocular 3D vehicle localization is an important task in Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) and Cooperative Vehicle Infrastructure System (CVIS), which is usually achieved by monocular 3D vehicle detection. However, depth information cannot be obtained directly by monocular cameras due to the inherent imaging mechanism, resulting in more challenging monocular 3D tasks. Most of the current monocular 3D vehicle detection methods leverage 2D detectors and additional geometric modules, which reduces the efficiency. In this paper, we propose a 3D vehicle localization network CenterLoc3D for roadside monocular cameras, which directly predicts centroid and eight vertexes in image space, and the dimension of 3D bounding boxes without 2D detectors. To improve the precision of 3D vehicle localization, we propose a weighted-fusion module and a loss with spatial constraints embedded in CenterLoc3D. Firstly, the transformation matrix between 2D image space and 3D world space is solved by camera calibration. Secondly, vehicle type, centroid, eight vertexes, and the dimension of 3D vehicle bounding boxes are obtained by CenterLoc3D. Finally, centroid in 3D world space can be obtained by camera calibration and CenterLoc3D for 3D vehicle localization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first application of 3D vehicle localization for roadside monocular cameras. Hence, we also propose a benchmark for this application including a dataset (SVLD-3D), an annotation tool (LabelImg-3D), and evaluation metrics. Through experimental validation, the proposed method achieves high accuracy and real-time performance. authors_text: Younes Ben Mazziane,Sara Alouf,Giovanni Neglia
title: A Formal Analysis of the Count-Min Sketch with Conservative Updates
title_zh: 具有保守更新的最小计数草图的形式分析
abstract: Count-Min Sketch with Conservative Updates (CMS-CU) is a popular algorithm to approximately count items' appearances in a data stream. Despite CMS-CU's widespread adoption, the theoretical analysis of its performance is still wanting because of its inherent difficulty. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to study CMS-CU and derive new upper bounds on the expected value and the CCDF of the estimation error under an i.i.d. request process. Our formulas can be successfully employed to derive improved estimates for the precision of heavy-hitter detection methods and improved configuration rules for CMS-CU. The bounds are evaluated both on synthetic and real traces.
summary: Count-Min Sketch with Conservative Updates (CMS-CU) is a popular algorithm to approximately count items' appearances in a data stream. Despite CMS-CU's widespread adoption, the theoretical analysis of its performance is still wanting because of its inherent difficulty. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to study CMS-CU and derive new upper bounds on the expected value and the CCDF of the estimation error under an i.i.d. request process. Our formulas can be successfully employed to derive improved estimates for the precision of heavy-hitter detection methods and improved configuration rules for CMS-CU. The bounds are evaluated both on synthetic and real traces.
abstract_zh: 保守更新的最小计数草图 (CMS-CU) 是一种流行的算法，用于近似计算数据流中项目的出现次数。尽管CMS-CU被广泛采用，但由于其固有的困难，对其性能的理论分析仍然缺乏。在本文中，我们提出了一种研究 CMS-CU 的新方法，并得出独立同分布下估计误差的预期值和 CCDF 的新上限。请求过程。我们的公式可以成功地用于改进重击检测方法的精度估计，并改进 CMS-CU 的配置规则。边界是根据合成迹线和真实迹线进行评估的。

AI.tldr: 本文对带保守更新的Count-Min Sketch算法进行形式化分析，推导其估计误差的理论上界。
AI.motivation: 尽管Count-Min Sketch with Conservative Updates（CMS-CU）被广泛应用，但其理论分析仍存在不足，限制了精度优化和参数配置。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，针对独立同分布请求过程，推导估计误差的期望值和互补累积分布函数（CCDF）的上界。
AI.result: 获得可应用于重 hitters 检测精度提升和CMS-CU配置优化的理论公式，并通过合成与真实数据验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为CMS-CU的理论优化和实际应用提供了数学依据，推动了流数据处理技术的进一步发展。

authors_text: Duri Janett,Johannes Lengler
title: Two-Dimensional Drift Analysis: Optimizing Two Functions Simultaneously Can Be Hard
title_zh: 二维漂移分析：同时优化两个函数可能很困难
comment: Version 1 contained a bug in the proof of Theorem 2b, so this proof has substantially changed. Moreover, introduction and discussion sections have been substantially revised
comments: Version 1 contained a bug in the proof of Theorem 2b, so this proof has substantially changed. Moreover, introduction and discussion sections have been substantially revised
abstract: In this paper we show how to use drift analysis in the case of two random variables $X_1, X_2$, when the drift is approximatively given by $A\cdot (X_1,X_2)^T$ for a matrix $A$. The non-trivial case is that $X_1$ and $X_2$ impede each other's progress, and we give a full characterization of this case. As application, we develop and analyze a minimal example TwoLinear of a dynamic environment that can be hard. The environment consists of two linear function $f_1$ and $f_2$ with positive weights $1$ and $n$, and in each generation selection is based on one of them at random. They only differ in the set of positions that have weight $1$ and $n$. We show that the $(1+1)$-EA with mutation rate $χ/n$ is efficient for small $χ$ on TwoLinear, but does not find the shared optimum in polynomial time for large $χ$.
summary: In this paper we show how to use drift analysis in the case of two random variables $X_1, X_2$, when the drift is approximatively given by $A\cdot (X_1,X_2)^T$ for a matrix $A$. The non-trivial case is that $X_1$ and $X_2$ impede each other's progress, and we give a full characterization of this case. As application, we develop and analyze a minimal example TwoLinear of a dynamic environment that can be hard. The environment consists of two linear function $f_1$ and $f_2$ with positive weights $1$ and $n$, and in each generation selection is based on one of them at random. They only differ in the set of positions that have weight $1$ and $n$. We show that the $(1+1)$-EA with mutation rate $χ/n$ is efficient for small $χ$ on TwoLinear, but does not find the shared optimum in polynomial time for large $χ$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们展示了如何在两个随机变量 $X_1, X_2$ 的情况下使用漂移分析，当矩阵 $A$ 的漂移近似由 $A\cdot (X_1,X_2)^T$ 给出时。重要的情况是 $X_1$ 和 $X_2$ 阻碍彼此的进步，我们给出了这种情况的完整描述。作为应用程序，我们开发并分析了一个动态环境的最小示例 TwoLinear，该示例可能很困难。该环境由两个具有正权重 $1$ 和 $n$ 的线性函数 $f_1$ 和 $f_2$ 组成，并且在每一代中选择随机基于其中一个。它们仅在权重为 $1$ 和 $n$ 的头寸集合上有所不同。我们证明，突变率为 $χ/n$ 的 $(1+1)$-EA 对于 TwoLinear 上的小 $χ$ 是有效的，但对于大 $χ$ 却没有在多项式时间内找到共享最优值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出二维漂移分析方法，研究同时优化两个函数的难度，并通过TwoLinear动态环境验证该方法。
AI.motivation: 传统漂移分析针对单变量随机过程，而多目标优化中多个变量相互影响的场景缺乏理论支持，需建立新的分析框架。
AI.method: 扩展漂移分析至二维随机变量(X₁,X₂)，利用矩阵A描述变量间相互抑制关系，并构建TwoLinear动态环境进行实验验证。
AI.result: (1+1)-EA在TwoLinear环境中，当突变率χ/n较小时能高效找到共享最优解，但大χ时无法在多项式时间内收敛。
AI.conclusion: 二维漂移分析揭示了多函数同时优化的复杂性，为动态多目标进化算法提供了理论依据和挑战性案例。

conclusion: 二维漂移分析揭示了多函数同时优化的复杂性，为动态多目标进化算法提供了理论依据和挑战性案例。
search_text: Two-Dimensional Drift Analysis: Optimizing Two Functions Simultaneously Can Be Hard 二维漂移分析：同时优化两个函数可能很困难 In this paper we show how to use drift analysis in the case of two random variables $X_1, X_2$, when the drift is approximatively given by $A\cdot (X_1,X_2)^T$ for a matrix $A$. The non-trivial case is that $X_1$ and $X_2$ impede each other's progress, and we give a full characterization of this case. As application, we develop and analyze a minimal example TwoLinear of a dynamic environment that can be hard. The environment consists of two linear function $f_1$ and $f_2$ with positive weights $1$ and $n$, and in each generation selection is based on one of them at random. They only differ in the set of positions that have weight $1$ and $n$. We show that the $(1+1)$-EA with mutation rate $χ/n$ is efficient for small $χ$ on TwoLinear, but does not find the shared optimum in polynomial time for large $χ$. 在本文中，我们展示了如何在两个随机变量 $X_1, X_2$ 的情况下使用漂移分析，当矩阵 $A$ 的漂移近似由 $A\cdot (X_1,X_2)^T$ 给出时。重要的情况是 $X_1$ 和 $X_2$ 阻碍彼此的进步，我们给出了这种情况的完整描述。作为应用程序，我们开发并分析了一个动态环境的最小示例 TwoLinear，该示例可能很困难。该环境由两个具有正权重 $1$ 和 $n$ 的线性函数 $f_1$ 和 $f_2$ 组成，并且在每一代中选择随机基于其中一个。它们仅在权重为 $1$ 和 $n$ 的头寸集合上有所不同。我们证明，突变率为 $χ/n$ 的 $(1+1)$-EA 对于 TwoLinear 上的小 $χ$ 是有效的，但对于大 $χ$ 却没有在多项式时间内找到共享最优值。 本文提出二维漂移分析方法，研究同时优化两个函数的难度，并通过TwoLinear动态环境验证该方法。 Duri Janett,Johannes Lengler cs.NE,math.PR

authors_text: Nazmul Karim,Mamshad Nayeem Rizve,Nazanin Rahnavard,Ajmal Mian,Mubarak Shah
title: UNICON: Combating Label Noise Through Uniform Selection and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: UNICON：通过统一选择和对比学习对抗标签噪声
comment: Accepted at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: Supervised deep learning methods require a large repository of annotated data; hence, label noise is inevitable. Training with such noisy data negatively impacts the generalization performance of deep neural networks. To combat label noise, recent state-of-the-art methods employ some sort of sample selection mechanism to select a possibly clean subset of data. Next, an off-the-shelf semi-supervised learning method is used for training where rejected samples are treated as unlabeled data. Our comprehensive analysis shows that current selection methods disproportionately select samples from easy (fast learnable) classes while rejecting those from relatively harder ones. This creates class imbalance in the selected clean set and in turn, deteriorates performance under high label noise. In this work, we propose UNICON, a simple yet effective sample selection method which is robust to high label noise. To address the disproportionate selection of easy and hard samples, we introduce a Jensen-Shannon divergence based uniform selection mechanism which does not require any probabilistic modeling and hyperparameter tuning. We complement our selection method with contrastive learning to further combat the memorization of noisy labels. Extensive experimentation on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrates the effectiveness of UNICON; we obtain an 11.4% improvement over the current state-of-the-art on CIFAR100 dataset with a 90% noise rate. Our code is publicly available
summary: Supervised deep learning methods require a large repository of annotated data; hence, label noise is inevitable. Training with such noisy data negatively impacts the generalization performance of deep neural networks. To combat label noise, recent state-of-the-art methods employ some sort of sample selection mechanism to select a possibly clean subset of data. Next, an off-the-shelf semi-supervised learning method is used for training where rejected samples are treated as unlabeled data. Our comprehensive analysis shows that current selection methods disproportionately select samples from easy (fast learnable) classes while rejecting those from relatively harder ones. This creates class imbalance in the selected clean set and in turn, deteriorates performance under high label noise. In this work, we propose UNICON, a simple yet effective sample selection method which is robust to high label noise. To address the disproportionate selection of easy and hard samples, we introduce a Jensen-Shannon divergence based uniform selection mechanism which does not require any probabilistic modeling and hyperparameter tuning. We complement our selection method with contrastive learning to further combat the memorization of noisy labels. Extensive experimentation on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrates the effectiveness of UNICON; we obtain an 11.4% improvement over the current state-of-the-art on CIFAR100 dataset with a 90% noise rate. Our code is publicly available
abstract_zh: 有监督的深度学习方法需要大量带注释的数据存储库；因此，标签噪音是不可避免的。使用此类噪声数据进行训练会对深度神经网络的泛化性能产生负面影响。为了对抗标签噪声，最近最先进的方法采用某种样本选择机制来选择可能干净的数据子集。接下来，使用现成的半监督学习方法进行训练，其中拒绝的样本被视为未标记的数据。我们的综合分析表明，当前的选择方法不成比例地从简单（可快速学习）的类别中选择样本，同时拒绝相对较难的类别中的样本。这会在选定的干净集中造成类别不平衡，进而降低高标签噪声下的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了 UNICON，这是一种简单而有效的样本选择方法，对高标签噪声具有鲁棒性。为了解决简单样本和困难样本选择不成比例的问题，我们引入了基于 Jensen-Shannon 散度的统一选择机制，该机制不需要任何概率建模和超参数调整。我们通过对比学习来补充我们的选择方法，以进一步对抗噪声标签的记忆。对多个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了 UNICON 的有效性；与当前最先进的 CIFAR100 数据集相比，我们在 90% 的噪声率下获得了 11.4% 的改进。我们的代码是公开的

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UNICON的方法，通过均匀选择和对比学习来应对标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 监督深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，但标签噪声不可避免。现有的样本选择方法倾向于选择容易学习的类别，导致类别不平衡，从而影响模型性能。
AI.method: UNICON引入了一种基于Jensen-Shannon散度的均匀选择机制，无需概率建模和超参数调整，并结合对比学习以减少对噪声标签的记忆。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，UNICON在CIFAR100数据集上实现了11.4%的性能提升，噪声率为90%。
AI.conclusion: UNICON是一种简单而有效的样本选择方法，能够有效应对高标签噪声问题，并且在多个数据集上表现优异。

search_text: UNICON: Combating Label Noise Through Uniform Selection and Contrastive Learning UNICON：通过统一选择和对比学习对抗标签噪声 Supervised deep learning methods require a large repository of annotated data; hence, label noise is inevitable. Training with such noisy data negatively impacts the generalization performance of deep neural networks. To combat label noise, recent state-of-the-art methods employ some sort of sample selection mechanism to select a possibly clean subset of data. Next, an off-the-shelf semi-supervised learning method is used for training where rejected samples are treated as unlabeled data. Our comprehensive analysis shows that current selection methods disproportionately select samples from easy (fast learnable) classes while rejecting those from relatively harder ones. This creates class imbalance in the selected clean set and in turn, deteriorates performance under high label noise. In this work, we propose UNICON, a simple yet effective sample selection method which is robust to high label noise. To address the disproportionate selection of easy and hard samples, we introduce a Jensen-Shannon divergence based uniform selection mechanism which does not require any probabilistic modeling and hyperparameter tuning. We complement our selection method with contrastive learning to further combat the memorization of noisy labels. Extensive experimentation on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrates the effectiveness of UNICON; we obtain an 11.4% improvement over the current state-of-the-art on CIFAR100 dataset with a 90% noise rate. authors_text: Paolo Ferragina,Travis Gagie,Dominik Köppl,Giovanni Manzini,Gonzalo Navarro,Manuel Striani,Francesco Tosoni
title: Improving Matrix-vector Multiplication via Lossless Grammar-Compressed Matrices
title_zh: 通过无损语法压缩矩阵改进矩阵向量乘法
abstract: As nowadays Machine Learning (ML) techniques are generating huge data collections, the problem of how to efficiently engineer their storage and operations is becoming of paramount importance. In this article we propose a new lossless compression scheme for real-valued matrices which achieves efficient performance in terms of compression ratio and time for linear-algebra operations. Experiments show that, as a compressor, our tool is clearly superior to gzip and it is usually within 20% of xz in terms of compression ratio. In addition, our compressed format supports matrix-vector multiplications in time and space proportional to the size of the compressed representation, unlike gzip and xz that require the full decompression of the compressed matrix. To our knowledge our lossless compressor is the first one achieving time and space complexities which match the theoretical limit expressed by the $k$-th order statistical entropy of the input. To achieve further time/space reductions, we propose column-reordering algorithms hinging on a novel column-similarity score. Our experiments on various data sets of ML matrices show that, with a modest preprocessing time, our column reordering can yield a further reduction of up to 16% in the peak memory usage during matrix-vector multiplication. Finally, we compare our proposal against the state-of-the-art Compressed Linear Algebra (CLA) approach showing that ours runs always at least twice faster (in a multi-thread setting) and achieves better compressed space occupancy for most of the tested data sets. This experimentally confirms the provably effective theoretical bounds we show for our compressed-matrix approach.
summary: As nowadays Machine Learning (ML) techniques are generating huge data collections, the problem of how to efficiently engineer their storage and operations is becoming of paramount importance. In this article we propose a new lossless compression scheme for real-valued matrices which achieves efficient performance in terms of compression ratio and time for linear-algebra operations. Experiments show that, as a compressor, our tool is clearly superior to gzip and it is usually within 20% of xz in terms of compression ratio. In addition, our compressed format supports matrix-vector multiplications in time and space proportional to the size of the compressed representation, unlike gzip and xz that require the full decompression of the compressed matrix. To our knowledge our lossless compressor is the first one achieving time and space complexities which match the theoretical limit expressed by the $k$-th order statistical entropy of the input. To achieve further time/space reductions, we propose column-reordering algorithms hinging on a novel column-similarity score. Our experiments on various data sets of ML matrices show that, with a modest preprocessing time, our column reordering can yield a further reduction of up to 16% in the peak memory usage during matrix-vector multiplication. Finally, we compare our proposal against the state-of-the-art Compressed Linear Algebra (CLA) approach showing that ours runs always at least twice faster (in a multi-thread setting) and achieves better compressed space occupancy for most of the tested data sets. This experimentally confirms the provably effective theoretical bounds we show for our compressed-matrix approach.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器学习 (ML) 技术正在生成大量数据集合，如何有效地设计其存储和操作的问题变得至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的实值矩阵无损压缩方案，该方案在线性代数运算的压缩比和时间方面实现了高效的性能。实验表明，作为压缩器，我们的工具明显优于 gzip，并且在压缩比方面通常在 xz 的 20% 以内。此外，我们的压缩格式支持与压缩表示的大小成比例的时间和空间上的矩阵向量乘法，这与需要对压缩矩阵进行完全解压缩的 gzip 和 xz 不同。据我们所知，我们的无损压缩器是第一个实现时间和空间复杂性的压缩器，其与输入的 $k$ 阶统计熵表示的理论极限相匹配。为了进一步减少时间/空间，我们提出了基于新颖的列相似性分数的列重新排序算法。我们对 ML 矩阵的各种数据集进行的实验表明，在适当的预处理时间下，我们的列重新排序可以使矩阵向量乘法期间的峰值内存使用量进一步减少高达 16%。最后，我们将我们的建议与最先进的压缩线性代数（CLA）方法进行比较，结果表明我们的运行速度总是至少快两倍（在多线程设置中），并且对于大多数测试数据集实现了更好的压缩空间占用。这通过实验证实了我们为压缩矩阵方法展示的可证明有效的理论界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无损语法压缩矩阵方法，用于提升矩阵-向量乘法的效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习数据规模的扩大，传统压缩方法（如gzip/xz）在存储和运算效率上存在不足，无法直接支持压缩矩阵的高效运算。
AI.method: 基于k阶统计熵理论设计无损压缩方案，并引入列相似性评分的列重排算法，实现压缩表示下的矩阵运算。
AI.result: 压缩比优于gzip，接近xz；矩阵运算时间与压缩数据规模成正比，内存峰值降低16%；多线程下比CLA快2倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论最优复杂度下实现了存储与计算效率的突破，为大规模机器学习运算提供了新解决方案。

Our experiments on various data sets of ML matrices show that, with a modest preprocessing time, our column reordering can yield a further reduction of up to 16% in the peak memory usage during matrix-vector multiplication. Finally, we compare our proposal against the state-of-the-art Compressed Linear Algebra (CLA) approach showing that ours runs always at least twice faster (in a multi-thread setting) and achieves better compressed space occupancy for most of the tested data sets. This experimentally confirms the provably effective theoretical bounds we show for our compressed-matrix approach. 如今，机器学习 (ML) 技术正在生成大量数据集合，如何有效地设计其存储和操作的问题变得至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的实值矩阵无损压缩方案，该方案在线性代数运算的压缩比和时间方面实现了高效的性能。实验表明，作为压缩器，我们的工具明显优于 gzip，并且在压缩比方面通常在 xz 的 20% 以内。此外，我们的压缩格式支持与压缩表示的大小成比例的时间和空间上的矩阵向量乘法，这与需要对压缩矩阵进行完全解压缩的 gzip 和 xz 不同。据我们所知，我们的无损压缩器是第一个实现时间和空间复杂性的压缩器，其与输入的 $k$ 阶统计熵表示的理论极限相匹配。为了进一步减少时间/空间，我们提出了基于新颖的列相似性分数的列重新排序算法。我们对 ML 矩阵的各种数据集进行的实验表明，在适当的预处理时间下，我们的列重新排序可以使矩阵向量乘法期间的峰值内存使用量进一步减少高达 16%。最后，我们将我们的建议与最先进的压缩线性代数（CLA）方法进行比较，结果表明我们的运行速度总是至少快两倍（在多线程设置中），并且对于大多数测试数据集实现了更好的压缩空间占用。这通过实验证实了我们为压缩矩阵方法展示的可证明有效的理论界限。 本文提出了一种无损语法压缩矩阵方法，用于提升矩阵-向量乘法的效率。 Paolo Ferragina,Travis Gagie,Dominik Köppl,Giovanni Manzini,Gonzalo Navarro,Manuel Striani,Francesco Tosoni cs.DS

authors_text: Chong Hyun Lee,Kibae Lee
title: Semi-supervised anomaly detection algorithm based on KL divergence (SAD-KL)
title_zh: 基于KL散度的半监督异常检测算法（SAD-KL）
abstract: The unlabeled data are generally assumed to be normal data in detecting abnormal data via semisupervised learning. This assumption, however, causes inevitable detection error when distribution of unlabeled data is different from distribution of labeled normal dataset. To deal the problem caused by distribution gap between labeled and unlabeled data, we propose a semi-supervised anomaly detection algorithm using KL divergence (SAD-KL). The proposed SAD-KL is composed of two steps: (1) estimating KL divergence of probability density functions (PDFs) of the local outlier factors (LOFs) of the labeled normal data and the unlabeled data (2) estimating detection probability and threshold for detecting normal data in unlabeled data by using the KL divergence. We show that the PDFs of the LOFs follow Burr distribution and use them for detection. Once the threshold is computed, the SAD-KL runs iteratively until the labeling change rate is lower than the predefined threshold. Experiments results show that the SAD-KL shows superior detection probability over the existing algorithms even though it takes less learning time.
summary: The unlabeled data are generally assumed to be normal data in detecting abnormal data via semisupervised learning. This assumption, however, causes inevitable detection error when distribution of unlabeled data is different from distribution of labeled normal dataset. To deal the problem caused by distribution gap between labeled and unlabeled data, we propose a semi-supervised anomaly detection algorithm using KL divergence (SAD-KL). The proposed SAD-KL is composed of two steps: (1) estimating KL divergence of probability density functions (PDFs) of the local outlier factors (LOFs) of the labeled normal data and the unlabeled data (2) estimating detection probability and threshold for detecting normal data in unlabeled data by using the KL divergence. We show that the PDFs of the LOFs follow Burr distribution and use them for detection. Once the threshold is computed, the SAD-KL runs iteratively until the labeling change rate is lower than the predefined threshold. Experiments results show that the SAD-KL shows superior detection probability over the existing algorithms even though it takes less learning time.
abstract_zh: 在通过半监督学习检测异常数据时，通常将未标记的数据假设为正常数据。然而，当未标记数据的分布与标记正态数据集的分布不同时，这种假设会导致不可避免的检测错误。为了解决标记数据和未标记数据之间的分布差距引起的问题，我们提出了一种使用 KL 散度的半监督异常检测算法（SAD-KL）。所提出的SAD-KL由两个步骤组成：（1）估计标记正常数据和未标记数据的局部离群因子（LOF）的概率密度函数（PDF）的KL散度（2）利用KL散度估计未标记数据中检测正常数据的检测概率和阈值。我们证明 LOF 的 PDF 遵循 Burr 分布并使用它们进行检测。一旦计算出阈值，SAD-KL就会迭代运行，直到标签变化率低于预定义的阈值。实验结果表明，尽管 SAD-KL 需要更少的学习时间，但其检测概率优于现有算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于KL散度的半监督异常检测算法（SAD-KL），解决未标记数据分布与标记正常数据分布差异导致的检测误差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统半监督异常检测假设未标记数据均为正常数据，但实际中二者分布差异会导致检测误差，需改进算法以适应分布不一致场景。
AI.method: SAD-KL分两步：1）计算标记正常数据与未标记数据局部离群因子（LOFs）的概率密度函数（PDFs）的KL散度；2）利用KL散度估计检测概率与阈值，并通过迭代优化直至标签变化率低于预设阈值。假设LOFs的PDF符合Burr分布进行建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，SAD-KL在检测概率上优于现有算法，且学习时间更短。
AI.conclusion: SAD-KL通过KL散度有效缓解了分布差异问题，提升了半监督异常检测的性能与效率。

authors_text: Junyong Lee,Myeonghee Lee,Sunghyun Cho,Seungyong Lee
title: Reference-based Video Super-Resolution Using Multi-Camera Video Triplets
title_zh: 使用多摄像机视频三元组的基于参考的视频超分辨率
abstract: We propose the first reference-based video super-resolution (RefVSR) approach that utilizes reference videos for high-fidelity results. We focus on RefVSR in a triple-camera setting, where we aim at super-resolving a low-resolution ultra-wide video utilizing wide-angle and telephoto videos. We introduce the first RefVSR network that recurrently aligns and propagates temporal reference features fused with features extracted from low-resolution frames. To facilitate the fusion and propagation of temporal reference features, we propose a propagative temporal fusion module. For learning and evaluation of our network, we present the first RefVSR dataset consisting of triplets of ultra-wide, wide-angle, and telephoto videos concurrently taken from triple cameras of a smartphone. We also propose a two-stage training strategy fully utilizing video triplets in the proposed dataset for real-world 4x video super-resolution. We extensively evaluate our method, and the result shows the state-of-the-art performance in 4x super-resolution.
summary: We propose the first reference-based video super-resolution (RefVSR) approach that utilizes reference videos for high-fidelity results. We focus on RefVSR in a triple-camera setting, where we aim at super-resolving a low-resolution ultra-wide video utilizing wide-angle and telephoto videos. We introduce the first RefVSR network that recurrently aligns and propagates temporal reference features fused with features extracted from low-resolution frames. To facilitate the fusion and propagation of temporal reference features, we propose a propagative temporal fusion module. For learning and evaluation of our network, we present the first RefVSR dataset consisting of triplets of ultra-wide, wide-angle, and telephoto videos concurrently taken from triple cameras of a smartphone. We also propose a two-stage training strategy fully utilizing video triplets in the proposed dataset for real-world 4x video super-resolution. We extensively evaluate our method, and the result shows the state-of-the-art performance in 4x super-resolution.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个基于参考的视频超分辨率（RefVSR）方法，该方法利用参考视频来获得高保真结果。我们专注于三摄像头设置中的 RefVSR，目标是利用广角和长焦视频实现低分辨率超宽视频的超分辨率。我们引入了第一个 RefVSR 网络，它循环对齐和传播与从低分辨率帧提取的特征融合的时间参考特征。为了促进时间参考特征的融合和传播，我们提出了一种传播时间融合模块。为了学习和评估我们的网络，我们提出了第一个 RefVSR 数据集，其中包含从智能手机的三摄像头同时拍摄的超广角、广角和长焦视频的三元组。我们还提出了一种两阶段训练策略，充分利用所提出的数据集中的视频三元组来实现现实世界的 4 倍视频超分辨率。我们广泛评估了我们的方法，结果显示了 4 倍超分辨率下最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考视频的多摄像头视频超分辨率方法，利用超广角、广角和望远镜视频三元组实现低分辨率视频的高保真超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法难以有效利用多摄像头参考视频信息，而实际场景中多角度视频可提供更丰富的时空信息以提升超分辨率效果。
AI.method: 设计了首个递归对齐并传播时序参考特征的RefVSR网络，提出传播式时序融合模块，并构建包含三摄像头同步视频的RefVSR数据集，采用两阶段训练策略进行4倍超分辨率学习。
AI.result: 在4倍超分辨率任务中达到SOTA性能，实验表明方法在保持细节和运动一致性方面优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过多摄像头参考视频的时空特征融合与传播，结合定制化数据集和训练策略，有效提升了视频超分辨率质量，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shaopeng Fu,Fengxiang He,Yang Liu,Li Shen,Dacheng Tao
title: Robust Unlearnable Examples: Protecting Data Against Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 鲁棒的不可学习示例：保护数据免受对抗性学习的影响
comment: In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2022
comments: In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2022
abstract: The tremendous amount of accessible data in cyberspace face the risk of being unauthorized used for training deep learning models. To address this concern, methods are proposed to make data unlearnable for deep learning models by adding a type of error-minimizing noise. However, such conferred unlearnability is found fragile to adversarial training. In this paper, we design new methods to generate robust unlearnable examples that are protected from adversarial training. We first find that the vanilla error-minimizing noise, which suppresses the informative knowledge of data via minimizing the corresponding training loss, could not effectively minimize the adversarial training loss. This explains the vulnerability of error-minimizing noise in adversarial training. Based on the observation, robust error-minimizing noise is then introduced to reduce the adversarial training loss. Experiments show that the unlearnability brought by robust error-minimizing noise can effectively protect data from adversarial training in various scenarios. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/fshp971/robust-unlearnable-examples}.
summary: The tremendous amount of accessible data in cyberspace face the risk of being unauthorized used for training deep learning models. To address this concern, methods are proposed to make data unlearnable for deep learning models by adding a type of error-minimizing noise. However, such conferred unlearnability is found fragile to adversarial training. In this paper, we design new methods to generate robust unlearnable examples that are protected from adversarial training. We first find that the vanilla error-minimizing noise, which suppresses the informative knowledge of data via minimizing the corresponding training loss, could not effectively minimize the adversarial training loss. This explains the vulnerability of error-minimizing noise in adversarial training. Based on the observation, robust error-minimizing noise is then introduced to reduce the adversarial training loss. Experiments show that the unlearnability brought by robust error-minimizing noise can effectively protect data from adversarial training in various scenarios. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/fshp971/robust-unlearnable-examples}.
abstract_zh: 网络空间中大量可访问的数据面临着未经授权用于训练深度学习模型的风险。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了一些方法，通过添加一种误差最小化噪声来使数据无法被深度学习模型学习。然而，这种赋予的不可学习性对于对抗性训练来说是脆弱的。在本文中，我们设计了新方法来生成鲁棒的不可学习的示例，这些示例不受对抗性训练的影响。我们首先发现，普通的误差最小化噪声通过最小化相应的训练损失来抑制数据的信息知识，但不能有效地最小化对抗性训练损失。这解释了对抗性训练中误差最小化噪声的脆弱性。根据观察结果，引入鲁棒的误差最小化噪声来减少对抗性训练损失。实验表明，鲁棒误差最小化噪声带来的不可学习性可以有效保护数据免受各种场景下的对抗性训练。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/fshp971/robust-unlearnable-examples} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成鲁棒不可学习示例的方法，以保护数据免受对抗性训练的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有通过添加误差最小化噪声使数据不可学习的方法在对抗性训练下表现脆弱，需提升数据保护的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒误差最小化噪声，通过降低对抗性训练损失来增强数据不可学习性。
AI.result: 实验表明，鲁棒误差最小化噪声能有效保护数据免受多种场景下的对抗性训练攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过改进噪声生成策略，显著提升了数据在对抗性学习环境中的安全性。

authors_text: Xiaoke Jiang,Donghai Li,Hao Chen,Ye Zheng,Rui Zhao,Liwei Wu
title: Uni6D: A Unified CNN Framework without Projection Breakdown for 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: Uni6D：用于 6D 姿态估计的无投影分解的统一 CNN 框架
abstract: As RGB-D sensors become more affordable, using RGB-D images to obtain high-accuracy 6D pose estimation results becomes a better option. State-of-the-art approaches typically use different backbones to extract features for RGB and depth images. They use a 2D CNN for RGB images and a per-pixel point cloud network for depth data, as well as a fusion network for feature fusion. We find that the essential reason for using two independent backbones is the "projection breakdown" problem. In the depth image plane, the projected 3D structure of the physical world is preserved by the 1D depth value and its built-in 2D pixel coordinate (UV). Any spatial transformation that modifies UV, such as resize, flip, crop, or pooling operations in the CNN pipeline, breaks the binding between the pixel value and UV coordinate. As a consequence, the 3D structure is no longer preserved by a modified depth image or feature. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method denoted as Uni6D that explicitly takes the extra UV data along with RGB-D images as input. Our method has a Unified CNN framework for 6D pose estimation with a single CNN backbone. In particular, the architecture of our method is based on Mask R-CNN with two extra heads, one named RT head for directly predicting 6D pose and the other named abc head for guiding the network to map the visible points to their coordinates in the 3D model as an auxiliary module. This end-to-end approach balances simplicity and accuracy, achieving comparable accuracy with state of the arts and 7.2x faster inference speed on the YCB-Video dataset.
summary: As RGB-D sensors become more affordable, using RGB-D images to obtain high-accuracy 6D pose estimation results becomes a better option. State-of-the-art approaches typically use different backbones to extract features for RGB and depth images. They use a 2D CNN for RGB images and a per-pixel point cloud network for depth data, as well as a fusion network for feature fusion. We find that the essential reason for using two independent backbones is the "projection breakdown" problem. In the depth image plane, the projected 3D structure of the physical world is preserved by the 1D depth value and its built-in 2D pixel coordinate (UV). Any spatial transformation that modifies UV, such as resize, flip, crop, or pooling operations in the CNN pipeline, breaks the binding between the pixel value and UV coordinate. As a consequence, the 3D structure is no longer preserved by a modified depth image or feature. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method denoted as Uni6D that explicitly takes the extra UV data along with RGB-D images as input. Our method has a Unified CNN framework for 6D pose estimation with a single CNN backbone. In particular, the architecture of our method is based on Mask R-CNN with two extra heads, one named RT head for directly predicting 6D pose and the other named abc head for guiding the network to map the visible points to their coordinates in the 3D model as an auxiliary module. This end-to-end approach balances simplicity and accuracy, achieving comparable accuracy with state of the arts and 7.2x faster inference speed on the YCB-Video dataset.
abstract_zh: 随着 RGB-D 传感器变得越来越便宜，使用 RGB-D 图像获得高精度 6D 位姿估计结果成为更好的选择。最先进的方法通常使用不同的主干来提取 RGB 和深度图像的特征。他们使用 2D CNN 处理 RGB 图像，使用每像素点云网络处理深度数据，以及使用融合网络进行特征融合。我们发现使用两个独立主干的本质原因是“投影击穿”问题。在深度图像平面中，物理世界的投影 3D 结构由 1D 深度值及其内置 2D 像素坐标 (UV) 保存。任何修改 UV 的空间变换（例如 CNN 管道中的调整大小、翻转、裁剪或池化操作）都会破坏像素值和 UV 坐标之间的绑定。因此，修改后的深度图像或特征不再保留 3D 结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 Uni6D，它明确地将额外的 UV 数据和 RGB-D 图像作为输入。我们的方法有一个统一的 CNN 框架，用于使用单个 CNN 主干进行 6D 姿态估计。特别是，我们的方法的架构基于 Mask R-CNN，具有两个额外的头，一个名为 RT head，用于直接预测 6D 姿势，另一个名为 abc head，用于引导网络将可见点映射到 3D 模型中的坐标，作为辅助模块。这种端到端方法平衡了简单性和准确性，在 YCB-Video 数据集上实现了与最先进技术相当的准确性和 7.2 倍的推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Uni6D的统一CNN框架，用于解决6D姿态估计中的投影分解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因深度图像的'投影分解'问题需使用独立的RGB和深度图像处理网络，导致结构复杂且效率低下。
AI.method: 通过将UV坐标数据与RGB-D图像结合输入单一CNN主干网络，基于Mask R-CNN架构扩展两个头部（RT头直接预测6D姿态，abc头辅助映射3D坐标）。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video数据集上达到与现有方法相当的精度，推理速度提升7.2倍。
AI.conclusion: Uni6D通过整合UV信息和统一网络结构有效解决了投影分解问题，在保持精度的同时显著提升了效率。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Doostmohammadian,Maria Vrakopoulou,Alireza Aghasi,Themistoklis Charalambous
title: Distributed Finite-Sum Constrained Optimization subject to Nonlinearity on the Node Dynamics
title_zh: 节点动力学非线性的分布式有限和约束优化
abstract: Motivated by recent development in networking and parallel data-processing, we consider a distributed and localized finite-sum (or fixed-sum) allocation technique to solve resource-constrained convex optimization problems over multi-agent networks (MANs). Such networks include (smart) agents representing an intelligent entity capable of communication, processing, and decision-making. In particular, we consider problems subject to practical nonlinear constraints on the dynamics of the agents in terms of their communications and actuation capabilities (referred to as the node dynamics), e.g., networks of mobile robots subject to actuator saturation and quantized communication. The considered distributed sum-preserving optimization solution further enables adding purposeful nonlinear constraints, for example, sign-based nonlinearities, to reach convergence in predefined-time or robust to impulsive noise and disturbances in faulty environments. Moreover, convergence can be achieved under minimal network connectivity requirements among the agents; thus, the solution is applicable over dynamic networks where the channels come and go due to the agent's mobility and limited range. This paper discusses how various nonlinearity constraints on the optimization problem (e.g., collaborative allocation of resources) can be addressed for different applications via a distributed setup (over a network).
summary: Motivated by recent development in networking and parallel data-processing, we consider a distributed and localized finite-sum (or fixed-sum) allocation technique to solve resource-constrained convex optimization problems over multi-agent networks (MANs). Such networks include (smart) agents representing an intelligent entity capable of communication, processing, and decision-making. In particular, we consider problems subject to practical nonlinear constraints on the dynamics of the agents in terms of their communications and actuation capabilities (referred to as the node dynamics), e.g., networks of mobile robots subject to actuator saturation and quantized communication. The considered distributed sum-preserving optimization solution further enables adding purposeful nonlinear constraints, for example, sign-based nonlinearities, to reach convergence in predefined-time or robust to impulsive noise and disturbances in faulty environments. Moreover, convergence can be achieved under minimal network connectivity requirements among the agents; thus, the solution is applicable over dynamic networks where the channels come and go due to the agent's mobility and limited range. This paper discusses how various nonlinearity constraints on the optimization problem (e.g., collaborative allocation of resources) can be addressed for different applications via a distributed setup (over a network).
abstract_zh: 受网络和并行数据处理最新发展的推动，我们考虑采用分布式和局部有限和（或固定和）分配技术来解决多代理网络（MAN）上的资源受限凸优化问题。这样的网络包括代表能够通信、处理和决策的智能实体的（智能）代理。特别是，我们考虑在代理的通信和驱动能力（称为节点动态）方面的动力学受到实际非线性约束的问题，例如，受执行器饱和和量化通信影响的移动机器人网络。所考虑的分布式保和优化解决方案还能够添加有目的的非线性约束，例如基于符号的非线性，以在预定时间内达到收敛或对故障环境中的脉冲噪声和干扰具有鲁棒性。此外，可以在代理之间最小的网络连接要求下实现收敛；因此，该解决方案适用于动态网络，其中由于代理的移动性和有限范围而导致信道来来去去。本文讨论了如何通过分布式设置（通过网络）为不同的应用程序解决优化问题（例如资源的协作分配）的各种非线性约束。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多智能体网络中，如何通过分布式有限和约束优化方法解决具有节点动态非线性约束的凸优化问题。
AI.motivation: 受网络和并行数据处理发展的推动，需要解决多智能体网络中因通信和执行能力限制（如移动机器人饱和执行器和量化通信）导致的非线性约束优化问题，并确保在动态网络环境下实现收敛。
AI.method: 提出一种分布式和局部有限和分配技术，通过引入目的性非线性约束（如符号非线性）实现预定义时间收敛，并在最小网络连通性要求下适应动态网络变化。
AI.result: 该方法能够在节点动态非线性约束下实现收敛，适用于存在突发噪声、干扰及动态连接的网络环境，例如移动机器人资源分配场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的分布式优化方法有效解决了多智能体网络中的非线性约束问题，为动态网络环境下的资源分配提供了鲁棒解决方案。

search_text: Distributed Finite-Sum Constrained Optimization subject to Nonlinearity on the Node Dynamics 节点动力学非线性的分布式有限和约束优化 Motivated by recent development in networking and parallel data-processing, we consider a distributed and localized finite-sum (or fixed-sum) allocation technique to solve resource-constrained convex optimization problems over multi-agent networks (MANs). Such networks include (smart) agents representing an intelligent entity capable of communication, processing, and decision-making. In particular, we consider problems subject to practical nonlinear constraints on the dynamics of the agents in terms of their communications and actuation capabilities (referred to as the node dynamics), e.g., networks of mobile robots subject to actuator saturation and quantized communication. The considered distributed sum-preserving optimization solution further enables adding purposeful nonlinear constraints, for example, sign-based nonlinearities, to reach convergence in predefined-time or robust to impulsive noise and disturbances in faulty environments. Moreover, convergence can be achieved under minimal network connectivity requirements among the agents; thus, the solution is applicable over dynamic networks where the channels come and go due to the agent's mobility and limited range. This paper discusses how various nonlinearity constraints on the optimization problem (e.g., collaborative allocation of resources) can be addressed for different applications via a distributed setup (over a network). 受网络和并行数据处理最新发展的推动，我们考虑采用分布式和局部有限和（或固定和）分配技术来解决多代理网络（MAN）上的资源受限凸优化问题。这样的网络包括代表能够通信、处理和决策的智能实体的（智能）代理。特别是，我们考虑在代理的通信和驱动能力（称为节点动态）方面的动力学受到实际非线性约束的问题，例如，受执行器饱和和量化通信影响的移动机器人网络。所考虑的分布式保和优化解决方案还能够添加有目的的非线性约束，例如基于符号的非线性，以在预定时间内达到收敛或对故障环境中的脉冲噪声和干扰具有鲁棒性。此外，可以在代理之间最小的网络连接要求下实现收敛；因此，该解决方案适用于动态网络，其中由于代理的移动性和有限范围而导致信道来来去去。本文讨论了如何通过分布式设置（通过网络）为不同的应用程序解决优化问题（例如资源的协作分配）的各种非线性约束。 本文研究了在多智能体网络中，如何通过分布式有限和约束优化方法解决具有节点动态非线性约束的凸优化问题。 Mohammadreza Doostmohammadian,Maria Vrakopoulou,Alireza Aghasi,Themistoklis Charalambous eess.SY,cs.AI,math.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Yuyuan Liu,Yu Tian,Chong Wang,Yuanhong Chen,Fengbei Liu,Vasileios Belagiannis,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Translation Consistent Semi-supervised Segmentation for 3D Medical Images
title_zh: 3D 医学图像的平移一致半监督分割
abstract: 3D medical image segmentation methods have been successful, but their dependence on large amounts of voxel-level annotated data is a disadvantage that needs to be addressed given the high cost to obtain such annotation. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) solve this issue by training models with a large unlabelled and a small labelled dataset. The most successful SSL approaches are based on consistency learning that minimises the distance between model responses obtained from perturbed views of the unlabelled data. These perturbations usually keep the spatial input context between views fairly consistent, which may cause the model to learn segmentation patterns from the spatial input contexts instead of the segmented objects. In this paper, we introduce the Translation Consistent Co-training (TraCoCo) which is a consistency learning SSL method that perturbs the input data views by varying their spatial input context, allowing the model to learn segmentation patterns from visual objects. Furthermore, we propose the replacement of the commonly used mean squared error (MSE) semi-supervised loss by a new Cross-model confident Binary Cross entropy (CBC) loss, which improves training convergence and keeps the robustness to co-training pseudo-labelling mistakes. We also extend CutMix augmentation to 3D SSL to further improve generalisation. Our TraCoCo shows state-of-the-art results for the Left Atrium (LA) and Brain Tumor Segmentation (BRaTS19) datasets with different backbones. Our code is available at https://github.com/yyliu01/TraCoCo.
summary: 3D medical image segmentation methods have been successful, but their dependence on large amounts of voxel-level annotated data is a disadvantage that needs to be addressed given the high cost to obtain such annotation. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) solve this issue by training models with a large unlabelled and a small labelled dataset. The most successful SSL approaches are based on consistency learning that minimises the distance between model responses obtained from perturbed views of the unlabelled data. These perturbations usually keep the spatial input context between views fairly consistent, which may cause the model to learn segmentation patterns from the spatial input contexts instead of the segmented objects. In this paper, we introduce the Translation Consistent Co-training (TraCoCo) which is a consistency learning SSL method that perturbs the input data views by varying their spatial input context, allowing the model to learn segmentation patterns from visual objects. Furthermore, we propose the replacement of the commonly used mean squared error (MSE) semi-supervised loss by a new Cross-model confident Binary Cross entropy (CBC) loss, which improves training convergence and keeps the robustness to co-training pseudo-labelling mistakes. We also extend CutMix augmentation to 3D SSL to further improve generalisation. Our TraCoCo shows state-of-the-art results for the Left Atrium (LA) and Brain Tumor Segmentation (BRaTS19) datasets with different backbones. Our code is available at https://github.com/yyliu01/TraCoCo.
abstract_zh: 3D 医学图像分割方法已经取得了成功，但它们对大量体素级注释数据的依赖是一个缺点，考虑到获得此类注释的成本很高，需要解决这一缺点。半监督学习（SSL）通过使用大型未标记数据集和小型标记数据集训练模型来解决此问题。最成功的 SSL 方法基于一致性学习，该学习可以最小化从未标记数据的扰动视图获得的模型响应之间的距离。这些扰动通常使视图之间的空间输入上下文相当一致，这可能导致模型从空间输入上下文而不是分割对象中学习分割模式。在本文中，我们介绍了翻译一致性协同训练（TraCoCo），这是一种一致性学习 SSL 方法，它通过改变输入数据视图的空间输入上下文来扰乱输入数据视图，从而允许模型从视觉对象中学习分割模式。此外，我们建议用新的跨模型置信二元交叉熵（CBC）损失替换常用的均方误差（MSE）半监督损失，这提高了训练收敛性并保持了对协同训练伪标签错误的鲁棒性。我们还将 CutMix 增强扩展到 3D SSL，以进一步提高泛化能力。我们的 TraCoCo 显示了具有不同主干的左心房 (LA) 和脑肿瘤分割 (BRaTS19) 数据集的最新结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yyliu01/TraCoCo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TraCoCo的半监督学习方法，用于改进3D医学图像分割，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 3D医学图像分割方法依赖大量标注数据，而获取这些数据成本高昂。现有半监督学习方法可能因空间上下文一致性导致模型学习错误分割模式。
AI.method: 引入Translation Consistent Co-training（TraCoCo）方法，通过改变输入视图的空间上下文进行扰动，并采用新的Cross-model confident Binary Cross entropy（CBC）损失函数及3D CutMix增强。
AI.result: 在Left Atrium（LA）和Brain Tumor Segmentation（BRaTS19）数据集上，TraCoCo在不同网络结构下均达到最先进的分割效果。
AI.conclusion: TraCoCo通过空间上下文扰动和改进损失函数，有效提升了半监督分割的性能，为减少标注数据需求提供了新思路。

search_text: Translation Consistent Semi-supervised Segmentation for 3D Medical Images 3D 医学图像的平移一致半监督分割 3D medical image segmentation methods have been successful, but their dependence on large amounts of voxel-level annotated data is a disadvantage that needs to be addressed given the high cost to obtain such annotation. These perturbations usually keep the spatial input context between views fairly consistent, which may cause the model to learn segmentation patterns from the spatial input contexts instead of the segmented objects. In this paper, we introduce the Translation Consistent Co-training (TraCoCo) which is a consistency learning SSL method that perturbs the input data views by varying their spatial input context, allowing the model to learn segmentation patterns from visual objects. Furthermore, we propose the replacement of the commonly used mean squared error (MSE) semi-supervised loss by a new Cross-model confident Binary Cross entropy (CBC) loss, which improves training convergence and keeps the robustness to co-training pseudo-labelling mistakes. We also extend CutMix augmentation to 3D SSL to further improve generalisation. Our TraCoCo shows state-of-the-art results for the Left Atrium (LA) and Brain Tumor Segmentation (BRaTS19) datasets with different backbones. authors_text: Zi Jian Yew,Gim Hee Lee
title: REGTR: End-to-end Point Cloud Correspondences with Transformers
title_zh: REGTR：与 Transformer 的端到端点云对应
abstract: Despite recent success in incorporating learning into point cloud registration, many works focus on learning feature descriptors and continue to rely on nearest-neighbor feature matching and outlier filtering through RANSAC to obtain the final set of correspondences for pose estimation. In this work, we conjecture that attention mechanisms can replace the role of explicit feature matching and RANSAC, and thus propose an end-to-end framework to directly predict the final set of correspondences. We use a network architecture consisting primarily of transformer layers containing self and cross attentions, and train it to predict the probability each point lies in the overlapping region and its corresponding position in the other point cloud. The required rigid transformation can then be estimated directly from the predicted correspondences without further post-processing. Despite its simplicity, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3DMatch and ModelNet benchmarks. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/yewzijian/RegTR .
summary: Despite recent success in incorporating learning into point cloud registration, many works focus on learning feature descriptors and continue to rely on nearest-neighbor feature matching and outlier filtering through RANSAC to obtain the final set of correspondences for pose estimation. In this work, we conjecture that attention mechanisms can replace the role of explicit feature matching and RANSAC, and thus propose an end-to-end framework to directly predict the final set of correspondences. We use a network architecture consisting primarily of transformer layers containing self and cross attentions, and train it to predict the probability each point lies in the overlapping region and its corresponding position in the other point cloud. The required rigid transformation can then be estimated directly from the predicted correspondences without further post-processing. Despite its simplicity, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3DMatch and ModelNet benchmarks. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/yewzijian/RegTR .
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在将学习融入点云配准方面取得了成功，但许多工作都专注于学习特征描述符，并继续依靠最近邻特征匹配和通过 RANSAC 进行离群值过滤来获得用于姿态估计的最终对应集。在这项工作中，我们推测注意力机制可以取代显式特征匹配和RANSAC的作用，从而提出一个端到端的框架来直接预测最终的对应集。我们使用主要由包含自注意力和交叉注意力的变换器层组成的网络架构，并训练它来预测每个点位于重叠区域的概率及其在另一个点云中的相应位置。然后可以直接根据预测的对应关系估计所需的刚性变换，而无需进一步的后处理。尽管很简单，我们的方法在 3DMatch 和 ModelNet 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/yewzijian/RegTR 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端点云配准方法REGTR，用于直接预测点云之间的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究在点云配准中引入了学习机制，但多数工作仍依赖于显式的特征匹配和RANSAC进行异常值过滤，这限制了性能和效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的网络架构，主要包含自注意力和交叉注意力层，用于预测每个点在重叠区域的概率及其在另一点云中的对应位置，从而直接估计刚性变换。
AI.result: 该方法在3DMatch和ModelNet基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: REGTR通过利用Transformer机制直接预测点云对应关系，避免了传统方法中的显式特征匹配和RANSAC步骤，取得了优异的配准效果。
