search_text: REGTR: End-to-end Point Cloud Correspondences with Transformers REGTR：与 Transformer 的端到端点云对应 Despite recent success in incorporating learning into point cloud registration, many works focus on learning feature descriptors and continue to rely on nearest-neighbor feature matching and outlier filtering through RANSAC to obtain the final set of correspondences for pose estimation. In this work, we conjecture that attention mechanisms can replace the role of explicit feature matching and RANSAC, and thus propose an end-to-end framework to directly predict the final set of correspondences. We use a network architecture consisting primarily of transformer layers containing self and cross attentions, and train it to predict the probability each point lies in the overlapping region and its corresponding position in the other point cloud. The required rigid transformation can then be estimated directly from the predicted correspondences without further post-processing. Despite its simplicity, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3DMatch and ModelNet benchmarks. Our source code can be found at https://github.com/yewzijian/RegTR . 尽管最近在将学习融入点云配准方面取得了成功，但许多工作都专注于学习特征描述符，并继续依靠最近邻特征匹配和通过 RANSAC 进行离群值过滤来获得用于姿态估计的最终对应集。在这项工作中，我们推测注意力机制可以取代显式特征匹配和RANSAC的作用，从而提出一个端到端的框架来直接预测最终的对应集。我们使用主要由包含自注意力和交叉注意力的变换器层组成的网络架构，并训练它来预测每个点位于重叠区域的概率及其在另一个点云中的相应位置。然后可以直接根据预测的对应关系估计所需的刚性变换，而无需进一步的后处理。尽管很简单，我们的方法在 3DMatch 和 ModelNet 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。我们的源代码可以在 https://github.com/yewzijian/RegTR 找到。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端点云配准方法REGTR，用于直接预测点云之间的对应关系。 Zi Jian Yew,Gim Hee Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Trevine Oorloff,Yaser Yacoob
title: Expressive Talking Head Video Encoding in StyleGAN2 Latent-Space
title_zh: StyleGAN2 潜在空间中的富有表现力的头部视频编码
comment: The project page is located at https://trevineoorloff.github.io/ExpressiveFaceVideoEncoding.io/
comments: The project page is located at https://trevineoorloff.github.io/ExpressiveFaceVideoEncoding.io/
abstract: While the recent advances in research on video reenactment have yielded promising results, the approaches fall short in capturing the fine, detailed, and expressive facial features (e.g., lip-pressing, mouth puckering, mouth gaping, and wrinkles) which are crucial in generating realistic animated face videos. To this end, we propose an end-to-end expressive face video encoding approach that facilitates data-efficient high-quality video re-synthesis by optimizing low-dimensional edits of a single Identity-latent. The approach builds on StyleGAN2 image inversion and multi-stage non-linear latent-space editing to generate videos that are nearly comparable to input videos. While existing StyleGAN latent-based editing techniques focus on simply generating plausible edits of static images, we automate the latent-space editing to capture the fine expressive facial deformations in a sequence of frames using an encoding that resides in the Style-latent-space (StyleSpace) of StyleGAN2. The encoding thus obtained could be super-imposed on a single Identity-latent to facilitate re-enactment of face videos at $1024^2$. The proposed framework economically captures face identity, head-pose, and complex expressive facial motions at fine levels, and thereby bypasses training, person modeling, dependence on landmarks/ keypoints, and low-resolution synthesis which tend to hamper most re-enactment approaches. The approach is designed with maximum data efficiency, where a single $W+$ latent and 35 parameters per frame enable high-fidelity video rendering. This pipeline can also be used for puppeteering (i.e., motion transfer).
summary: While the recent advances in research on video reenactment have yielded promising results, the approaches fall short in capturing the fine, detailed, and expressive facial features (e.g., lip-pressing, mouth puckering, mouth gaping, and wrinkles) which are crucial in generating realistic animated face videos. To this end, we propose an end-to-end expressive face video encoding approach that facilitates data-efficient high-quality video re-synthesis by optimizing low-dimensional edits of a single Identity-latent. The approach builds on StyleGAN2 image inversion and multi-stage non-linear latent-space editing to generate videos that are nearly comparable to input videos. While existing StyleGAN latent-based editing techniques focus on simply generating plausible edits of static images, we automate the latent-space editing to capture the fine expressive facial deformations in a sequence of frames using an encoding that resides in the Style-latent-space (StyleSpace) of StyleGAN2. The encoding thus obtained could be super-imposed on a single Identity-latent to facilitate re-enactment of face videos at $1024^2$. The proposed framework economically captures face identity, head-pose, and complex expressive facial motions at fine levels, and thereby bypasses training, person modeling, dependence on landmarks/ keypoints, and low-resolution synthesis which tend to hamper most re-enactment approaches. The approach is designed with maximum data efficiency, where a single $W+$ latent and 35 parameters per frame enable high-fidelity video rendering. This pipeline can also be used for puppeteering (i.e., motion transfer).
abstract_zh: 虽然视频重现研究的最新进展已经取得了有希望的结果，但这些方法在捕捉精细、细节和富有表现力的面部特征（例如，压唇、皱嘴、张嘴和皱纹）方面还不够，而这些特征对于生成逼真的动画面部视频至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种端到端的表达性人脸视频编码方法，通过优化单个潜在身份的低维编辑，促进数据高效的高质量视频重新合成。该方法建立在 StyleGAN2 图像反转和多阶段非线性潜在空间编辑的基础上，生成几乎与输入视频相当的视频。虽然现有的 StyleGAN 基于潜在的编辑技术侧重于简单地生成静态图像的合理编辑，但我们使用驻留在 StyleGAN2 的样式潜在空间 (StyleSpace) 中的编码来自动化潜在空间编辑，以捕获帧序列中精细的富有表现力的面部变形。由此获得的编码可以叠加在单个 Identity-latent 上，以方便以 1024^2$ 的价格重新制定面部视频。所提出的框架经济地捕捉精细水平的面部身份、头部姿势和复杂的表情面部运动，从而绕过训练、人物建模、对地标/关键点的依赖以及低分辨率合成，这些往往会阻碍大多数重演方法。该方法的设计具有最高的数据效率，其中单个 $W+$ 潜在参数和每帧 35 个参数可实现高保真视频渲染。该管道还可用于木偶操纵（即运动传输）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN2潜在空间的端到端表达性人脸视频编码方法，通过优化低维身份潜在向量实现高质量视频重合成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频重演方法难以捕捉唇部压力、皱纹等精细面部特征，且依赖训练数据、关键点检测和低分辨率合成，限制了生成效果。
AI.method: 结合StyleGAN2图像反转与多阶段非线性潜在空间编辑，在StyleSpace中编码帧序列的细微表情变化，通过单个身份潜在向量叠加实现1024²分辨率视频生成。
AI.result: 在无需训练、关键点检测和低分辨率合成的情况下，使用单个W+潜在向量和每帧35参数实现与输入视频近似的高保真表情视频重演。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以数据高效方式同时捕捉面部身份、姿态和复杂表情运动，为高保真视频重演和动作迁移提供了新范式。

authors_text: Mingwu Zheng,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang,Liming Chen
title: ImFace: A Nonlinear 3D Morphable Face Model with Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: ImFace：具有隐式神经表示的非线性 3D 可变形脸部模型
abstract: Precise representations of 3D faces are beneficial to various computer vision and graphics applications. Due to the data discretization and model linearity, however, it remains challenging to capture accurate identity and expression clues in current studies. This paper presents a novel 3D morphable face model, namely ImFace, to learn a nonlinear and continuous space with implicit neural representations. It builds two explicitly disentangled deformation fields to model complex shapes associated with identities and expressions, respectively, and designs an improved learning strategy to extend embeddings of expressions to allow more diverse changes. We further introduce a Neural Blend-Field to learn sophisticated details by adaptively blending a series of local fields. In addition to ImFace, an effective preprocessing pipeline is proposed to address the issue of watertight input requirement in implicit representations, enabling them to work with common facial surfaces for the first time. Extensive experiments are performed to demonstrate the superiority of ImFace.
summary: Precise representations of 3D faces are beneficial to various computer vision and graphics applications. Due to the data discretization and model linearity, however, it remains challenging to capture accurate identity and expression clues in current studies. This paper presents a novel 3D morphable face model, namely ImFace, to learn a nonlinear and continuous space with implicit neural representations. It builds two explicitly disentangled deformation fields to model complex shapes associated with identities and expressions, respectively, and designs an improved learning strategy to extend embeddings of expressions to allow more diverse changes. We further introduce a Neural Blend-Field to learn sophisticated details by adaptively blending a series of local fields. In addition to ImFace, an effective preprocessing pipeline is proposed to address the issue of watertight input requirement in implicit representations, enabling them to work with common facial surfaces for the first time. Extensive experiments are performed to demonstrate the superiority of ImFace.
abstract_zh: 3D 人脸的精确表示有利于各种计算机视觉和图形应用。然而，由于数据离散化和模型线性，在当前研究中捕获准确的身份和表达线索仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 可变形人脸模型，即 ImFace，用于学习具有隐式神经表示的非线性连续空间。它构建了两个明确解开的变形场来分别建模与身份和表达式相关的复杂形状，并设计了一种改进的学习策略来扩展表达式的嵌入以允许更多样化的变化。我们进一步引入神经混合场，通过自适应地混合一系列局部场来学习复杂的细节。除了 ImFace 之外，还提出了一种有效的预处理管道来解决隐式表示中的无懈可击的输入要求问题，使它们首次能够处理常见的面部表面。进行了大量的实验来证明 ImFace 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImFace模型，通过隐式神经表示学习非线性连续空间，以更精确地捕捉3D人脸的身份和表情信息。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸模型因数据离散化和线性限制，难以准确建模复杂身份特征与表情变化，需更灵活的连续表示方法。
AI.method: 构建身份-表情解耦变形场，改进表情嵌入扩展策略，设计神经混合场融合局部细节，并提出封闭表面预处理流程。
AI.result: 实验验证ImFace在细节精度、表情多样性及常见面部表面处理上优于现有方法，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ImFace通过隐式神经表示与解耦建模显著提升了3D人脸建模的精度与灵活性，为相关应用提供新思路。

It builds two explicitly disentangled deformation fields to model complex shapes associated with identities and expressions, respectively, and designs an improved learning strategy to extend embeddings of expressions to allow more diverse changes. We further introduce a Neural Blend-Field to learn sophisticated details by adaptively blending a series of local fields. In addition to ImFace, an effective preprocessing pipeline is proposed to address the issue of watertight input requirement in implicit representations, enabling them to work with common facial surfaces for the first time. Extensive experiments are performed to demonstrate the superiority of ImFace. 3D 人脸的精确表示有利于各种计算机视觉和图形应用。然而，由于数据离散化和模型线性，在当前研究中捕获准确的身份和表达线索仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 可变形人脸模型，即 ImFace，用于学习具有隐式神经表示的非线性连续空间。它构建了两个明确解开的变形场来分别建模与身份和表达式相关的复杂形状，并设计了一种改进的学习策略来扩展表达式的嵌入以允许更多样化的变化。我们进一步引入神经混合场，通过自适应地混合一系列局部场来学习复杂的细节。除了 ImFace 之外，还提出了一种有效的预处理管道来解决隐式表示中的无懈可击的输入要求问题，使它们首次能够处理常见的面部表面。进行了大量的实验来证明 ImFace 的优越性。 本文提出ImFace模型，通过隐式神经表示学习非线性连续空间，以更精确地捕捉3D人脸的身份和表情信息。 Mingwu Zheng,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang,Liming Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Changlin Li,Bohan Zhuang,Guangrun Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang,Yi Yang
title: Automated Progressive Learning for Efficient Training of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 自动渐进式学习可有效训练视觉变压器
abstract: Recent advances in vision Transformers (ViTs) have come with a voracious appetite for computing power, high-lighting the urgent need to develop efficient training methods for ViTs. Progressive learning, a training scheme where the model capacity grows progressively during training, has started showing its ability in efficient training. In this paper, we take a practical step towards efficient training of ViTs by customizing and automating progressive learning. First, we develop a strong manual baseline for progressive learning of ViTs, by introducing momentum growth (MoGrow) to bridge the gap brought by model growth. Then, we propose automated progressive learning (AutoProg), an efficient training scheme that aims to achieve lossless acceleration by automatically increasing the training overload on-the-fly; this is achieved by adaptively deciding whether, where and how much should the model grow during progressive learning. Specifically, we first relax the optimization of the growth schedule to sub-network architecture optimization problem, then propose one-shot estimation of the sub-network performance via an elastic supernet. The searching overhead is reduced to minimal by recycling the parameters of the supernet. Extensive experiments of efficient training on ImageNet with two representative ViT models, DeiT and VOLO, demonstrate that AutoProg can accelerate ViTs training by up to 85.1% with no performance drop. Code: https://github.com/changlin31/AutoProg
summary: Recent advances in vision Transformers (ViTs) have come with a voracious appetite for computing power, high-lighting the urgent need to develop efficient training methods for ViTs. Progressive learning, a training scheme where the model capacity grows progressively during training, has started showing its ability in efficient training. In this paper, we take a practical step towards efficient training of ViTs by customizing and automating progressive learning. First, we develop a strong manual baseline for progressive learning of ViTs, by introducing momentum growth (MoGrow) to bridge the gap brought by model growth. Then, we propose automated progressive learning (AutoProg), an efficient training scheme that aims to achieve lossless acceleration by automatically increasing the training overload on-the-fly; this is achieved by adaptively deciding whether, where and how much should the model grow during progressive learning. Specifically, we first relax the optimization of the growth schedule to sub-network architecture optimization problem, then propose one-shot estimation of the sub-network performance via an elastic supernet. The searching overhead is reduced to minimal by recycling the parameters of the supernet. Extensive experiments of efficient training on ImageNet with two representative ViT models, DeiT and VOLO, demonstrate that AutoProg can accelerate ViTs training by up to 85.1% with no performance drop. Code: https://github.com/changlin31/AutoProg
abstract_zh: 视觉变形金刚 (ViT) 的最新进展带来了对计算能力的巨大需求，凸显了开发有效的 ViT 训练方法的迫切需要。渐进式学习是一种模型能力在训练过程中逐步增长的训练方案，已经开始展现出其高效训练的能力。在本文中，我们通过定制和自动化渐进式学习，朝着高效训练 ViT 迈出了实际的一步。首先，我们通过引入动量增长（MoGrow）来弥合模型增长带来的差距，为 ViT 的渐进式学习制定强大的手动基线。然后，我们提出了自动渐进学习（AutoProg），这是一种高效的训练方案，旨在通过自动增加动态训练过载来实现无损加速；这是通过自适应地决定模型在渐进式学习过程中是否应该增长、在哪里增长以及增长多少来实现的。具体来说，我们首先将增长时间表的优化放宽到子网架构优化问题，然后提出通过弹性超网对子网性能进行一次性估计。通过回收超网的参数，将搜索开销降至最低。使用 DeiT 和 VOLO 两种代表性 ViT 模型在 ImageNet 上进行高效训练的大量实验表明，AutoProg 可以将 ViT 训练加速高达 85.1%，且性能不会下降。代码：https://github.com/changlin31/AutoProg

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动渐进学习方法（AutoProg），用于高效训练视觉Transformer（ViT），通过动态调整模型容量和训练负载实现加速。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer（ViT）的训练需要大量计算资源，而渐进学习虽能提高效率但需人工设计，缺乏自动化方案。
AI.method: 引入动量增长（MoGrow）缓解模型扩展间隙问题，并设计AutoProg框架，通过弹性超网络实现子网络性能估计，自动决策模型扩展时机与幅度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，使用DeiT和VOLO模型验证AutoProg可加速训练达85.1%，且无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: AutoProg通过自动化渐进学习有效提升了ViT训练效率，为大规模模型训练提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Xin Lai,Jianhui Liu,Li Jiang,Liwei Wang,Hengshuang Zhao,Shu Liu,Xiaojuan Qi,Jiaya Jia
title: Stratified Transformer for 3D Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 点云分割的分层变压器
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code is avaiable at https://github.com/dvlab-research/Stratified-Transformer
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code is avaiable at https://github.com/dvlab-research/Stratified-Transformer
abstract: 3D point cloud segmentation has made tremendous progress in recent years. Most current methods focus on aggregating local features, but fail to directly model long-range dependencies. In this paper, we propose Stratified Transformer that is able to capture long-range contexts and demonstrates strong generalization ability and high performance. Specifically, we first put forward a novel key sampling strategy. For each query point, we sample nearby points densely and distant points sparsely as its keys in a stratified way, which enables the model to enlarge the effective receptive field and enjoy long-range contexts at a low computational cost. Also, to combat the challenges posed by irregular point arrangements, we propose first-layer point embedding to aggregate local information, which facilitates convergence and boosts performance. Besides, we adopt contextual relative position encoding to adaptively capture position information. Finally, a memory-efficient implementation is introduced to overcome the issue of varying point numbers in each window. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our method on S3DIS, ScanNetv2 and ShapeNetPart datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/Stratified-Transformer.
summary: 3D point cloud segmentation has made tremendous progress in recent years. Most current methods focus on aggregating local features, but fail to directly model long-range dependencies. In this paper, we propose Stratified Transformer that is able to capture long-range contexts and demonstrates strong generalization ability and high performance. Specifically, we first put forward a novel key sampling strategy. For each query point, we sample nearby points densely and distant points sparsely as its keys in a stratified way, which enables the model to enlarge the effective receptive field and enjoy long-range contexts at a low computational cost. Also, to combat the challenges posed by irregular point arrangements, we propose first-layer point embedding to aggregate local information, which facilitates convergence and boosts performance. Besides, we adopt contextual relative position encoding to adaptively capture position information. Finally, a memory-efficient implementation is introduced to overcome the issue of varying point numbers in each window. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our method on S3DIS, ScanNetv2 and ShapeNetPart datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/dvlab-research/Stratified-Transformer.
abstract_zh: 近年来，3D 点云分割取得了巨大进展。当前大多数方法都专注于聚合局部特征，但无法直接对远程依赖关系进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了分层变压器，它能够捕获远程上下文并表现出强大的泛化能力和高性能。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新颖的关键采样策略。对于每个查询点，我们以分层的方式密集采样附近的点和稀疏的远处点作为其键，这使得模型能够扩大有效感受野并以较低的计算成本享受远程上下文。此外，为了应对不规则点排列带来的挑战，我们提出第一层点嵌入来聚合局部信息，从而促进收敛并提高性能。此外，我们采用上下文相对位置编码来自适应捕获位置信息。最后，引入了一种内存高效的实现来克服每个窗口中点数不同的问题。大量实验证明了我们的方法在 S3DIS、ScanNetv2 和 ShapeNetPart 数据集上的有效性和优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/dvlab-research/Stratified-Transformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层Transformer模型，用于解决3D点云分割中长距离依赖建模不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在聚合局部特征时难以直接建模长距离依赖，导致泛化能力不足和性能局限。
AI.method: 提出分层键采样策略（密集采样近点、稀疏采样远点）、第一层点嵌入以聚合局部信息、上下文相对位置编码及内存高效实现。
AI.result: 在S3DIS、ScanNetv2和ShapeNetPart数据集上验证了方法的有效性，实验结果优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 分层Transformer通过高效建模长距离上下文和局部信息，显著提升了3D点云分割的性能与泛化能力。

authors_text: Choubo Ding,Guansong Pang,Chunhua Shen
title: Catching Both Gray and Black Swans: Open-set Supervised Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 抓住灰天鹅和黑天鹅：开放集监督异常检测
abstract: Despite most existing anomaly detection studies assume the availability of normal training samples only, a few labeled anomaly examples are often available in many real-world applications, such as defect samples identified during random quality inspection, lesion images confirmed by radiologists in daily medical screening, etc. These anomaly examples provide valuable knowledge about the application-specific abnormality, enabling significantly improved detection of similar anomalies in some recent models. However, those anomalies seen during training often do not illustrate every possible class of anomaly, rendering these models ineffective in generalizing to unseen anomaly classes. This paper tackles open-set supervised anomaly detection, in which we learn detection models using the anomaly examples with the objective to detect both seen anomalies (`gray swans') and unseen anomalies (`black swans'). We propose a novel approach that learns disentangled representations of abnormalities illustrated by seen anomalies, pseudo anomalies, and latent residual anomalies (i.e., samples that have unusual residuals compared to the normal data in a latent space), with the last two abnormalities designed to detect unseen anomalies. Extensive experiments on nine real-world anomaly detection datasets show superior performance of our model in detecting seen and unseen anomalies under diverse settings. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/choubo/DRA.
summary: Despite most existing anomaly detection studies assume the availability of normal training samples only, a few labeled anomaly examples are often available in many real-world applications, such as defect samples identified during random quality inspection, lesion images confirmed by radiologists in daily medical screening, etc. These anomaly examples provide valuable knowledge about the application-specific abnormality, enabling significantly improved detection of similar anomalies in some recent models. However, those anomalies seen during training often do not illustrate every possible class of anomaly, rendering these models ineffective in generalizing to unseen anomaly classes. This paper tackles open-set supervised anomaly detection, in which we learn detection models using the anomaly examples with the objective to detect both seen anomalies (`gray swans') and unseen anomalies (`black swans'). We propose a novel approach that learns disentangled representations of abnormalities illustrated by seen anomalies, pseudo anomalies, and latent residual anomalies (i.e., samples that have unusual residuals compared to the normal data in a latent space), with the last two abnormalities designed to detect unseen anomalies. Extensive experiments on nine real-world anomaly detection datasets show superior performance of our model in detecting seen and unseen anomalies under diverse settings. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/choubo/DRA.
abstract_zh: 尽管大多数现有的异常检测研究都假设仅提供正常训练样本，但在许多实际应用中通常可以使用一些标记的异常示例，例如随机质量检查期间识别的缺陷样本、放射科医生在日常医疗筛查中确认的病变图像等。这些异常示例提供了有关特定于应用程序的异常的宝贵知识，从而能够显着改进一些最新模型中类似异常的检测。然而，在训练过程中看到的这些异常通常并不能说明所有可能的异常类别，从而使这些模型无法有效地推广到未见过的异常​​类别。本文解决了开放集监督异常检测问题，其中我们使用异常示例学习检测模型，其目标是检测可见的异常（“灰天鹅”）和不可见的异常（“黑天鹅”）。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法学习由可见异常、伪异常和潜在残留异常（即与潜在空间中的正常数据相比具有不寻常残差的样本）说明的异常的解开表示，最后两个异常旨在检测未见的异常。对九个现实世界异常检测数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的模型在不同设置下检测可见和未见异常方面具有卓越的性能。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/choubo/DRA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种开放集监督异常检测方法，旨在同时检测已知异常（灰天鹅）和未知异常（黑天鹅）。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法通常仅使用正常样本训练，但实际应用中常有部分标记的异常样本。这些样本虽能提升对同类异常的检测能力，却无法覆盖所有可能的异常类别，导致模型难以泛化到新类别异常。
AI.method: 通过学习分离表示：利用已知异常样本、伪异常样本及潜在残差异常（潜空间中与正常数据差异显著的样本）的表征，其中后两类用于检测未知异常。
AI.result: 在九个真实世界异常检测数据集上的实验表明，该模型在多种设置下均能有效检测已知和未知异常。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦表征学习，有效解决了开放集异常检测中对未知异常类别的泛化问题，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Catching Both Gray and Black Swans: Open-set Supervised Anomaly Detection 抓住灰天鹅和黑天鹅：开放集监督异常检测 Despite most existing anomaly detection studies assume the availability of normal training samples only, a few labeled anomaly examples are often available in many real-world applications, such as defect samples identified during random quality inspection, lesion images confirmed by radiologists in daily medical screening, etc. These anomaly examples provide valuable knowledge about the application-specific abnormality, enabling significantly improved detection of similar anomalies in some recent models. However, those anomalies seen during training often do not illustrate every possible class of anomaly, rendering these models ineffective in generalizing to unseen anomaly classes. This paper tackles open-set supervised anomaly detection, in which we learn detection models using the anomaly examples with the objective to detect both seen anomalies (`gray swans') and unseen anomalies (`black swans'). We propose a novel approach that learns disentangled representations of abnormalities illustrated by seen anomalies, pseudo anomalies, and latent residual anomalies (i.e., samples that have unusual residuals compared to the normal data in a latent space), with the last two abnormalities designed to detect unseen anomalies. Extensive experiments on nine real-world anomaly detection datasets show superior performance of our model in detecting seen and unseen anomalies under diverse settings. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/choubo/DRA. 尽管大多数现有的异常检测研究都假设仅提供正常训练样本，但在许多实际应用中通常可以使用一些标记的异常示例，例如随机质量检查期间识别的缺陷样本、放射科医生在日常医疗筛查中确认的病变图像等。这些异常示例提供了有关特定于应用程序的异常的宝贵知识，从而能够显着改进一些最新模型中类似异常的检测。然而，在训练过程中看到的这些异常通常并不能说明所有可能的异常类别，从而使这些模型无法有效地推广到未见过的异常​​类别。本文解决了开放集监督异常检测问题，其中我们使用异常示例学习检测模型，其目标是检测可见的异常（“灰天鹅”）和不可见的异常（“黑天鹅”）。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法学习由可见异常、伪异常和潜在残留异常（即与潜在空间中的正常数据相比具有不寻常残差的样本）说明的异常的解开表示，最后两个异常旨在检测未见的异常。对九个现实世界异常检测数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的模型在不同设置下检测可见和未见异常方面具有卓越的性能。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/choubo/DRA。 本文提出一种开放集监督异常检测方法，旨在同时检测已知异常（灰天鹅）和未知异常（黑天鹅）。 Choubo Ding,Guansong Pang,Chunhua Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Duc Minh Vo,Hong Chen,Akihiro Sugimoto,Hideki Nakayama
title: NOC-REK: Novel Object Captioning with Retrieved Vocabulary from External Knowledge
title_zh: NOC-REK：从外部知识检索词汇的新颖对象描述
abstract: Novel object captioning aims at describing objects absent from training data, with the key ingredient being the provision of object vocabulary to the model. Although existing methods heavily rely on an object detection model, we view the detection step as vocabulary retrieval from an external knowledge in the form of embeddings for any object's definition from Wiktionary, where we use in the retrieval image region features learned from a transformers model. We propose an end-to-end Novel Object Captioning with Retrieved vocabulary from External Knowledge method (NOC-REK), which simultaneously learns vocabulary retrieval and caption generation, successfully describing novel objects outside of the training dataset. Furthermore, our model eliminates the requirement for model retraining by simply updating the external knowledge whenever a novel object appears. Our comprehensive experiments on held-out COCO and Nocaps datasets show that our NOC-REK is considerably effective against SOTAs.
summary: Novel object captioning aims at describing objects absent from training data, with the key ingredient being the provision of object vocabulary to the model. Although existing methods heavily rely on an object detection model, we view the detection step as vocabulary retrieval from an external knowledge in the form of embeddings for any object's definition from Wiktionary, where we use in the retrieval image region features learned from a transformers model. We propose an end-to-end Novel Object Captioning with Retrieved vocabulary from External Knowledge method (NOC-REK), which simultaneously learns vocabulary retrieval and caption generation, successfully describing novel objects outside of the training dataset. Furthermore, our model eliminates the requirement for model retraining by simply updating the external knowledge whenever a novel object appears. Our comprehensive experiments on held-out COCO and Nocaps datasets show that our NOC-REK is considerably effective against SOTAs.
abstract_zh: 新颖的对象描述旨在描述训练数据中缺少的对象，其关键要素是为模型提供对象词汇。尽管现有方法严重依赖于对象检测模型，但我们将检测步骤视为从外部知识进行词汇检索，其形式为维基词典中任何对象定义的嵌入形式，其中我们在检索图像区域中使用从 Transformer 模型学习的特征。我们提出了一种从外部知识中检索词汇的端到端新颖对象字幕方法（NOC-REK），该方法同时学习词汇检索和字幕生成，成功地描述了训练数据集之外的新颖对象。此外，我们的模型通过在新对象出现时简单地更新外部知识来消除模型重新训练的要求。我们对 COCO 和 Nocaps 数据集的综合实验表明，我们的 NOC-REK 对 SOTA 相当有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于外部知识检索词汇的新型物体描述方法（NOC-REK），用于描述训练数据中未出现的物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖物体检测模型获取词汇，但需频繁重新训练模型。本文旨在通过外部知识库动态检索词汇，避免模型再训练。
AI.method: 利用Wiktionary嵌入的外部知识，结合图像区域特征（来自Transformer模型）检索词汇，并通过端到端框架联合学习词汇检索与描述生成。
AI.result: 在COCO和Nocaps数据集上的实验表明，NOC-REK在新型物体描述任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NOC-REK通过动态更新外部知识库而非模型再训练，为新型物体描述提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Weicheng Ma,Samiha Datta,Lili Wang,Soroush Vosoughi
title: EnCBP: A New Benchmark Dataset for Finer-Grained Cultural Background Prediction in English
title_zh: EnCBP：用于更细粒度英语文化背景预测的新基准数据集
abstract: While cultural backgrounds have been shown to affect linguistic expressions, existing natural language processing (NLP) research on culture modeling is overly coarse-grained and does not examine cultural differences among speakers of the same language. To address this problem and augment NLP models with cultural background features, we collect, annotate, manually validate, and benchmark EnCBP, a finer-grained news-based cultural background prediction dataset in English. Through language modeling (LM) evaluations and manual analyses, we confirm that there are noticeable differences in linguistic expressions among five English-speaking countries and across four states in the US. Additionally, our evaluations on nine syntactic (CoNLL-2003), semantic (PAWS-Wiki, QNLI, STS-B, and RTE), and psycholinguistic tasks (SST-5, SST-2, Emotion, and Go-Emotions) show that, while introducing cultural background information does not benefit the Go-Emotions task due to text domain conflicts, it noticeably improves deep learning (DL) model performance on other tasks. Our findings strongly support the importance of cultural background modeling to a wide variety of NLP tasks and demonstrate the applicability of EnCBP in culture-related research.
summary: While cultural backgrounds have been shown to affect linguistic expressions, existing natural language processing (NLP) research on culture modeling is overly coarse-grained and does not examine cultural differences among speakers of the same language. To address this problem and augment NLP models with cultural background features, we collect, annotate, manually validate, and benchmark EnCBP, a finer-grained news-based cultural background prediction dataset in English. Through language modeling (LM) evaluations and manual analyses, we confirm that there are noticeable differences in linguistic expressions among five English-speaking countries and across four states in the US. Additionally, our evaluations on nine syntactic (CoNLL-2003), semantic (PAWS-Wiki, QNLI, STS-B, and RTE), and psycholinguistic tasks (SST-5, SST-2, Emotion, and Go-Emotions) show that, while introducing cultural background information does not benefit the Go-Emotions task due to text domain conflicts, it noticeably improves deep learning (DL) model performance on other tasks. Our findings strongly support the importance of cultural background modeling to a wide variety of NLP tasks and demonstrate the applicability of EnCBP in culture-related research.
abstract_zh: 虽然文化背景已被证明会影响语言表达，但现有的关于文化建模的自然语言处理（NLP）研究过于粗粒度，并且没有考察同一语言使用者之间的文化差异。为了解决这个问题并用文化背景特征增强 NLP 模型，我们收集、注释、手动验证和基准测试 EnCBP，这是一个更细粒度的、基于新闻的英文文化背景预测数据集。通过语言模型（LM）评估和手动分析，我们确认五个英语国家和美国四个州之间的语言表达存在显着差异。此外，我们对九个句法（CoNLL-2003）、语义（PAWS-Wiki、QNLI、STS-B 和 RTE）和心理语言学任务（SST-5、SST-2、Emotion 和 Go-Emotions）的评估表明，虽然由于文本域冲突，引入文化背景信息并没有利于 Go-Emotions 任务，但它显着提高了深度学习（DL）模型在其他任务上的性能。我们的研究结果有力地支持了文化背景建模对各种 NLP 任务的重要性，并证明了 EnCBP 在文化相关研究中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EnCBP数据集，用于细粒度英语文化背景预测，通过分析不同英语国家及美国各州的语言表达差异，验证文化背景对NLP任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有NLP文化建模研究过于粗粒度，未关注同一语言使用者间的文化差异，限制了模型对文化因素的准确捕捉。
AI.method: 收集并标注新闻语料构建EnCBP数据集，通过语言模型评估与人工分析验证文化差异，并在九类任务（语法、语义、心理语言学）中测试文化背景信息对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现英语国家及美国各州存在显著语言表达差异，文化背景信息在除Go-Emotions外的其他任务中均提升深度学习模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 文化背景建模对多种NLP任务至关重要，EnCBP数据集为文化相关研究提供了有效基准，推动细粒度文化因素的探索。

search_text: EnCBP: A New Benchmark Dataset for Finer-Grained Cultural Background Prediction in English EnCBP：用于更细粒度英语文化背景预测的新基准数据集 While cultural backgrounds have been shown to affect linguistic expressions, existing natural language processing (NLP) research on culture modeling is overly coarse-grained and does not examine cultural differences among speakers of the same language. To address this problem and augment NLP models with cultural background features, we collect, annotate, manually validate, and benchmark EnCBP, a finer-grained news-based cultural background prediction dataset in English. Through language modeling (LM) evaluations and manual analyses, we confirm that there are noticeable differences in linguistic expressions among five English-speaking countries and across four states in the US. Additionally, our evaluations on nine syntactic (CoNLL-2003), semantic (PAWS-Wiki, QNLI, STS-B, and RTE), and psycholinguistic tasks (SST-5, SST-2, Emotion, and Go-Emotions) show that, while introducing cultural background information does not benefit the Go-Emotions task due to text domain conflicts, it noticeably improves deep learning (DL) model performance on other tasks. Our findings strongly support the importance of cultural background modeling to a wide variety of NLP tasks and demonstrate the applicability of EnCBP in culture-related research. 虽然文化背景已被证明会影响语言表达，但现有的关于文化建模的自然语言处理（NLP）研究过于粗粒度，并且没有考察同一语言使用者之间的文化差异。为了解决这个问题并用文化背景特征增强 NLP 模型，我们收集、注释、手动验证和基准测试 EnCBP，这是一个更细粒度的、基于新闻的英文文化背景预测数据集。通过语言模型（LM）评估和手动分析，我们确认五个英语国家和美国四个州之间的语言表达存在显着差异。此外，我们对九个句法（CoNLL-2003）、语义（PAWS-Wiki、QNLI、STS-B 和 RTE）和心理语言学任务（SST-5、SST-2、Emotion 和 Go-Emotions）的评估表明，虽然由于文本域冲突，引入文化背景信息并没有利于 Go-Emotions 任务，但它显着提高了深度学习（DL）模型在其他任务上的性能。我们的研究结果有力地支持了文化背景建模对各种 NLP 任务的重要性，并证明了 EnCBP 在文化相关研究中的适用性。 本文提出EnCBP数据集，用于细粒度英语文化背景预测，通过分析不同英语国家及美国各州的语言表达差异，验证文化背景对NLP任务的影响。 Weicheng Ma,Samiha Datta,Lili Wang,Soroush Vosoughi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hiroki Naganuma,Hideaki Iiduka
title: Conjugate Gradient Method for Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 生成对抗网络的共轭梯度法
abstract: One of the training strategies of generative models is to minimize the Jensen--Shannon divergence between the model distribution and the data distribution. Since data distribution is unknown, generative adversarial networks (GANs) formulate this problem as a game between two models, a generator and a discriminator. The training can be formulated in the context of game theory and the local Nash equilibrium (LNE). It does not seem feasible to derive guarantees of stability or optimality for the existing methods. This optimization problem is far more challenging than the single objective setting. Here, we use the conjugate gradient method to reliably and efficiently solve the LNE problem in GANs. We give a proof and convergence analysis under mild assumptions showing that the proposed method converges to a LNE with three different learning rate update rules, including a constant learning rate. Finally, we demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and momentum SGD in terms of best Frechet inception distance (FID) score and outperforms Adam on average. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Hiroki11x/ConjugateGradient_GAN}.
summary: One of the training strategies of generative models is to minimize the Jensen--Shannon divergence between the model distribution and the data distribution. Since data distribution is unknown, generative adversarial networks (GANs) formulate this problem as a game between two models, a generator and a discriminator. The training can be formulated in the context of game theory and the local Nash equilibrium (LNE). It does not seem feasible to derive guarantees of stability or optimality for the existing methods. This optimization problem is far more challenging than the single objective setting. Here, we use the conjugate gradient method to reliably and efficiently solve the LNE problem in GANs. We give a proof and convergence analysis under mild assumptions showing that the proposed method converges to a LNE with three different learning rate update rules, including a constant learning rate. Finally, we demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and momentum SGD in terms of best Frechet inception distance (FID) score and outperforms Adam on average. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Hiroki11x/ConjugateGradient_GAN}.
abstract_zh: 生成模型的训练策略之一是最小化模型分布和数据分布之间的 Jensen-Shannon 散度。由于数据分布未知，生成对抗网络（GAN）将此问题表述为两个模型（生成器和判别器）之间的博弈。训练可以在博弈论和局部纳什均衡（LNE）的背景下制定。为现有方法提供稳定性或最优性的保证似乎并不可行。这个优化问题比单一目标设置更具挑战性。在这里，我们使用共轭梯度方法来可靠且高效地解决 GAN 中的 LNE 问题。我们在温和的假设下给出了证明和收敛分析，表明所提出的方法收敛到具有三种不同学习率更新规则（包括恒定学习率）的 LNE。最后，我们证明所提出的方法在最佳 Frechet 起始距离 (FID) 得分方面优于随机梯度下降 (SGD) 和动量 SGD，并且平均优于 Adam。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Hiroki11x/ConjugateGradient_GAN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用共轭梯度法来解决生成对抗网络（GANs）中的局部纳什均衡（LNE）问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的GAN训练方法难以保证稳定性或最优性，因此需要一种更可靠且高效的优化方法。
AI.method: 本文采用共轭梯度法来求解GANs中的LNE问题，并在温和假设下提供了收敛性分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在最佳FID分数上优于随机梯度下降（SGD）和动量SGD，在平均表现上优于Adam。
AI.conclusion: 共轭梯度法在求解GANs的LNE问题上表现优异，具有更好的收敛性和性能。

authors_text: Jing Zhou,Changchun Bao
title: Multi-source wideband doa estimation method by frequency focusing and error weighting
title_zh: 基于频率聚焦和误差加权的多源宽带波达估计方法
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, this paper has been submitted to interspeech 2022, confirmation number: 445
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, this paper has been submitted to interspeech 2022, confirmation number: 445
abstract: In this paper, a new multi-source wideband direction of arrival (MSW-DOA) estimation method is proposed for the signal with non-uniform distribution using the sub-array of uniform linear array. Different from conventional methods, based on the free far-field model, the proposed method mainly makes two contributions. One is that the sub-array decomposition is adopted to improve the accuracy of MSW-DOA estimation by minimizing the weighted error, and the other one is that the frequency focusing procedure is optimized according to the presence probability of sound sources for reducing the influence of the sub-bands with low signal to noise ratio (SNR). Simulation results show that the proposed method can effectively improve the performance of wideband DOA estimation in the case of multiple sound sources.
summary: In this paper, a new multi-source wideband direction of arrival (MSW-DOA) estimation method is proposed for the signal with non-uniform distribution using the sub-array of uniform linear array. Different from conventional methods, based on the free far-field model, the proposed method mainly makes two contributions. One is that the sub-array decomposition is adopted to improve the accuracy of MSW-DOA estimation by minimizing the weighted error, and the other one is that the frequency focusing procedure is optimized according to the presence probability of sound sources for reducing the influence of the sub-bands with low signal to noise ratio (SNR). Simulation results show that the proposed method can effectively improve the performance of wideband DOA estimation in the case of multiple sound sources.
abstract_zh: 本文针对非均匀分布信号，利用均匀线阵子阵提出了一种新的多源宽带波达方向（MSW-DOA）估计方法。与传统方法不同，基于自由远场模型，该方法主要做出两个贡献。一是采用子阵分解，通过最小化加权误差来提高MSW-DOA估计的精度；二是根据声源存在概率优化频率聚焦过程，减少低信噪比子带的影响。仿真结果表明，该方法能够有效提高多声源情况下的宽带DOA估计性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于频率聚焦和误差加权的多源宽带DOA估计方法，以提高非均匀分布信号的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理多源宽带信号时存在精度不足及受低信噪比子带干扰的问题，需改进估计性能。
AI.method: 采用子阵分解最小化加权误差，并根据声源存在概率优化频率聚焦过程，降低低SNR子带影响。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法在多声源场景下有效提升了宽带DOA估计的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过双创新点有效解决了多源宽带信号定位难题，适用于复杂声学环境。

authors_text: Liangzu Peng,Manolis C. Tsakiris,René Vidal
title: ARCS: Accurate Rotation and Correspondence Search
title_zh: ARCS：精确旋转和对应搜索
abstract: This paper is about the old Wahba problem in its more general form, which we call "simultaneous rotation and correspondence search". In this generalization we need to find a rotation that best aligns two partially overlapping $3$D point sets, of sizes $m$ and $n$ respectively with $m\geq n$. We first propose a solver, $\texttt{ARCS}$, that i) assumes noiseless point sets in general position, ii) requires only $2$ inliers, iii) uses $O(m\log m)$ time and $O(m)$ space, and iv) can successfully solve the problem even with, e.g., $m,n\approx 10^6$ in about $0.1$ seconds. We next robustify $\texttt{ARCS}$ to noise, for which we approximately solve consensus maximization problems using ideas from robust subspace learning and interval stabbing. Thirdly, we refine the approximately found consensus set by a Riemannian subgradient descent approach over the space of unit quaternions, which we show converges globally to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point in $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ iterations, or locally to the ground-truth at a linear rate in the absence of noise. We combine these algorithms into $\texttt{ARCS+}$, to simultaneously search for rotations and correspondences. Experiments show that $\texttt{ARCS+}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets with more than $10^6$ points with a $10^4$ time-speedup over alternative methods. \url{https://github.com/liangzu/ARCS}
summary: This paper is about the old Wahba problem in its more general form, which we call "simultaneous rotation and correspondence search". In this generalization we need to find a rotation that best aligns two partially overlapping $3$D point sets, of sizes $m$ and $n$ respectively with $m\geq n$. We first propose a solver, $\texttt{ARCS}$, that i) assumes noiseless point sets in general position, ii) requires only $2$ inliers, iii) uses $O(m\log m)$ time and $O(m)$ space, and iv) can successfully solve the problem even with, e.g., $m,n\approx 10^6$ in about $0.1$ seconds. We next robustify $\texttt{ARCS}$ to noise, for which we approximately solve consensus maximization problems using ideas from robust subspace learning and interval stabbing. Thirdly, we refine the approximately found consensus set by a Riemannian subgradient descent approach over the space of unit quaternions, which we show converges globally to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point in $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ iterations, or locally to the ground-truth at a linear rate in the absence of noise. We combine these algorithms into $\texttt{ARCS+}$, to simultaneously search for rotations and correspondences. Experiments show that $\texttt{ARCS+}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets with more than $10^6$ points with a $10^4$ time-speedup over alternative methods. \url{https://github.com/liangzu/ARCS}
abstract_zh: 这篇论文是关于更一般形式的旧 Wahba 问题，我们称之为“同时旋转和对应搜索”。在这个概括中，我们需要找到一个旋转，最好地将两个部分重叠的 $3$D 点集对齐，大小分别为 $m$ 和 $n$ 与 $m\geq n$。我们首先提出一个求解器 $\texttt{ARCS}$，i) 假设一般位置无噪声点集，ii) 仅需要 $2$ 内点，iii) 使用 $O(m\log m)$ 时间和 $O(m)$ 空间，并且 iv) 即使使用 $m,n\approx 10^6$ 也能在大约 $0.1$ 秒内成功解决问题。接下来，我们将$\texttt{ARCS}$对噪声进行鲁棒化，为此我们使用鲁棒子空间学习和区间刺穿的思想来近似解决共识最大化问题。第三，我们通过黎曼次梯度下降方法在单位四元数空间上细化了近似找到的共识集，我们证明了该共识在 $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ 迭代中全局收敛到 $\varepsilon$ 驻点，或者在没有噪声的情况下以线性速率局部收敛到地面实况。我们将这些算法组合到$\texttt{ARCS+}$中，以同时搜索旋转和对应。实验表明，$\texttt{ARCS+}$ 在具有超过 $10^6$ 点的大型数据集上实现了最先进的性能，与替代方法相比，时间加速了 $10^4$。 \url{https://github.com/liangzu/ARCS}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ARCS的高效算法，用于解决大规模3D点集的旋转对齐与对应搜索问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Wahba问题在处理大规模点云数据时存在计算效率低、鲁棒性差的问题，尤其在噪声环境下难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 提出ARCS算法：1) 基于无噪声点集的通用位置假设；2) 仅需2个内点即可求解；3) 时间复杂度O(m log m)，空间复杂度O(m)；4) 结合鲁棒子空间学习与区间刺穿法处理噪声，并通过黎曼子梯度下降优化共识集。
AI.result: ARCS+在10^6级点云数据集上实现比现有方法快10^4倍的性能，达到当时最先进的对齐精度与效率。
AI.conclusion: ARCS+通过分阶段优化策略有效解决了大规模点云的旋转对齐问题，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

search_text: ARCS: Accurate Rotation and Correspondence Search ARCS：精确旋转和对应搜索 This paper is about the old Wahba problem in its more general form, which we call "simultaneous rotation and correspondence search". In this generalization we need to find a rotation that best aligns two partially overlapping $3$D point sets, of sizes $m$ and $n$ respectively with $m\geq n$. We first propose a solver, $\texttt{ARCS}$, that i) assumes noiseless point sets in general position, ii) requires only $2$ inliers, iii) uses $O(m\log m)$ time and $O(m)$ space, and iv) can successfully solve the problem even with, e.g., $m,n\approx 10^6$ in about $0.1$ seconds. We next robustify $\texttt{ARCS}$ to noise, for which we approximately solve consensus maximization problems using ideas from robust subspace learning and interval stabbing. Thirdly, we refine the approximately found consensus set by a Riemannian subgradient descent approach over the space of unit quaternions, which we show converges globally to an $\varepsilon$-stationary point in $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ iterations, or locally to the ground-truth at a linear rate in the absence of noise. We combine these algorithms into $\texttt{ARCS+}$, to simultaneously search for rotations and correspondences. Experiments show that $\texttt{ARCS+}$ achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale datasets with more than $10^6$ points with a $10^4$ time-speedup over alternative methods. \url{https://github.com/liangzu/ARCS} 这篇论文是关于更一般形式的旧 Wahba 问题，我们称之为“同时旋转和对应搜索”。在这个概括中，我们需要找到一个旋转，最好地将两个部分重叠的 $3$D 点集对齐，大小分别为 $m$ 和 $n$ 与 $m\geq n$。我们首先提出一个求解器 $\texttt{ARCS}$，i) 假设一般位置无噪声点集，ii) 仅需要 $2$ 内点，iii) 使用 $O(m\log m)$ 时间和 $O(m)$ 空间，并且 iv) 即使使用 $m,n\approx 10^6$ 也能在大约 $0.1$ 秒内成功解决问题。接下来，我们将$\texttt{ARCS}$对噪声进行鲁棒化，为此我们使用鲁棒子空间学习和区间刺穿的思想来近似解决共识最大化问题。第三，我们通过黎曼次梯度下降方法在单位四元数空间上细化了近似找到的共识集，我们证明了该共识在 $O(\varepsilon^{-4})$ 迭代中全局收敛到 $\varepsilon$ 驻点，或者在没有噪声的情况下以线性速率局部收敛到地面实况。我们将这些算法组合到$\texttt{ARCS+}$中，以同时搜索旋转和对应。实验表明，$\texttt{ARCS+}$ 在具有超过 $10^6$ 点的大型数据集上实现了最先进的性能，与替代方法相比，时间加速了 $10^4$。 \url{https://github.com/liangzu/ARCS} 本文提出了一种名为ARCS的高效算法，用于解决大规模3D点集的旋转对齐与对应搜索问题。 Liangzu Peng,Manolis C. Tsakiris,René Vidal cs.CV

authors_text: Yangyang Hu,Yang Yu
title: Enhancing Neural Mathematical Reasoning by Abductive Combination with Symbolic Library
title_zh: 通过与符号库的归纳结合增强神经数学推理
comment: Appeared in ICML 2020 Workshop on Bridge Between Perception and Reasoning: Graph Neural Networks & Beyond, Vienna, Austria, 2020. Code at https://agit.ai/Polixir/ABL-Sym | Video presentation available at https://slideslive.com/s/yangyang-hu-38188 | Online demonstration available at http://math.polixir.ai
comments: Appeared in ICML 2020 Workshop on Bridge Between Perception and Reasoning: Graph Neural Networks & Beyond, Vienna, Austria, 2020. Code at https://agit.ai/Polixir/ABL-Sym | Video presentation available at https://slideslive.com/s/yangyang-hu-38188 | Online demonstration available at http://math.polixir.ai
abstract: Mathematical reasoning recently has been shown as a hard challenge for neural systems. Abilities including expression translation, logical reasoning, and mathematics knowledge acquiring appear to be essential to overcome the challenge. This paper demonstrates that some abilities can be achieved through abductive combination with discrete systems that have been programmed with human knowledge. On a mathematical reasoning dataset, we adopt the recently proposed abductive learning framework, and propose the ABL-Sym algorithm that combines the Transformer neural models with a symbolic mathematics library. ABL-Sym shows 9.73% accuracy improvement on the interpolation tasks and 47.22% accuracy improvement on the extrapolation tasks, over the state-of-the-art approaches. Online demonstration: http://math.polixir.ai
summary: Mathematical reasoning recently has been shown as a hard challenge for neural systems. Abilities including expression translation, logical reasoning, and mathematics knowledge acquiring appear to be essential to overcome the challenge. This paper demonstrates that some abilities can be achieved through abductive combination with discrete systems that have been programmed with human knowledge. On a mathematical reasoning dataset, we adopt the recently proposed abductive learning framework, and propose the ABL-Sym algorithm that combines the Transformer neural models with a symbolic mathematics library. ABL-Sym shows 9.73% accuracy improvement on the interpolation tasks and 47.22% accuracy improvement on the extrapolation tasks, over the state-of-the-art approaches. Online demonstration: http://math.polixir.ai
abstract_zh: 最近，数学推理被证明是对神经系统的一项艰巨挑战。表达翻译、逻辑推理和数学知识获取等能力似乎对于克服这一挑战至关重要。本文证明，某些能力可以通过与用人类知识编程的离散系统进行溯因组合来实现。在数学推理数据集上，我们采用最近提出的溯因学习框架，并提出将 Transformer 神经模型与符号数学库相结合的 ABL-Sym 算法。与最先进的方法相比，ABL-Sym 的插值任务精度提高了 9.73%，外推任务精度提高了 47.22%。在线演示：http://math.polixir.ai

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABL-Sym算法，通过归纳学习框架将Transformer神经模型与符号数学库结合，以提升神经系统的数学推理能力。
AI.motivation: 数学推理对神经系统具有挑战性，现有方法在表达转换、逻辑推理和数学知识获取方面存在不足，需借助人类知识编程的符号系统增强能力。
AI.method: 采用归纳学习框架，设计ABL-Sym算法，将Transformer模型与符号数学库进行归纳组合，实现神经与符号系统的协同推理。
AI.result: 在数学推理数据集上，ABL-Sym在插值任务中提升9.73%准确率，在外推任务中提升47.22%准确率，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 神经与符号系统的归纳组合能显著提升数学推理能力，尤其在外推任务中表现突出，为混合符号-神经系统提供了有效实现路径。

authors_text: Shitong Luo,Jiahan Li,Jiaqi Guan,Yufeng Su,Chaoran Cheng,Jian Peng,Jianzhu Ma
title: Equivariant Point Cloud Analysis via Learning Orientations for Message Passing
title_zh: 通过消息传递学习方向进行等变点云分析
abstract: Equivariance has been a long-standing concern in various fields ranging from computer vision to physical modeling. Most previous methods struggle with generality, simplicity, and expressiveness -- some are designed ad hoc for specific data types, some are too complex to be accessible, and some sacrifice flexible transformations. In this work, we propose a novel and simple framework to achieve equivariance for point cloud analysis based on the message passing (graph neural network) scheme. We find the equivariant property could be obtained by introducing an orientation for each point to decouple the relative position for each point from the global pose of the entire point cloud. Therefore, we extend current message passing networks with a module that learns orientations for each point. Before aggregating information from the neighbors of a point, the networks transforms the neighbors' coordinates based on the point's learned orientations. We provide formal proofs to show the equivariance of the proposed framework. Empirically, we demonstrate that our proposed method is competitive on both point cloud analysis and physical modeling tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/luost26/Equivariant-OrientedMP .
summary: Equivariance has been a long-standing concern in various fields ranging from computer vision to physical modeling. Most previous methods struggle with generality, simplicity, and expressiveness -- some are designed ad hoc for specific data types, some are too complex to be accessible, and some sacrifice flexible transformations. In this work, we propose a novel and simple framework to achieve equivariance for point cloud analysis based on the message passing (graph neural network) scheme. We find the equivariant property could be obtained by introducing an orientation for each point to decouple the relative position for each point from the global pose of the entire point cloud. Therefore, we extend current message passing networks with a module that learns orientations for each point. Before aggregating information from the neighbors of a point, the networks transforms the neighbors' coordinates based on the point's learned orientations. We provide formal proofs to show the equivariance of the proposed framework. Empirically, we demonstrate that our proposed method is competitive on both point cloud analysis and physical modeling tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/luost26/Equivariant-OrientedMP .
abstract_zh: 等方差一直是从计算机视觉到物理建模等各个领域长期关注的问题。以前的大多数方法都在通用性、简单性和表现力方面遇到困难——有些是专门为特定数据类型设计的，有些太复杂而难以访问，有些则牺牲了灵活的转换。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖而简单的框架，以基于消息传递（图神经网络）方案实现点云分析的等方差。我们发现可以通过为每个点引入一个方向来获得等变属性，以将每个点的相对位置与整个点云的全局姿态解耦。因此，我们用一个学习每个点方向的模块来扩展当前的消息传递网络。在聚合来自某个点的邻居的信息之前，网络会根据该点学习到的方向来转换邻居的坐标。我们提供正式的证明来证明所提出的框架的等变性。根据经验，我们证明我们提出的方法在点云分析和物理建模任务上都具有竞争力。代码可在 https://github.com/luost26/Equivariant-OrientedMP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习方向的消息传递框架，用于实现点云分析中的等变性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在通用性、简洁性和表达性方面存在不足，难以灵活处理变换或适应不同数据类型。
AI.method: 通过为每个点学习方向，解耦点的相对位置与点云整体姿态，扩展消息传递网络以实现等变性。
AI.result: 在点云分析和物理建模任务中，该方法表现出竞争力，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架以简洁方式实现等变性，理论证明与实验结果验证了其有效性。

method: 通过为每个点学习方向，解耦点的相对位置与点云整体姿态，扩展消息传递网络以实现等变性。

search_text: Equivariant Point Cloud Analysis via Learning Orientations for Message Passing 通过消息传递学习方向进行等变点云分析 Equivariance has been a long-standing concern in various fields ranging from computer vision to physical modeling. Most previous methods struggle with generality, simplicity, and expressiveness -- some are designed ad hoc for specific data types, some are too complex to be accessible, and some sacrifice flexible transformations. In this work, we propose a novel and simple framework to achieve equivariance for point cloud analysis based on the message passing (graph neural network) scheme. We find the equivariant property could be obtained by introducing an orientation for each point to decouple the relative position for each point from the global pose of the entire point cloud. Therefore, we extend current message passing networks with a module that learns orientations for each point. Before aggregating information from the neighbors of a point, the networks transforms the neighbors' coordinates based on the point's learned orientations. We provide formal proofs to show the equivariance of the proposed framework. Empirically, we demonstrate that our proposed method is competitive on both point cloud analysis and physical modeling tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/luost26/Equivariant-OrientedMP . 等方差一直是从计算机视觉到物理建模等各个领域长期关注的问题。以前的大多数方法都在通用性、简单性和表现力方面遇到困难——有些是专门为特定数据类型设计的，有些太复杂而难以访问，有些则牺牲了灵活的转换。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖而简单的框架，以基于消息传递（图神经网络）方案实现点云分析的等方差。我们发现可以通过为每个点引入一个方向来获得等变属性，以将每个点的相对位置与整个点云的全局姿态解耦。因此，我们用一个学习每个点方向的模块来扩展当前的消息传递网络。在聚合来自某个点的邻居的信息之前，网络会根据该点学习到的方向来转换邻居的坐标。我们提供正式的证明来证明所提出的框架的等变性。根据经验，我们证明我们提出的方法在点云分析和物理建模任务上都具有竞争力。代码可在 https://github.com/luost26/Equivariant-OrientedMP 获取。 本文提出了一种基于学习方向的消息传递框架，用于实现点云分析中的等变性。 Shitong Luo,Jiahan Li,Jiaqi Guan,Yufeng Su,Chaoran Cheng,Jian Peng,Jianzhu Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Zike Lei,Xi Chen,Ying Tan,Xiang Chen,Li Chai
title: Optimization of Directional Landmark Deployment for Visual Observer on SE(3)
title_zh: SE上视觉观察者定向地标部署优化（3）
abstract: An optimization method is proposed in this paper for novel deployment of given number of directional landmarks (location and pose) within a given region in the 3-D task space. This new deployment technique is built on the geometric models of both landmarks and the monocular camera. In particular, a new concept of Multiple Coverage Probability (MCP) is defined to characterize the probability of at least n landmarks being covered simultaneously by a camera at a fixed position. The optimization is conducted with respect to the position and pose of the given number of landmarks to maximize MCP through globally exploration of the given 3-D space. By adopting the elimination genetic algorithm, the global optimal solutions can be obtained, which are then applied to improve the convergent performance of the visual observer on SE(3) as a demonstration example. Both simulation and experimental results are presented to validate the effectiveness of the proposed landmark deployment optimization method.
summary: An optimization method is proposed in this paper for novel deployment of given number of directional landmarks (location and pose) within a given region in the 3-D task space. This new deployment technique is built on the geometric models of both landmarks and the monocular camera. In particular, a new concept of Multiple Coverage Probability (MCP) is defined to characterize the probability of at least n landmarks being covered simultaneously by a camera at a fixed position. The optimization is conducted with respect to the position and pose of the given number of landmarks to maximize MCP through globally exploration of the given 3-D space. By adopting the elimination genetic algorithm, the global optimal solutions can be obtained, which are then applied to improve the convergent performance of the visual observer on SE(3) as a demonstration example. Both simulation and experimental results are presented to validate the effectiveness of the proposed landmark deployment optimization method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种优化方法，用于在 3D 任务空间的给定区域内新颖地部署给定数量的方向性地标（位置和姿态）。这种新的部署技术建立在地标和单目相机的几何模型之上。特别地，定义了多重覆盖概率（MCP）的新概念来表征固定位置处的相机同时覆盖至少n个地标的概率。针对给定数量的地标的位置和姿态进行优化，以通过对给定 3-D 空间的全局探索来最大化 MCP。通过采用消除遗传算法，可以获得全局最优解，然后将其应用于提高SE(3)上视觉观察器的收敛性能作为示范例子。仿真和实验结果都验证了所提出的地标部署优化方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在三维任务空间内优化定向地标部署的方法，通过最大化多覆盖概率（MCP）提升视觉观测器在SE(3)上的收敛性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉观测器在复杂三维环境中的收敛性能受限于地标部署策略，需通过优化地标位置与姿态提升覆盖概率以增强观测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于地标与单目相机的几何模型，定义多覆盖概率（MCP）指标，采用消除遗传算法在三维空间中全局搜索最优地标部署方案。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证表明，该方法能有效提升视觉观测器在SE(3)空间中的收敛效率与观测精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化地标部署策略可显著增强视觉观测器性能，所提方法为三维空间中的视觉导航与定位提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Hari Shankar,Adithya Narayan,Shefali Jain,Divya Singh,Pooja Vyas,Nivedita Hegde,Purbayan Kar,Abhi Lad,Jens Thang,Jagruthi Atada,Duy Nguyen,PS Roopa,Akhila Vasudeva,Prathima Radhakrishnan,Sripad Krishna Devalla
title: Leveraging Clinically Relevant Biometric Constraints To Supervise A Deep Learning Model For The Accurate Caliper Placement To Obtain Sonographic Measurements Of The Fetal Brain
title_zh: 利用临床相关的生物识别约束来监督深度学习模型，以实现卡尺的准确放置，从而获得胎儿大脑的超声测量结果
comment: Accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
comments: Accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: Multiple studies have demonstrated that obtaining standardized fetal brain biometry from mid-trimester ultrasonography (USG) examination is key for the reliable assessment of fetal neurodevelopment and the screening of central nervous system (CNS) anomalies. Obtaining these measurements is highly subjective, expertise-driven, and requires years of training experience, limiting quality prenatal care for all pregnant mothers. In this study, we propose a deep learning (DL) approach to compute 3 key fetal brain biometry from the 2D USG images of the transcerebellar plane (TC) through the accurate and automated caliper placement (2 per biometry) by modeling it as a landmark detection problem. We leveraged clinically relevant biometric constraints (relationship between caliper points) and domain-relevant data augmentation to improve the accuracy of a U-Net DL model (trained/tested on: 596 images, 473 subjects/143 images, 143 subjects). We performed multiple experiments demonstrating the effect of the DL backbone, data augmentation, generalizability and benchmarked against a recent state-of-the-art approach through extensive clinical validation (DL vs. 7 experienced clinicians). For all cases, the mean errors in the placement of the individual caliper points and the computed biometry were comparable to error rates among clinicians. The clinical translation of the proposed framework can assist novice users from low-resource settings in the reliable and standardized assessment of fetal brain sonograms.
summary: Multiple studies have demonstrated that obtaining standardized fetal brain biometry from mid-trimester ultrasonography (USG) examination is key for the reliable assessment of fetal neurodevelopment and the screening of central nervous system (CNS) anomalies. Obtaining these measurements is highly subjective, expertise-driven, and requires years of training experience, limiting quality prenatal care for all pregnant mothers. In this study, we propose a deep learning (DL) approach to compute 3 key fetal brain biometry from the 2D USG images of the transcerebellar plane (TC) through the accurate and automated caliper placement (2 per biometry) by modeling it as a landmark detection problem. We leveraged clinically relevant biometric constraints (relationship between caliper points) and domain-relevant data augmentation to improve the accuracy of a U-Net DL model (trained/tested on: 596 images, 473 subjects/143 images, 143 subjects). We performed multiple experiments demonstrating the effect of the DL backbone, data augmentation, generalizability and benchmarked against a recent state-of-the-art approach through extensive clinical validation (DL vs. 7 experienced clinicians). For all cases, the mean errors in the placement of the individual caliper points and the computed biometry were comparable to error rates among clinicians. The clinical translation of the proposed framework can assist novice users from low-resource settings in the reliable and standardized assessment of fetal brain sonograms.
abstract_zh: 多项研究表明，从孕中期超声检查（USG）检查中获得标准化的胎儿脑生物测定是可靠评估胎儿神经发育和筛查中枢神经系统（CNS）异常的关键。获得这些测量结果是高度主观的、由专业知识驱动的，并且需要多年的培训经验，限制了所有怀孕母亲的高质量产前护理。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种深度学习 (DL) 方法，通过准确和自动的卡尺放置（每个生物测量 2 个），将其建模为标志性检测问题，根据小脑平面 (TC) 的 2D USG 图像计算 3 个关键的胎儿大脑生物测量。我们利用临床相关的生物识别约束（卡尺点之间的关系）和领域相关的数据增强来提高 U-Net DL 模型的准确性（训练/测试：596 个图像，473 个受试者/143 个图像，143 个受试者）。我们进行了多项实验，证明了 DL 主干、数据增强、普遍性的效果，并通过广泛的临床验证（DL 与 7 位经验丰富的临床医生）对最近最先进的方法进行了基准测试。对于所有情况，各个卡尺点的放置和计算生物测量的平均误差与临床医生的误差率相当。所提出的框架的临床转化可以帮助资源匮乏环境中的新手用户对胎儿脑部超声图进行可靠和标准化的评估。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于深度学习的方法，通过准确自动放置标尺来计算胎儿脑部三个关键生物测量值，以提高超声检查的标准化和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前胎儿脑部生物测量依赖专家主观判断，需多年经验，限制了所有孕妇获得高质量产前护理的机会，尤其在资源匮乏地区。
AI.method: 采用U-Net深度学习模型，将标尺放置建模为关键点检测问题，并结合临床相关生物约束关系及领域特定数据增强技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在标尺点放置和生物测量计算的平均误差与7位经验丰富的临床医生相当，且在不同数据集上表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可辅助资源匮乏地区的初级用户实现胎儿脑部超声图像的标准化评估，具有重要的临床转化价值。

We performed multiple experiments demonstrating the effect of the DL backbone, data augmentation, generalizability and benchmarked against a recent state-of-the-art approach through extensive clinical validation (DL vs. 7 experienced clinicians). For all cases, the mean errors in the placement of the individual caliper points and the computed biometry were comparable to error rates among clinicians. The clinical translation of the proposed framework can assist novice users from low-resource settings in the reliable and standardized assessment of fetal brain sonograms. 多项研究表明，从孕中期超声检查（USG）检查中获得标准化的胎儿脑生物测定是可靠评估胎儿神经发育和筛查中枢神经系统（CNS）异常的关键。获得这些测量结果是高度主观的、由专业知识驱动的，并且需要多年的培训经验，限制了所有怀孕母亲的高质量产前护理。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种深度学习 (DL) 方法，通过准确和自动的卡尺放置（每个生物测量 2 个），将其建模为标志性检测问题，根据小脑平面 (TC) 的 2D USG 图像计算 3 个关键的胎儿大脑生物测量。我们利用临床相关的生物识别约束（卡尺点之间的关系）和领域相关的数据增强来提高 U-Net DL 模型的准确性（训练/测试：596 个图像，473 个受试者/143 个图像，143 个受试者）。我们进行了多项实验，证明了 DL 主干、数据增强、普遍性的效果，并通过广泛的临床验证（DL 与 7 位经验丰富的临床医生）对最近最先进的方法进行了基准测试。对于所有情况，各个卡尺点的放置和计算生物测量的平均误差与临床医生的误差率相当。所提出的框架的临床转化可以帮助资源匮乏环境中的新手用户对胎儿脑部超声图进行可靠和标准化的评估。 本研究提出一种基于深度学习的方法，通过准确自动放置标尺来计算胎儿脑部三个关键生物测量值，以提高超声检查的标准化和可靠性。 Hari Shankar,Adithya Narayan,Shefali Jain,Divya Singh,Pooja Vyas,Nivedita Hegde,Purbayan Kar,Abhi Lad,Jens Thang,Jagruthi Atada,Duy Nguyen,PS Roopa,Akhila Vasudeva,Prathima Radhakrishnan,Sripad Krishna Devalla eess.IV,cs.CV
